A proximity-preserving embedding space is constructed to encode reasoning chain-response dynamics, enabling planning via gradient descent or reinforcement learning. Our method supports multi-scale abstraction, allowing reasoning chain edits at token, segment, and instruction levels to be integrated into a unified planner. Through extensive experiments on language understanding and generation tasks, we demonstrate that Thoughts-as-Planning outperforms state-of-the-art reasoning chain tuning baselines in efficiency, robustness, and generalization, while offering interpretability through its structured planning trajectory. Our code is available at https://github.com/FastLM/Thoughts-as-Planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Thoughts-as-Planning框架，将推理链优化形式化为潜在语义空间上的序列决策过程，通过学习潜在世界模型和构建近邻保持嵌入空间，实现基于梯度下降或强化学习的规划，在多尺度抽象上统一了token、segment和instruction级别的推理链编辑，实验表明该方法在效率、鲁棒性和泛化性上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有推理链优化方法依赖黑盒启发式或无梯度搜索，缺乏可解释性、泛化能力和样本效率。
AI.method: 将LLM建模为部分可观测环境，学习潜在世界模型模拟推理链编辑对下游输出的影响；构建近邻保持嵌入空间编码推理链-响应动态；支持token、segment和instruction多尺度抽象的统一规划，可通过梯度下降或强化学习进行规划。
AI.result: 在语言理解和生成任务上，该方法在效率、鲁棒性和泛化性上均优于现有的推理链调优基线方法，且具有结构化规划轨迹带来的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: Thoughts-as-Planning通过将推理链优化问题形式化为可规划的序列决策过程，有效提升了推理链调优的性能和可解释性，代码已开源。

title: Motion-guided sparse correction enables expert-quality point tracking across diverse microscopy regimes
summary: Tracking the dynamics of non-canonical biological systems in microscopy videos remains a persistent challenge. Both classical and learning-based trackers depend on expert-reviewed data to be evaluated and adapted, yet exhaustive manual annotation rarely scales to the videos where these tools are needed most. We developed RIPPLE (Refinement Interpolation Platform for Point Location Estimation), which recasts annotation as sparse correction: a user clicks a starting point, RIPPLE proposes a full trajectory, and the user intervenes only where the trajectory drifts. We tested RIPPLE on five challenging microscopy datasets from our laboratories, four from the transparent jellyfish Clytia hemisphaerica and one tracking landmarks on rapidly moving sperm. Across these, RIPPLE matched the quality of exhaustive manual annotation while reducing manual clicks by 3 to 25 times across datasets. RIPPLE thereby fills a missing layer between manual annotation and fully automated tracking, enabling immediate quantification of biological dynamics, method benchmarking, and the production of the gold-standard data needed to adapt future automated microscopy trackers.

AI.tldr: RIPPLE是一种通过稀疏修正实现高效轨迹标注的工具，在多个显微镜数据集上将人工点击量减少3-25倍，同时保持与详尽人工标注相当的质量。
AI.motivation: 显微镜视频中非经典生物系统的动态追踪面临挑战，现有追踪器依赖专家评审数据，但详尽的人工标注难以规模化，因此需要一种更高效的标注方法。
AI.method: 提出RIPPLE（精炼插值平台用于点位置估计），将标注重构为稀疏修正：用户点击起始点，RIPPLE提出完整轨迹，用户仅在轨迹偏离时进行干预修正。
AI.result: 在五个具有挑战性的显微镜数据集上（四个来自透明水螅Clytia hemisphaerica，一个追踪快速移动精子上的标志点），RIPPLE达到了与详尽人工标注相当的质量，同时将人工点击量减少了3至25倍。
AI.conclusion: RIPPLE填补了人工标注与全自动追踪之间的空白，能够即时量化生物动态、进行方法基准测试，并生成未来自动化显微镜追踪器所需的金标准数据。

title: Spectral Guidance for Flexible and Efficient Control of Diffusion Models
summary: We introduce Spectral Guidance, a framework for controlling diffusion models by leveraging the intrinsic geometry of the generative process. As data is progressively corrupted by noise, only a small number of features remain informative for control. We characterize them as the singular functions of a conditional expectation operator and show that they can be learned via a self-supervised objective. Once recovered, this basis enables the projection of arbitrary guidance signals, such as labels, CLIP embeddings, or masks, directly onto the sampling trajectory. This approach allows for stable, high-fidelity control without retraining or denoiser backpropagation during sampling. Empirically, we improve conditional accuracy on CIFAR-10 by 37 percentage points over the strongest training-free baseline while offering $4\times$ faster sampling. Moreover, the same representations that support label and CLIP guidance also enable spatial control, such as mask-based guidance, without auxiliary models. Finally, our framework reveals a phase transition in the generative process, pinpointing the optimal time window for effective guidance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Spectral Guidance框架，利用生成过程的几何结构来控制扩散模型，通过条件期望算子的奇异函数学习低维控制基，实现无需重训练或反向传播的稳定、高保真控制，在CIFAR-10上条件准确率提升37个百分点，采样速度提升4倍，并揭示了生成过程中的相变现象。
AI.motivation: 扩散模型在生成过程中，数据逐渐被噪声破坏，仅有少量特征保持信息量，如何有效利用这些特征实现高效、稳定的控制是一个关键问题。现有方法要么需要重训练，要么在采样时进行耗时的去噪器反向传播。
AI.method: 通过条件期望算子的奇异函数（singular functions）来刻画生成过程中保持信息的关键特征，并利用自监督目标学习这些特征。学习到的基可以将任意引导信号（如标签、CLIP嵌入、掩码）直接投影到采样轨迹上，无需重训练或反向传播。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上，条件准确率相比最强无训练基线提升37个百分点，采样速度提升4倍。同一组表征同时支持标签引导、CLIP引导以及空间控制（如基于掩码的引导），无需辅助模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架揭示了生成过程中的相变现象，精确定位了有效引导的最优时间窗口，为扩散模型的高效控制提供了理论基础和实用方法。

title: Robust and Efficient Guardrails with Latent Reasoning
summary: Maintaining the safety of large language models (LLMs) is crucial as they are increasingly deployed in real-world applications. Existing safety guardrails typically rely on single-pass classification or, more recently, distilled reasoning. Reasoning-based guardrails significantly outperform classification-only baselines, but they incur substantial query latency and token overhead that make them impractical for highthroughput deployment. To address this challenge, we propose COLAGUARD, a guardrail model that transfers multi-step safety reasoning into a continuous latent space through a stage-wise training curriculum, enabling direct hidden-state propagation at inference. Evaluated on ten prompt- and response-moderation settings spanning eight safety benchmarks, COLAGUARD improves macro-F1 by 8.24 points over Llama Guard 3 and matches our explicit reasoning baseline, GuardReasoner, in macroF1 while delivering a 12.9X speedup and 22.4X reduction in token usage. Our results suggest that latent reasoning offers a practical alternative to explicit rationale generation for deployable guardrails, jointly improving safety robustness and inference efficiency rather than treating them as competing objectives.

AI.tldr: 提出COLAGUARD，通过将多步安全推理转移到连续潜空间，实现高效的安全护栏，在保持与推理基线相当性能的同时，获得12.9倍加速和22.4倍token减少。
AI.motivation: 现有推理型安全护栏（如GuardReasoner）性能优于分类基线，但推理延迟和token开销过高，难以支持高吞吐部署。
AI.method: 通过阶段式训练课程将多步安全推理转移到连续潜空间，推理时直接传播隐状态，避免显式生成推理链。
AI.result: 在8个安全基准的10种设置上，相比Llama Guard 3提升8.24个macro-F1点，匹配GuardReasoner性能的同时实现12.9倍加速和22.4倍token减少。
AI.conclusion: 潜推理可作为显式推理的实用替代方案，同时提升安全鲁棒性和推理效率，而非将二者视为竞争目标。

title: GPF-LiveNews: A Streaming Evaluation Protocol for Group-Conditioned Framing in Large Language Models
summary: Deployed language models are evaluated in a non-stationary environment: model versions, retrieval layers, safety systems, and real-world inputs all change over time. Static bias benchmarks remain useful, but they do not show how models frame newly emerging events for different prompted audiences. We introduce GPF-LIVENEWS, a streaming evaluation protocol and benchmark snapshot for auditing group-conditioned framing in open-ended LLM outputs. The protocol expands fresh BBC/Reuters news anchors across 42 identity labels and seven prompt families, then evaluates response bundles using semantic-sensitivity and sentiment-disparity signals. In a pilot over 12 monitoring runs and 23 hosted models, Policy/Action prompts produce the strongest semantic movement, while sentiment variation is flatter across dimensions and prompt families. The released artifact includes article metadata, prompt templates, instantiated prompts, model-output metadata, score tables, documentation, and reproduction scripts. We interpret all scores as observed-window audit signals for human review, not as permanent fairness rankings or direct proof of harmful bias.

AI.tldr: 提出了GPF-LIVENEWS，一个用于审计大语言模型在不同受众群体条件下如何框架化新兴事件的流式评估协议和基准数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有静态偏见基准无法捕捉模型在非平稳环境（模型版本、检索层、安全系统、真实世界输入随时间变化）中如何针对不同受众群体框架化新兴事件。
AI.method: 扩展BBC/Reuters新闻锚点，覆盖42个身份标签和7类提示模板，通过语义敏感性和情感差异信号评估模型输出束。
AI.result: 在12次监控运行和23个托管模型的试点中，Policy/Action提示产生最强的语义位移，而情感差异在各维度和提示家族中较为平坦。
AI.conclusion: 所有评分应解释为观察窗口内的审计信号供人工审查，而非永久性公平排名或有害偏见的直接证据。

title: An Approach for Thyroid Nodule Analysis Using Thermographic Images
summary: Thyroid cancer is said to be the second most common type of cancer in female individuals and the third in males by 2030, according to projections. In general, detecting cancer in its early stages improves the chance of survival of the individual. Thermography is a diagnostic tool that has been increasingly used to detect cancer and abnormalities, including that of thyroid. Various methods to segment and detect hot regions in thermograms and, consequently, to detect suspicious tissues present in these images have been proposed. It is well known that medical diagnosis yields a great deal of information. Thus, physicians have to comprehensively analyse and evaluate this information in a short period of time, which is infeasible in most cases. In this work, we perform a general review of thermography , focusing on the thyroid analysis. We propose protocols for image acquisiton and an autonomous registration for thyroid images. We also perform analyses of the image data, which include feature extraction, image processing, and a possible approach for classification of healthy or unhealthy patients. In summary, this work presents a pilot project for detection of tumors in our university hospital, which is part of an effort to support preventive medical actions in our endocrinology department. Under some future adjustments, this project will be submitted for approval by the ethics and research committee of Hospital Universitário Antonio Pedro at Universidade Federal Fluminense (HUAP-UFF) and to the Brazilian Ministry of Health Ethical committee under the name: Evaluation of the importance of thermography to aid diagnosis of thyroid nodules of patients in HUAP-UFF (in Portuguese: Avaliação da importância da termografia no auxílio à investigação diagnóstica de nódulos tireoidianos em pacientes acompanhados no HUAP-UFF).

AI.tldr: 本文综述了甲状腺热成像技术，提出了图像采集协议、自主配准方法及特征提取与分类方法，旨在为大学医院开发肿瘤检测试点项目，以支持预防性医疗行动。
AI.motivation: 甲状腺癌发病率预计上升，早期检测可提高生存率；热成像作为一种非侵入性诊断工具具有潜力，但现有方法在图像配准、自动化分析等方面仍存在不足，且临床信息量大、医生难以全面快速分析。
AI.method: 对甲状腺热成像进行综述；提出图像采集协议；设计自主图像配准方法；进行特征提取与图像处理；探索健康/非健康分类方法。
AI.result: 提出了一个完整的甲状腺热成像分析流程，包括采集、配准、特征提取和分类，并建立了大学医院的试点项目框架。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为甲状腺热成像辅助诊断提供了基础框架，未来经伦理委员会批准后将正式开展临床研究，有望支持内分泌科的预防性医疗。

title: Sequential Physics-Constrained Neural Operator Forward Modeling for the $\textit{Norne}$ Reservoir System
comment: 22 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Code available at https://github.com/clementetienam/physicsnemo/tree/801a85bc08aa9caa0d54027a145b88c68e5e5f36/examples/reservoir_simulation/norne
summary: We develop a comprehensive mathematical and computational framework for sequential surrogate modeling of three-phase black-oil reservoir dynamics using neural operators, with particular emphasis on Fourier Neural Operators (FNO) and their physics-informed variant (PINO). The application focus is the Norne benchmark reservoir, defined on a heterogeneous $46\times112\times22$ grid ($N=113,344$ cells), with a production history spanning $T=30$ timesteps covering 3298 days. Our theoretical contributions are organized around four interlocking problems: (1) functional-analytic formulation in a product-Sobolev-space setting, including well-posedness of the implicit timestep map and sharp local Lipschitz estimates; (2) covariate shift quantification, proving that the Wasserstein-2 distance grows as $W_2 \leq \varepsilon(L^n-1)/(L-1)$, with exponential population-risk discrepancy for $L>1$; (3) physics-constrained spectral stability, showing PINO training with $λ_R \geq λ^*_R$ reduces the learned Jacobian spectral radius to $ρ_F + Cλ_R^{-1/2}$, yielding uniform-in-time rollout error $|δ_n| \leq \varepsilon/(1-ρ)$; and (4) $K$-step TBPTT gradient analysis, deriving geometric bias decay $O(ρ^K)$, optimal window $K^ = O(\log(T/σ^2))$, and Adam convergence $O(1/\sqrt{t}) + O(ρ^{K^*})$. Empirical validation confirms all theoretical predictions: autoregressive PINO surrogates sustain $R^2>0.99$ (oil), $R^2>0.90$ (gas), $R^2\approx 0.80$ (pressure), and monotonically improving $R^2$ (water) across the full 3298-day horizon, trained on eight NVIDIA B200 GPUs in under one hour. A 1000-member ensemble runs in under one minute on a single B200 GPU, giving a ${\sim}10^4\times$ wall-clock speedup over the OPM finite-volume simulator.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了基于神经算子（FNO/PINO）的三相黑油储层序贯代理模型理论框架，在Norne基准油藏（113,344网格，3298天）上验证了：1) 乘积Sobolev空间中的泛函分析适定性；2) Wasserstein-2距离的指数增长上界；3) PINO训练中谱半径约束保证均匀时间步误差；4) K步TBPTT梯度的几何衰减与Adam收敛性。自回归PINO代理在单GPU上实现~10⁴倍加速，油相R²>0.99、气相R²>0.90、压力R²≈0.80、水相R²单调提升。
AI.motivation: 传统油藏数值模拟（如OPM有限体积法）计算成本极高，难以支持大规模不确定性量化（如千级集合模拟）。作者旨在开发一种兼具理论严谨性与计算效率的神经算子代理模型，解决序贯模拟中的累积误差、分布偏移和训练稳定性等核心问题。
AI.method: 1) 建立隐式时间步映射在乘积Sobolev空间中的适定性与局部Lipschitz估计；2) 量化协变量偏移，证明Wasserstein-2距离的指数增长界；3) 提出物理约束谱稳定性条件（λ_R ≥ λ*_R），证明谱半径压缩与均匀时间步误差界；4) 推导K步TBPTT梯度分析的几何偏差衰减与最优窗口K*。在Norne油藏上使用8块NVIDIA B200 GPU训练PINO。
AI.result: 自回归PINO在3298天全预测窗口上：油相R²>0.99、气相R²>0.90、压力R²≈0.80、水相R²单调提升。1000成员集合模拟在单块B200 GPU上<1分钟，较OPM有限体积模拟器获得~10⁴倍墙钟加速。训练时间<1小时（8×B200 GPU）。
AI.conclusion: 理论分析与实验验证一致表明，所提出的物理约束神经算子框架能实现高精度、长时稳定的序贯代理模拟，且计算效率提升显著，为大规模油藏不确定性量化提供了可行方案。关键理论贡献包括协变量偏移谱界、物理约束谱半径压缩以及TBPTT最优窗口选择准则。

title: Bridging the Sim-to-Real Gap in Reinforcement Learning-Based Industrial Dispatching through Execution Semantics
comment: Accepted for publication at the 24th IEEE International Conference on Industrial Informatics (INDIN 2026), held from 26 to 29 July 2026 in Melbourne, Australia
summary:
Event-driven scheduling policies are increasingly deployed in industrial environments, where decisions are made under asynchronous and partially observed system states. As a result, decision states are not temporally consistent, action admissibility is not explicitly defined, and the origin of execution errors remains ambiguous. These issues limit both reliability and interpretability.
  To address this gap, a policy-neutral execution and measurement layer is proposed to mediate between scheduling policies and the industrial execution environment. The layer constructs decision-valid snapshots from asynchronous event streams, defines a standardized execution contract with explicit action admissibility, and records outcomes as divergences between policy intent, transactional outcomes, physical execution, and human intervention. This enables a separation between decision semantics and execution behavior and makes deployment mismatch observable and structurally attributable.
  The proposed framework is evaluated using a discrete-event simulation. The results show analytical benefits across all observation lag regimes, as undifferentiated execution failures are transformed into structured, typed outcomes with full attribution coverage. Operational benefits are strongest under low observation lag, where avoidable execution errors can be prevented before commitment. Overall, the layer turns execution uncertainty into supervisory data for evaluation and policy refinement.

AI.tldr: 提出一个策略无关的执行与测量层，用于解耦事件驱动调度策略与工业执行环境，将未定义的执行不确定性转化为可结构化和可归因的监督数据。
AI.motivation: 现有事件驱动调度策略在异步、部分可观测的工业环境中面临决策状态不一致、动作可采纳性未明确定义、执行错误来源模糊等问题，限制了系统的可靠性与可解释性。
AI.method: 提出一个策略无关的执行与测量层，作为调度策略与工业执行环境的中介。该层从异步事件流构建决策有效的快照，定义带有显式动作可采纳性的标准化执行合约，并将执行结果记录为策略意图、事务结果、物理执行和人为干预之间的偏差。
AI.result: 通过离散事件仿真评估，在所有观测延迟场景下均展现分析性收益，将未区分的执行失败转化为结构化、带类型的输出并实现完全归因覆盖。低观测延迟下操作性收益最强，可避免的执行错误能在提交前被阻止。
AI.conclusion: 该层将执行不确定性转化为可用于评估和策略优化的监督数据，实现了决策语义与执行行为的分离，并使部署不匹配变得可观测和可归因。

title: Large language models reorganize representational geometry during in-context learning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) exhibit remarkable flexibility: they can adapt to novel tasks from in-context examples without any parameter updates, a capability known as in-context learning (ICL). Prior work on synthetic tasks has shown that ICL can implement specific algorithms, demonstrating architectural competence, and mechanistic analyses have identified key circuits that support this behavior. However, because in-context computation -- regardless of its algorithmic form -- relies on transformations in high-dimensional representation space, it remains unclear how the geometry of that space shapes ICL effectiveness. Motivated by the neuroscience view of classification as the untangling of neural representations, we hypothesize that ICL depends on the successful online untangling of task-relevant representations. To test this idea, we study how LLMs classify in-context examples whose labels are defined by the model's own internal representations with known structure. We show that ICL performance correlates systematically with the representational structure of the underlying classification task and that successful ICL is accompanied by geometric reorganization that increases online separability. We further find that LLM behavior is well described by a prototype-like algorithm that integrates evidence while reshaping representations to support classification. These findings offer a geometric account of ICL in pretrained LLMs, establish representational geometry as a mechanistic constraint on ICL, and quantify the gap between what pretrained representations afford and what in-context learning can exploit.

AI.tldr: 本文从几何角度研究大语言模型的上下文学习能力，发现ICL的效果与表征空间的在线可分离性（untangling）密切相关，并揭示了一种原型聚类式的证据整合机制。
AI.motivation: 现有研究虽已发现ICL能实现特定算法并识别出关键神经回路，但缺乏对高维表征空间中几何结构如何约束ICL有效性的理解。受神经科学中"分类即解缠神经表征"观点的启发，作者假设ICL依赖于任务相关表征的在线解缠。
AI.method: 利用模型自身内部表征具有已知结构的分类任务（即标签由模型内部表征定义），系统分析ICL性能与表征几何结构之间的关联，并观测在线分类过程中的表征重组。
AI.result: ICL性能与底层分类任务的表征结构存在系统性相关；成功的ICL伴随表征的几何重组，提高了在线可分离性；LLM的行为可由一种原型聚类算法很好地描述。
AI.conclusion: 为预训练LLM中的ICL提供了几何层面的解释，建立了表征几何作为ICL的机制性约束，并量化了预训练表征的潜力与ICL实际可利用能力之间的差距。

title: Toward Ethical Facial Age Estimation: A Generalized Zero-Shot Benchmark Without Training on Children's Data
summary: Age estimation from facial images typically relies on training data that includes images of minors, a practice that raises serious ethical, legal, and privacy concerns. In this work, we propose a generalized zero-shot benchmark for facial age estimation that explicitly excludes children's data during training while still assessing model performance on younger populations. We revisit six widely used datasets and introduce standardized splits with strict age-group separation: samples aged 18-59 for training, validation, and testing; samples under 18 reserved exclusively for zero-shot evaluation; and samples 60+ as an unseen validation set for model selection under distribution shift. For datasets with identity annotations, subject-exclusive splits prevent identity leakage and better reflect real-world deployment conditions. Evaluating nine state-of-the-art age estimation methods under this protocol reveals that all evaluated methods consistently fail to generalize to unseen age groups, suffering substantial performance degradation -- on average 46.4%, and up to 52.8% -- relative to the supervised baseline. Moreover, models do not simply degrade: they systematically anchor predictions for unseen ages to nearby seen classes, a manifestation of the well-known seen-class bias in generalized zero-shot learning. By formalizing age estimation without children's data as a generalized zero-shot benchmark on existing datasets, this work highlights a critical gap between current modeling practices and real-world ethical constraints. Our benchmark provides a principled basis for evaluating models under restricted data regimes and encourages the development of methods that are robust to distribution shift and aligned with responsible data use.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向面部年龄估计的广义零样本基准，在训练时完全排除儿童数据（<18岁），但仍评估模型对年轻人群的预测能力。实验表明，九种现有方法在零样本设置下性能平均下降46.4%，且存在明显的"已见类别偏差"问题。
AI.motivation: 现有年龄估计方法依赖包含儿童图像的训练数据，这引发了严重的伦理、法律和隐私问题。作者希望在不使用儿童数据的前提下，仍能评估模型对年轻人群的年龄估计能力，从而弥合当前建模实践与现实伦理约束之间的差距。
AI.method: 对六个广泛使用的数据集进行标准化拆分：18-59岁用于训练/验证/测试，<18岁专用于零样本评估，60+作为分布偏移下的未见验证集。对于含身份标注的数据集，采用身份排除划分以防止身份泄露。在此协议下评估了九种最先进的年龄估计方法。
AI.result: 所有评估方法在零样本年龄组上均表现失败，性能相对监督基线平均下降46.4%，最高达52.8%。模型并非随机退化，而是系统性地将未见年龄的预测锚定到邻近的已见类别，表现出典型的"已见类别偏差"。
AI.conclusion: 该基准揭示了当前年龄估计模型在受限数据场景下的严重不足，为评估面向伦理约束的年龄估计方法提供了原则性框架，并鼓励开发对分布偏移鲁棒且符合负责任数据使用原则的新方法。

title: Cycle-Space Informed Detection of Autoencoded Blind False Data Injection Attacks on Power Systems
summary: The rapid growth of AI-driven data centers and large-scale energy storage systems is increasing the reliance of power system operation on real-time measurement data and automated decision-making. However, many existing detection methods rely on statistical or data-driven analysis of measurements and can fail when attackers exploit the same data structure to craft stealthy perturbations. To illustrate this limitation, we demonstrate a blind False Data Injection Attack (FDIA) in which an Autoencoder learns the measurement manifold and generates perturbations aligned with the Jacobian null space, thereby allowing the attack to evade both residual-based baddata detectors and time-series anomaly detectors. To mitigate data-driven FDIAs which exploit the null space, we propose a topology-informed Cycle-Space Detector (CSD) that leverages the Cycle-Space of the network to impose structural constraints that enhance null space estimation. In addition, we prove that by using the Minimum Cycle Basis (MCB), the proposed CSD achieves the optimal generalization error for attack detection. By exploiting topology-derived cycle constraints rather than relying solely on numerical null space estimation, the proposed method does not require precise line parameters and improves the separation between normal and attacked measurements. Simulation results on IEEE 14-, 30-, 57-, and 118-bus systems demonstrate that the proposed method effectively detects data-driven FDIAs under realistic measurement noise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种拓扑感知的环空间检测器（CSD），利用电网的最小环基（MCB）施加结构约束，以检测数据驱动的盲虚假数据注入攻击（FDIA），无需精确线路参数，并在多种IEEE标准系统中验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于统计或数据驱动的检测方法在面对攻击者利用相同数据结构构造隐蔽扰动时容易失效，亟需一种不依赖纯数值方法、利用物理拓扑约束的检测机制。
AI.method: 提出拓扑感知的环空间检测器（CSD），利用电网的环空间（Cycle-Space）施加结构约束；通过最小环基（MCB）优化检测的泛化误差，不依赖精确线路参数，增强正常与攻击测量的分离度。
AI.result: 在IEEE 14、30、57、118节点系统上的仿真结果表明，所提方法在存在实际测量噪声的条件下能有效检测数据驱动的FDIA。
AI.conclusion: 利用拓扑衍生的环约束而非纯数值空域估计，CSD在检测性能上具有理论最优泛化误差，并适用于实际电力系统场景。

title: The Importance of Out-of-Band Metadata for Safe Autonomous Agents: The Redpanda Agentic Data Plane
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure. Published at SAO '26 (co-located with ACM CAIS '26)
summary:
AI agents are increasingly expected to operate as digital employees: accessing enterprise data, making decisions, and taking actions autonomously. But agents are simultaneously less predictable than humans -- prone to hallucination, misinterpretation, and adversarial manipulation -- and more technically capable: with deep system knowledge and high-throughput interfaces cascading damage at machine speed. This combination makes it unsafe to rely on agents to faithfully interpret or propagate security-critical metadata such as access policies, data classifications, and behavioral constraints.
  We present the Redpanda Agentic Data Plane (ADP), an architecture built around out-of-band metadata channels: infrastructure pathways that carry security context, policy signals, and audit trails deterministically, entirely outside the agent's read and write path and across heterogeneous infrastructure. These channels enforce governance at every stage of the agent lifecycle -- scoping data access on the way in, constraining actions during execution, and capturing tamper-proof transcripts on the way out.
  We demonstrate ADP with a multi-agent portfolio rebalancing system in which autonomous agents monitor markets, make trade decisions, and execute orders across isolated client accounts -- with per-client data scoping, trade approval thresholds, and tamper-proof audit trails all enforced by out-of-band channels the agents can neither see nor bypass.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Redpanda Agentic Data Plane (ADP)架构，通过带外元数据通道在代理生命周期各阶段强制执行安全治理，解决AI代理在自主操作中因不可预测性和高速级联损害带来的安全风险。
AI.motivation: AI代理作为数字员工具有不可预测性（幻觉、误读、对抗操控）与高能力（深度系统知识、高速接口）的矛盾组合，导致依赖代理自身解释或传播安全关键元数据（如访问策略、数据分类、行为约束）存在安全隐患。
AI.method: 提出带外元数据通道（out-of-band metadata channels）架构：在代理读写路径之外，通过基础设施通道确定性传递安全上下文、策略信号和审计线索，跨越异构基础设施，在数据接入时限定权限、执行时约束行为、输出时捕获防篡改记录。
AI.result: 通过多代理投资组合再平衡系统验证：代理可在跨隔离账户场景下自主监控市场、决策交易、执行订单，同时由代理不可见且无法绕过的带外通道强制执行每客户端数据隔离、交易审批阈值和防篡改审计。
AI.conclusion: 带外元数据通道架构能有效解除对代理自身安全可靠性的依赖，在不牺牲自主性的前提下实现企业级安全治理，为AI代理的安全部署提供可行路径。

title: From Data to Insights: Exploring Program-of-Thoughts Prompting for Chart Summarization
summary: Charts play a critical role in conveying numerical data insights through structured visual representations. However, semantic visual understanding and numerical reasoning requirements hinder the accurate description of charts, interpreting a challenging task in chart summarization. Despite recent advancements in visual language models (VLMs), approaches lack robust mechanisms for verifying statistical fact correctness and are computationally heavy. To address this gap, this paper explores a strategy of using zero-shot learning to motivate the lightweight VLMs to perform computational reasoning, via Python programs as intermediaries to derive valid summary statistics for chart understanding. Specifically, we introduce a novel chart-to-dictionary auxiliary task, offering a more flexible representation compared to traditional chart-to-table methods, making it particularly well-suited for integration with the Program-of-Thought (PoT) strategy. Experimental results demonstrate our strategy performs on par with existing chart summarization methods across semantic and factual metrics. Code is available on https://anonymous.4open.science/r/ZeroShot-PoT-C2T-5A6B.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用零样本学习驱动轻量级视觉语言模型，通过Python程序作为中间件进行统计推理（结合Program-of-Thought策略），并引入图表到字典的辅助任务，实现高效且事实准确的图表摘要。
AI.motivation: 现有图表摘要方法存在两个主要问题：(1) 视觉语言模型缺乏验证统计事实正确性的鲁棒机制；(2) 模型计算开销大。需要一种轻量且能确保数值推理准确性的方案。
AI.method: 提出零样本学习策略，利用轻量级VLM通过Python程序作为中间件进行统计推理（Program-of-Thought策略），并设计图表到字典（chart-to-dictionary）辅助任务替代传统的图表到表格方法，提供更灵活的表示。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提策略在语义指标和事实正确性指标上均与现有图表摘要方法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 零样本+Python程序推理+图表到字典的轻量级方案能有效平衡计算效率与统计事实准确性，为图表摘要提供了一种可行方向。

title: Deep Psychovisual Image Representations
summary: Psychovisual models suggest human vision decouples low-level feature extraction from higher cognition by first forming intermediate abstractions. In contrast, deep learning-based vision models routinely extract and aggregate features using homogeneous stacks of spatial layers, rendering their decision-making processes opaque. In this paper, we propose Deep Visual Coding, a learned frequency-domain representation inspired by 1990s image codes that quantised perceptually salient frequencies, which together with complex-valued image representations produces psychovisual-style abstractions. This approach enables the first psychovisual-based deep learning framework, utilizing data-driven spectral filters that learn to encode task-relevant semantic structures within distinct frequency sub-bands. Salience analyses reveal that our psychovisual models extract highly interpretable object parts compared to the amorphous regions produced by regular Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs). Furthermore, we find that our models are less depth dependent than CNNs for model scaling, since our complex-valued representations and learned abstractions subsume the role of the deep spatial layers. Together, these findings demonstrate that psychovisual coding provides a promising path toward more efficient and transparent vision models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出深度视觉编码（Deep Visual Coding），一种受心理视觉模型启发的频域表示方法，通过复数图像表示和可学习的谱滤波器，构建了首个基于心理视觉的深度学习框架。该方法能提取高度可解释的物体部件，且模型对深度依赖性较低，为实现更高效、更透明的视觉模型提供了新路径。
AI.motivation: 心理视觉模型表明人类视觉将低层特征提取与高层认知解耦，但现有深度学习视觉模型使用同质化的空间层堆叠，决策过程不透明。作者希望借鉴心理视觉机制，构建更透明、可解释的视觉模型。
AI.method: 提出Deep Visual Coding框架，受1990年代图像编码启发，在频域量化感知显著频率，结合复数图像表示形成心理视觉风格的抽象表征。使用数据驱动的谱滤波器学习在不同频带编码任务相关的语义结构。
AI.result: 显著性分析表明，心理视觉模型能提取高度可解释的物体部件，而传统CNN提取的是模糊区域。该模型对深度依赖性低于CNN，复数表示和学到的抽象表征替代了深层空间层的作用。
AI.conclusion: 心理视觉编码为构建更高效、更透明的视觉模型提供了有前景的方向。

title: When LLM Reward Design Fails: Diagnostic-Driven Refinement for Sparse Structured RL
summary: For sparse, structured reinforcement-learning tasks with semantic reward-function interfaces, LLM-generated reward shaping is better framed as debugging than one-shot generation. We study PPO-trained agents using MiniGrid as core evaluation and MuJoCo as boundary stress test. Our audit finds two dominant one-shot failure modes -- reward flooding and semantic/API misunderstanding -- plus a rarer weak-shaping case. We propose diagnostic-driven iterative refinement, where training diagnostics and a failure-mode taxonomy guide targeted reward-function revision. Refinement improves DoorKey-8x8 from 2.3% to 97.6% and KeyCorridor from 31.2% to 86.7% with high seed-to-seed variance. Controls show these gains are not from retrying or extra training: metrics-only re-prompting yields large drops, while a static-vocabulary control recovers much of the gap (87.6%; 70.7%), showing the taxonomy prompt is a major mechanism and dynamic labels provide only partially isolated incremental evidence. Budget-matched and Best-of-3 comparisons separate refinement from selection and training-time effects. Component-removal tests, sensitivity analyses, and an audit against author labels provide converging evidence for the debugging interpretation while revealing calibration limits. Continuous-control results show the boundary: success-based diagnostics can misfire in dense-reward locomotion, and return-trend feedback removes one false-positive mechanism without robust gains. The low-call protocol is a cost contrast with population-based reward search, not a benchmark comparison. In four crossed-variance-design environments, point estimates suggest larger gains when LLM reward-function variance dominates but bootstrap intervals are wide. The method is bounded to sparse structured tasks with reliable interfaces under PPO; fields like event_text may help, hurt, or be neutral.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将LLM生成奖励塑形视为调试过程而非一次性生成，通过诊断驱动的迭代精炼显著提升稀疏结构化强化学习任务的性能。
AI.motivation: LLM生成奖励函数存在失败模式（奖励泛滥、语义/API误解、弱塑形），一次性生成效果不佳，需要系统化的调试方法。
AI.method: 提出诊断驱动的迭代精炼方法：利用训练诊断指标和失败模式分类法指导LLM对奖励函数进行针对性修正。在MiniGrid环境（DoorKey-8x8, KeyCorridor）上评估，并在MuJoCo连续控制任务上进行边界测试。
AI.result: DoorKey-8x8从2.3%提升至97.6%，KeyCorridor从31.2%提升至86.7%。消融实验表明分类提示词是主要机制，动态标签提供增量证据。预算匹配和Best-of-3对比区分了精炼与选择效应。连续控制任务中基于成功的诊断在密集奖励环境下可能失效。
AI.conclusion: 该方法适用于PPO下具有可靠接口的稀疏结构化任务；调试视角优于一次性生成，但存在校准限制和边界条件（连续控制任务效果有限）。

title: The Chain Holds, the Answer Folds: Trace-Answer Dissociation in Reasoning Models Under Adversarial Pressure
summary: Reasoning models are evaluated on single-turn benchmarks but deployed in multi-turn dialogue, where users push back on correct answers. Under sustained adversarial pressure we find a previously undocumented failure mode: the chain-of-thought stays factually correct from first turn to last while the emitted answer flips wrong. We call this unfaithful capitulation (UC) and isolate it with a $2\times 2$ latent-versus-behavioral framework that flip-rate metrics and single-turn faithfulness probes both miss. Across three datasets (MT-Consistency, MMLU-Pro, GSM8K), the latent-correct rate at the behavioral flip clusters near 50% in think mode and collapses to 11-15% under no_think -- paired, within-model causal evidence that reasoning creates the gap. Across models the effect tracks the reasoning channel (high in Qwen3-32B and GPT-OSS-20B, low in inline-CoT Gemma-4-31B-it). An independent GPT-4o judge corroborates $86\%$ of UC labels; a token-level probe shows the answer-slot argmax is correct in $84\%$ of UC cells; and a naive trace-anchored defense backfires. We release all trajectories, traces, and judge labels.

AI.tldr: 本文发现推理模型在多轮对话中会出现“不忠实投降”现象：思维链始终正确，但最终答案却在对抗压力下翻转错误。通过潜在-行为二维框架识别出这一被现有指标遗漏的故障模式。
AI.motivation: 推理模型在单轮基准上评估，但实际部署于多轮对话，用户会持续质疑正确回答。现有指标（翻转率、单轮忠实性探测）无法捕捉这种多轮场景下的新型失败模式。
AI.method: 提出2×2潜在-行为分析框架，在三个数据集（MT-Consistency、MMLU-Pro、GSM8K）上测试，比较think与no_think模式，并用GPT-4o裁判验证、token级探针分析。
AI.result: 行为翻转时潜在正确率在think模式下接近50%，no_think骤降至11-15%；GPT-4o裁判86%认同UC标签；token级探针显示84%的UC格子中答案槽argmax正确；朴素防御适得其反。
AI.conclusion: 推理过程创造了忠实性差距，但现有防御手段无效。该现象跨模型存在但程度不同（Qwen3-32B和GPT-OSS-20B严重，Gemma-4-31B-it较轻）。

title: GrowLoop: Self-Evolving Conversation Evaluation Seeded by Human
summary: With the rapid advancement of large language models, evaluating human-likeness in open-ended conversation has become increasingly important. However, human-likeness is a form of tacit knowledge that humans perceive intuitively, yet the underlying criteria resist explicit formulation. Human judgments vary widely, with strong agreement on some cases and legitimate disagreement on others. Meanwhile, the criteria behind human judgments remain implicit, leaving no clear basis for constructing cases. Further, what counts as human-like is not static, but evolving with model capability and human expectations. Despite progress in evaluation methods such as expert-authored benchmarks, Reward Models, and self-evolving benchmarks, none addresses all three challenges simultaneously. Therefore, we propose GrowLoop, a self-evolving conversation evaluation system that continuously adapts as models advance and scenarios shift. With minimal human seed annotations as the first mover, LLM agents iteratively extract and refine evaluation rubrics through Heuristic Learning. Human-AI agreement is required where annotators converge, while only plausibility is expected where they diverge. Moreover, the Rubric-Case co-evolution mechanism enables continuous evolution, expanded through new seeds when the evaluation target moves. Applied to human-likeness evaluation in open-ended conversation, the generated rubrics not only substantially outperform existing methods in alignment with human judgments, but also uncover issues that annotators overlook. The resulting benchmark effectively discriminates models across capability tiers and reveals where they fall short, while generalizing to new scenarios and adapting as models advance. Our work shifts the benchmarking paradigm from manual updates or difficulty scaling to comprehensive, continuous self-evolution.

AI.tldr: 提出GrowLoop，一种自演进的对话评估系统，通过启发式学习、人机共识与分歧处理、以及Rubric-Case共同进化机制，持续适应模型能力提升和场景变化，在开放域对话类人度评估上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型飞速发展，开放域对话的类人度评估日益重要，但面临三大挑战：1) 类人度是内隐知识，标准难以显式化；2) 人类判断存在分歧，缺乏构建case的明确依据；3) 类人度标准随模型能力和人类预期动态变化。现有方法（专家基准、奖励模型、自演进基准）均无法同时解决这三个问题。
AI.method: 提出GrowLoop系统，核心包括：(1) 少量人工种子标注作为初始动力；(2) LLM代理通过启发式学习（Heuristic Learning）迭代提取和精炼评估准则；(3) 人类与AI在意见收敛处要求一致性，在分歧处仅要求合理性；(4) Rubric-Case共同进化机制，评估目标变化时通过新种子扩展实现持续演进。
AI.result: 生成的准则在人类判断对齐度上显著优于现有方法，并能发现注释者忽略的问题。构建的基准能有效区分不同能力层级的模型，揭示模型不足之处，且能泛化到新场景并随模型进步而适应。
AI.conclusion: 该工作将基准范式从人工更新或难度扩展转向全面的、持续的自演进，为开放域对话类人度评估提供了动态适配的解决方案。

title: Turbulence-Robust Dynamic Object Segmentation with Multi-Signal Priors and SAM2 Refinement
summary:
This technical report presents our solution for the CVPR 2026 UG2+ Challenge Track 3: Dynamic Object Segmentation in Turbulence (DOST). We design a training-free multi-signal segmentation pipeline that combines pretrained motion estimation, self-supervised semantic priors, background anomaly modeling, manually calibrated proposal fusion, and SAM2-based mask refinement. The method uses RAFT for dense motion responses, DINOv2 for semantic objectness priors, ViBe for training-free background modeling, and pretrained SAM2 for box-prompt mask refinement.
  Instead of optimizing an end-to-end segmentation network, our system operates entirely in inference mode. This design is suitable for the DOST setting, where severe atmospheric turbulence produces pseudo-motion, blur, and intermittent target visibility, making a single motion cue unreliable. The final submitted masks are evaluated by the official leaderboard, which reports 0.425041 mIoU and 0.457206 mDice. Since no task-specific model training or fine-tuning is performed, stronger learned temporal association, adaptive proposal selection, or task-specific adaptation may further improve the system.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练的、结合多种预训练模型（RAFT、DINOv2、ViBe、SAM2）的多信号分割流程，用于CVPR 2026 UG2+挑战赛中的湍流动态目标分割任务，在官方榜单上取得了0.425 mIoU和0.457 mDice的成绩。
AI.motivation: 大气湍流会导致伪运动、模糊和间歇性目标可见性，单一运动线索不可靠，因此需要设计一种不依赖端到端训练、融合多种线索的分割方案。
AI.method: 提出训练-free的多信号分割流水线：RAFT估计密集运动响应，DINOv2提供语义先验，ViBe进行无训练背景建模，手动校准的提议融合，最后用SAM2基于框提示进行掩码精修。整个系统仅在推理模式下运行。
AI.result: 在官方排行榜上取得0.425041 mIoU和0.457206 mDice。
AI.conclusion: 该无需训练的方法在湍流场景下有效，但更强的时序关联学习、自适应提议选择或任务特定微调可进一步提升性能。

title: CosmicFish-HRM: Adaptive Reasoning via Hierarchical Recurrent Mechanisms in Compact Language Models
comment: 17 pages, 4 figures. Exploratory study of adaptive reasoning depth in compact autoregressive language models. Code available at https://github.com/MistyozAI/CosmicFish-HRM
summary: Large language models have achieved strong reasoning capabilities, though often at the cost of massive parameter counts and expensive inference. In this work, we explore a different direction: adaptive reasoning depth in compact language models. We present CosmicFish-HRM, a compact language model built around a Hierarchical Reasoning Module (HRM) that dynamically allocates computational effort during inference. Instead of applying fixed computation to every input, the model iterates through high-level and low-level reasoning cycles and learns when to halt based on input complexity. CosmicFish-HRM combines this adaptive reasoning core with modern transformer components including Grouped Query Attention, RoPE, and SwiGLU activations. While the additional reasoning infrastructure introduces overhead at small scale, we hypothesize that this tradeoff becomes increasingly favorable as model size grows and the relative cost of the HRM core diminishes. Our results show that the model learns non-uniform reasoning behavior, allocating different numbers of reasoning steps across tasks and inputs. These findings suggest that adaptive reasoning depth may offer a promising alternative to relying solely on parameter scale for reasoning capability.

AI.tldr: CosmicFish-HRM 是一个紧凑型语言模型，通过分层推理模块（HRM）动态分配计算资源，根据输入复杂度自适应调整推理深度，在较小参数规模下探索推理能力的提升。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型虽然推理能力强，但通常需要庞大的参数量和昂贵的推理成本。本文探索在紧凑模型中通过自适应推理深度来替代单纯增加参数规模，实现更高效的推理。
AI.method: 提出 CosmicFish-HRM 模型，核心是分层推理模块（HRM），通过高低层推理循环动态决定何时停止推理。结合了 Grouped Query Attention、RoPE、SwiGLU 等现代 transformer 组件。
AI.result: 模型学会了非均匀的推理行为，能根据任务和输入复杂度分配不同数量的推理步骤。但小规模下推理基础设施引入额外开销。
AI.conclusion: 自适应推理深度可能是一种有前景的替代方案，可以替代单纯依赖参数规模来提升推理能力，且这种优势随模型规模增大而更加明显。

title: Trends in AI and Human-AI Interaction in Clinical Trials -- A Hybrid Human-AI Exploration
comment: 8 pages plus 2 pages references and appendix
summary: This paper examines records retrieved from the ClinicalTrials.gov registry to characterize temporal trends in AI terminology and the geographical distribution of AI trials. The work also reports on an exploratory hybrid human-AI approach to analyzing human-AI interaction trends in registered clinical trials. The hybrid workflow comprised a frontier generative AI model (GPT-5.5) and human review to screen and categorize records returned by an AI-focused search. The findings indicate a marked increase in AI-related trials over time, with recent growth in references to machine learning, deep learning, chatbots, GPTs, and large language models. Geographically, China and the United States accounted for the largest numbers of AI-related trials, with notable recent increases in several other countries including Italy, France, Spain, the UK and Turkey (Türkiye). In a random sample of 100 records, human and AI classifiers showed good agreement in identifying studies not substantively using AI, but lower agreement in classifying human-AI interaction, particularly where health professional interaction was ambiguous or insufficiently described. Overall, the results suggest that hybrid human-AI screening of clinical trial records is potentially viable, but clearer trial reporting and more precise interaction definitions will benefit the process.

AI.tldr: 本文分析了ClinicalTrials.gov中的AI相关临床试验，发现AI试验数量随时间显著增加，中美国数量最多，并探索了混合人机方法筛选试验记录的可行性。
AI.motivation: 研究人员希望了解AI在临床试验中的应用趋势及其地理分布，并探索使用混合人机方法来自动化分析临床试验记录中的AI相关交互。
AI.method: 使用前沿生成式AI模型（GPT-5.5）结合人工审查，对从ClinicalTrials.gov检索到的AI相关试验记录进行筛选和分类，分析时间趋势和地理分布。
AI.result: AI相关试验随时间显著增加，机器学习、深度学习、聊天机器人、GPT和LLM引用增多；中美两国试验数量最多，意大利、法国、西班牙、英国和土耳其近期增长显著；人机分类器在识别非实质性使用AI的研究上一致性良好，但在分类人机交互（尤其是医疗专业人员交互模糊时）一致性较低。
AI.conclusion: 混合人机筛选临床试验记录具有潜在可行性，但需要更清晰的试验报告和更精确的交互定义来改进该过程。

title: Hallucination Detection-Guided Preference Optimization for Clinical Summarization
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise on summarization tasks, but they often produce hallucinations, which are unsupported or incorrect statements that limit their reliability in specialized healthcare applications. We introduce \itermodelfull (\itermodel), an inference-time method that leverages hallucination detectors to guide iterative summary revisions toward factual corrections. Building on this, we propose \itermodel for Preference Learning (\model), which converts detector-guided refinement trajectories into preference pairs for model finetuning. Extensive experiments show that our methods substantially reduce hallucinations for Llama and Gemma models in summarizing real-world clinical notes from \MimicIV. For example, \itermodel reduces 24\% and \model reduces 48\% hallucinations in Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct. Importantly, both methods preserve summary fluency, coherence, and relevance according to human expert and LLM-Jury evaluations. Together, these results demonstrate that detection-informed refinement and preference learning offer an automated solution for improving factual faithfulness in clinical summarization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种方法：\itermodel（推理时利用幻觉检测器迭代修正摘要）和\model（将修正轨迹转化为偏好对微调模型），在临床笔记总结中显著减少了Llama和Gemma模型的幻觉（分别减少24%和48%），同时保持流畅性和相关性。
AI.motivation: LLM在摘要任务中常产生幻觉（不准确或未受支持的陈述），限制了其在专业医疗场景中的可靠性，因此需要提升事实忠实度的方法。
AI.method: 1）\itermodel：推理阶段利用幻觉检测器指导模型对摘要进行迭代修正；2）\model：将检测器引导的修正轨迹转换为偏好对，用于模型微调。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-IV临床笔记总结中，\itermodel减少Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct 24%的幻觉，\model减少48%的幻觉；两种方法均未损害流畅性、连贯性和相关性。
AI.conclusion: 基于检测信息的修正和偏好学习为提升临床摘要的事实忠实度提供了一种自动化解决方案。

title: Pocket-Dentist: On-Device Dental Image Understanding via Efficient Multimodal Large Language Models
summary: Evaluations of dental vision-language models remain fragmented across datasets, task definitions and metrics, and often ignore their computational cost. This limits their widespread deployment for dental screening outside specialist centres, where timely inference, limited hardware, and local handling of patient images are vital for practical, privacy-preserving clinical prescreening. Here we present Pocket-Dentist, an efficiency-aware benchmark for dental multimodal question answering that brings together three datasets spanning approximately 1,159 patients, five task types and seven metrics. Across typical 14 VLMs, our results reveals an interesting observation: compact VLMs (e.g., 2B-parameter models) outperform larger VLMs in accuracy while requiring substantially lower computational costs in dental image understanding. Deployed locally on an iPhone 17 Pro, our finetuned compact VLM Pocket-Dentist-2B processed each sample in 4.31 s, reducing latency by 4.9-fold and memory use by 2.3-fold compared with a 7B baseline.

AI.tldr: 提出了Pocket-Dentist，一个面向牙科多模态问答的效率感知基准，发现小型VLM（2B参数）在牙科图像理解中比大型VLM更准确且计算成本更低，在iPhone 17 Pro上部署可实现低延迟和小内存占用。
AI.motivation: 现有牙科视觉语言模型评估分散在不同数据集、任务定义和指标上，且忽略了计算成本，限制了其在专科中心以外的牙科筛查中的广泛应用。
AI.method: 构建了Pocket-Dentist基准，包含约1159名患者的三个数据集、五种任务类型和七种评估指标，在14种VLM上进行测试，并微调了紧凑型VLM进行本地部署。
AI.result: 紧凑型VLM（2B参数）在准确率上优于大型VLM，且计算成本显著降低。在iPhone 17 Pro上，Pocket-Dentist-2B每个样本处理耗时4.31秒，延迟降低4.9倍，内存使用减少2.3倍。
AI.conclusion: 小型VLM在牙科图像理解中更具实用性和效率优势，适合部署在本地设备上进行隐私保护的临床预筛查。

title: Conf-Gen: Conformal Uncertainty Quantification for Generative Models
summary: Conformal prediction (CP) and its extension, conformal risk control (CRC), are established frameworks for quantifying uncertainty in supervised machine learning through formal guarantees. However, recent breakthroughs in artificial intelligence (AI) have been driven by unsupervised generative models, such as large language models (LLMs) and image generators, which are not directly compatible with CP or CRC. In this work we introduce conformal generation (Conf-Gen), a general framework adapting CRC to generative tasks while relaxing its theoretical assumptions. Conf-Gen unifies and generalizes previous attempts to apply CP to LLMs, and extends conformal methodology to entirely new domains. We demonstrate the flexibility of Conf-Gen through some novel applications, including obtaining conformal guarantees on: image generators producing non-memorized images, conversational AI systems having asked enough clarifying questions, and the output of AI agents being correct.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Conf-Gen框架，将置信风险控制（CRC）适配到生成式任务（如LLM、图像生成器等），放宽理论假设，统一并推广了先前将置信预测（CP）应用于LLM的尝试，并在图像非记忆生成、对话系统提问充分性、AI智能体输出正确性等新领域实现了置信保证。
AI.motivation: CP和CRC在监督学习中提供了不确定性量化保障，但无法直接应用于当前AI突破性进展所在的非监督生成模型（如LLM和图像生成器），需要一种适配生成任务的通用框架。
AI.method: 通过对CRC进行理论假设放宽和适配，提出Conf-Gen通用框架，统一并推广了之前将CP应用于LLM的零散尝试，扩展到新的生成领域。
AI.result: 在图像生成（非记忆化保证）、对话AI（足够提问次数保证）、AI智能体（输出正确性保证）等新型应用中成功实现了置信保证。
AI.conclusion: Conf-Gen弥合了传统置信框架与生成式AI之间的鸿沟，为更广泛的无监督生成任务提供了形式化的不确定性量化保障。

title: Beyond Consensus: Trace-Level Synthesis in Mixture of Agents
summary: When multiple LLM agents solve the same problem, standard practice compresses each agent's reasoning into a majority vote or layered synthesis, treating agreement as the finish line. We show this is unnecessarily lossy: an LLM aggregator that reads complete reasoning traces recovers correct solutions even when agents unanimously agree, with beneficial corrections consistently outweighing harmful ones -- the \emph{aggregation paradox}. Majority voting has a ceiling that perturbation diversity does not raise (error correlations are identical); the aggregator's gain comes from trace-level complementarity, assembling correct intermediate steps from minority chains that voting discards. These findings motivate Self-Consistent Mixture of Agents which generates trace diversity through semantic-preserving input perturbations, safeguards the majority via anchored refinement with provable non-degradation guarantees, and always synthesizes -- never gates on consensus. A single model with perturbation-induced trace variation outperforms heterogeneous model pools across structured reasoning, PhD-level science, competition mathematics, and competitive programming. The unit of aggregation should be the reasoning trace, not the answer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的LLM集成方法Self-Consistent Mixture of Agents（SC-MoA），核心思想是将推理轨迹而非答案作为聚合单元。研究发现，即使所有智能体一致同意，直接读取完整推理轨迹的聚合器仍能恢复正确解决方案，且有益修正始终超过有害修正（称为"聚合悖论"）。多数投票存在天花板效应，扰动多样性无法提升其性能，而聚合器的收益来自轨迹级互补性——组装被投票丢弃的少数链中的正确中间步骤。SC-MoA通过语义保持的输入扰动生成轨迹多样性，通过带可证明非退化保证的锚定精炼保护多数意见，并始终合成而非基于共识门控。实验表明，单一模型通过扰动诱导的轨迹变化在结构化推理、博士级科学、竞赛数学和竞争编程任务上均优于异构模型池。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在聚合多个LLM智能体的推理结果时，通常采用多数投票或分层合成，将"一致同意"作为终止信号。作者认为这种做法存在信息损失——即使所有智能体最终答案一致，它们的推理轨迹中仍包含互补的有用信息，这些信息在压缩为答案时被丢弃了。
AI.method: 提出Self-Consistent Mixture of Agents (SC-MoA)方法：(1) 通过语义保持的输入扰动生成推理轨迹多样性；(2) 使用锚定精炼（anchored refinement）保护多数意见，并提供可证明的非退化保证；(3) 始终合成所有轨迹，而非基于共识进行门控选择。核心创新在于将聚合单元从答案级别提升到推理轨迹级别。
AI.result: (1) 发现了"聚合悖论"：即使智能体一致同意，阅读完整推理轨迹的聚合器仍能恢复正确解，有益修正始终超过有害修正。(2) 多数投票存在天花板效应，扰动多样性无法提升其性能。(3) 单一模型通过扰动诱导的轨迹变化在多个复杂推理任务上优于异构模型池。(4) 验证了轨迹级互补性是聚合器收益的来源。
AI.conclusion: 聚合的基本单元应该是推理轨迹，而非答案。通过尊重和利用推理过程中的细粒度信息，即使使用单一模型也能获得优于多模型集成的效果，这颠覆了"模型多样性是集成学习核心"的传统认知。

title: Reasoning that Travels: Dissecting How Chain-of-Thought Transfers Across Models
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) often generate extensive chain-of-thought (CoT) traces before producing a final answer. As explicit textual artifacts, these traces can be passed to other models to solve the same task, enabling cross-model reasoning transfer. Yet successful transfer alone does not reveal how the provided CoT contributes to another model's answer. We study this question with a controlled provider--receiver framework, where a provider generates a reasoning trace and a receiver solves the same problem from increasingly longer trace prefixes. We compare force-answer, where the receiver answers directly from the prefix, with free-generation, where it may continue reasoning before answering. Across models and benchmarks, full traces often transfer successfully, but prefix trajectories reveal distinct mechanisms. In force-answer mode, AIME transfer is largely driven by explicit answer availability. MMLU-Pro instead reflects a larger role for receiver competence, while ZebraLogic depends on partial structured-answer information rather than complete-answer leakage alone. In free-generation mode, partial CoTs improve performance across benchmarks, indicating that prefixes can guide continued reasoning. Finally, answer agreement among receivers provides a gold-free signal for stopping provider reasoning early. Overall, cross-model CoT transfer is not a single phenomenon: it can reflect answer extraction, reasoning scaffolding, or receiver-dependent competence.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大推理模型（LRMs）生成的思维链（CoT）在跨模型推理迁移中的作用机制，发现完整CoT迁移成功，但前缀轨迹揭示不同机制：AIME依赖显式答案泄露，MMLU-Pro依赖接收者能力，ZebraLogic依赖部分结构化答案信息。自由生成模式下，部分CoT可通过引导推理提升性能，接收者答案一致性可作为停止提供者早期推理的无监督信号。
AI.motivation: 探究大推理模型生成的思维链（CoT）在跨模型迁移中是如何真正贡献到接收模型的答案——究竟是简单的答案提取、推理支架作用，还是依赖于接收者自身能力？现有研究只关注迁移是否成功，而未揭示其背后机制。
AI.method: 提出"提供者-接收者"（provider-receiver）实验框架：提供者生成完整推理轨迹，接收者从越来越长的前缀轨迹中解决问题。比较两种模式：force-answer（直接从前缀强制回答）和free-generation（允许继续推理后回答）。在AIME、MMLU-Pro、ZebraLogic等基准上测试。
AI.result: （1）完整CoT常能成功迁移；（2）force-answer模式下，AIME迁移主要依赖显式答案可用性，MMLU-Pro依赖接收者能力，ZebraLogic依赖部分结构化答案信息；（3）free-generation模式下，部分CoT前缀可引导推理并提升性能；（4）接收者之间的答案一致性可作为无监督信号来提前停止提供者推理。
AI.conclusion: 跨模型CoT迁移并非单一现象，而是涉及三种不同机制：答案提取、推理支架构建、以及接收者依赖的自身能力。答案一致性可用于判断何时停止提供者推理。

title: ViASNet: A Video Ad Saliency Network for Predicting Dynamic Saliency and Viewer Engagement
summary: The digital media landscape has seen a pervasive shift toward short-form video advertising on TV, social media and e-commerce platforms. The present study focuses on deep saliency prediction for short-form video advertising. Deep saliency models have been used to generate predictions of human eye fixation patterns with the purpose of enhancing user interaction with digital technology and optimizing its design. For video ads, dynamic saliency maps capture where and when viewers are looking, revealing why video ads are effective, and how their content should be optimized. We develop and test a new deep dynamic saliency prediction model called ViASNet (Video Ad Saliency Network), which has an architecture founded on the 3D U-Net, and accommodates the influence of audio and the semantic meaning of scenes. We assess the model's performance on 151 video ads, each seen by about 20 viewers wile their eye movements were tracked, and explore the critical factors influencing model performance through ablation experiments. We calculate the entropy of the predicted saliency maps frame-by-frame as a diagnostic tool to identify ads and scenes that fail to engage viewers, and illustrate its use on test data of 15 unseen ads. Our study reveals that ad design and testing can be sped up considerably through automated systems built on deep saliency models such as ViASNet.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViASNet深度动态显著性预测模型，基于3D U-Net架构并整合音频与语义信息，用于预测短视频广告中的人眼注视模式。在151个视频广告（每广告约20名观众）上验证性能，通过熵值诊断广告/场景的观众参与度，表明该模型可加速广告设计与测试流程。
AI.motivation: 短视频广告在电视、社交媒体和电商平台中日益普及，理解观众注视模式对优化广告设计和提升用户交互至关重要。现有深度显著性模型主要针对静态图像或通用视频，缺乏专门针对短视频广告、同时整合音频与语义信息的动态显著性预测模型。
AI.method: 提出ViASNet模型，基于3D U-Net架构设计，能够同时处理视频动态信息、音频特征和场景语义含义。通过151个视频广告（每广告约20名观众）的眼动追踪数据进行评估，并采用消融实验探索影响模型性能的关键因素。创新性地利用预测显著图逐帧熵值作为诊断工具，识别未能吸引观众注意力的广告和场景。
AI.result: ViASNet在151个视频广告数据集上取得良好预测性能；消融实验揭示了音频和语义信息对模型性能的贡献；熵值诊断工具能有效识别观众参与度低的广告和场景，并在15个未见广告上验证了其实用性。
AI.conclusion: 基于ViASNet等深度显著性模型的自动化系统可以显著加速广告设计与测试流程，为短视频广告优化提供有效工具。

title: A Training-Time Diagnostic for Generalization via the Log-Alignment Ratio
summary: We study the log-alignment ratio (LAR), a measure of parameter-activation alignment, introduced in parameterization theory. We reformulate it as the overlap between a weight spectrum $p$ of the normalized squared singular values of a matrix and an activation spectrum $q$ of the normalized squared projections of inputs onto its singular directions. We show that unembedding LAR tracks the transition between memorization and generalization in two different settings by capturing the spread of $p$ and $q$ during training. In grokking, LAR predicts the effective dimension of the learned function: $k \approx n^{2(1-\text{LAR})}$, where $n$ is the input dimension of the matrix. In 3B-parameter language model pre-training, its deviation from a non-overfitting baseline tracks the generalization gap, and its rate of decline increases as overfitting approaches. LAR is computable from quantities available during the forward pass with negligible computational overhead, and requires no held-out validation data.

AI.tldr: 本文重新定义了log-alignment ratio（LAR）为权重谱p与激活谱q之间的重叠度量，并证明LAR在grokking和LLM预训练两个场景中都能跟踪泛化与记忆之间的转换，且计算开销极低。
AI.motivation: 探索参数-激活对齐的度量LAR，试图理解其在神经网络记忆与泛化过程中的行为机制。
AI.method: 将LAR重新表述为归一化奇异值谱p与输入投影谱q之间的重叠；在grokking和3B参数语言模型预训练中分析LAR的动态变化。
AI.result: 在grokking中，LAR能预测学习函数的有效维度k ≈ n^{2(1-LAR)}；在预训练中，LAR偏离无过拟合基线的程度跟踪泛化差距，且其下降速率在过拟合逼近时加快。
AI.conclusion: LAR是一个高效、无需验证集的计算指标，能有效跟踪训练过程中的泛化与记忆边界。

title: PRO-CUA: Process-Reward Optimization for Computer Use Agents
summary: Computer use agents (CUAs) have shown strong potential for automating complex digital workflows, yet their training remains constrained by costly live environment interaction and limited high-quality supervision. Existing filtered behavior cloning pipelines suffer from imitation bottlenecks, including distribution shift from the expert demonstration and the absence of negative learning signals. Meanwhile, standard trajectory-level reinforcement learning struggles with sparse rewards, ambiguous credit assignment, and high infrastructure costs for long-horizon GUI interaction. In this work, we propose PRO-CUA, a process-reward optimization framework for training CUAs with iterative step-level reinforcement learning. PRO-CUA decouples on-policy environment interaction from policy optimization: the current policy collects states through live rollouts, generates diverse candidate actions for each state, receives step-level feedback from a process reward model (PRM), and is optimized with group-relative advantages. This design enables dense and flexible credit assignment without relying on golden answers or offline expert trajectories, while reducing distribution shift by training on the agent's own execution states. Experiments on live web benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of PRO-CUA and the reliability of PRM-guided step-level training.

AI.tldr: PRO-CUA提出一种过程奖励优化框架，通过解耦在线环境交互与策略优化、引入步骤级强化学习和过程奖励模型，有效解决了GUI智能体训练中的模仿瓶颈和稀疏奖励问题。
AI.motivation: 现有CUA训练面临两大问题：1) 过滤式行为克隆存在模仿瓶颈（分布偏移、缺乏负反馈信号）；2) 轨迹级强化学习存在稀疏奖励、信用分配模糊、长程GUI交互基础设施成本高。
AI.method: PRO-CUA采用迭代步骤级强化学习：当前策略通过在线rollout收集状态，生成多样候选动作，由过程奖励模型(PRM)提供步骤级反馈，基于组相对优势进行优化。将策略优化与环境交互解耦。
AI.result: 在真实网页基准测试上的实验验证了PRO-CUA的有效性，以及PRM引导的步骤级训练的可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法实现了无需标准答案或离线专家轨迹的密集灵活信用分配，同时通过训练智能体自身执行状态减少了分布偏移。

title: The Trust Paradox: How CS Researchers Engage LLM Leaderboards
summary: Large language model (LLM) leaderboards rank AI models using standardized benchmarks and have become highly visible across computer science, despite known limitations in their reliability and robustness. Yet how they shape researchers' actual practice remains empirically uncharted. We address this gap through semi-structured interviews with eight researchers across four computer science subfields, analyzed using reflexive thematic analysis. We find a near-universal paradox of pragmatic skepticism: while participants expressed deep distrust of leaderboard rankings, they continued to use them as rough decision-making aids. Peer networks, not leaderboards, emerged as the primary model selection mechanism, and arena-based (human-voting) leaderboards were consistently preferred over static benchmark leaderboards. Leaderboard influence varied sharply across subfields, revealing that disciplinary culture, not individual attitudes, mediates engagement; for instance, NLP researchers faced state-of-the-art comparison pressure while HCI and Systems/Privacy researchers reported none. Across these differences, however, participants converged on cost transparency as the most demanded missing feature (seven of eight). We translate these findings into concrete design recommendations that align evaluation infrastructure with how researchers actually use it, such as task-specific score breakdowns, cost integration, and voter-demographic disclosure.

AI.tldr: 通过访谈8位计算机科学研究者，发现LLM排行榜存在"务实怀疑论"悖论：研究者虽不信任排行榜，但仍将其作为决策辅助工具。同行网络比排行榜更重要，竞技场式排行榜优于静态基准。不同子领域影响差异大，成本透明度是最迫切的需求。
AI.motivation: LLM排行榜在计算机科学中被广泛使用，但其可靠性和稳健性存在已知局限，然而排行榜如何真正影响研究者实践行为尚未有实证研究，因此作者希望通过质性研究填补这一空白。
AI.method: 对来自四个计算机科学子领域的八位研究者进行半结构化访谈，采用反思性主题分析法分析数据。
AI.result: 发现"务实怀疑论"悖论：研究者普遍不信任排行榜但仍使用；同行网络是主要模型选择机制；竞技场式排行榜优于静态排行榜；排行榜影响因子领域而异（NLP领域压力大，HCI和系统/隐私领域无压力）；成本透明度是七位研究者最迫切的需求。
AI.conclusion: 基于发现提出设计建议：任务特定分数细分、成本集成、投票者人口统计信息披露等，使评估基础设施更贴合研究者实际使用方式。

title: CapTalk: Text-Guided Stylization and Speech-Driven 3D Head Animation
summary: Audio-driven 3D facial animation aims to generate synchronized lip movements and vivid facial expressions from arbitrary audio clips. While existing methods can produce synchronized lip motions, they often rely on predefined identity or style latent features, which limits users' ability to freely control speaking styles. Moreover, applying a fixed style or identity to an entire audio segment typically results in facial animation styles that do not adapt to the emotional content of the audio. To address these challenges, we revisit the entanglement between style and emotion, construct a large-scale dataset with textual descriptions of both style and emotion, and propose a novel talking head generation framework that enables separate control over style and emotion. Our model takes as input both textual descriptions of speaking style and character emotion, as well as the driving audio stream, enabling real-time generation of highly synchronized lip movements and facial expressions that match the provided descriptions. Furthermore, our model supports dynamic emotion control during inference, allowing it to handle scenarios where the target emotion changes throughout the speech.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的音频驱动3D面部动画框架，通过文本描述分别控制说话风格和情感，支持动态情感变化，实现实时生成同步唇部和面部表情。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖预定义的身份或风格潜在特征，限制了用户自由控制说话风格的能力；且固定风格或身份无法适应音频中的情感变化。
AI.method: 构建了包含风格和情感文本描述的大规模数据集，提出可分别控制风格和情感的说话头生成框架，输入包括风格文本描述、情感文本描述和驱动音频，支持推理时动态情感控制。
AI.result: 能够实时生成与输入描述匹配的高度同步的唇部运动和面部表情，并支持语音过程中目标情感变化的场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦风格与情感，实现了更灵活、自适应的说话头动画生成，提升了用户体验和控制能力。

title: Comparing Post-Hoc Explainable AI Methods for Interpreting Black-Box EEG Models in Depression Detection
summary: Recent advances in deep learning have enabled increasingly accurate electroencephalography (EEG)-based classification of Major Depressive Disorder (MDD), but the decision-making processes of high-capacity models remain difficult to interpret. This study investigates multiple post-hoc explainability methods applied to an InceptionTime architecture trained for EEG-based MDD detection. The analysis includes Shapley-based, gradient-based, and perturbation-based attribution approaches: DeepSHAP, Integrated Gradients, GradCAM, Occlusion, and Permutation Feature Importance. Explainability analysis was performed within a subject-level stratified 5-fold cross-validation framework using global attribution aggregation across EEG segments and subjects. The evaluated methods revealed partially convergent attribution patterns, with recurring emphasis on frontal, temporal, and posterior EEG regions, particularly in the right hemisphere. Quantitative comparison demonstrated substantial agreement between gradient- and perturbation-based approaches, while DeepSHAP produced comparatively distinct attribution distributions. At the same time, variability between explainability methods highlighted the influence of methodological assumptions on the resulting explanations. Overall, the results suggest that different post-hoc explainability approaches capture partially overlapping relevance structures in EEG-based deep learning models for depression detection. Although the observed attribution patterns are broadly consistent with several previous EEG studies of MDD, the analysis should be interpreted as exploratory rather than evidence of definitive neurophysiological biomarkers or clinical applicability. The study highlights both the usefulness and limitations of post-hoc explainability for interpreting black-box EEG classifiers in psychiatric applications.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多种事后可解释性方法（DeepSHAP、Integrated Gradients、GradCAM、Occlusion、Permutation Feature Importance）在基于InceptionTime架构的EEG抑郁症检测模型中的应用，发现不同方法在额叶、颞叶和后部脑区（尤其是右半球）有部分一致的归因模式，但方法间存在显著差异，强调了事后解释的探索性价值与局限性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在EEG抑郁症检测中表现优异，但高容量模型的决策过程难以解释，缺乏对模型归因机制的深入理解，因此需要系统评估多种事后可解释性方法在该任务中的表现与一致性。
AI.method: 采用InceptionTime架构进行EEG抑郁症分类，在五折交叉验证框架下，综合运用Shapley类（DeepSHAP）、梯度类（Integrated Gradients、GradCAM）和扰动类（Occlusion、Permutation Feature Importance）共五种事后可解释性方法，通过全局归因聚合分析EEG分段和受试者层面的特征重要性。
AI.result: 不同可解释性方法在额叶、颞叶和后部区域（尤其右半球）呈现出部分收敛的归因模式；梯度法与扰动法结果高度一致，而DeepSHAP产生较独特的归因分布；方法间的变异性表明方法论假设显著影响解释结果。
AI.conclusion: 事后可解释性方法能捕捉EEG深度学习模型中部分重叠的相关性结构，与既往MDD脑电研究一致，但结果应视为探索性而非神经生物学标志物或临床证据，凸显了事后解释在精神疾病应用中的有用性与局限性。

title: The Confidence Shortcut: A Reasoning Failure Mode of Masked Diffusion Models
summary: Masked diffusion language models (MDMs) uniquely support any-order generation, with confidence-based decoding currently serving as the de facto standard inference policy. To optimize for this, recent training schemes attempt to align training mask patterns directly with those observed during generation. However, we argue that confidence-based decoding is inherently misaligned with the logical-flow trajectories required for complex reasoning, and that confidence-aligned training actively entrenches this misalignment. We make this concrete using multi-digit addition, where the decoding strategy prematurely predicts locally easy digits before resolving their long-range dependencies, producing high-confidence errors on challenging inputs. While traditional random masking keeps the failure rate low on this challenging tail, confidence-aligned training amplifies the error rate by an order of magnitude. Across five distinct reasoning tasks, this same pattern emerges with task-dependent severity: confidence-based decoding induces failures on highly complex inputs, and confidence-aligned training exacerbates them. In contrast, random masking -- despite its perceived inefficiency -- robustly preserves the reasoning-trajectory conditionals essential for solving the challenging tail.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了置信度对齐训练会恶化掩码扩散语言模型在复杂推理任务上的错误率，而随机掩码训练反而能更好地保留推理轨迹条件。
AI.motivation: 当前置信度解码策略与复杂推理所需的逻辑流轨迹存在本质不对齐，且置信度对齐训练会加剧这一问题，需要揭示这一缺陷。
AI.method: 通过多位加法等五个推理任务，对比置信度对齐训练与随机掩码训练下模型的错误率，分析解码策略对复杂推理的影响。
AI.result: 置信度对齐训练将错误率放大一个数量级，而随机掩码训练在困难样本上保持低错误率。这一模式在五个推理任务中一致出现。
AI.conclusion: 置信度解码与复杂推理天然不对齐，置信度对齐训练会恶化这一缺陷；随机掩码虽然看似低效，但能稳健保护推理轨迹条件。

title: Beyond Recall: Behavioral Specification as an Interpretive Layer for AI Personalization
comment: 134 pages, 4 figures. Code, data, judge prompts, and reproduction instructions: github.com/agulaya24/beyond-recall
summary:
If an AI agent makes decisions on a person's behalf, those decisions must align with its user. We introduce representational accuracy to measure how faithfully a system captures a person's interpretation. An interpretive layer is operationalized as a Behavioral Specification. Our reference implementation aggressively compresses a person's data into interpretive patterns, served as context to a language model. We evaluate the Specification on a prototype benchmark of held-out behavioral predictions scored by a calibrated 5-judge LLM panel. We test it independently and in composition with a range of context conditions: full raw corpus, full extracted facts, and four commercial memory systems (Mem0, Letta, Supermemory, Zep).
  Across 14 public-domain autobiographical corpora, the Specification lifts representational accuracy in aggregate and nearly eliminates model hedging. It recovers most of what the raw corpus delivers, at ~25x less context cost. The Specification lifts subjects toward a common predictive level regardless of pretraining baseline; the lift in absolute points is therefore largest where the baseline is lowest, suggesting the population of relevance is anyone not adequately represented in pretraining. Lift is greatest on interpretation-required questions, where providing an interpretive layer enables model behavior that extracted facts or raw corpus do not. Conversely, on recall-required questions, this layer can interfere rather than help.
  We conclude that representational accuracy is distinct from recall and that human-AI alignment is dependent on how accurately the user is represented. Representational accuracy makes that alignment testable.

AI.tldr: 提出表征准确性（Representational Accuracy）概念，通过行为规范（Behavioral Specification）作为解释层压缩用户数据，在14个自传语料库上显著提升人机对齐，减少模型 hedging，以约1/25的上下文成本恢复原始语料大部分效果，且对预训练中代表性不足的人群提升最大。
AI.motivation: AI代理替人做决策时，决策必须与用户对齐。现有方法缺乏衡量系统如何忠实捕捉用户诠释（interpretation）的度量标准，且原始数据消耗过大、事实提取无法处理需要诠释的问题。
AI.method: 提出表征准确性指标；将解释层（Interpretive Layer）操作为行为规范（Behavioral Specification），通过激进压缩用户数据为解释性模式，作为语言模型的上下文；使用5位校准LLM评委对留出行为预测评分，在14个公开自传语料库上测试独立效果及与多种上下文条件（原始语料、提取事实、四种商业记忆系统）的组合。
AI.result: 行为规范在聚合层面提升表征准确性，几乎消除模型 hedging；以约1/25的上下文成本恢复原始语料大部分效果；将不同预训练基线的受试者提升到共同预测水平，基线越低提升越大；在需要诠释的问题上提升最大（事实提取和原始语料做不到），但在需要回忆的问题上可能产生干扰。
AI.conclusion: 表征准确性不同于回忆（recall），人机对齐依赖于用户被表征的准确度，表征准确性使这种对齐变得可测试。

title: Multi-Stage VLM Pipeline for Zero-Shot Traffic Accident Understanding
comment: Accepted at the AUTOPILOT Workshop, CVPR 2026 (non-archival). Workshop Paper ID 13. Code: https://github.com/fuumin621/cvpr2026-accident-1st-place-solution
summary: We present the 1st-place solution to the ACCIDENT challenge at the CVPR 2026 AUTOPILOT Workshop, which asks for zero-shot prediction of accident timing, impact centroid, and collision type from CCTV footage. On a frozen Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct checkpoint we build a three-stage pipeline (full-video joint prediction, time refinement, and single-frame grounding of the impact centroid), run the same pipeline a second time on a 235B Mixture-of-Experts sibling, blend the two outputs 9:1, and finally snap each predicted point onto the nearest vehicle detection. The final system reaches Public LB 0.55469 / Private LB 0.57080, roughly +0.21 over the strongest host baseline (Molmo-7B, 0.358) and wins the challenge. We ablate each component, report the negative results that shaped the final design, and release the code at https://github.com/fuumin621/cvpr2026-accident-1st-place-solution.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了在CVPR 2026 AUTOPILOT Workshop的ACCIDENT挑战中获得第一名的解决方案。该方案在冻结的Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct检查点上构建三阶段流水线（全视频联合预测、时间精炼、单帧冲击中心定位），并在235B MoE模型上重复相同流程，以9:1比例融合两个输出，最后将预测点吸附到最近的车辆检测上。最终在Public LB上达到0.55469，Private LB上达到0.57080，比最强基线Molmo-7B高出约0.21，赢得挑战。
AI.motivation: ACCIDENT挑战要求从CCTV视频中零样本预测事故时间、冲击中心和碰撞类型，这是一个具有实际意义的自动驾驶安全任务。已有基线（如Molmo-7B）性能有限，亟需更强的零样本事故预测方案。
AI.method: 采用冻结的Qwen3-VL-32B-Instruct作为基础模型，构建三阶段流水线：1）全视频联合预测；2）时间精炼；3）单帧冲击中心定位。然后在235B MoE模型上重复相同流程，以9:1比例融合两个输出，最后将预测点吸附到最近的车辆检测结果上。
AI.result: Public LB得分0.55469，Private LB得分0.57080，相比最强基线Molmo-7B（0.358）提升约0.21，获得挑战第一名。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多模型融合+车辆检测后处理的三阶段流水线方法在零样本事故预测任务上取得了显著优于基线的性能，证明了多尺度视觉语言模型协同与精细后处理的有效性。

title: The Hamilton-Jacobi Theory of Deep Learning
summary: In this paper, training a neural network is identified, exactly, as a search through Hamilton--Jacobi initial-value problems: each gradient step selects the initial data of a viscous Hamilton--Jacobi equation whose Hopf--Cole propagator best fits the observations; at inference, the input is the spatial point at which that solution is evaluated and the initial condition is already encoded in the weights. The correspondence is exact for log-sum-exp layers and structural for broader architectures: residual networks, transformers, and recurrent architectures (RNNs, LSTMs, SSMs) each discretize the same class of Hamilton--Jacobi equations, with architecture-dependent Hamiltonian and viscosity. A single deformation parameter $\varepsilon$ unifies all four perspectives (network, tropical algebra, viscous PDE, convex optimization) in a commutative diagram closed under Lipschitz conditions. Quantitative consequences include: the minimax optimal generalization rate $O(n^{-1/(d+2)})$ for fixed $t$; adversarial robustness controlled by $\varepsilon$; backpropagation as the co-state equation of the Hamiltonian system for residual networks (Pontryagin Maximum Principle); scaling exponents consistent with data intrinsic dimension via PDE quadrature; and a closed-form $O(N)$ influence function (softmax attribution weights $π_j$) whose entropy landscape undergoes fold bifurcations as $\varepsilon$ increases, each merging attribution basins.

AI.tldr: 本文证明神经网络训练等价于求解 Hamilton-Jacobi 初值问题，梯度步选择 HJ 方程的初始数据，推理时输入为空间点。该对应在 log-sum-exp 层中精确成立，对 ResNet、Transformer、RNN/LSTM/SSM 等架构结构性成立。一个变形参数 ε 统一了网络、热带代数、粘性 PDE、凸优化四个视角。定量结果包括：最优泛化率 O(n^{-1/(d+2)})、ε 控制的对抗鲁棒性、反向传播对应 Hamiltonian 协态方程、基于数据本征维度的标度指数、以及闭式 O(N) 影响函数（softmax 归因权重 π_j）的熵景观随 ε 增加经历折叠分岔。
AI.motivation: 旨在建立神经网络训练与 Hamilton-Jacobi 方程之间的精确数学等价关系，从而用 PDE 理论统一理解多种架构的学习行为，并提供定量分析工具。
AI.method: 利用 Hopf-Cole 变换建立 log-sum-exp 层与粘性 Hamilton-Jacobi 方程之间的精确对应；将残差网络、Transformer、RNN/LSTM/SSM 等架构统一建模为同一类 HJ 方程的不同离散化（依赖于架构的 Hamilton 量和粘性）；引入单一变形参数 ε 连接四个视角。
AI.result: 得到闭式影响函数 O(N) 和 softmax 归因权重 π_j；推导出 minimax 最优泛化率 O(n^{-1/(d+2)})；ε 控制对抗鲁棒性；反向传播对应 Hamiltonian 协态方程；数据本征维度相关的标度指数；熵景观随 ε 增加经历折叠分岔。
AI.conclusion: 神经网络训练与推理可统一在 Hamilton-Jacobi 方程框架下，ε 是连接不同视角的核心参数，该框架提供了泛化、鲁棒性、归因等关键性质的定量理论解释。

title: Governing Technical Debt in Agentic AI Systems
summary: Agentic AI systems are increasingly being explored as production infrastructure: they reason over multiple steps, call tools, act through workflows, and adapt through memory and feedback. These systems create governance challenges that are not fully captured by traditional software or predictive ML technical debt. We define Agentic Technical Debt as the accumulated liability created when prompts, memory, tool schemas, orchestration graphs, control policies, and observability routines are patched together faster than they can be validated, standardized, and governed. We define Stochastic Tax as the recurring operating burden of keeping probabilistic agent behavior within acceptable bounds. The distinction matters: debt is a stock of design and governance liability, while the tax is a flow of operating cost that arises because stochastic agents act through tools and workflows. We outline how managers can make both visible through lightweight dashboards and governance controls.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"Agentic技术债务"和"随机税"两个概念，分别描述AI智能体系统中因快速拼凑产生的累积治理负债和因概率性行为产生的持续运营成本，并给出管理建议。
AI.motivation: 传统软件和预测性ML的技术债务框架无法充分捕捉智能体AI系统（多步推理、工具调用、工作流、记忆与反馈）带来的治理挑战，因此需要新的概念框架来理解和量化这些系统的负债与成本。
AI.method: 通过定义两个核心概念（Agentic技术债务作为存量负债，随机税作为流量运营成本），区分其本质差异，并建议通过轻量级仪表盘和治理控制来使二者可视化。
AI.result: 明确了Agentic技术债务（设计治理负债的存量）与随机税（运营成本的流量）的区别，并提出了管理者可操作的监控与治理方案。
AI.conclusion: 智能体AI系统需要新的治理框架，将技术债务（存量）与随机税（流量）区分管理，通过可视化仪表盘降低治理成本，使概率性行为维持在可接受范围内。

title: Text-Preserving Lossy Text Compression: A Study of Strategic Deletion and LLM Reconstruction
summary: Traditional lossless text compression preserves every byte, but its gains on natural language are often modest in realistic operating regimes. We study \emph{lossy semantic text compression}, where the encoder strategically deletes parts of the text and a large language model (LLM) reconstructs the original content from the retained skeleton. We benchmark a progression of deletion strategies, including uniform step deletion, word-length-guided deletion (WordLen), word-frequency-guided deletion (WordFreq), LP-optimized deletion (Opt), entropy-based deletion using GPT-2 surprisal, and hybrid methods that combine frequency and surprisal signals. Evaluation on the BBC News dataset across retention rates $\r_{keep} \in [0.1,0.9]$ shows three main findings. First, WordFreq is a strong low-cost baseline: despite using only a static frequency lookup, it remains competitive with much more expensive semantic methods while being far faster at the encoder. Second, semantic and hybrid methods provide their clearest gains at mild-to-moderate compression, whereas word-frequency deletion is often more robust at the lowest retention rates. Third, QLoRA fine-tuning yields a strong local decoder that is competitive with Gemini 2.0 Flash and is often strongest in decoder-only comparisons. Additional English and Chinese experiments show that the overall framework transfers across domains, while the best deletion rule remains dataset-dependent.

AI.tldr: 本文研究有损语义文本压缩，编码器策略性地删除文本部分，LLM重构原始内容。实验发现：WordFreq是低成本强基线；语义方法在中度压缩时优势明显；QLoRA微调可产生强大的本地解码器。
AI.motivation: 传统无损文本压缩对自然语言的压缩增益有限，作者希望探索有损语义压缩（选择性删除文本后用LLM重构）能否在保留语义的前提下实现更高压缩率。
AI.method: 对比多种删除策略：均匀步长删除、词长引导、词频引导(WordFreq)、LP优化、GPT-2熵删除、以及结合频率与熵的混合方法。在BBC News数据集上评估保留率0.1-0.9，并用QLoRA微调本地解码器。
AI.result: WordFreq是强且快的低成本基线；语义方法在中度压缩时增益最大，低保留率时词频删除更稳健；QLoRA微调产生的本地解码器可媲美Gemini 2.0 Flash；框架可跨领域迁移。
AI.conclusion: 有损语义压缩框架有效，但最佳删除策略依赖数据集特性，不存在通用的最优规则。

title: EarthShift: a benchmark for measuring robustness to real-world distribution shifts in Earth observation
summary: Current Earth observation benchmarks focus on measuring performance on diverse tasks and applications, typically measuring generalization in-distribution. But when models are deployed, they must generalize to myriad out-of-distribution scenarios, such as new time periods, geographies, scales, and sensors. We introduce EarthShift: the first public testbed for benchmarking robustness across multiple realistic distribution shifts encountered in remote sensing. EarthShift enables users to measure distributional robustness by comparing performance in- and out-of-distribution using datasets from paired datasets from different sources, temporal windows, geographic locations, and sensors. Our experiments on 8 geospatial foundation models (GFMs) and 11 tasks covering 5 shift types show that GFMs consistently perform 15-20% worse out-of-distribution on average regardless of model architecture, size, pre-training or fine-tuning strategy. We show that GFM robustness is similar to that of generic vision foundation models, and even fully-supervised models. This highlights a need for future research to strive for improvements in distributional robustness, not just performance, which can be benchmarked using EarthShift. We release our code and datasets to provide a testbed to guide future work to create foundation models that are robust and reliable in real-world applications. Code and data for EarthShift are available at: https://earthshift.github.io

AI.tldr: EarthShift是首个用于遥感领域分布偏移鲁棒性测试的公开基准，包含5种偏移类型，实验表明8种地理空间基础模型在分布外场景中平均性能下降15-20%，且鲁棒性与通用视觉模型及全监督模型相当。
AI.motivation: 现有遥感基准仅关注分布内泛化性能，而模型部署时需面对时间、地理、尺度、传感器等多种分布偏移场景，缺乏系统的鲁棒性测试平台。
AI.method: 构建EarthShift基准，涵盖5种分布偏移类型（时间、地理、尺度、传感器等），配对分布内/分布外数据集，在8种地理空间基础模型和11个任务上进行系统性鲁棒性评估。
AI.result: 所有地理空间基础模型在分布外场景平均性能下降15-20%，且鲁棒性与通用视觉基础模型及全监督模型相似，不受模型架构、规模、预训练或微调策略影响。
AI.conclusion: 当前地理空间基础模型在分布鲁棒性方面存在显著不足，未来研究应不仅关注性能提升，还需注重分布鲁棒性改进，EarthShift为此提供了标准化测试平台。

title: Learning Robust and Task-Invariant Functional Representation from fMRI through Siamese Self-Supervised Learning
summary: Functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI) is a powerful tool for investigating human brain function. However, the high cost of data acquisition and the inherent subjectivity of psychiatric rating scales often lead to datasets with small sample sizes and variable label quality, especially when targeting a specific neurological condition. Combined with the inherently high dimensionality of fMRI data, these limitations substantially increase the risk of model overfitting. Recent years have seen growing interest in developing fMRI foundation models by combining multiple datasets; however, the computational resources needed for pretraining and fine-tuning are often prohibitive. We show that a lightweight self-supervised framework yields representations that generalize across diverse downstream tasks, outperforming fully supervised baselines and approaching the performance of large-scale models. We introduce BrainSimSiam, a data-efficient self-supervised representation learning framework that leverages positive-only data pairs to learn robust and generalizable features. We demonstrate that the learned representations achieve strong performance across multiple downstream classification and regression tasks, highlighting the potential of BrainSimSiam for data-limited neuroimaging applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BrainSimSiam，一种轻量级自监督学习框架，仅使用正样本对从fMRI数据中学习鲁棒且可泛化的特征表示，在多个下游分类和回归任务中超越全监督基线，性能接近大规模模型，尤其适合数据有限的神经影像应用场景。
AI.motivation: fMRI数据获取成本高、样本量小、标签质量不稳定，加之数据维度高，导致模型容易过拟合。现有的大规模fMRI基础模型需要大量计算资源进行预训练和微调，不便于推广使用。
AI.method: 提出BrainSimSiam，一种轻量级自监督表示学习框架，仅使用正样本对（positive-only data pairs）进行训练，无需负样本或大规模预训练，通过自监督方式学习鲁棒且可泛化的特征表示。
AI.result: 学习的表示在多个下游分类和回归任务上均取得强性能，超越了全监督基线，并且性能接近需要更大计算资源的大规模模型。
AI.conclusion: BrainSimSiam为数据有限的神经影像应用提供了一种高效、轻量的解决方案，有望降低fMRI研究中模型过拟合风险，并推动fMRI基础模型的更广泛应用。

title: Better Later Than Sooner: Neuro-Symbolic Knowledge Graph Construction via Ontology-grounded Post-extraction Correction
summary: Question answering (QA) is a core challenge in AI, particularly for complex queries requiring multi-hop reasoning across documents, or symbolic operations like aggregation or exhaustive listing. Retrieval-augmented generation has become the dominant approach to QA, with recent graph-based variants addressing part of these issues by organizing knowledge to better support compositional questions. However, most textual graph-based RAG methods still lack the structure needed for symbolic operations useful to answer complex questions reliably. This motivates symbolic graph-based approaches, which extract knowledge graphs (KGs) whose relations are logic predicates that enable SQL-like querying. Yet these pipelines typically use LLMs for KG extraction, which can introduce consistency issues, where extracted facts may violate commonsense ontology constraints. We propose a neuro-symbolic framework for ontology-grounded KG construction combining open-domain extraction, embedding-based canonicalization of types and predicates, and targeted LLM-based correction of ontology violations. By deferring corrections to a post-extraction stage, our method avoids repeated LLM calls, substantially reducing token usage while improving KG consistency and preserving downstream QA quality. Finally, we show that the extracted KGs are well suited for symbolic querying by measuring the occurrence of SPARQL graph patterns.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种神经符号框架，通过结合开放域抽取、基于嵌入的类型/谓词规范化以及针对性的LLM本体校正，构建本体约束的知识图谱，在减少token消耗的同时提升KG一致性并保持下游QA质量。
AI.motivation: 现有基于文本的图RAG方法缺乏支持符号操作（如SQL式查询）的结构，而基于符号的KG抽取方法存在LLM一致性问题，抽取事实可能违反常识本体约束。
AI.method: 提出神经符号框架：1) 开放域KG抽取；2) 基于嵌入的类型和谓词规范化（canonicalization）；3) 针对本体违规的LLM后纠正。将纠正延迟到抽取后阶段，避免重复LLM调用。
AI.result: 该方法大幅降低token使用量，提升KG一致性，同时保持下游QA质量；通过SPARQL图模式出现频率验证了抽取的KG适合符号查询。
AI.conclusion: 通过后纠正策略在效率和一致性之间取得良好平衡，生成的KG能够有效支持符号化查询，为复杂QA提供更可靠的结构化知识支撑。

title: Error as a Lens: Probing LLM Reasoning through Synthetic Misconception Generation
summary: Personalized tutoring, teacher training, and education research need access to \emph{targeted} synthetic misconceptions, but privacy and IRB constraints make labelled corpora of real student errors scarce.
