LLMs could in principle generate synthetic errors at scale, but producing an arbitrary wrong answer is easy for a modern LLM while producing one that matches a specified cognitive failure mode is much harder. We present a framework that generates errors targeted to a five-class taxonomy adapted from the revised Bloom's taxonomy, evaluated on questions from the TheoremQA dataset. A Generation Agent (GA) drafts a candidate erroneous solution conditioned on a target class, and an Examination Agent (EA) judges whether the draft is incorrect and class-consistent. The framework yields a reusable recipe for building class-stratified synthetic error datasets where authentic student corpora are unavailable. As a secondary diagnostic, targeted error generation is substantially harder than free-form incorrect-answer generation, and answer-grounding contributes more than expanded examples or external textbook content.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个双层智能体框架（生成智能体+检查智能体），用于生成针对布鲁姆分类学五个类别的合成错误答案，在TheoremQA数据集上验证，发现目标导向的错误生成比自由形式错误生成困难得多，且答案锚定比扩展示例或外部教材内容贡献更大。
AI.motivation: 个性化辅导、教师培训和教育研究需要**针对性**的合成错误概念，但隐私和IRB限制导致真实学生错误标注语料匮乏。LLM虽可大规模生成错误答案，但生成符合特定认知失败模式的错误比生成任意错误答案困难得多。
AI.method: 提出双层智能体框架：1) 生成智能体(GA)根据目标类别草拟候选错误解答；2) 检查智能体(EA)判断草稿是否错误且类别一致。在TheoremQA数据集上，基于修订版布鲁姆分类学的五类分类法进行评估。
AI.result: 目标导向的错误生成比自由形式错误生成更困难；答案锚定（answer-grounding）比扩展示例或外部教材内容贡献更大；框架可生成可重用的分层合成错误数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了一种在缺乏真实学生语料时构建分层合成错误数据集的可重用方法，并对不同错误生成策略的难度和贡献进行了诊断分析。

title: Rethinking FID Through the Geometry of the Reference Dataset
comment: 9 pages, 2 figures. Accepted to ICML 2026 Workshop: Combining Theory and Benchmarks
summary: Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) is widely used to evaluate image generators, yet lower FID does not always correspond to better sample quality. We show that this mismatch depends in part on the geometry of the reference dataset. In a controlled study across six datasets, distributional density and effective rank significantly explain how FID changes as sample quality improves. Concentrated datasets tend to yield more favorable FID trends, whereas more dispersed datasets can make FID worsen despite better samples. Attribution to precision and recall and ablations with alternative feature spaces and distances support the same conclusion. These results suggest that distributional metrics should be interpreted together with the geometry of the reference dataset for more reliable benchmarking.

AI.tldr: FID分数与样本质量之间的不一致性部分源于参考数据集的几何结构（密度和有效秩），集中数据集下FID更可靠，分散数据集下FID可能误导。
AI.motivation: 揭示FID作为评估指标时与样本质量不匹配的原因，指出参考数据集的几何属性会影响FID的可靠性。
AI.method: 在六个数据集上进行受控研究，分析分布密度和有效秩对FID趋势的影响，并通过精度/召回归因、替代特征空间与距离的消融实验进行验证。
AI.result: 数据集的集中程度（密度高）时FID随质量提升而改善；数据集分散（密度低）时FID可能恶化。有效秩同样显著影响这一关系。
AI.conclusion: 评估生成模型时，应结合参考数据集的几何特性来解释分布指标，以实现更可靠的基准测试。

title: FormInv: A Measurement Protocol for Semantic Invariance in Mathematical Reasoning Benchmarks
comment: 18 pages, 3 figures. Under review for the 3rd AI for Math Workshop (AI4Math), ICML 2026
summary: A paraphrase-quality audit of MathCheck (ICLR 2025) detected 4 semantically incorrect paraphrases in 129 groups (3.1%); removing them drops GPT-4o from rank 2 to rank 4 and elevates Claude Haiku and DeepSeek V3 above it; these ranking changes are invisible to any single-model evaluation. Cross-model unanimity found these errors automatically (>= 3/4 models for MathCheck; >= 6/9 for our primary evaluation) for under $10; in our own dataset the same protocol found that 47% of auto-generated connective-variation paraphrases were semantically incorrect. That flaw compounds a deeper measurement gap: Claude Haiku 4.5 achieves 86% accuracy yet SCR=50%, meaning half its theorems are answered differently under semantically equivalent restatements, while aggregate accuracy across 9 models spans only 86-96% yet Semantic Consistency Rates (SCR) span 50-82% -- a 32-point gap invisible to standard benchmarks. Formally, for any target ranking over 9 frontier models there exists a weighting over paraphrase families that realizes it (No-Free-Benchmark corollary), because no model Pareto-dominates all families -- so benchmark designers who select families are implicitly choosing which model wins. FormInv supplies the audit protocol (replicated on external benchmarks at 100% recall), SCR and per-theorem Cochran's Q as primary invariance measures evaluated on 9 models across 366-811 items (on Lean4-verified theorems), and FormInvSelector for regime-aware model selection.

AI.tldr: MathCheck基准测试存在语义错误问题：3.1%的改写句错误导致GPT-4o排名虚高；跨模型一致性检测可自动发现这些问题；更大的问题是语义一致性率(SCR)与准确率之间存在32个百分点的巨大差距；论文提出FormInv审计协议和FormInvSelector模型选择工具。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试存在语义改写错误导致模型排名失真，且标准评估无法检测这些错误；更根本的是，模型在语义等价改写下的推理一致性（SCR）与准确率之间存在巨大鸿沟，现有基准无法反映这一测量缺陷。
AI.method: 通过跨模型一致性投票（MathCheck用>=3/4模型，主评估用>=6/9模型）自动检测语义错误；引入SCR（语义一致性率）和per-theorem Cochran's Q作为主要不变量度量；提出No-Free-Benchmark推论证明模型选择的权重依赖性。
AI.result: MathCheck中3.1%的改写错误；移除后GPT-4o从第2降至第4；自建数据集中47%的改写存在语义错误；SCR范围50-82%而准确率范围86-96%，两者差距达32个百分点；FormInv在外部基准上达到100%召回率。
AI.conclusion: 标准基准无法揭示模型在语义等价改写下的不一致性；SCR比准确率更能反映模型鲁棒性差异；基准设计者选择改写族等同于选择获胜模型，需使用FormInv进行审计和FormInvSelector进行模型选择。

title: Paper Agents, Paper Gains: An Empirical Analysis of DeFi Investment Agents
summary: DeFi investment agents, systems that use AI for autonomous on-chain trading, have attained over USD 3 billion in combined token valuations since late 2024. We survey over 1,900 AI-tagged crypto projects, filter to investment-focused agents, and curate 10 representative projects spanning strategy and observability dimensions. We then conduct a deep-dive architectural analysis of two prominent agent frameworks, ElizaOS and Virtuals Protocol, and a quantitative on-chain performance analysis of 11 Solana-based agent treasuries with publicly attributable trading activity, covering 925,323 token holders. We find that current deployments remain early and heterogeneous: (1) in our sample, many projects do not yet provide clear evidence of autonomous trade execution, and developer interviews suggest that many visible deployments remain basic API integrations; (2) agent treasuries retain over USD 30M in paper gains while token holders collectively lost USD 191.7M, with the top 1% of wallets capturing 81.4% of all gains (USD 1.81B); (3) token valuations are weakly connected to treasury fundamentals, with market-cap-to-AUM ratios exceeding 10,000x versus below 1x for established DeFi protocols; and (4) aggregate user gains peaked at USD 2.4B before declining to net losses, with median returns negative on every platform and tokens declining 93% on average from all-time highs. We interpret these outcomes as characteristic of a permissionless, first-generation market in which open infrastructure enables rapid experimentation but also allows naive or speculative agents to launch before robust standards for autonomy, performance, and stakeholder alignment emerge. We therefore propose a maturity framework along three dimensions: autonomous execution, risk-adjusted profitability, and stakeholder alignment, to characterize the gap between current deployments and future investment-grade agent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文调查了AI驱动去中心化金融（DeFi）投资代理的现状。研究涵盖1,900多个AI相关加密项目，深入分析了ElizaOS和Virtuals Protocol两大代理框架，以及对11个Solana代理金库的链上绩效分析（覆盖925,323个代币持有者）。主要发现：大多数项目尚未证明自主交易能力；代理金库账上有超过3,000万美元的纸面收益，而代币持有者集体亏损1.917亿美元，前1%的钱包捕获了81.4%的收益；代币估值与金库基本面弱相关，市值管理资产比率超过10,000倍；用户累计收益从峰值24亿美元跌至净亏损。研究提出了一个衡量代理系统成熟度的三维框架：自主执行能力、风险调整后盈利能力、利益相关者对齐程度。
AI.motivation: DeFi投资代理自2024年底以来吸引了超过30亿美元的代币估值，但这些系统的实际能力、性能和用户影响缺乏系统性研究。本文旨在通过大规模调查和深度分析，揭示当前AI代理在DeFi领域的真实部署状况，识别市场存在的重大问题（如估值泡沫、财富集中、用户损失），并为未来投资级代理系统建立评估标准。
AI.method: 本文采用多阶段分析方法：(1) 对1,900多个AI标记的加密项目进行广泛调查，筛选出投资代理，并选取10个代表性项目；(2) 对ElizaOS和Virtuals Protocol两个主要代理框架进行深入的架构分析；(3) 对11个Solana基代理金库进行定量链上绩效分析，覆盖925,323个代币持有者；(4) 提出三维成熟度框架（自主执行、风险调整后盈利、利益相关者对齐）。
AI.result: (1) 大多数项目尚未提供自主交易的明确证据，许多部署仅是基础API集成；(2) 代理金库保留3,000万美元纸面收益，但代币持有者集体亏损1.917亿美元，1%的钱包捕获81.4%的所有收益（18.1亿美元）；(3) 代币估值与基本面弱相关，市值管理资产比率超过10,000倍（成熟DeFi协议低于1倍）；(4) 用户收益从峰值24亿美元跌至净亏损，各平台中位数收益均为负，代币平均从历史高点下跌93%。
AI.conclusion: 当前DeFi投资代理市场是典型的去中心化第一代市场，开放基础设施促进了快速实验，但也允许幼稚或投机性代理在缺乏自主性、绩效和利益相关者对齐标准的情况下推出。作者提出了一个三维成熟度框架（自主执行、风险调整后盈利能力、利益相关者对齐），用以评估当前部署与未来投资级代理系统之间的差距。

title: LLMBridge: An LLM Pipeline for End-to-end Referential Bridging Resolution in English
summary: In this paper, we introduce LLMBridge, a new LLM based system for the task of end-to-end referential bridging resolution in English. Our bridging resolution pipeline combines heuristic pre/post-processing with the natural language inference ability that comes from LLMs. We evaluate our bridging resolution pipeline on 3 datasets which have been used for referential bridging resolution evaluation in English: ISNotes, BASHI, and GUMBridge. Comparison to previous bridging resolution systems shows that the performance of LLMBridge surpasses previous state-of-the-art (SoTA) systems for all 3 datasets in the challenging End-to-end Evaluation Setting, as well as the Basic Bridging Resolution Evaluation Setting (gold bridging anaphor given). We also conduct a thorough error analysis of the LLMBridge performance, examining what varieties of bridging remain difficult for LLM based systems to identify. With this paper, we release the code for the LLMBridge pipeline.

AI.tldr: LLMBridge是一个基于大语言模型的端到端指称桥接消解系统，结合启发式前后处理与LLM的自然语言推理能力，在三个英文数据集上超越了此前所有SOTA系统，并进行了详细的错误分析。
AI.motivation: 指称桥接消解（referential bridging resolution）是一项具有挑战性的NLP任务，现有系统性能有限，作者希望利用LLM强大的自然语言推理能力来提升端到端场景下的桥接消解效果。
AI.method: 提出LLMBridge管道，包含启发式预处理和后处理模块，核心调用LLM进行自然语言推理判断桥接关系，支持端到端设置和给定桥接回指的基本设置两种评估方式。
AI.result: 在ISNotes、BASHI和GUMBridge三个数据集上，LLMBridge在端到端和基本评估设置中均超越了此前所有SOTA系统。
AI.conclusion: LLM能够有效提升桥接消解性能，但某些特定类型的桥接关系仍然具有挑战性；代码已开源。

title: DMC-CF: Dynamic Multimodal CounterFactual QA benchmark for Causal Reasoning
summary: With the rapid advancement of multimodal large language models (MLLMs), models have demonstrated increasingly powerful multimodal capabilities. However, whether MLLMs trained through statistical learning can truly understand the causal relationships underlying the real world remains a key research question. In recent years, numerous multimodal causal reasoning datasets have been proposed. Nevertheless, these datasets are either limited in scale or constructed from synthetic images and videos, cartoon-based content, or other non-realistic multimodal sources. To address these limitations, we collect real-world videos and construct DMC-CF-Static, a large-scale benchmark for multimodal causal counterfactual reasoning. Furthermore, to mitigate issues such as data contamination in traditional static evaluation, we represent causal events using causal graphs and propose the Dynamic Graph Intervention (DGI) framework to build the dynamic evaluation benchmark DMC-CF-Dynamic from DMC-CF-Static. Experimental results on the overall DMC-CF, which includes both static and dynamic evaluation benchmarks, demonstrate that the multimodal causal reasoning capabilities of current multimodal large language models in real-world scenarios still require substantial improvement.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了大规模真实世界视频多模态因果反事实推理基准DMC-CF，包含静态基准DMC-CF-Static和基于动态图干预（DGI）框架的动态基准DMC-CF-Dynamic，实验表明当前多模态大模型在真实场景中的因果推理能力仍有显著提升空间。
AI.motivation: 现有因果推理数据集规模有限，且多基于合成图像、卡通等非真实多模态数据构建，缺乏真实世界视频的大规模基准。同时，传统静态评估存在数据污染问题。
AI.method: 1）收集真实世界视频，构建大规模多模态因果反事实推理静态基准DMC-CF-Static；2）提出动态图干预（DGI）框架，基于因果图表示因果事件，从静态基准构建动态评估基准DMC-CF-Dynamic。
AI.result: 在整体DMC-CF（包含静态与动态基准）上的实验结果表明，当前多模态大语言模型在真实场景中的多模态因果推理能力仍需大幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 当前多模态大模型在真实世界因果推理任务上表现不足，DMC-CF基准可有效推动该领域研究。

title: FedQHD: Closed-Form Function-Space Federated Reinforcement Learning
summary: Federated reinforcement learning enables decentralized agents to collaboratively improve policies or value estimates without exchanging raw trajectories. However, FedAvg-style parameter averaging is not function-space consistent: when clients use heterogeneous encoders or even identical nonlinear networks, averaged parameters need not correspond to the weighted average of client value functions in any common function space. We propose FedQHD, a federated Q-learning method using hyperdimensional (random-feature) state encoders with a linear readout, so that Q-functions are nonlinear in state yet linear in trainable parameters. This linear structure enables closed-form aggregation. With a shared encoder, the function-space consensus update coincides exactly with weighted averaging of local readout matrices. With heterogeneous encoders, the server constructs a global teacher by averaging client Q-values on a shared anchor-state set, and each client compiles this teacher into its local representation via a single ridge projection. We formalize the federation gap -- the error incurred when compiling a federated teacher into a heterogeneous client representation -- relative to a client-specific oracle projection. We show that this gap decomposes into subspace misalignment, anchor-set conditioning, and regularization bias. We further identify the anchor-to-dimension ratio $m \geq D_i$ as the well-conditioned regime in which the gap reduces to a multiple of the encoder heterogeneity floor. On four continuous-state, discrete-action control benchmarks, FedQHD matches or outperforms FedAvg-style baselines and distillation-based alternatives while requiring substantially less computation, and the empirical dependence of the federation gap on encoder dimension matches our theoretical analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedQHD，一种基于超维度（随机特征）状态编码器的联邦Q学习方法，通过线性读出结构实现函数空间一致的聚合，避免了传统FedAvg参数平均带来的函数空间不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 传统FedAvg风格的参数平均在联邦强化学习中存在函数空间不一致的问题：当客户端使用异构编码器甚至相同的非线性网络时，参数平均并不对应客户端价值函数的加权平均，导致聚合效果受损。
AI.method: 提出FedQHD方法，使用超维度（随机特征）状态编码器配合线性读出层，使Q函数在状态上非线性但参数线性可调。利用线性结构实现闭式聚合：共享编码器时直接平均读出矩阵；异构编码器时，服务器在共享锚点状态集上平均客户端Q值构建全局教师，每个客户端通过岭投影将教师编译到本地表示中。
AI.result: 在四个连续状态、离散动作的控制基准测试中，FedQHD在匹配或超越FedAvg风格基线及基于蒸馏的替代方法的同时，计算量显著更低。联邦间隙对编码器维度的经验依赖性与理论分析一致。
AI.conclusion: FedQHD通过线性读出和超维度编码器有效解决了联邦强化学习中的函数空间不一致问题，理论分析揭示了联邦间隙的构成（子空间错位、锚点集条件数、正则化偏差），并指出锚点-维度比m≥D_i为良态区域。

title: ReasonOps: Operator Segmentation for LLM Reasoning Traces
summary: Chain-of-thought traces from large reasoning models can span tens of thousands of tokens, yet we lack a vocabulary for describing their internal structure. Previous methods developed to analyze chain-of-thought traces are either too rigid or not expressive enough, failing to capture features across domains and models. To remedy this, we develop ReasonOps, an unsupervised, expressive method for annotating chain-of-thought traces, providing succinct universal operators. Using ReasonOps, we analyze 44,662 traces from 12 thinking LLMs spanning 6 families across 8 reasoning benchmarks and discover that they share a common compositional structure: 7 recurring reasoning operators -- discourse-level moves such as backtracking, inferring, and hypothesizing -- that emerge from unsupervised clustering of sentence-initial 3-token pivots. These operators appear across every model family and benchmark domain, confirmed by three independent LLM judges who classify held-out samples at 70 -76% accuracy. We analyze the structure of operators on easy vs. hard problems, revealing that reflective operators are more helpful on hard problems and harm performance on easy problems. Operator sequences are highly model-identifying: a classifier trained on operator distributions alone recovers the source model with macro-AUC, revealing that each model family has a distinctive reasoning fingerprint. Structural operator features predict within-problem answer correctness well above baselines. Classifiers built on these operators reach WP-AUC and on AIME specifically. ReasonOps further enables early quality estimation well before the trace completes: we predict at WP-AUC for only 50% of the trace. The ReasonOps pipeline is unsupervised and annotation-free, enabling deep insights into LLM reasoning traces as well as strong downstream results on model identification and correctness prediction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReasonOps，一种无监督方法，用于为思维链追踪生成简洁的通用算子（如回溯、推断、假设等7种）。通过对12个推理LLM的44,662条追踪分析，发现所有模型共享可组合结构。这些算子能识别模型来源、预测答案正确性，并可在追踪完成前进行早期质量评估。
AI.motivation: 现有的思维链分析方法要么过于僵化，要么表达能力不足，无法跨领域和模型捕捉特征。缺乏描述思维链内部结构的通用词汇。
AI.method: 提出ReasonOps无监督方法，通过对句首3个token的聚类，从思维链追踪中提取7种通用推理算子（回溯、推断、假设等），并使用3个独立LLM裁判验证。
AI.result: 7种算子出现在所有模型系列和基准领域；算子分布可识别模型来源（宏AUC）；算子结构特征能预测答案正确性（WP-AUC）；仅用50%追踪即可实现早期质量估计（WP-AUC）。
AI.conclusion: ReasonOps提供了无监督、免标注的思维链分析工具，揭示了LLM推理的通用组成结构，并在模型识别和正确性预测方面取得了强下游结果。

title: Bosses, Kings, and the Commons: Cooperation Under Power Asymmetry in LLM Societies
summary: Communities can sustainably manage shared resources (commons) through self-governance and cooperative norms, a central finding of Ostrom's theory of self-governance. However, real-world commons (e.g., fisheries, forests, and irrigation systems) are often governed under asymmetric power structures, where certain individuals or institutions possess disproportionate control over resource extraction and collective outcomes. As Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly explored as agents in synthetic governance simulations, understanding how LLM societies behave under asymmetric power structures is becoming increasingly important, yet existing evaluations largely ignore such asymmetries. We introduce Sovereignty over the Commons Simulation (SovSim), a generative multi-agent simulation framework that incorporates an agent with asymmetric power (boss or king) into a society of symmetric agents (workers or peasants), where all agents extract from a shared resource, collectively determining its sustainability over time. Across eleven state-of-the-art models, we find that introducing asymmetric power leads to severe breakdowns in cooperation and sustainability, with up to an 87.3% degradation in survival rate relative to symmetric settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SovSim框架，研究LLM社会在非对称权力结构下合作与可持续性的崩溃，发现引入"国王"角色可导致生存率下降高达87.3%。
AI.motivation: 现有研究忽视LLM社会中非对称权力结构的影响，而现实中的公共资源管理常存在权力不对等。
AI.method: 提出SovSim生成式多智能体仿真框架，在对称智能体社会中引入非对称权力智能体（老板/国王），测试11种先进LLM模型。
AI.result: 非对称权力导致合作与可持续性严重崩溃，生存率在对称与非对称之间下降高达87.3%。
AI.conclusion: LLM社会在非对称权力结构下难以维持Ostrom式自治理的可持续性，权力不平等是合作退化的关键因素。

title: WorldMemArena: Evaluating Multimodal Agent Memory Through Action-World Interaction
summary: Multimodal large language models are increasingly deployed as long-horizon agents, where memory must do more than recall: it must track an evolving world, revise what has gone stale, and surface the right evidence at decision time. Existing benchmarks measure recall over static dialogue, collapse memory into a single end-of-task accuracy, and reduce visual observations to captions, leaving us unable to localize failures to writing, maintenance, retrieval, or use. The rise of agent harnesses that author their own memory sharpens this gap, since we have no principled way to compare hand-designed pipelines with self-managing alternatives. To close these gaps, we formulate multimodal agent memory as an Action-World Interaction Loop with an observable four-stage lifecycle, and instantiate it in WorldMemArena: 400 multi-session multimodal tasks spanning Lifelong Evolution (evolving personal and task states) and Agentic Execution (memory from real observations, actions, and feedback), annotated with gold memory points, updates, distractors, and evidence chains for stage-level diagnosis. This enables the first head-to-head comparison of long-context, manually designed (RAG and external memory systems), and harness-based memory agents. Results show that: (1) better memory writing and storage do not guarantee better performance; (2) multimodal memory still struggles to fully use visual evidence; (3) systems are unstable across domains and degrade on realistic agentic trajectories; and (4) harness memory is more flexible but remains costly and less reliable.

AI.tldr: 本文提出WorldMemArena基准，首次系统评估多模态大语言模型在长期代理任务中的记忆能力，发现当前系统在视觉证据利用、跨领域稳定性和记忆可靠性方面存在显著不足。
AI.motivation: 现有基准仅评估静态对话中的回忆能力，将记忆简化为单一准确率指标，无法定位失败于记忆的写入、维护、检索或使用哪个环节，且缺乏对手动设计与自管理记忆代理的可比评估方法。
AI.method: 将多模态代理记忆形式化为"动作-世界交互循环"的四阶段生命周期，构建包含400个多会话多模态任务的WorldMemArena基准，标注黄金记忆点、更新、干扰项和证据链，支持阶段级诊断。
AI.result: (1)更好的记忆写入和存储不保证更好性能；(2)多模态记忆难以充分利用视觉证据；(3)系统跨领域不稳定且在真实代理轨迹上退化；(4)记忆框架更灵活但成本高且可靠性低。
AI.conclusion: 当前多模态代理记忆系统在视觉证据利用和跨领域泛化上仍有显著瓶颈，记忆框架虽有潜力但需提升可靠性与成本效益。

title: LoRe: Adaptive Interaction-Evaluation Routing with Per-Step Interaction Budgets for Iterative Graph Solvers
summary: Diffusion-based neural solvers for combinatorial optimization repeatedly re-evaluate dense edge/factor interactions, making inference expensive in wall-clock time and often memory-bound at scale. Inspired by the computational methodologies of many-body physics, we introduce LoRe, a training-free, inference-time drop-in wrapper that enforces per-step interaction-evaluation budgeting: at each iteration, it evaluates only a fixed fraction of interactions by dynamically routing computation to high-conflict or high-uncertainty interactions, instead of using a fixed sparsification (e.g., static kNN graphs or static masks). Under fully inclusive end-to-end wall-clock accounting, LoRe substantially improves scalability on the Maximum Independent Set (MIS) problem, extending feasible inference more than $3\times$ beyond the baseline's out-of-memory limit, delivering a $\sim 8\times$ speedup and a $\sim 12\times$ peak-memory reduction, with solution quality preserved in this regime. Demonstrating cross-task generality on the large-scale Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) and zero-shot robustness to topology shifts, LoRe achieves a $\sim 15\times$ speedup at $n=1000$ with a $44\times$ memory reduction and competitive tour quality.

AI.tldr: LoRe是一种无需训练的推理时包装器，通过动态预算分配只评估部分边/因子交互，显著提升扩散型组合优化神经求解器的可扩展性（MIS问题扩展3倍以上，速度提升~8倍，内存减少~12倍；TSP问题n=1000时速度提升~15倍，内存减少44倍），同时保持解质量。
AI.motivation: 扩散型神经求解器在组合优化中需要反复评估密集的边/因子交互，导致推理耗时且内存受限，难以扩展到大规模问题。
AI.method: LoRe受多体物理计算方法启发，是一种无需训练、推理时的即插即用包装器：在每次迭代中只评估固定比例的交互，通过动态路由计算将资源分配给高冲突或高不确定性的交互，而非使用静态稀疏化策略。
AI.result: 在MIS问题上：可行推理规模扩大3倍以上，速度提升~8倍，峰值内存减少~12倍，解质量保持不变。在TSP问题上（n=1000）：速度提升~15倍，内存减少44倍，竞争性的路径质量。零样本鲁棒性应对拓扑变化。
AI.conclusion: LoRe通过动态交互预算分配，在不牺牲解质量的前提下显著提升了扩散型组合优化求解器的可扩展性和效率，且具有跨任务泛化能力和零样本鲁棒性。

title: GTA: Generating Long-Horizon Tasks for Web Agents at Scale
comment: Published at Proceedings of the 64th Annual Meeting of the Association for Computational Linguistics
summary: Web agents, which couple language models with browsing and tool-use capabilities, show promise as open web assistants. Yet progress is increasingly limited by the lack of scalable, process-level supervision. Existing benchmarks are largely manually constructed, providing only coarse start-goal annotations without intermediate trajectories, while recent automatic generation efforts remain expensive, biased, and shallow. These limitations prevent reliable training and evaluation of agents that must generalize to realistic, multi-hop, cross-page tasks. We introduce a scalable framework, GTA, that integrates crawling, retrieval-based seeding, in-context generation, and automated quality control to produce realistic tasks paired with executable trajectories. This design decouples crawling from generation for greater efficiency, grounds tasks in the site graph to enforce compositionality, and ensures dense supervision through deterministic replays and systematic validation. We instantiate the pipeline on over 50 websites covering e-commerce, government, forums, and news, with multilingual and multi-hop coverage. The resulting benchmark reveals a significant human-agent performance gap and enables detailed diagnostics. Our contributions are three-fold: (i) formalizing multi-hop web-agent task generation, (ii) proposing an efficient and validated pipeline for automatic data creation, and (iii) releasing a dynamic benchmark with reproducible evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GTA框架，通过整合爬取、检索式种子生成、上下文生成和自动质量控制，自动创建多跳网页智能体任务及轨迹，构建了覆盖50+网站的基准，揭示了人机性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有网页智能体基准多依赖人工构建，缺乏中间轨迹的粗粒度标注成本高，而自动生成方法昂贵、有偏且浅层，无法支持智能体在多跳跨页任务上的训练与评估。
AI.method: 提出GTA框架：将爬取与生成解耦以提高效率，基于站点图进行检索式种子生成以强制组合性，通过确定性回放和系统验证提供密集的轨迹级监督。
AI.result: 在50+网站（电商、政府、论坛、新闻）上实例化，涵盖多语言和多跳场景，构建的基准揭示了显著的人机性能差距。
AI.conclusion: 贡献包括：(i)形式化多跳网页智能体任务生成，(ii)提出高效且经过验证的自动数据创建流水线，(iii)发布动态基准和可复现评估。

title: Orthogonal Negative Guidance in Attention Feature Space for Text-to-Image Generation
summary: Text-to-image (T2I) models have become increasingly capable of generating high-quality images. Yet, enforcing the explicit absence of a specified object or attribute remains a fundamentally challenging problem. Existing approaches, including prompt negation, post-hoc editing, and negative guidance, remain insufficient for explicit concept suppression, often failing to remove the target concept or degrading overall image quality. To this end, we propose Orthogonal Negative Guidance in attention feature space, a training-free method that operates in the attention output space of MM-DiT-based T2I transformers. Our method orthogonalizes negative-prompt attention features with respect to positive-prompt features and subtracts only the orthogonal component, suppressing unwanted concepts while preserving desired semantics. Experiments on FLUX-dev and FLUX-schnell show that our method achieves favorable trade-offs between concept suppression, prompt alignment, and image quality. In human evaluation, our method outperforms the second-best baseline by 18.78%. We further show that our method supports multi-concept suppression and adjustable concept suppression.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于注意力特征空间的正交负向引导方法，无需训练即可在MM-DiT架构的T2I模型中实现精确概念抑制，通过正交化正负提示注意力特征来去除不需要的概念，同时保持图像质量和提示对齐。
AI.motivation: 现有T2I模型难以实现显式概念抑制，提示否定、后处理编辑和负向引导等方法在移除目标概念时往往效果不佳或损害图像质量。
AI.method: 在注意力输出空间中对负向提示特征相对于正向提示特征进行正交化，仅减去正交分量，从而在抑制不需要概念的同时保留期望语义。
AI.result: 在FLUX-dev和FLUX-schnell上实验，人评中比第二好基线高18.78%，支持多概念抑制和可调节概念抑制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在概念抑制、提示对齐和图像质量之间取得了良好权衡，是一种训练免费且有效的解决方案。

title: Causal Intelligence for Constraint-Aware Intervention Design to Induce State Transitions
summary: Driving a system from one state to another through targeted interventions is a fundamental challenge in science, yet most predictive models offer limited mechanistic insight and no principled framework for decision-making. Here we present COAST (Causally Optimal Actions for State Transitions), a causal-intelligence approach for the in-silico design of constrained interventions that induce user-defined state transitions. Given data characterizing source and target states, COAST learns context-specific causal graphs and structural causal models, attributes observed distributional shifts to mechanism-level causal drivers, and introduces a novel constraint-aware multi-objective optimization formulation that balances transition efficacy, intervention complexity, and target-state stability. The approach is modular and domain-agnostic, integrating feature selection, causal discovery, causal modeling, and intervention identification and evaluation through interchangeable components. Across synthetic benchmarks and real biological datasets, COAST recovers key causal drivers and identifies robust single- and multi-target intervention strategies that achieve desired state transitions, accompanied by transparent mechanistic rationales to guide experimental validation.

AI.tldr: COAST是一种因果智能方法，通过学习上下文特定的因果图、结构因果模型以及约束感知的多目标优化，从数据中设计最优干预策略，实现系统从源状态到目标状态的可控转变。
AI.motivation: 现有预测模型缺乏机制性洞察，无法为状态转换提供原则性的干预决策框架。
AI.method: COAST包含：特征选择、因果发现、结构因果建模、机制级分布偏移归因，以及结合干预效果、复杂度和目标状态稳定性的约束感知多目标优化。
AI.result: 在合成基准和真实生物数据上，COAST成功恢复关键因果驱动因素，识别出稳健的单/多靶点干预策略，并提供透明机制解释。
AI.conclusion: COAST提供了一种模块化、领域无关的因果干预策略设计框架，能有效指导实验验证。

title: BenchTrace: A Benchmark for Testing Reflection Ability and Controlled Evolution in LLM Agents
summary: Self-evolving agents improve over time by reflecting on past failures, but existing evaluation is limited in two ways: it measures only task scores, leaving reflection quality unknown, and it relies on agents' own episode runs, offering no mechanism to target specific failure patterns. We present \textbf{BenchTrace}, a benchmark for evaluating self-evolution ability in LLM agents. BenchTrace is built on a snapshot-reflection dataset of 1,821 annotated episodes spanning six diverse tasks, and comprises a \textbf{Reflection Evaluation} that probes failure identification through targeted QA tasks, and an \textbf{Evolution Evaluation} that tests whether past failure experience translates into avoidance behavior in a controlled self-evolution simulation. Building on BenchTrace, we propose \textbf{failure avoidance rate (FAR)}, a new evaluation metric measuring the fraction of test cases in which the agent successfully avoids the target failure instance. Experiments with Qwen3-32B and GPT-4.1 reveal that both models fall below a 30\% end-to-end pass rate on reflection evaluation, with diagnosis as the primary bottleneck. Evolution evaluation shows that self-evolution methods generally improve FAR over the non-evolving baseline, but agents forget early lessons as noise episodes accumulate, and agents fail to generalize their reflections beyond the specific context, causing negative transfer across task contexts. Our correlation analysis further reveals that only a fully correct reflection is strongly associated with higher FAR. BenchTrace exposes concrete limits of current self-evolution approaches and provides a controlled, model-agnostic framework for targeted evaluation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出BenchTrace，一个用于评估LLM智能体自我进化能力的基准。它包含1,821条带注释的快照-反思数据集，通过反思评估（Reflection Evaluation）和进化评估（Evolution Evaluation）两个维度，以及失败避免率（FAR）指标，揭示当前模型在自我进化中诊断能力不足、遗忘早期经验、缺乏泛化等关键瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有自我进化智能体的评估存在两个局限：仅衡量任务得分而忽视反思质量，且依赖智能体自身回合运行，无法针对特定失败模式进行评估。
AI.method: 构建1,821条带注释的智能体快照-反思数据集，覆盖六种任务。提出Reflection Evaluation（通过目标QA任务探测失败识别能力）和Evolution Evaluation（在受控模拟中测试经验是否能转化为规避行为），并提出FAR（失败避免率）指标。
AI.result: Qwen3-32B和GPT-4.1在反思评估上的端到端通过率均低于30%，诊断是主要瓶颈。进化评估显示自我进化方法能提升FAR，但智能体会遗忘早期经验、无法泛化反思到具体上下文之外，导致负迁移。
AI.conclusion: BenchTrace揭示了当前自我进化方法的明确局限，为针对性评估提供了受控、与模型无关的框架。仅完全的反思才与更高的FAR强相关。

title: Structured Prompt Optimization Meets Reinforcement Learning for Global and Local Interpretability over Complex Text
summary: LLMs have advanced text classification, yet existing paradigms face a trade-off: supervised (label only) fine-tuning is scalable but offers limited reasoning on complex text and lacks broader model transparency, while discrete prompt optimization offers human-readable instructions but struggles with performance and scalability. We introduce eXTC (eXplainable Text Classifier) with three progressive stages: (1) learning a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP, or rulebook) in natural language via a new Structured Prompt Optimization algorithm; (2) SOP-grounded reasoning distillation from a large teacher LLM into a compact LM; and (3) expanding reasoning capabilities beyond the initial SOP via reinforcement learning. This design enables eXTC to provide (i) fast inference via a compact LM, with (ii) inference-time local reasoning traces, alongside a global, modular explanation of its learned domain rules, while (iii) significantly outperforming existing paradigms across diverse benchmarks in both classification performance and explanation quality, with stage-by-stage gains.

AI.tldr: 提出eXTC，通过三阶段流程（SOP学习、推理蒸馏、强化学习扩展）在分类性能和可解释性上显著超越现有范式，同时保持紧凑模型快速推理。
AI.motivation: 现有文本分类范式存在两难：监督微调可扩展但推理能力有限且不透明，离散提示优化可解释但性能和可扩展性差。需要一种兼顾性能、可解释性和可扩展性的方法。
AI.method: 三阶段渐进式流程：1) 通过结构化提示优化算法学习自然语言标准操作流程(SOP)；2) 从大型教师LLM向紧凑学生LM进行基于SOP的推理蒸馏；3) 通过强化学习扩展超出初始SOP的推理能力。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，分类性能和解释质量均显著优于现有范式，且每个阶段都能带来逐步提升。
AI.conclusion: eXTC通过紧凑模型实现快速推断，同时提供推理时局部推理轨迹和全局模块化规则解释，成功打破了性能与可解释性之间的权衡。

title: Semantic and Visual Evidence for Efficient Long-Video Reasoning: A Solution for the HD-EPIC VQA Challenge
summary: Understanding long-form egocentric videos remains challenging for multimodal large language models (MLLMs) due to limited context length and insufficient grounding of fine-grained visual details. The recently proposed HD-EPIC benchmark highlights these limitations: even strong long-context models achieve relatively low performance across diverse video question answering tasks. In this paper, we propose a unified framework that decouples long-video reasoning into two complementary forms of evidence: semantic evidence and visual evidence. Semantic evidence captures global procedural structure through a coarse-to-fine extraction pipeline, while object-centric visual evidence preserves fine-grained grounding through bounding boxes and visual embeddings. During inference, we formulate reasoning as a query-conditioned evidence retrieval and integration process, dynamically selecting relevant information from both sources. Our approach achieves competitive performance in the HD-EPIC-VQA Challenge across multiple task categories. More broadly, our results demonstrate that explicitly structuring, retrieving, and integrating semantic and visual evidence is critical for effective long-video understanding with MLLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种解耦长视频推理的统一框架，将证据分为语义证据（全局过程结构）和视觉证据（细粒度目标中心信息），通过查询条件的证据检索与集成实现动态选择，在HD-EPIC-VQA挑战中取得竞争性表现。
AI.motivation: 长格式第一人称视频理解对多模态大模型存在挑战：有限上下文长度与细粒度视觉细节接地不足。现有强长上下文模型在HD-EPIC基准上表现仍较低。
AI.method: 提出统一框架，将长视频推理解耦为语义证据（通过粗到细提取管道捕获全局过程结构）和视觉证据（通过边界框和视觉嵌入保留目标中心细粒度接地）。推理时进行查询条件驱动的证据检索与集成。
AI.result: 在HD-EPIC-VQA挑战的多个任务类别中取得竞争性表现。
AI.conclusion: 显式地结构化、检索和集成语义与视觉证据，对于利用MLLM实现有效的长视频理解至关重要。

title: Label-Free Reinforcement Learning via Cross-Model Entropy
summary: Post-training large language models with reinforcement learning is bottlenecked by the reward signal. Existing approaches require either ground-truth verifiable rewards, restricting training to domains with automatic correctness checks (e.g., mathematics, code execution), or human preference labels, which are expensive to collect and prone to reward hacking. Recent label-free methods replace ground-truth verifiers with self-referential signals like majority voting or token entropy over a model's own outputs, but risk reinforcing a model's own errors. In this work we propose Cross-Model Entropy (CME), the mean log-likelihood of a generator's response under a separate verifier model, as a label-free reward signal for RL post-training. CME is continuous, training-free, and grounded in the principle that responses a verifier finds unsurprising are likely correct or high quality. Because the verifier is independent of the generator, the signal cannot be gamed through self-consistency. We integrate CME into GRPO with no other changes to the training loop, extending label-free RL to open-ended instruction following -- a regime where self-referential signals are inapplicable or poorly suited. On open-ended instruction following (UltraFeedback prompts, evaluated on AlpacaEval 2.0), CME rewards beat the untrained base in head-to-head LLM-as-Judge comparisons across four model families (Qwen, Llama, Gemma, OLMo) and three training regimes (pretrained, SFT, and instruction-tuned), with tie-adjusted win rates ranging from 52.5% to 71.4%. Code will be released upon publication.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cross-Model Entropy (CME)，用一个独立的验证器模型计算生成器输出的平均对数似然作为奖励信号，替代传统RL训练中需要人工标注或自参考的奖励，在开放指令遵循任务上取得了显著提升。
AI.motivation: 现有RL后训练受限于奖励信号瓶颈：基于可验证奖励的方法只适用于数学、代码等有自动正确性检查的领域；基于人类偏好的标注成本高且易被奖励欺骗；无标注的自参考方法（如多数投票、token熵）会强化模型自身错误。
AI.method: 提出Cross-Model Entropy (CME)，使用一个独立的验证器模型计算生成器输出在该验证器下的平均对数似然作为奖励信号，并集成到GRPO训练框架中，无需对训练循环做其他修改。
AI.result: 在UltraFeedback prompts上评估，使用AlpacaEval 2.0进行LLM-as-Judge对比，CME奖励在四个模型家族（Qwen, Llama, Gemma, OLMo）和三种训练范式（预训练、SFT、指令微调）下均超过未训练的基座模型，调整后的胜率在52.5%到71.4%之间。
AI.conclusion: CME是一种连续、无需训练、不可被自我一致性欺骗的无标注奖励信号，能将标签自由的RL扩展至开放指令遵循等自参考方法不适用的场景。

title: Tailoring the Curriculum: Student-Centered Reasoning Distillation via Dynamic Data-Model Compatibility
summary: Reasoning distillation transfers complex reasoning abilities from large language models (LLMs) to smaller ones, yet its success depends on how well the training data align with the student model. This paper introduces the Data-Model Compatibility (DMC) metric, which can be used to assess the suitability of a dataset for reasoning distillation on a student model. DMC provides an assessment by jointly considering data quality, relative difficulty, and student capability. We validated the effectiveness of DMC from two perspectives: (1) DMC exhibits a strong correlation with reasoning distillation performance; and (2) using DMC as the criterion for data selection leads to improved reasoning distillation performance. Both findings are consistently demonstrated across multiple student models and tasks. Moreover, since the DMC of each dataset dynamically changes during training, our experiments demonstrate that dynamically selecting datasets based on DMC can further enhance performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出数据-模型兼容性（DMC）指标，通过联合考虑数据质量、相对难度和学生能力来评估数据集对推理蒸馏的适用性。实验表明DMC与蒸馏性能强相关，且基于DMC的数据选择能提升推理蒸馏效果，动态选择效果更佳。
AI.motivation: 推理蒸馏的成功依赖于训练数据与学生模型的匹配程度，但缺乏有效的评估指标来衡量这种兼容性。
AI.method: 提出DMC指标，联合考虑数据质量、相对难度和学生模型能力三个维度来评估数据集对特定学生模型的适用性；并基于DMC进行动态数据选择。
AI.result: DMC与推理蒸馏性能呈强相关；基于DMC的数据选择显著提升蒸馏性能；动态选择比静态选择效果更好。
AI.conclusion: DMC是一个有效的评估指标，能够指导数据选择从而提升推理蒸馏效果，且动态调整策略能进一步优化性能。

title: Same Question, Different Source, Different Answer: Auditing Source-Dependence in Medical Multi-Source RAG
summary: A retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) system deployed over a multi-author institutional corpus can give a different answer to the same question depending on which source it retrieves -- a failure mode the dominant single-gold-answer paradigm cannot diagnose. We argue that source-dependence is a missing axis of NLP evaluation, and that auditing it means shifting the unit of evaluation from answer correctness to the inter-source relationship. We make this concrete in transplant patient education, where institutional sources demonstrably disagree, releasing three artefacts: TransplantQA, a benchmark of real patient questions, each answered by grounding generation in multiple institutional handbooks as candidate sources; HERO-QA, a hierarchical retrieval strategy that grounds and audits each answer; and a structured-output judge that scores inter-source relationships on a validated 5-label taxonomy. At scale, better retrieval reveals far more disagreement than prior estimates suggested -- understating its prevalence, not its intensity. The framework is domain-agnostic and transfers to legal and educational RAG: measuring source-dependence is a responsibility for deployed multi-source NLP generally.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RAG系统存在"源依赖"问题（不同来源给出不同答案），并构建了TransplantQA基准、HERO-QA检索策略和结构化评判器来评估多源RAG系统中的答案分歧。研究发现更好的检索会揭示更多、而非更少的分歧。
AI.motivation: 现有NLP评估范式以单一标准答案为假设，无法诊断RAG系统因检索不同来源而产生不同答案的失败模式，需要引入"源依赖"作为新的评估维度。
AI.method: 1) 构建TransplantQA基准（真实患者问题+多个机构手册）；2) 提出HERO-QA分层检索策略，兼顾答案生成与源依赖审计；3) 设计结构化评判器，基于经过验证的5标签分类体系对源间关系评分。
AI.result: 更好的检索策略揭示了比先前估计更多的源间分歧——问题不在于分歧强度被低估，而在于分歧普遍性被严重低估。
AI.conclusion: 该框架是领域无关的，可迁移至法律和教育领域的RAG系统。衡量源依赖是部署多源NLP系统的一般性责任。

title: ParCo-SDF: Learning Prior-Free Partial-to-Complete Signed Distance Fields of Deformable Objects
summary: This study addresses the partial-to-complete geometry reconstruction of deformable objects (DOs) from point-cloud observations toward precise DO manipulation. Recent DO reconstruction approaches often adopt implicit neural representations (INRs) to model continuous surfaces as well as capture structural variability. However, these methods typically rely on object-specific shape priors that improve training stability and limit generalization. To figure it out, we introduce ParCo-SDF, a two-stage partial-to-complete signed distance field (SDF) reconstruction framework consisting of temporal geometry encoding followed by FiLM-conditioned SDF prediction. The temporal encoder captures structural similarity across DO sequence, enabling prior-free stable training. FiLM-based conditioning preserves reconstruction expressivity while reducing network complexity. We evaluate the proposed method against a state-of-the-art DO surface reconstruction baseline on a rubber band manipulation dataset, demonstrating robust and high-fidelity reconstruction under severe occlusions.

AI.tldr: 提出ParCo-SDF两阶段框架，通过时序几何编码和FiLM条件化SDF预测，无需物体先验即可实现可变形物体的部分到完整几何重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于隐式神经表示的可变形物体重建方法依赖物体特定的形状先验，限制了泛化能力且训练不稳定。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：1) 时序几何编码器捕获变形序列中的结构相似性；2) FiLM条件化SDF预测器保持重建表现力同时降低网络复杂度。
AI.result: 在橡皮筋操作数据集上，相比SOTA基线方法，在严重遮挡下实现了鲁棒且高保真的表面重建。
AI.conclusion: ParCo-SDF通过时序信息替代形状先验，实现了无先验的稳定训练和高质量的局部到完整变形物体重建。

title: Designing Active Tether-Net Systems for Space Debris Capture with Graph-Learning-Aided Mixed-Combinatorial Optimization
comment: Accepted for presentation at 2026 AIAA Aviation Forum
summary: Active tether-net systems are a promising solution for capturing large non-cooperative targets, such as space debris, by deploying a flexible net manipulated by maneuverable units (MUs). However, concurrent systematic explorations of design and control choices of the tether-net system to understand its full potential remain limited, partly due to the complex, constrained, nonlinear optimization problem that it presents -- one that involves a mixture of continuous, integer and categorical variables, with the latter two arising from net connectivity and component choices, respectively. Classical binary encoding methods are often ineffective for solving highly nonlinear and multimodal Mixed Combinatorial Nonlinear Programmings (MCNLPs) in engineering design, while integer coding approaches can introduce spurious relations among combinations. Given the graph-structured characteristics of the combinatorial space, this paper adopts and extends a new graph-learning-aided optimization approach to solve this MCNLP problem. Here, a Graph Neural Network (GNN) is trained to score (as output) and thereof recommend candidate combinations represented as nodes in a graph, with the continuous variable vector portion of a candidate design given as input. As a result, the MCNLP optimization reduces to an NLP, which can be solved using standard solvers. While this reduction approach is agnostic to the choice of the NLP solver, here a state-of-the-art Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithm with gradient-based fine-tuning is used as the solver. Demonstrated on the problem of concurrently designing the morphology of the net, choice of mass and thrusters in the MUs and aiming points used by the controller of the tether-net system, the GNN-based recommender is shown to provide significantly faster convergence to similar optimal solutions, compared to direct solution of the MCNLP problem.

AI.tldr: 本文针对主动绳网系统的设计与控制优化难题，提出了一种基于图神经网络（GNN）的推荐方法，将混合组合非线性规划（MCNLP）简化为标准NLP问题，显著加速了收敛过程。
AI.motivation: 主动绳网系统虽被认为是捕获太空碎片的有效方案，但其设计变量涉及连续、整数和类别变量的混合，构成复杂的MCNLP问题。传统的二进制编码和整数编码方法在处理这种高度非线性、多模态问题时效果不佳，因此需要新的优化方法。
AI.method: 将组合空间建模为图结构，训练GNN对候选组合（图中节点）进行评分和推荐；将原MCNLP问题降阶为NLP问题，使用粒子群优化（PSO）结合梯度微调进行求解。
AI.result: 在同时优化绳网形态、MU质量和推进器选择以及控制器瞄准点的任务中，基于GNN的推荐方法相比直接求解MCNLP问题，在获得相似最优解的情况下显著加快了收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: GNN辅助优化方法有效解决了绳网系统中MCNLP的求解困难，为复杂工程设计中的组合优化问题提供了一种高效、通用的新范式。

title: Rethinking Literature Search Evaluation: Deep Research Helps, and Human Citation Lists Are Not a Ground Truth
summary: We study large-scale literature search from two complementary angles: improving the retrieval pipeline, and stress-testing the human reference list as an evaluation target. First, we implement a Deep Research pipeline that processes the full query paper and expands the retrieved results breadth-first along their bibliographies, and show that it substantially outperforms vanilla API-only search, raising recall on RollingEval-Jun25 (a 250-paper literature-search benchmark) from below 20% to above 80%. Second, we use a neutral LLM-as-a-judge to determine if human references are sound ground truth for the task. We find significant limitations: only 51% of human citations are judged moderately relevant or higher, against 86--88% for the strongest AI-based re-rankers. We study this gap on the OpenAlex co-authorship graph, finding that humans are 2.5x more likely than the best AI re-rankers to cite a direct collaborator. Together, our results argue against single-axis literature-search evaluation: recall, topical-relevance scoring, ranked-list diversity, and a co-authorship-distance diagnostic each measure complementary properties of citation quality and should be reported jointly.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大规模文献检索的两个方面：改进检索流程（Deep Research管道将召回率从20%以下提升至80%以上），以及检验人工参考文献作为评估标准的质量（发现仅51%的人工引用被评为中等相关，人类引用直接合作者的概率是AI重排序器的2.5倍）。结论建议文献搜索评估应综合报告召回率、主题相关性、排序多样性和合作者距离等多个维度。
AI.motivation: 现有文献检索评估过度依赖人工参考列表作为黄金标准，但其客观性存疑；同时传统检索方法在大型文献库中性能有限，亟需更全面的评估框架和更高效的检索方法。
AI.method: 提出Deep Research管道：完整处理查询论文并沿参考文献广度优先扩展检索结果；使用中性LLM作为裁判评估人工引用的相关性；基于OpenAlex合作者网络分析引用偏差。
AI.result: Deep Research管道在RollingEval-Jun25基准上将召回率从低于20%提升至80%以上；人工引用仅51%被判定为中等相关以上，而AI重排序器达到86-88%；人类引用直接合作者的概率是AI的2.5倍。
AI.conclusion: 不应将文献检索评估简化为单一指标，而应联合报告召回率、主题相关性、排序多样性和合作者距离等多个互补维度，以全面衡量引用质量。

title: SafeRx-Agent: A Knowledge-Grounded Multi-Agent Framework for Safe and Explainable Medication Recommendation
summary: Medication recommendation predicts medications for patient visits, but existing methods still face two key challenges. At the model level, traditional drug recommendation methods only predict structured drug codes with limited evidence grounding, while LLM agents can use richer clinical context but may lack safety verification and traceability. At the task level, existing benchmarks often use broad medication categories, which ignore subgroup-level safety differences and can lead to risk overestimation. We introduce the first fine-grained medication recommendation setting based on fourth-level ATC code generation. We propose Safe Prescription Agent (SafeRx-Agent), a knowledge-grounded multi-agent framework that uses patient context, external clinical knowledge, and safety verification to recommend traceable medication sets. Experimental results on MIMIC-III and MIMIC-IV datasets show that SafeRx-Agent improves fine-grained medication prediction accuracy while controlling drug interactions, contraindications, and medication set size.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SafeRx-Agent，一个基于知识的多智能体框架，用于细粒度药物推荐（四级ATC代码），在MIMIC-III/IV数据集上提升了预测准确性并控制了药物相互作用、禁忌症和用药集大小。
AI.motivation: 现有药物推荐方法存在两个关键挑战：模型层面，传统方法仅预测结构化药物代码且缺乏证据支撑，而LLM智能体虽能利用临床上下文但缺乏安全验证和可追溯性；任务层面，现有基准使用宽泛的药物类别，忽略亚组级别的安全性差异，导致风险高估。
AI.method: 提出Safe Prescription Agent (SafeRx-Agent)，一个知识驱动的多智能体框架。该框架利用患者临床上下文、外部临床知识和安全验证机制，推荐可追溯的药物集合，基于四级ATC代码生成实现细粒度药物推荐。
AI.result: 在MIMIC-III和MIMIC-IV数据集上的实验表明，SafeRx-Agent在提升细粒度药物预测准确性的同时，有效控制了药物相互作用、禁忌症和用药集大小。
AI.conclusion: SafeRx-Agent通过多智能体协作和外部知识整合，在细粒度药物推荐任务上实现了更安全、更可追溯的推荐结果，解决了现有方法在安全验证和细粒度建模方面的不足。

title: One Click per Cell Type Suffices: Training-free Group Interaction for Cell Instance Segmentation
summary: Cell instance segmentation models trained on cell-specific datasets suffer severe performance drops on out-of-distribution cell types, while interactive foundation models overcome this through per-instance prompting at a cost that is prohibitively expensive for histopathology images containing hundreds to thousands of densely packed instances. We introduce Group Prompting, a new paradigm that shifts interactive segmentation from per-instance $O(N)$ to per-type $O(T)$, where a single click per cell type suffices to segment all instances of that type. Our key observation is that the frozen image encoder of the Segment Anything Model (SAM) already clusters same-type cells in its feature space before any prompt is given. Exploiting this property, we propose Chain-of-Prompts (CoP), a training-free framework that recursively expands a single user click by (1) identifying reliable same-type locations through non-parametric gating of multi-scale encoder features, and (2) selecting the most spatially distant reliable point as the next prompt to maximize coverage. On three cell-type-annotated benchmarks, CoP with one click per type retains over 90% of per-instance performance and surpasses fully-supervised methods without any additional training. On four morphologically homogeneous benchmarks, a single click retains over 99%. Project Page: https://shjo-april.github.io/Chain-of-Prompts/

AI.tldr: 提出Chain-of-Prompts (CoP)框架，通过组提示（Group Prompting）范式将交互式分割从每实例O(N)降为每类型O(T)，利用SAM编码器自动聚类同类型细胞的特性，单次点击即可分割某一类型的所有细胞实例，在多个基准上达到甚至超越全监督方法。
AI.motivation: 现有细胞实例分割模型在未见过的细胞类型上性能严重下降；交互式基础模型虽能泛化但需逐实例标注（O(N)），在密集组织病理图像中成本过高。旨在将交互成本从每实例降至每类型。
AI.method: 提出Chain-of-Prompts (CoP)框架：基于SAM冻结的图像编码器已能自动聚类同类型细胞的观察，(1)通过非参数门控机制筛选多尺度编码器特征中的可靠同类型位置，(2)递归地选择空间距离最远的可靠点作为下一个提示以最大化覆盖范围。无需训练。
AI.result: 在三个细胞类型标注基准上，每类型一次点击保留超90%的逐实例性能，且超越全监督方法。在四个形态同质基准上，单次点击保留超99%性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出了组提示新范式，实现了无需训练、高效且泛化能力强的细胞实例分割，极大降低了交互式分割在密集组织病理图像中的使用成本。

title: Return-to-Go Is More Than a Number: Q-Guided Alignment for Return-Conditioned Supervised Learning
comment: 28 pages, 13 figures, 20 tables, accepted by ICML 2026
summary: Conditioned Sequence Models (CSMs) learn policies by treating return-to-go (RTG) as a control signal. However, existing CSMs often treat the RTGs as simple numerical inputs rather than aligning them with the performance of their policies. In this paper, we propose Q-ALIGN DT, a framework that enforces this alignment by ensuring the $Q$-value of the output policy is consistent with the input RTG. By leveraging a $Q$ function to provide dense guidance to CSMs and further fine-tuning it using an RTG-perturbation technique with the CSM, our method ensures that higher RTGs are consistently mapped to trajectories with higher expected returns. Theoretically, we show that Q-ALIGN DT can efficiently learn the desired policy and output a near-optimal one when the RTG is sufficiently high. Empirically, we demonstrate through extensive experiments that Q-ALIGN DT achieves superior controllability and performance across the D4RL benchmark. Remarkably, our model effectively learns a structured family of policies that maintains precise alignment and generalizes to tasks like velocity-tracking where prior methods fail.

AI.tldr: Q-ALIGN DT通过Q函数对齐条件序列模型中的回报引导信号与策略实际性能，在D4RL基准测试中实现了更好的可控性和性能，并能泛化到速度追踪等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有CSMs将return-to-go视为简单数值输入，未能使其与策略的实际性能对齐，导致控制信号不准确。
AI.method: 提出Q-ALIGN DT框架，利用Q函数提供密集指导，并通过RTG扰动技术微调Q函数，确保输入RTG与输出策略的Q值一致，使高RTG映射到高回报轨迹。
AI.result: 在D4RL基准测试中取得优越的可控性和性能，并且能有效学习结构化策略族，在速度追踪等先前方法失败的任务上也能泛化。
AI.conclusion: Q-ALIGN DT能高效学习理想策略，当RTG足够高时能输出近最优策略，理论分析和实验均验证了其有效性。

title: Surfacing Isolated Learners with Outcome-Independent Mediation of Feedback between Teachers and Students Using AI
comment: Accepted to HAI-Agency Workshop on Orchestrating Human and AI Agency for Proactive and Reflective Learning
summary: AI-augmented classrooms generate rich teacher and student feedback before graded outcomes become available, yet these signals can be difficult to translate into timely instructional decisions. We propose an interpretable decision layer: a transparent mechanism that ranks course topics requiring attention without using grades or post-hoc outcome labels. The approach combines three signals: student learning difficulty prevalence, disagreement between learner self-reports and observed difficulties, and unresolved teacher concerns. The output is a ranked set of topic priorities with per-topic decision records explaining each ranking. In one graduate CS course offering ($n=5$ instructor interviews; $n=279$ survey responses), prioritized topics aligned with instructor concerns (top-5 overlap 3/5; Spearman $ρ=0.80$) and student-reported topic difficulty ($ρ=0.46$, $p=.048$). Multi-signal integration also surfaced learners not identified through individual signal sources alone (AUC $=0.96$ vs. $0.91$ for gap prevalence alone). Reflective thinking, help-seeking, and self-efficacy provided additional evidence that student behavioral signals align with learning-related constructs. While preliminary, these findings suggest that transparent coordination mechanisms may help support human-AI co-agency when feedback is incomplete.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需成绩的可解释决策层，通过整合学习困难普遍性、自我报告与观察困难的不一致性、以及未解决的教师关切三个信号，对课程主题进行优先级排序，帮助教师在成绩出来前做出教学决策。
AI.motivation: AI增强课堂中产生的师生反馈信号难以在成绩出来前转化为及时的教学决策，需要一种无需成绩的可解释机制来辅助教学优先级判断。
AI.method: 提出一个透明决策层，融合三种信号：学生学习困难普遍性、学习者自我报告与观察困难之间的差异、未解决的教师关切。输出为按主题排序的优先级列表，附带每个主题的决策记录解释排名依据。
AI.result: 在研究生CS课程中（5次教师访谈，279份问卷），优先级主题与教师关切高度一致（top-5重叠3/5，Spearman ρ=0.80），与学生报告的主题困难也相关（ρ=0.46，p=.048）。多信号整合比单独使用差距普遍性更好（AUC 0.96 vs 0.91）。
AI.conclusion: 透明协调机制有助于在反馈不完整时支持人机协同决策，初步证据表明学生行为信号与学习相关构念一致。

title: UA-Legal-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating Large Language Models on Ukrainian Legal Reasoning
summary: Legal NLP benchmarks are overwhelmingly English-centric, leaving failure modes in morphologically rich, non-Latin-script languages undetected. We introduce UA-Legal-Bench, a five-task benchmark for evaluating large language models on Ukrainian legal reasoning, built from the Unified State Register of Court Decisions (EDRSR) -- one of the world's largest open judicial corpora (99.5 million decisions). The benchmark comprises: (1) case-type classification (4 classes, n=2,000), (2) judgment form classification (4 classes, n=2,000), (3) case-outcome prediction (6 classes, n=800), (4) legal norm extraction (n=1,794), and (5) cause category prediction (22 classes, n=1,871). We evaluate 11 LLMs (3B--675B) from five families under zero-shot and 3-shot prompting via AWS Bedrock with 158K API calls. Our results reveal sharply task-dependent few-shot effects: few-shot prompting improves judgment form classification by up to +38.6 pp but has mixed effects on outcome prediction. We show that accuracy is misleading on imbalanced legal tasks: the model with highest COP accuracy (62%) is a majority-class predictor (macro-F1: 23%), while the genuinely best model scores only 44% macro-F1. Within-family scaling analysis reveals that 8B models can match frontier performance on surface-level tasks but scaling thresholds vary dramatically across families. We release all data, prompts, and model predictions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出UA-Legal-Bench，一个面向乌克兰语法律推理的五任务基准，基于9900万份司法判决构建。评估11个LLM（3B-675B），发现少样本学习效果高度任务依赖，并揭示准确率在类别不平衡任务中的误导性，以及不同模型家族间的扩展规律差异。
AI.motivation: 现有法律NLP基准几乎完全以英语为中心，无法检测出在形态丰富、非拉丁字母语言中的失败模式，尤其缺乏对乌克兰语等语种的评估体系。
AI.method: 基于乌克兰统一国家法院判决登记册（EDRSR，9900万份判决）构建五任务基准：(1)案件类型分类(4类, n=2000)、(2)判决形式分类(4类, n=2000)、(3)案件结果预测(6类, n=800)、(4)法律规范抽取(n=1794)、(5)案由类别预测(22类, n=1871)。在AWS Bedrock上对5个模型家族11个LLM（3B-675B）进行零样本和3样本提示评估，共调用158K次API。
AI.result: 少样本提示在判决形式分类上最多提升+38.6个百分点，但对结果预测效果不一。准确率在不平衡法律任务中具有误导性：COP准确率最高的模型（62%）实际是多数类预测器（macro-F1仅23%），真正最优模型仅44% macro-F1。家族内扩展分析表明，8B模型可在表层任务上匹配前沿性能，但不同家族的扩展阈值差异显著。
AI.conclusion: UA-Legal-Bench揭示了英语中心法律基准的局限，强调在多语言、形态丰富语言中部署法律AI时需要更细致的评估指标（如macro-F1而非准确率），并指出模型扩展规律存在任务和家族特异性。

title: Recovering Policy-Induced Errors: Benchmarking and Trajectory Synthesis for Robust GUI Agents
comment: ICML 2026 Spotlight. 36 pages, 19 figures, includes appendix
summary: While GUI agents have advanced rapidly, they often lack the robustness to recover from their own errors, hindering real-world deployment. To bridge this gap at both the evaluation and data levels, we introduce GUI-RobustEval and propose Robustness-driven Trajectory Synthesis. GUI-RobustEval contains $1,216$ executable test cases that systematically measure error recovery capabilities across a broad and realistic spectrum of error modes. At the data level, RoTS is a scalable synthesis framework that creates $800k$ high-quality data via a tree-based pipeline that proactively discovers diverse error modes and synthesizes corresponding recovery steps. Our two models, RoTS-7B and RoTS-32B, fine-tuned on our dataset, both demonstrate significant gains on GUI-RobustEval and traditional GUI benchmarks. Notably, RoTS-32B achieves state-of-the-art performance on OSWorld, with a $47.4\%$ success rate and a $33.8\%$ All-Pass@4 score, suggesting that improved long-horizon error recovery ability contributes to both robustness and overall performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/AlibabaResearch/RoTS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GUI-RobustEval评估基准和RoTS数据合成框架，通过800k高质量训练数据和树状管道主动发现错误模式并合成恢复步骤，最终RoTS-32B在OSWorld上达到47.4%成功率，验证了提升长程错误恢复能力对GUI智能体鲁棒性和整体性能的双重贡献。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI智能体缺乏从自身错误中恢复的鲁棒性，严重阻碍实际部署，因此需要在评估和数据两个层面填补这一空白。
AI.method: 提出RoTS框架，采用基于树的管道（tree-based pipeline）主动探索多样化的错误模式，并合成对应的恢复步骤，生成80万条高质量训练数据；同时构建了包含1,216个可执行测试用例的GUI-RobustEval评估基准，系统性地衡量错误恢复能力。
AI.result: RoTS-7B和RoTS-32B在GUI-RobustEval和传统GUI基准上均取得显著提升；其中RoTS-32B在OSWorld上达到47.4%成功率和33.8% All-Pass@4分数，实现当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 提升长程错误恢复能力不仅能增强鲁棒性，还能改善GUI智能体的整体性能表现，错误恢复是推动GUI智能体实用化的关键方向。

title: Theoretical Foundations and Effective Algorithms for Policy-Aware Simulator Learning
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) agents typically learn world models by minimizing predictive loss. However, powerful RL optimizers inevitably exploit minor model inaccuracies, leading to simulator exploitation and a reality gap where policies succeed in simulation but fail in the real world. We propose that the objective for learning simulators should be strategic robustness rather than predictive accuracy, and formulate this as a zero-sum minimax game between a model player and an adversarial policy player. We provide a comprehensive theoretical analysis: (1) an online learning guarantee showing the game is learnable with sublinear regret bounds; (2) a tractable critic-based simplification bounding the global policy-value gap by the local critic's loss; and (3) an Error-MDP duality, proving that finding the worst-case policy is formally dual to a standard RL problem where the reward is the one-step critic error. This duality yields a provably convergent active data selection algorithm. Experiments on continuous control tasks demonstrate that our approach reduces prediction error in strategically important regions by $1.5$-$2.2\times$ and enables policies trained purely in simulation to match near-optimal real-world performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出以策略鲁棒性替代预测精度作为模型学习的优化目标，通过零和极小极大博弈框架训练世界模型，理论证明了可学习性、策略-价值间隙上界与错误MDP对偶性，实验表明该方法能将关键区域预测误差降低1.5-2.2倍，使纯仿真策略达到接近最优的真实世界性能。
AI.motivation: 传统MBRL因模型微小误差被RL优化器放大，导致仿真与真实世界之间存在"现实差距"（reality gap），需要一种更鲁棒的模型学习目标。
AI.method: 将世界模型学习建模为模型玩家与对抗性策略玩家之间的零和极小极大博弈；提出基于评论家的简化方法、错误MDP对偶性及主动数据选择算法。
AI.result: 在连续控制任务中，关键区域预测误差降低1.5-2.2倍；纯仿真训练的策略匹配近最优真实世界性能。
AI.conclusion: 从预测精度转向策略鲁棒性是缩小仿真与现实差距的有效路径，理论分析与实验均验证了该框架的可行性与优越性。

title: DenseSteer: Steering Small Language Models towards Dense Math Reasoning
summary: Large language models (LLMs) demonstrate strong chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning abilities, while smaller models (<= 3B parameters) significantly underperform on multi-step reasoning tasks. Based on empirical analyses of the Qwen-2.5 model family on math reasoning benchmarks, we find that more proficient reasoning is associated with fewer reasoning steps but higher information density per step, a property we term Dense Reasoning. Motivated by this observation, we propose DenseSteer, a training-free inference-time steering framework that enhances small-model reasoning by modulating internal representations toward dense reasoning patterns. Experiments show that our method yields consistent accuracy improvements without increasing token-level Negative Log-Likelihood, highlighting dense reasoning as an effective structural approach to mathematical problem solving.

AI.tldr: DenseSteer通过将小模型的内部表征向高信息密度的推理模式（密集推理）引导，在不增加推理步数的情况下提升了小模型在数学推理任务上的准确性。
AI.motivation: 小模型（≤3B参数）在多步推理任务上表现显著不如大模型，且作者发现更熟练的推理与更少的推理步骤但每步更高信息密度相关，因此希望利用这种"密集推理"模式来提升小模型的推理能力。
AI.method: 提出DenseSteer，一种无需训练、仅在推理阶段进行干预的框架，通过调节小模型的内部表征，使其向密集推理模式的方向偏移。
AI.result: 在数学推理基准上，DenseSteer持续提升了小模型的准确性，且未增加token级别的负对数似然。
AI.conclusion: 密集推理是一种有效的数学问题求解结构模式，通过推理阶段的表征引导，可以显著提升小模型的推理性能。

title: Slogans or Stance? A Label-Light Diagnostic for Entrepreneurial-Discourse Measurement on Chinese SOE Speeches
summary: Dictionary methods, topic models, and embedding-similarity scorers are widely used in CSS and management research to measure constructs such as "entrepreneurial spirit" in corporate speeches. We contribute a label-light measurement diagnostic for such instruments rather than a new extraction model. On a corpus of 80 speeches by leaders of centrally administered Chinese state-owned enterprises, we exploit a natural experiment of 24 same-company different-speaker pairs and 5 same-company same-speaker pairs to test whether a method's per-document indices vary with leader identity holding firm constant. LDA fails (Cohen d=0.20, 95% CI [-0.72, 1.20]); a dictionary scorer reaches d=0.81 and a Chinese sentence encoder d=0.65 on doc-vector distances of order 10^-3. A zero-shot 9B open-weight LLM (Qwen3.5:9b) raises paired-contrast d to 1.09 (exact permutation p1=0.034). We downgrade three claims accordingly: gold F1 measures consistency with the LLM's own prompt rule rather than external construct recovery; doc-level style residualisation cuts the LLM's d to 0.43 (p1=0.22), so roughly half of the effect is consistent with leader idiolect; and a confidence-weighted calibration trades Delta for variance with an auto-mined slogan lexicon near-inert in ablation. We release the 2,190-segment scored corpus, the 170-paragraph pilot, the slogan lexicon, two-family LLM scores, and the evaluation harness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级（标签少）的诊断方法，用于评估现有文本测量工具（如词典法、主题模型、嵌入相似度）在企业管理研究中的有效性。通过在80篇中国央企领导人讲话语料上进行自然实验（同一企业不同发言人配对），发现LDA效果差，词典和句子编码器中等，而零样本大语言模型（Qwen3.5:9b）效果最好（Cohen d=1.09）。但进一步分析显示，约一半效果来自领导人个人语风而非真实构念，且校准会带来方差-偏差权衡。作者发布语料库、评分、词典和评估框架。
AI.motivation: 现有文本测量工具（词典法、主题模型、嵌入相似度）被广泛用于测量企业演讲中的“企业家精神”等构念，但缺乏对测量工具有效性的系统诊断——尤其是它们是否能区分“构念本身”还是“说话者身份”。作者利用央企领导人讲话这一自然实验情景，检验不同工具是否对同一企业、不同领导人的文本产生不同结果，从而诊断工具是否真正捕捉到企业层面特征而非个人语风。
AI.method: 基于80篇央企领导人讲话，构建24对同一企业不同领导人配对和5对同一企业同一领导人配对。比较四种方法：LDA主题模型、词典评分器、中文句子编码器、零样本大语言模型（Qwen2.5:9b）。使用Cohen's d和置换检验评估配对对比效果。进一步通过风格残差化、置信加权校准等方法诊断LLM效果的来源。
AI.result: LDA完全失败（d=0.20, 不显著）；词典评分器d=0.81；中文句子编码器d=0.65；零样本LLM表现最好（d=1.09, p=0.034）。但风格残差化后LLM的d降至0.43（不显著），说明约一半效果来自领导人个人语风；置信加权校准在减少偏差的同时增加了方差；自动挖掘的口号词典在消融实验中几乎无效果。
AI.conclusion: 作者下调三个结论：1）黄金标准F1衡量的是与LLM自身提示规则的一致性，而非外部构念恢复；2）文档级风格残差化发现LLM效果约一半来自领导人个人语风；3）置信加权校准是偏差-方差权衡。核心贡献是提供了一个轻量级诊断框架，而非新的提取模型。

title: Comparative evaluation of photogrammetric reconstruction methods and 3D Gaussian Splatting for road surface roughness analysis
summary: Image-based 3D reconstruction offers a low-cost alternative to traditional sensor-based techniques for road surface assessment. This study compares four reconstruction pipelines--COLMAP, Meshroom, Metashape, and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS)--to evaluate their ability to estimate road surface roughness from smartphone imagery. All point clouds were processed in CloudCompare using a consistent workflow involving orientation alignment, segmentation, normal estimation, and roughness computation at neighborhood radiuses of 0.2, 0.4, and 0.6 model units. The results show that COLMAP provides the highest sensitivity to micro-texture, while Meshroom yields balanced reconstructions with moderate roughness variation. Metashape produces the smoothest geometry due to its internal filtering, and 3DGS captures visible irregularities but exhibits higher noise and lower density. The comparison demonstrates that open-source pipelines are viable for relative roughness evaluation, offering a practical approach for low-cost pavement monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文比较了四种基于图像的3D重建管线（COLMAP、Meshroom、Metashape、3DGS）从智能手机图像估计道路表面粗糙度的能力，发现COLMAP对微观纹理最敏感，Meshroom重建均衡，Metashape几何最平滑，3DGS能捕捉明显不规则但噪声较大，表明开源管线可用于低成本路面监测。
AI.motivation: 传统基于传感器的路面评估方法成本高昂，因此探索基于图像的低成本替代方案（智能手机图像）进行3D重建和路面粗糙度估计，以实现经济实用的路面监测。
AI.method: 使用智能手机拍摄道路图像，分别通过COLMAP、Meshroom、Metashape和3DGS四种管线进行3D重建生成点云，然后在CloudCompare中统一进行定向对齐、分割、法线估计，并在0.2、0.4、0.6模型单位的邻域半径下计算粗糙度。
AI.result: COLMAP对微观纹理最敏感；Meshroom重建均衡，粗糙度变化适中；Metashape因内部滤波产生最平滑的几何；3DGS能捕捉明显不规则但噪声较高且点云密度较低。
AI.conclusion: 开源重建管线（如COLMAP）在相对粗糙度评估中表现可行，为低成本路面监测提供了实用方法。

title: Moment Matching Q-Learning
comment: 23 pages, 14 figures, 10 tables, accepted by ICML 2026
summary: Score-based and flow-based generative models exhibit remarkable expressive capacity in capturing complex distributions, and have been extensively deployed in tasks ranging from image generation to reinforcement learning. Nevertheless, these models suffer from prolonged inference latency, which imposes a significant computational bottleneck in RL with iterative sampling. To overcome this limitation, we propose a new framework named Moment Matching Q-Learning (MoMa QL), which utilizes a technique from statistical hypothesis testing known as maximum mean discrepancy (MMD) that intend to match all orders of statistics between the original and target distribution. By enforcing strong regularization on all moment statistics, this algorithm guarantees distribution-level convergence for conditional score function and remains stable under various hyperparameters. Empirically, we show that our method MoMa QL is more computationally efficient with a comparable if not competitive performance in various D4RL tasks. Remarkably, by accelerating the action sampling process for flow-based policies, MoMa QL demonstrates superior performance in offline-to-online RL tasks because of faster and stronger adaptability for online interactive finetuning.

AI.tldr: 提出Moment Matching Q-Learning (MoMa QL)框架，通过最大均值差异(MMD)技术匹配原始分布与目标分布的所有阶统计量，加速基于分数/流的生成模型在强化学习中的推理速度，在D4RL任务中表现高效，尤其在离线到在线RL中展现优越的自适应能力。
AI.motivation: 基于分数和流的生成模型在强化学习中迭代采样导致推理延迟过长，成为计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出MoMa QL框架，利用最大均值差异(MMD)匹配原始分布与目标分布的所有阶统计量，对条件分数函数施加强正则化，确保分布级收敛。
AI.result: 在D4RL任务中计算效率更高且性能相当；在离线到在线RL任务中，因加速流策略的动作采样过程，展现出更快的在线微调适应能力。
AI.conclusion: MoMa QL通过匹配所有阶矩统计量，有效缓解了生成模型在RL中的推理延迟问题，同时保持稳定性和竞争性能。

title: Provably Secure Agent Guardrail
summary: As large language models transition from bounded generative engines to agents with expansive execution privileges, AI going out of control precipitates a fundamental crisis in artificial intelligence security. Existing defense architectures heavily rely on empirical semantic guardrails and probabilistic large model adjudicators, mechanisms that fail to provide deterministic security lower bounds when facing complex semantic symbol decoupling attacks. To overcome this empirical semantic guardrail dilemma, this paper proposes a new security paradigm for agents based on the fundamental limitations of logical reasoning. Based on this paradigm, we further introduce an executable Proof-Constrained Action (ePCA) framework with a neural symbolic isolation architecture. This framework abandons semantic trust in natural language, forcing agents to losslessly formalize their intentions into first-order logical mathematical constraints before performing physical operations. Empirical evaluations of macroscopic and microscopic two-dimensional dynamic adversarial systems demonstrate that our formal verification mechanism achieves zero attack success rate and zero false positive rate across the evaluated scenarios, with extremely low computational latency. This research provides a conditional formal foundation under explicit system assumptions and an engineering paradigm for constructing the underlying defense foundation for future intelligent systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于逻辑推理根本限制的新型智能体安全范式——可执行证明约束动作框架（ePCA），通过神经符号隔离架构将智能体的意图无损形式化为数理逻辑约束，在宏观与微观二维动态对抗系统中实现了零攻击成功率与零误报率，为未来智能系统提供了可验证的形式化安全基础。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体安全防御主要依赖经验性语义护栏和概率性大模型裁决器，这些机制在面对复杂语义符号解耦攻击时无法提供确定性的安全下限，存在"经验语义护栏困境"。
AI.method: 提出ePCA框架，构建神经符号隔离架构：放弃对自然语言的语义信任，在执行物理操作前强制智能体将意图无损形式化为一阶逻辑数学约束，通过形式化验证机制确保行为安全。
AI.result: 在宏观与微观二维动态对抗系统评估中，该形式化验证机制实现了零攻击成功率与零误报率，且计算延迟极低。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为智能体安全提供了一种在显式系统假设下的条件形式化基础，以及构建未来智能系统底层防御的工程范式。

title: Relevance as a Vulnerability: How Web Retrieval Degrades Safety Alignment in LLM Agents
summary: AI agents augment large language models with external tools such as web retrieval, enabling grounded and up-to-date responses. However, incorporating external content into the generation pipeline can weaken the safety alignment mechanisms that govern model outputs. Prior work shows that enabling retrieval in agents increases compliance with harmful requests. We introduce AgentREVEAL, a diagnostic framework for analyzing retrieval-induced safety degradation in LLM agents. The framework examines two axes: how retrieval is integrated into the agent pipeline and the properties of the retrieved content. Along the integration axis, we find that binding tool invocation and response generation in a single step amplifies harmful outputs. Along the content axis, we uncover the Safe Source Paradox: even oppositional or safety-oriented sources, such as pages containing warnings or risk disclaimers, can increase harmful compliance by an average of 25% compared to the no-retrieval baseline. Finally, we show that relevance acts as a shared activation condition for both vulnerabilities. Similar patterns appear on frontier closed models, and harmful compliance remains elevated under several representative pipeline interventions, with some agents also entering this regime under autonomous retrieval. Because relevance is also what makes retrieval useful, these results expose a safety-utility trade-off for retrieval-enabled agents. We introduce HarmURLBench, a benchmark containing 1,405 real-world URLs paired with 320 harmful behaviors to support future evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AgentREVEAL框架，系统分析检索增强型LLM代理的安全退化机制。研究发现：单步绑定工具调用与响应生成会放大有害输出；安全来源页面（如风险警告）反而使有害顺从率增加25%（安全来源悖论）；相关性是两种漏洞的共同激活条件，揭示了安全性与实用性之间的权衡。同时发布了HarmURLBench基准测试集。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明检索增强会提高LLM代理对有害请求的顺从性，但缺乏系统性的诊断框架来分析这一安全退化现象的根因和机制。
AI.method: 提出AgentREVEAL诊断框架，从两个维度分析：1）检索与生成管线的集成方式；2）检索内容的属性（来源安全性、相关性等）。通过对比不同集成方式和内容属性下的有害请求顺从率来量化安全退化。
AI.result: 1）单步绑定工具调用与响应生成会放大有害输出；2）发现"安全来源悖论"——包含警告或风险免责声明的安全页面反而使有害顺从率提升25%；3）相关性是两种漏洞的共同激活条件；4）前沿闭源模型也存在类似模式，多种管线干预均无法有效缓解。
AI.conclusion: 检索增强型代理面临安全性与实用性的根本性权衡，因为相关性既是检索有用的原因，也是安全退化的激活条件。发布了HarmURLBench基准（1,405个URL + 320个有害行为）以支持后续研究。

title: Uni-RCM: Unified Reference-guided Cross-modal Mapping for Multi-Class Anomaly Detection
comment: This work has been submitted IEEE for potential publication
summary: Multi-modal industrial anomaly detection typically relies on separate models for each product category, fundamentally limiting practical scalability. When shifting to a unified paradigm that handles diverse classes simultaneously, detection accuracy often degrades due to inter-class interference and feature manifold confusion. To overcome these challenges, we propose a Unified Reference guided Cross-modal Mapping framework, named Uni-RCM. At its core, we propose a reference guide block to dynamically filter out category-specific noise by introducing a learnable reference feature, which captures the commonalities across different modalities. Besides, an offline residual quantizer is proposed to characterize the normal distribution by multiple cascaded codebooks. Extensive evaluations on the MVTec-3D AD dataset demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance in the challenging multi-class setting and in terms of image-level detection and pixel-level localization.

AI.tldr: 提出Uni-RCM框架，通过可学习的参考特征模块和残差量化器，实现统一的多类别工业异常检测，在MVTec-3D AD数据集上达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多模态工业异常检测为每类产品单独建模，难以扩展；统一模型面临类别间干扰和特征流形混淆导致精度下降的问题。
AI.method: 提出参考引导模块（动态过滤类别特定噪声）+ 离线残差量化器（多级码本刻画正常分布）。
AI.result: 在MVTec-3D AD数据集上，多类别统一设置下图像级检测和像素级定位均达到SOTA。
AI.conclusion: Uni-RCM有效解决了多类别统一异常检测中的特征混淆问题，具备良好的扩展性和实用性。

title: Parallel Adaptive Multi-Objective Evolutionary Learning of Discretized Bayesian Network Classifiers for Clinical Data
summary: Bayesian Networks (BNs) are of interest from an explainable AI viewpoint, offering transparent probabilistic models for decision support. Baymex is a recently introduced multi-objective evolutionary algorithm for learning discretized BNs, enabling experts to trade-off different objectives of interest, such as likelihood, model complexity, and prior beliefs. While Baymex has been shown to outperform state-of-the-art BN learning approaches, Baymex still 1) requires a lot of computation time and 2) has only been evaluated on synthetic data. To improve scalability, we introduce a parallelization strategy as well as a mechanism that enables adaptively steering optimization toward networks that overfit less. We furthermore reconfigure Baymex to train a BN classifier through multi-objective optimization of cross-entropy loss and the BIC complexity term so as to evaluate its performance on real-world clinical classification tasks. Besides observing speedups up to over 54 times on a 16-core CPU, comparisons against clinically familiar baselines (decision trees, logistic regression, naive Bayes, and random forests) on two open-source (RADCURE and SUPPORT) and one in-house dataset, show that Baymex obtains statistically similar or better predictive performance while producing compact, clinically inspectable BNs. Importantly, Baymex finds multiple plausible BN classifiers that contain predictors consistent with established clinical factors.

AI.tldr: 本文针对Baymex算法在计算效率低且仅在合成数据上评估的问题，提出了并行化策略和自适应引导机制，并将其扩展到真实临床分类任务。在16核CPU上实现最高54倍加速，且在三个真实临床数据集上取得了与决策树、逻辑回归等基线相当或更优的性能，同时生成紧凑可解释的贝叶斯网络。
AI.motivation: Baymex算法虽然在贝叶斯网络学习中表现优异，但存在两大瓶颈：计算时间过长以及仅在合成数据上验证，缺乏真实场景下的评估。本文旨在提升其可扩展性并验证其在临床分类任务中的实用性。
AI.method: 1) 引入并行化策略加速计算；2) 设计自适应引导机制减少过拟合；3) 重新配置Baymex，通过交叉熵损失与BIC复杂度项的多目标优化来训练BN分类器；4) 在三个真实临床数据集（RADCURE、SUPPORT及一个内部数据集）上评估。
AI.result: 在16核CPU上实现最高54倍加速；在三个真实临床数据集上，Baymex取得了与决策树、逻辑回归、朴素贝叶斯和随机森林等基线统计上相似或更优的预测性能，同时生成紧凑、临床可检查的贝叶斯网络。
AI.conclusion: Baymex通过并行化和自适应机制成功提升了可扩展性，并在真实临床分类任务中证明了其有效性：不仅能获得竞争性的预测性能，还能提供与已知临床因素一致的可解释网络结构，兼顾了性能与可解释性。

title: OpenClawBench: Benchmarking Process-side Anomalies in Real-world Agent Execution Trajectories
summary: Task success can hide process anomalies in real-world agent executions. An agent may pass the final task oracle while still accumulating unresolved ambiguity, unsafe external writes, ignored errors, weakly grounded commitments, or capability-boundary overcommitment. We study this mismatch as the Outcome-Process Gap and introduce OpenClawBench, a large-scale dataset for measuring and supervising process-side anomalies in real agent execution processes. OpenClawBench is built from BFCL-driven OpenClaw sessions produced by 6 source models and contains 31,264 annotated trajectories. It aligns task-oracle outcomes with structured process evidence. FullTax converts the aligned trajectories into structured anomaly supervision: binary labels, supporting evidence, onset/span localization, severity, recoverability, and a 5-class anomaly taxonomy. Using OpenClawBench, we make the Outcome-Process Gap measurable. Among 31,135 oracle-passing executions, 2,904 are still labeled process-anomalous under FullTax. These results show that success-only evaluation misses a concrete class of process-side failures in real agent executions. A LoRA-fine-tuned Gemma 3 12B detector trained on the high-confidence FullTax supervised pool reaches binary F1=0.729 on the cleaner-labels held-out test split. Together, OpenClawBench turns real agent execution logs into auditable and reusable supervision for studying, diagnosing, and operationally monitoring runtime agent reliability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Outcome-Process Gap（结果-过程差距）概念，构建 OpenClawBench 数据集（31,264 条标注轨迹），发现 31,135 个通过任务检核的执行中仍有 2,904 条存在过程异常，表明仅以成功率为评估标准会遗漏过程侧故障。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体评估只关注最终任务是否成功（通过 oracle），忽略了执行过程中可能存在的潜在异常（如未消歧、不安全写入、被忽略的错误等），导致过程侧故障被成功结果掩盖。
AI.method: 基于 BFCL 驱动的 OpenClaw 会话构建大规模数据集，提出 FullTax 标注框架对轨迹进行结构化异常标注（二元标签、证据定位、严重度、可恢复性及5类异常分类），并用 LoRA 微调的 Gemma 3 12B 训练检测器。
AI.result: 31,135 个通过 oracle 的执行中 2,904 个被标记为过程异常；LoRA 微调 Gemma 3 12B 在干净标签测试集上达到二元 F1=0.729。
AI.conclusion: 成功导向的评估会遗漏大量过程侧故障，OpenClawBench 将执行日志转化为可审计、可复用的监督数据，用于智能体运行时可靠性的研究、诊断与监控。

title: Wait! There's a Way Out: A Decision Mechanism for Forecasting Conversational Derailment
comment: To appear in the Proceedings of ACL 2026
summary:
Forecasting conversational derailment is the task of predicting, as the conversation unfolds, whether it will eventually derail into personal attacks. Since forecasting models operate in an online fashion, they must decide whether to "trigger" an alert after each utterance--for example, to notify participants or a moderator that the conversation is at risk of derailing. Existing approaches make this decision solely based on the estimated likelihood of derailment given the preceding utterances, implicitly assuming that the conversation's future trajectory is fixed. As a result, they ignore the possibility of future recovery and incur an unnecessarily high rate of false positives.
  In this work we propose a method for decoupling the decision to trigger from derailment likelihood estimation. Our approach is inspired by the first human baseline on this task, which shows that humans achieve dramatically lower false positive rates by selectively deferring their decision to trigger when they anticipate that tension is likely to subside. We operationalize this insight with a deferral mechanism that uses forward-looking simulations to assess whether a tense moment admits plausible paths to recovery. Incorporating this mechanism into a state-of-the-art forecasting model substantially reduces false positives without sacrificing forecasting accuracy. More broadly, this work highlights the value of treating decision-making as a first-class component of forecasting systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将预警触发决策与对话脱轨概率估计解耦的方法，通过前瞻性模拟判断紧张时刻是否存在恢复路径，从而在不牺牲预测准确性的情况下大幅降低误报率。
AI.motivation: 现有对话脱轨预测模型仅基于脱轨概率做触发决策，忽视对话未来恢复的可能性，导致误报率过高。作者希望模拟人类标注者的决策方式，通过延迟触发来降低误报。
AI.method: 提出一种"延迟触发机制"（deferral mechanism），利用前瞻性模拟（forward-looking simulations）评估紧张时刻是否可能存在合理的恢复路径，从而决定是否立即触发预警，将决策与脱轨概率估计解耦。
AI.result: 将该机制集成到现有最先进的预测模型中，在不降低预测准确性的前提下，显著减少了误报率（false positives）。
AI.conclusion: 这项工作强调了将决策制定作为预测系统的一等组件（first-class component）的价值，为构建更鲁棒、更实用的对话监控系统提供了新思路。

title: FedSmoothLoRA: Toward Smoother and Faster Convergence in Federated Low-Rank Adaptation
summary: Federated fine-tuning of foundation models with Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) provides an efficient solution for reducing communication and computation costs while preserving data locality. However, the direct combination of FedAvg and LoRA suffers from three key issues: limited update space, which restricts the model's effective learning capacity; inter-round state mismatch, which disrupts cross-round local optimization continuity; and a client-agnostic starting state, which slows local convergence on clients. Although recent methods mitigate the limited update space issue by merging LoRA updates into the backbone across communication rounds, inter-round state mismatch and the client-agnostic starting state remain insufficiently addressed. To address these issues, we propose FedSmoothLoRA, a federated LoRA tuning framework that preserves the enlarged update space, improves cross-round local optimization continuity, and provides a client-aware starting state for local training. At each communication round, FedSmoothLoRA constructs the local LoRA initialization using two matrices: a Round-Matching matrix that preserves cross-round local state continuity, and a Gradient-Aligned matrix that provides client-specific optimization guidance from gradient signals estimated on local data. Together, these designs enable smoother and faster convergence. Extensive experiments on image classification and natural language generation tasks demonstrate that FedSmoothLoRA consistently outperforms existing federated LoRA tuning methods. Code: https://github.com/wangzehao0704/FedSmoothLoRA

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedSmoothLoRA，一种联邦LoRA微调框架，通过Round-Matching矩阵保持跨轮次局部状态连续性，以及Gradient-Aligned矩阵提供客户端特定优化指导，从而解决FedAvg+LoRA中存在的更新空间有限、跨轮次状态不匹配和客户端无关初始状态三个问题，在图像分类和自然语言生成任务上表现优越。
AI.motivation: FedAvg与LoRA直接结合存在三个关键问题：1) 更新空间有限，限制模型有效学习能力；2) 跨轮次状态不匹配，破坏局部优化连续性；3) 客户端无关的起始状态，减缓局部收敛速度。现有方法仅缓解了更新空间问题，后两个问题仍未被充分解决。
AI.method: 提出FedSmoothLoRA框架，每轮通信中利用两个矩阵构建局部LoRA初始化：Round-Matching矩阵保持跨轮次局部状态连续性，Gradient-Aligned矩阵从本地数据估计的梯度信号提供客户端特定优化指导。
AI.result: 在图像分类和自然语言生成任务上的大量实验表明，FedSmoothLoRA持续优于现有联邦LoRA微调方法。
AI.conclusion: FedSmoothLoRA通过保留扩大后的更新空间、改善跨轮次局部优化连续性、提供客户端感知的起始状态，实现了更平滑和更快的收敛，有效解决了现有联邦LoRA微调方法的核心缺陷。

title: Ensemble Score Filtering for Real-Data Energy Consumption Forecast Correction
