summary: Accurate estimation and forecasting of energy consumption are important for power-system operation, planning, and demand-side management. In practice, however, complete and timely measurements may not always be available, and the observed data can be partial, noisy, or delayed. This motivates the use of learned forecasting models for predicting the evolving consumption state, together with data assimilation methods for sequential forecast correction. In this work, we study a high-dimensional data assimilation problem for real energy-consumption data. \modeltext{The forward prediction is supplied by a pretrained black-box spatio-temporal forecasting model, which is treated as the state propagator in the filtering procedure.} We employ the Ensemble Score Filter (EnSF) to assimilate partial and noisy observations and to correct the forecast trajectory over time. The EnSF uses score-based diffusion models to approximate filtering distributions and avoids retraining neural-network score models during assimilation by using a closed-form score representation and Monte Carlo approximation. Numerical experiments demonstrate that open-loop propagation of the learned forecasting model can become unreliable over long horizons, while EnSF-based correction substantially improves state estimation. Comparisons with the Ensemble Kalman Filter (EnKF) further show that EnSF provides stronger correction under the nonlinear observation setting considered in this work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用集成得分滤波器（EnSF）对预训练的黑箱时空预测模型进行数据同化校正，以解决高维能耗数据中存在部分、噪声或延迟观测时的状态估计问题。实验表明，EnSF相比开环传播和集成卡尔曼滤波（EnKF）在非线性观测下具有更优的修正性能。
AI.motivation: 实际电力系统中能耗数据常存在不完整、带噪声或延迟的问题，需要结合学习型预测模型与数据同化方法实现准确的能耗状态估计与预测。
AI.method: 将预训练的黑箱时空预测模型视为滤波过程中的状态传播器，采用集成得分滤波器（EnSF）同化部分含噪观测数据，利用基于得分的扩散模型逼近滤波分布，并通过闭式得分表示与蒙特卡洛近似避免在同化过程中重新训练神经网络得分模型。
AI.result: 开环传播的预测模型在长时域上变得不可靠；EnSF的修正显著提升了状态估计精度；在非线性观测设置下，EnSF的校正效果优于集成卡尔曼滤波（EnKF）。
AI.conclusion: EnSF可有效结合黑箱预测模型与数据同化，适用于高维能耗数据的实时状态估计，在非线性观测下具有优于传统同化方法的性能。

title: Harmonizing Real-Time Constraints and Long-Horizon Reasoning: An Asynchronous Agentic Framework for Dynamic Scheduling
summary: The Dynamic Flexible Job Shop Scheduling Problem (DFJSP) necessitates a trade-off between instant reaction to stochastic disturbances and global optimization of production goals. Conventional priority rules are insufficiently flexible to handle complex disruptions, whereas learning-based approaches often compromise interpretability or fail to generalize across problem scales. Although Large Language Models (LLMs) offer advanced reasoning capabilities to bridge this gap, their substantial inference latency is incompatible with the millisecond-level decision cycles of industrial control systems. To resolve this conflict, we introduce RACE-Sched, an asynchronous agent-based framework that decouples policy execution from logical reasoning via a dual-stream architecture. The Reactive Stream executes low-latency symbolic heuristics to enable real-time dispatching, while the parallel Deliberative Stream leverages an LLM to synthesize, validate, and evolve these rules. Candidate rules undergo rigorous testing in a sandbox and are deployed via atomic updates, ensuring safety without blocking the control loop. Additionally, a semantic rule repository indexes validated heuristics for retrieval-based initialization which enhances transferability across problem scales. Extensive evaluations on GEN-Bench, MK-Bench, and JMS-Bench demonstrate that RACE-Sched outperforms leading Deep Reinforcement Learning and other LLM-based baselines. This approach harmonizes real-time constraints with long-horizon reasoning to achieve superior solution quality and robust adaptation to dynamic events.

AI.tldr: RACE-Sched是一个异步智能体框架，通过双流架构（反应流+深思流）将低延迟符号启发式规则执行与大语言模型的逻辑推理解耦，在DFJSP中实现了实时调度与长期优化的平衡，性能优于深度强化学习和其他LLM基线方法。
AI.motivation: DFJSP需要在即时响应随机扰动与全局生产目标优化之间做出权衡；传统优先级规则灵活性不足，学习型方法缺乏可解释性或难以跨问题规模泛化；LLM虽有高级推理能力但推理延迟过大，无法满足工业控制系统的毫秒级决策周期要求。
AI.method: 提出RACE-Sched异步智能体框架，采用双流架构：反应流执行低延迟符号启发式规则实现实时调度，并行深思流利用LLM合成、验证和演化规则。候选规则在沙盒中测试后通过原子更新部署，确保安全且不阻塞控制回路。同时建立语义规则库索引已验证的启发式规则，支持检索式初始化以增强跨问题规模的迁移性。
AI.result: 在GEN-Bench、MK-Bench和JMS-Bench三个基准测试上的广泛评估表明，RACE-Sched优于领先的深度强化学习方法和基于LLM的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过协调实时约束与长期推理，实现了更优的解质量和对动态事件的鲁棒适应。

title: OmniRetrieval: Unified Retrieval across Heterogeneous Knowledge Sources
summary: Real-world information needs require access to structurally diverse knowledge sources, from unstructured text and relational tables to knowledge graphs and property graphs. Existing retrievers, however, operate over one source at a time under a fixed query language, leaving the broader landscape of available knowledge fragmented behind incompatible interfaces. A natural attempt at unification would collapse these sources into a shared space, but this erases the structural affordances (such as schemas, ontologies, compositional operators) that give each source its expressive power. Effective retrieval over diverse knowledge, therefore, requires not homogenization but an overarching layer that meets each source on its own terms. To achieve this, we present OmniRetrieval, a framework that takes any natural-language query, identifies appropriate knowledge sources, and dispatches source-native queries to their native execution engines. Across an extensive benchmark spanning 13 datasets and 309 distinct knowledge bases over text, relational, and graph-structured sources, OmniRetrieval exceeds single-source baselines, demonstrating that it can serve as a general-purpose interface to the heterogeneous sources while preserving the structural distinctions that make each source valuable.

AI.tldr: OmniRetrieval是一个统一检索框架，能够将自然语言查询自动分发到多种异构知识源（文本、关系表、知识图谱、属性图等），无需牺牲各源的结构特性，在13个数据集、309个知识库的基准测试中优于单源基线。
AI.motivation: 现实世界信息需求涉及多种结构异构的知识源（非结构化文本、关系表、知识图谱、属性图），但现有检索器每次只能操作单一源且使用固定查询语言，导致知识碎片化、接口不兼容。简单地将所有源压缩到同一空间会丢失各自的结构性优势（如模式、本体、组合操作符），因此需要一种既能保留各源特有结构、又能统一检索的框架。
AI.method: 提出OmniRetrieval框架，接收自然语言查询，自动识别合适的知识源，并将源原生查询派发到各自的执行引擎执行检索，而非将所有源同质化处理。
AI.result: 在涵盖13个数据集和309个不同知识库（包括文本、关系表和图结构源）的广泛基准测试中，OmniRetrieval的性能超过了单源基线方法。
AI.conclusion: OmniRetrieval可以作为异构知识源的通用接口，在保留各源独特结构价值的同时实现统一检索，证明了无需同质化也能实现有效的跨源检索。

title: FlowSeg: Dynamic Semantic Guidance for LLM-Conditioned Segmentation
summary: LLM-conditioned segmentation has recently advanced rapidly by coupling large language models with iterative mask generation frameworks. However, we identify a persistent failure mode in current propose-then-select pipelines. Although high-quality mask candidates are often generated, the final prediction may fail to match the given linguistic condition. This failure arises because language semantics are typically used as static prompts or post-hoc matching signals, rather than participating in the iterative mask generation process. Through systematic analysis, we show that many errors stem from semantic misalignment rather than poor mask quality. To address this issue, we propose FlowSeg, which introduces dynamic semantic guidance via a bidirectional semantic flow between intermediate decoding states and LLM-derived condition embeddings throughout the generation process. Language conditions actively guide mask refinement at each stage, while condition embeddings are progressively updated by emerging visual evidence. This design yields semantically grounded mask representations and visually aligned language conditions, enabling more reliable matching. We further incorporate a lightweight boundary-aware refinement to selectively enhance uncertain regions without perturbing confident interiors. Extensive experiments on referring expression segmentation and reasoning segmentation tasks demonstrate that FlowSeg consistently improves language-mask alignment and achieves state-of-the-art performance. Project page: https://zkzhang98.github.io/FlowSeg_page

AI.tldr: FlowSeg通过双向语义流机制让语言条件主动参与掩码生成全过程，解决现有"先提议后选择"框架中语言条件与掩码预测语义不对齐的问题，在指代表达分割和推理分割任务上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的分割方法采用"提议-选择"流水线，语言条件仅作为静态提示或事后匹配信号，导致生成的掩码与语言条件之间存在语义不对齐（semantic misalignment）问题，即高质量掩码候选被选出后仍可能无法匹配语言描述。
AI.method: 提出FlowSeg，核心是双向语义流（bidirectional semantic flow）：(1) 语言条件在每一解码阶段主动引导掩码细化；(2) 条件嵌入随视觉证据逐步更新。此外，引入轻量级边界感知细化模块，选择性增强不确定区域而不扰动内部可靠区域。
AI.result: 在指代表达分割和推理分割任务上，FlowSeg一致提升了语言-掩码对齐质量，取得SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 动态语义引导机制能有效解决语言条件与分割掩码之间的语义错配问题，双向交互的设计比单向静态提示更有利于语义对齐。

title: Knowledge Offloading: Decomposing LLMs into Sparse Backbones and Memory Modules
summary: LLMs encode both general capabilities and domain-specific knowledge in a single set of parameters. We ask whether this capacity can be reorganized: keeping broadly useful computation in a shared backbone, while moving specialized knowledge into external memory modules. We propose \emph{knowledge offloading} (KOFF), a framework for decomposing a pretrained LLM into a sparse shared backbone and domain-specific memories. Starting from a frozen base model, we jointly learn a structured pruning mask and lightweight recovery modules, implemented as LoRA adapters and learned key-value caches. Across Llama and Qwen models from 3B to 8B, we find that non-trivial capacity can be moved out of the shared backbone without a large loss in model ability. At around 12\% global sparsity, KOFF preserves much of the unpruned model's performance, while pruning the same frozen model without memories degrades sharply. Ablations show that LoRA and learned KV memories are complementary, and specialization analyses suggest that the learned decomposition is meaningful: language-specific neurons are preferentially removed while language-general neurons largely remain in the backbone. These results suggest that knowledge can be reallocated between a shared core and swappable external memories.

AI.tldr: 本文提出知识卸载（KOFF）框架，通过结构化剪枝和轻量恢复模块（LoRA+学习型KV缓存），将预训练LLM分解为稀疏共享主干和领域特定记忆。实验表明，约12%全局稀疏度下性能保持良好，且语言特定神经元优先被移除，通用神经元保留在主干中。
AI.motivation: 探索是否可以将LLM中的通用能力与领域知识解耦，将专业知识迁移到外部记忆模块，而共享主干保留广泛适用的计算能力。
AI.method: 基于冻结基座模型，联合学习结构化剪枝掩码和轻量恢复模块（LoRA适配器+学习型KV缓存），实现知识卸载。
AI.result: 在3B-8B的Llama/Qwen模型上，12%全局稀疏度下KOFF保持未剪枝模型大部分性能，而同等剪枝无记忆的模型性能骤降。LoRA和学习KV缓存互补，语言特定神经元被优先剪除。
AI.conclusion: 知识可以在共享核心与可交换外部记忆之间重新分配，验证了LLM参数解耦的可行性。

title: When and How Human Curation Backfires: Preference Alignment under Multi-Model Self-Consuming Loop
summary: Foundation models are increasingly trained on synthetic data generated by prior model iterations rather than exclusively on real data. This self-consuming training paradigm can lead to model collapse, divergence, or bias amplification. Recent work (Ferbach et al., 2024) shows that incorporating human curation into the loop can steer a self-consuming model toward human-aligned behavior, but these analyses focus on a single, isolated model that solely consumes its own outputs. In practice, however, models often interact and train on input-output pairs produced by other models. This paper studies self-consuming training in the multi-model regime. We first formalize a framework for interacting self-consuming models and characterize when the resulting dynamical system converges to a stable point. We then examine how human curation of one model affects its own alignment (self-influence) and how such effects propagate to other models (cross-influence). Unlike isolated settings where human curation always enhances model alignment, we show that cross-model interactions can dampen or even invert this effect, ultimately degrading long-term alignment.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多模型自消费训练范式，发现模型间交互可能导致人类引导效果减弱甚至反转，从而损害长期对齐性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅关注单个模型自消费训练中人类引导的效果，但实际场景中模型间存在交互与数据共享，因此需要探索多模型自消费训练的动态机制。
AI.method: 形式化定义了多模型自消费训练框架，分析动态系统收敛条件；研究人类引导对自身模型的对齐影响（自影响）及对其他模型的对齐溢出效应（交叉影响）。
AI.result: 与单模型场景不同，多模型交互可能导致人类引导的对齐增强效果减弱甚至反转，损害长期对齐性能。
AI.conclusion: 多模型自消费训练中，跨模型交互会显著改变人类引导的传播效果，需谨慎设计交互机制以避免对齐退化。

title: DynSess: Dynamic Session-Level Evaluation and Optimization Framework for Role-Playing Agents
summary: Role-playing with large language models is fundamentally a session-level task, requiring agents to sustain character identity and interaction quality across extended multi-turn conversations. Yet existing evaluation and optimization methods remain largely turn-level, failing to capture long-horizon quality. We propose DynSess, a unified session-level framework for role-playing agents. DynSess-Eval scores complete dialogue sessions via rubrics targeting long-horizon behaviors. Leveraging its session-level rewards, we construct high-quality training trajectories through multi-turn lookahead search and train DynSess-Character with two complementary variants: DSPO (off-policy) and GSRPO (on-policy). Experiments show that DynSess-Eval aligns with human judgments substantially better than prior evaluators, and blind human evaluation further shows that DynSess-Character matches the strongest character model despite using substantially fewer parameters, while maintaining strong role consistency and interactive ability. Our dataset and code will be released to facilitate future research.

AI.tldr: 提出DynSess框架，通过会话级评估（DynSess-Eval）和基于会话级奖励的训练方法（DSPO和GSRPO），实现角色扮演代理在长多轮对话中的角色一致性和交互质量提升，在参数量更少的情况下达到强模型表现。
AI.motivation: 现有角色扮演大模型的评估和优化方法多停留在单轮层面，无法捕捉长程多轮对话中的角色维持和交互质量，需要会话级统一框架。
AI.method: 提出DynSess框架，包含DynSess-Eval（基于规则的会话级评分）和DynSess-Character训练方法（离线策略DSPO与在线策略GSRPO两种变体），通过多轮前瞻搜索构建高质量训练轨迹。
AI.result: DynSess-Eval与人类判断的相关性显著优于已有评估器；盲人评估显示DynSess-Character在参数量远小于最强模型的情况下，达到相当的角色一致性和交互能力。
AI.conclusion: 会话级框架对于角色扮演任务至关重要，DynSess有效弥补了单轮评估与优化的不足，且将开源数据集和代码以促进后续研究。

title: Benchmarking Large Vision-Language Models on CFMME: A Comprehensive Chinese Financial Multimodal Evaluation Dataset
summary: The emergence of Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) has substantially expanded model capabilities beyond text-only understanding, enabling unified inference across both visual and textual modalities and supporting a broader range of real-world applications. To comprehensively evaluate the perception, understanding, reasoning, and cognition capabilities of LVLMs throughout the entire financial business workflow in Chinese contexts, we introduce CFMME, a novel Chinese financial multimodal evaluation benchmark. CFMME comprises 6,052 instances spanning from fundamental academic knowledge to complex real-world applications, covering eight primary financial image modalities and four core multimodal tasks. On CFMME, we conduct a thorough evaluation of representative LVLMs. The results show that the state-of-the-art model attains an overall accuracy of 66.11\% on the question answering task and an average score of 77.18 on the detection, recognition, and information extraction tasks, indicating substantial room for improvement in current LVLMs. In addition, we conduct detailed analyses of error causes, cross-modal capabilities, and multi-orientation settings, yielding valuable insights for future research. We hope that CFMME will spur further progress in LVLMs, especially by improving their performance on multiple multimodal tasks in the financial domain.

AI.tldr: 提出了CFMME，一个用于评估中文金融场景下多模态大模型能力的中文金融多模态评估基准，包含6052个实例，覆盖8种金融图像模态和4种核心多模态任务。评估显示现有最优模型准确率仅66.11%，仍有很大提升空间。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLMs评估多集中于英文通用场景，缺乏针对中文金融领域业务流程中完整感知、理解、推理和认知能力的系统性评估基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含6052个实例的CFMME基准，涵盖8种金融图像模态（如票据、报表、合同等）和4类多模态任务（检测、识别、信息抽取、问答），并对代表性LVLMs进行全面测评。
AI.result: 最优模型在问答任务上达到66.11%的整体准确率，在检测、识别和信息抽取任务上平均得分为77.18，表明当前模型仍有显著改进空间。
AI.conclusion: CFMME揭示了当前LVLMs在中文金融多模态任务上的不足，通过错误原因、跨模态能力和多方向设置的详细分析，为未来研究提供了有价值的洞察和方向。

title: OISD: On-Policy Internal Self-Distillation of Language Models
summary: Recent reinforcement learning (RL) post-training approaches primarily optimize the final output policy using sparse outcome-level rewards, while largely overlooking predictive signals encoded in intermediate representations. In this paper, we introduce a new paradigm called on-policy internal self-distillation and propose the OISD framework, which improves reasoning by transferring on-policy predictive signals from the final layer to intermediate representations. During rollout and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) optimization, the final layer acts as both the policy and a detached internal teacher for selected intermediate layers, which are guided to align with it through two complementary mechanisms: logit alignment, which transfers high-level reasoning behaviors (how to think), and attention alignment, which enforces consistent attention patterns (where to look) from the final layer to the selected intermediate layer, both without requiring external privileged information. Our OISD, together with GRPO, employs signed advantage-weighted Jensen--Shannon alignment to distill informative intermediate representations while preserving policy consistency under a unified acting policy. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of OISD, with substantial and consistent improvements over strong reasoning RL baselines across four mathematical reasoning tasks. The code will be released at https://github.com/THE-MALT-LAB/OISD

AI.tldr: 本文提出OISD框架，通过在策略内部自蒸馏（从最终层到中间层进行logit对齐和注意力对齐）来提升强化学习推理能力，在数学推理任务上优于现有基线。
AI.motivation: 现有RL后训练方法主要使用稀疏的结果级奖励优化最终输出策略，忽略了中间表示中编码的预测信号，未能充分利用模型内部的推理信息。
AI.method: 提出OISD框架，在GRPO优化过程中，将最终层同时作为策略和内部教师，通过logit对齐（迁移推理行为）和注意力对齐（保持注意力一致性）两种机制，对选定的中间层进行知识蒸馏，并使用带符号优势加权的Jensen-Shannon对齐损失来保持策略一致性。
AI.result: 在四个数学推理任务上的实验结果表明，OISD相比强推理RL基线取得了显著且一致的改进。
AI.conclusion: 通过内部自蒸馏传递预测信号可以有效提升中间层表示质量，进而提升模型的推理能力，且不需要外部特权信息。

title: Indexing the Unreadable: LLM-Native Recursive Construction and Search of Service Taxonomies
comment: Preprint. 8 pages main paper + appendix; 2 figures. Under submission to EMNLP 2026
summary: The era of the Internet of Agents (IoA) is taking shape: LLM agents are expected to fulfill user goals by orchestrating fast-growing populations of Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers, Agent-to-Agent (A2A) endpoints, reusable skills, and other LLM-callable services. Yet LLMs face a structural mismatch with this regime: effective context is a scarce resource that does not scale with the number of services. Concatenating thousands of service descriptions into a prompt overflows the context window, and even when the window is large enough, models systematically under-attend to information in the middle of long inputs, the well-documented Lost-in-the-Middle phenomenon. This is fundamentally a question of context management for service discovery. To address this, we propose an LLM-native progressive-disclosure scheme and its concrete instantiation, A2X (Agent-to-Anything service discovery): an LLM-driven pipeline that automatically organizes the registered services into a hierarchical taxonomy and walks it layer by layer at query time, so that every LLM call sees only a small candidate set highly relevant to the user query. This decouples effective-context scarcity from registry size and significantly reduces token consumption while improving retrieval accuracy. Compared to full-context dumping, A2X achieves a 6.2-point Hit Rate gain at one-ninth the prompt-token cost; compared to the state-of-the-art open-source embedding-based baseline, A2X improves Hit Rate by more than 20 points.

AI.tldr: 本文提出A2X（Agent-to-Anything服务发现）方案，通过LLM驱动的渐进式层次化服务分类与逐层查询机制，解决IoA时代海量服务描述与LLM有限上下文窗口之间的结构性不匹配问题，在显著降低token消耗的同时提升检索准确率。
AI.motivation: LLM agent需要从快速增长的海量服务（MCP服务器、A22端点、技能等）中发现和调用相关服务，但将所有服务描述直接拼接到prompt中会溢出上下文窗口；即使窗口够大，模型也出现"Lost-in-the-Middle"问题，即对长输入中间部分的信息注意力不足。有效上下文成为一种无法随服务数量扩展的稀缺资源。
AI.method: 提出A2X方案：一个LLM驱动的渐进式信息揭示（progressive-disclosure）管道，自动将注册服务组织成层次化分类树，并在查询时逐层遍历，确保每次LLM调用仅看到与用户查询高度相关的小规模候选集。
AI.result: 相比全量上下文拼接，A2X在Hit Rate上提升6.2个百分点，而prompt token成本降至原来的1/9；相比最先进的开源基于嵌入的基线方法，A2X的Hit Rate提升超过20个百分点。
AI.conclusion: A2X成功将有效上下文稀缺性从注册中心规模中解耦，在提升检索准确率的同时大幅降低token消耗，为IoA时代的服务发现提供了一种高效的解决方案。

title: Compute Allocation in Evolutionary Search: From Depth-Breadth to Multi-Armed Bandits
summary: LLM-guided evolutionary search (Evolve systems) has reached state-of-the-art results on mathematical and combinatorial tasks, yet most existing systems report only the best of many runs and leave the run-to-run distribution undocumented. We ask how a fixed budget of LLM calls should be allocated, and how reliably a single run reaches the reported numbers. Sweeping the depth-breadth grid over five models and three tasks, we identify two empirical regularities: a fitness-compute envelope along which capability ordering largely collapses on effective FLOPs, and a bilinear depth-breadth fit with task-specific interaction; both are gated by model-task capability. Motivated by these regularities, we propose BaSE (Bandit-based Self-Evolving), a multi-armed bandit that allocates LLM calls across parallel trajectories. Without changing the model, prompt, or evaluator, BaSE improves mean fitness by 12.3% over the strongest island-protocol baseline across 8 (model, task) cells, with the largest gains on high-variance settings: a reliability gain from allocation alone.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LLM引导的进化搜索中预算分配策略，发现适应度-计算量包络线和双线性深度-广度拟合规律，并提出基于多臂赌博机的BaSE方法，在不改变模型、提示或评估器的情况下，平均适应度提升12.3%。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM进化搜索系统只报告多次运行中的最佳结果，忽略了运行间的分布差异。因此需要研究在固定LLM调用预算下如何分配资源，以及单次运行的可靠性。
AI.method: 1）在深度-广度网格上系统扫描5个模型和3个任务，发现两个经验规律：适应度-计算量包络线和双线性深度-广度拟合。2）基于这些规律提出BaSE（基于多臂赌博机的自进化系统），通过多臂赌博机在并行轨迹间分配LLM调用预算。
AI.result: BaSE在8个（模型，任务）组合上，相比最强岛屿协议基线平均适应度提升12.3%，在高方差设置上增益最大，且不改变模型、提示或评估器。
AI.conclusion: 仅通过改进分配策略即可获得显著的可靠性提升，为LLM进化搜索提供了更实用的优化框架。

title: V2XCrafter: Learning to Generate Driving Scene Across Agents
summary: Collaborative driving systems leverage vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication for multi-agent collaborative perception to enhance driving safety, yet they remain constrained by scarce annotated real-world V2X driving datasets and limited generalization across diverse driving conditions. While image generation technology offers a feasible solution for data augmentation, existing methods tailored for single-vehicle multi-view scenarios face two fundamental challenges in multi-agent driving settings: (1) the expansion of the learning objective degrades generation quality, and (2) the highly dynamic variations across agents hinder the modeling of consistency for physical attributes (e.g., color, category) in jointly observed objects. To bridge this gap, we propose V2XCrafter, the first framework for generating controllable and realistic collaborative driving scene across agents' camera views. For effective learning, we develop a progressive multi-agent diffusion model based on a single-agent backbone, using neighboring agents' latent states as reference signals to progressively guide the single-to-multi diffusion. To address cross-vehicle inconsistency, we propose a cross-agent attention module that leverages a collaboration view graph and learnable jointly observed object representation to model the dynamic cross-agent camera view relationships. Experiments have shown that V2XCrafter can generate high-fidelity and controllable street views with consistency across agents, thereby effectively enhancing the downstream collaborative 3D object detection tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出V2XCrafter，首个面向多智能体协同驾驶场景的可控真实跨视角图像生成框架，通过渐进式多智能体扩散模型和跨智能体注意力模块，解决了生成质量下降和跨车不一致性问题，有效提升了下游协同3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有协同驾驶系统受限于稀缺的真实V2X标注数据集和有限的泛化能力，而单车辆多视角的图像生成方法在多智能体场景面临两大挑战：学习目标扩展导致生成质量下降，以及跨智能体的高度动态变化阻碍了共同观测物体物理属性的一致性建模。
AI.method: 提出V2XCrafter框架：1）基于单智能体骨干网络的渐进式多智能体扩散模型，利用邻接智能体的潜状态作为参考信号逐步引导单到多扩散过程；2）跨智能体注意力模块，通过协作视图图（collaboration view graph）和可学习的共同观测物体表征来建模动态的跨智能体相机视图关系。
AI.result: V2XCrafter能够生成高保真、可控且跨智能体一致的街景视图，有效增强了下游协同3D目标检测任务的性能。
AI.conclusion: V2XCrafter作为首个面向多智能体协同驾驶场景的可控跨视角图像生成框架，成功解决了生成质量下降和跨车不一致性问题，验证了生成式数据增强对协同感知任务的有效性。

title: Model Merging by Output-Space Projection
summary: Model merging combines fine-tuned checkpoints into a single multi-task model without retraining. Existing methods - such as task arithmetic, model soups, TIES, and DARE - are computationally efficient and empirically successful, but rely on heuristic design choices and lack formal optimality guarantees. We show that merging can be formulated as a convex quadratic programme over residual updates, yielding weights that minimise a squared-output calibration objective using calibration inputs and fine-tuned model outputs, and subsuming existing methods as special cases. Our framework yields a closed-form diagnostic - the fraction of residual energy captured by a chosen basis - that predicts downstream merge quality using only the calibration set. Empirically, the QP matches or outperforms existing methods in the single-layer setting, and we characterise when the optimal basis provides significant gains over the cheaper diagonal QP. We extend to multi-layer merging via a sequential layer-wise algorithm and demonstrate consistent gains across language and vision benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将模型合并形式化为凸二次规划问题，通过校准数据和微调模型输出来优化权重，并提供了预测合并质量的闭式诊断指标，在单层和多层设置中均取得一致改进。
AI.motivation: 现有模型合并方法（如task arithmetic、model soups、TIES、DARE）虽然计算高效且经验成功，但依赖于启发式设计选择，缺乏形式化的最优性保证。作者旨在提供一个有理论保证的合并框架。
AI.method: 将模型合并重新表述为关于残差更新的凸二次规划问题，通过校准输入和微调模型输出最小化平方输出校准目标；推导出闭式诊断指标（残差能量被选定基捕获的比例）用于预测合并质量；扩展为逐层顺序算法以支持多层合并。
AI.result: 在单层设置中，QP方法匹配或优于现有方法；当最优基显著优于对角QP时，作者刻画了条件；在语言和视觉基准上，多层顺序合并算法取得一致改进。
AI.conclusion: 模型合并可以被形式化为有最优性保证的凸二次规划，诊断指标能有效预测合并质量，该方法在多种任务上表现一致优于现有启发式方法。

title: CoHyDE: Iterative Co-Training of LLM Rewriter & Dense Encoder for Tool Retrieval
summary: Tool retrieval over large API catalogs is a core bottleneck for LLM agents: user queries arrive in colloquial, often underspecified language, while the catalog uses technical API vocabulary that no fixed encoder can bridge on its own. The two dominant training approaches, contrastive encoder fine-tuning and HyDE-style query expansion with a frozen LLM, address this problem from opposite ends and fail in complementary directions: the fine-tuned encoder excels when the query's surface form already matches the catalog but collapses when it does not, while zero-shot HyDE is more robust to underspecified queries yet generates catalog-unaware hypothetical descriptions that degrade retrieval when queries are well-formed. We introduce CoHyDE, an iterative procedure that trains the dense encoder and the LLM rewriter as a single co-evolving system: the encoder is retrained with InfoNCE on catalog-style hypothetical descriptions produced by the rewriter, and the rewriter is preference-aligned via DPO against the encoder's retrieval scores, with both sides warm-started on the tool catalog before the loop begins. On a ~10k tool subset of the ToolBench catalog, three rounds of CoHyDE improve over the strongest single-component baseline by +2.5 pp NDCG@5 on standard queries and +6.3 pp on held-out vague queries, with gains as large as +8 pp on the hardest vague tier. Ablations confirm that co-training is the key ingredient: using either component in isolation fails to match CoHyDE on both well-formed and vague queries, with losses of up to -8 pp on vague queries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 CoHyDE，一种协同训练密集编码器和 LLM 重写器的迭代方法，用于解决大型 API 目录中工具检索的语义鸿沟问题。在 ToolBench 子集上，三个迭代轮次使标准查询 NDCG@5 提升 2.5 个百分点，模糊查询提升 6.3 个百分点，消融实验证实协同训练是关键。
AI.motivation: 用户查询通常使用口语化、模糊的语言，而 API 目录使用技术性词汇。现有的两种主流方法（对比学习微调编码器、HyDE 式查询扩展）各自存在互补性缺陷：微调编码器在查询表面形式匹配时表现好，但不匹配时崩溃；零样本 HyDE 对模糊查询鲁棒，但生成的假设描述不感知目录，降低高质量查询的检索效果。因此需要一种统一的方法。
AI.method: CoHyDE 是一个协同迭代训练框架：(1) 编码器使用 InfoNCE 损失，在重写器生成的目录风格假设描述上重新训练；(2) 重写器通过 DPO 进行偏好对齐，以编码器的检索分数作为偏好信号；(3) 两者均在工具目录上热启动，然后循环迭代。
AI.result: 在 ToolBench 约 10k 工具子集上，三轮 CoHyDE 相比最强单组件基线，标准查询 NDCG@5 提升 2.5 个百分点，模糊查询提升 6.3 个百分点，最难模糊查询提升高达 8 个百分点。消融实验表明单独使用任一组件均无法匹配 CoHyDE，模糊查询损失高达 8 个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 协同训练是解决 API 检索中语义鸿沟的关键要素，CoHyDE 同时提升了标准查询和模糊查询的检索性能，在两类互补的失败模式上取得了系统性改进。

title: Learnable Assessment Skills for LLM-based Automated Scoring: Rubric Construction via Iterative Optimization
summary: LLM-based automated scoring approaches near-human performance, but scaling to new tasks remains bottlenecked by the per-item human configuration of upstream stages such as rubric construction. Human experts bypass this bottleneck through evaluation heuristics developed over extensive practice. We ask whether LLMs can learn similar heuristics directly from scoring experience, and formalize this as the concept of assessment skills: item-independent natural-language procedural knowledge that guides LLMs through specific stages of the scoring workflow. Focusing on rubric construction as a first instantiation, we propose an iterative framework that decomposes a skill into a fixed scaffold and learnable item-agnostic rules, refining the rules through LLM-driven diagnosis of scoring errors and validation-gated selection. The framework requires no expert-written rubric. On all ten ASAP-SAS items, optimized skills substantially improve LLM-based scoring and frequently surpass the dataset-provided expert rubric. Cross-item transfer experiments further reveal that learned skills capture both generalizable and item-specific patterns.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于LLM的评估技能框架，通过迭代优化可学习的评分规则，使LLM无需专家编写评分标准即可实现高效自动评分，在ASAP-SAS数据集上表现优于专家编写的评分标准。
AI.motivation: 传统LLM自动评分方法扩展新任务时，需要人工配置上游阶段（如评分标准构建），形成瓶颈。人类专家通过长期实践形成的评估启发式方法可以绕过这一瓶颈，作者希望探究LLM能否从评分经验中直接学习类似的启发式方法。
AI.method: 提出"评估技能"概念——即与具体题目无关的自然语言程序性知识。聚焦评分标准构建，设计迭代框架：将技能分解为固定支架和可学习的题目无关规则，通过LLM驱动的评分错误诊断和验证选优机制不断优化规则，无需专家编写评分标准。
AI.result: 在全部10个ASAP-SAS题目上，优化后的评估技能显著提升了LLM评分性能，且经常超越数据集提供的专家评分标准。跨题目迁移实验表明，学到的技能既能捕捉通用模式，也能捕捉特定题目的模式。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了LLM可以通过迭代学习从评分经验中获得可迁移的评估技能，从而绕过人工评分标准构建的瓶颈，为自动评分的规模化扩展提供了新的思路。

title: AnyMo: Scaling Any-Modality Conditional Motion Generation with Masked Modeling
summary: Conditional human motion generation remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision and robotics. Despite significant progress, current methods are often constrained by fixed modality configurations and task-specific architectures, leaving cross-modal interactions and the scaling laws of multimodal-conditioned synthesis largely underexplored. A key bottleneck is the scarcity of large-scale modality-aligned motion data, limiting generalization across diverse control signals. In this work, we introduce OmniHuMo, a large-scale, high-quality dataset comprising over 5,000 hours of motion and 3.2 million sequences with precisely aligned multimodal annotations (e.g., text, speech, music, and trajectory). Leveraging OmniHuMo, we propose AnyMo, a unified multimodal framework combining a Residual FSQ-based motion tokenizer with a scalable masked modeling transformer, enabling high-quality motion synthesis under arbitrary modality combinations. Extensive experiments show that AnyMo achieves high-fidelity synthesis while offering flexible control over both spatial and stylistic attributes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OmniHuMo大规模多模态对齐运动数据集（5000+小时、320万序列）和AnyMo统一框架，通过残差FSQ运动分词器与可扩展掩码建模Transformer，实现任意模态组合下的高质量人体运动生成。
AI.motivation: 现有条件运动生成方法受限于固定模态配置和任务特定架构，缺乏跨模态交互研究，且缺少大规模模态对齐的运动数据，难以泛化到多样控制信号。
AI.method: 构建OmniHuMo数据集（文本、语音、音乐、轨迹等多模态对齐），提出AnyMo框架：结合残差FSQ运动分词器与可扩展掩码建模Transformer，支持任意模态组合的灵活控制。
AI.result: AnyMo在多种模态组合下实现高保真运动合成，支持空间和风格属性的灵活控制。
AI.conclusion: 大规模多模态对齐数据与统一框架可有效突破条件运动生成的模态限制，为多模态合成提供可扩展方案。

title: Bridging Chemists and AI: An Expert-Augmented Framework for Interpretable Route Evaluation
comment: 13 pages, 11 figures, ELLIS Unconference Workshop: Generative Models, LLMs, and the Future of Molecular AI (ML4Molecules 2025)
summary: Selecting efficient multi-step synthetic routes is a central challenge in organic synthesis, particularly in medicinal and process chemistry, where route choice directly impacts feasibility, cost, and development efficiency. Data-driven assessment systems often oversimplify the multi-objective nature of synthesis design and rely on proxy datasets, such as patent routes, rather than universally grounded criteria. To address this, we introduce an expert-augmented, data-driven scoring framework that integrates machine learning with chemists' domain knowledge for both numerical and explainable route assessment. A DeepSets-based model is trained using tree edit distance between reference and machine-generated routes, and then fine-tuned with expert evaluations to produce both quantitative scores and interpretable qualitative categories: Good, Plausible, and Bad. The resulting system achieves a Spearman correlation coefficient of 0.78 and a Pearson correlation of 0.77 for category assessment prediction, and 60.2% top-1 ranking accuracy for score prediction, substantially outperforming the previous baseline of 17.5%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种专家增强的数据驱动评分框架，结合深度学习和化学家领域知识，用于评估多步有机合成路线的质量，在评分和分类预测上显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 传统数据驱动评估系统对合成设计的多目标特性过度简化，且依赖专利路线等代理数据集，缺乏通用性标准，因此需要一种融合专家知识与机器学习的可解释路线评估方法。
AI.method: 基于DeepSets模型，使用参考路线与机器生成路线之间的树编辑距离进行训练，再通过专家评估进行微调，生成定量分数和定性分类（Good/Plausible/Bad）。
AI.result: 类别预测的Spearman相关系数0.78、Pearson相关系数0.77；分数预测的Top-1准确率60.2%，显著优于此前基线17.5%。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效结合了机器计算效率与化学家专业判断，在合成路线评估中实现了更准确且可解释的性能突破。

title: Diagnosing Harmful Continuation in Answer-Correct Long-CoT Training Traces
summary: Long chain-of-thought (CoT) traces are widely used as supervision for reasoning-oriented LLM SFT, yet answer-correct traces can still lead to markedly different fine-tuning outcomes. We study post-conclusion continuation in answer-correct long-CoT data: a continuation where the answer appears sufficiently supported, but the trace continues with additional reasoning that remains in the supervised target. To test its training effect, we use a delete-only editor to construct answer-preserving suffix removal and compare CoT-based SFT on the original and processed traces. We observe improved SFT outcomes after removing the editor-identified post-conclusion continuation, suggesting that this continuation is harmful to training in our setting. We therefore refer to this empirically supported phenomenon as harmful continuation. Beyond this intervention, we further characterize the removed post-conclusion continuation through uncertainty and hidden-state progress. We observe persistent local uncertainty together with weakened terminal-directional progress, forming an uncertainty--geometry mismatch. Finally, we instantiate Harmful Continuation Cut (HCC), a lightweight boundary proxy that approximates the editor-identified post-conclusion continuation boundary.

AI.tldr: 本文发现长思维链（CoT）数据中"结论后延续"部分对SFT训练有害，并通过删除实验验证了该现象，提出了轻量级的边界近似方法HCC。
AI.motivation: 长CoT轨迹中，即使答案正确，不同轨迹的微调效果差异显著。作者希望探究结论后延续（post-conclusion continuation）这一特定数据成分对训练的影响。
AI.method: 1) 使用仅删除的编辑器（delete-only editor）去除结论后延续部分；2) 对比原始与处理后的CoT进行SFT训练效果；3) 从不确定性和隐状态进展角度分析被删除的延续部分；4) 提出HCC（Harmful Continuation Cut）作为轻量级边界代理。
AI.result: 去除结论后延续后，SFT训练效果得到改善，表明该延续对训练有害。被删除的延续部分表现出持续性局部不确定性与弱化的终端方向进展，形成不确定性与几何的不匹配。
AI.conclusion: 结论后延续（harmful continuation）是长CoT数据中一种对训练有害但被忽视的现象，HCC可有效近似其边界。

title: Prompt-Level Reward Specifications for Open-Ended Post-Training
summary: Open-ended post-training benefits from rewards that make prompt-specific success conditions explicit, rather than relying only on post-hoc scalar scores. In instruction following, writing, and decision-support tasks, response quality depends on local requirements, holistic preferences, and explicit constraints, but existing reward methods often leave these criteria implicit or cover only narrowly verifiable cases. We propose a prompt-level reward specification framework that separates reward specification from reward computation. Given only prompts, our framework constructs reusable task-adaptive rubrics and executable hard-constraint checkers offline, making reward criteria explicit before training and reusable across rollouts. At scoring time, artifact-anchored rubric and code scores are combined with an independent global score for residual holistic quality, yielding a normalized hybrid reward over requirement satisfaction, holistic quality, and deterministic constraints. The framework requires no human preference annotations, reference answers, or a separately trained reward model. Experiments show that the resulting reward improves offline RM-style response ranking and supports online reinforcement learning across multiple open-ended benchmarks. Ablations further show that rubrics, global scoring, and executable verification provide complementary supervision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个提示级别的奖励规范框架，将奖励规范与计算分离，通过离线构建可复用的任务自适应评分标准和可执行硬约束检查器，在训练前明确奖励标准，结合锚定制品评分、代码评分和全局评分，生成混合奖励，无需人工偏好标注或独立奖励模型，在多个开放式基准上提升了奖励排序和在线强化学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有奖励方法在开放式后训练中常将评估标准隐式化或仅覆盖可验证的狭隘情况，无法充分捕捉指令遵循、写作和决策支持任务中局部需求、整体偏好和显式约束的复杂要求。
AI.method: 提出提示级奖励规范框架，离线构建任务自适应评分标准和可执行硬约束检查器，结合锚定制品评分、代码评分和全局评分生成归一化混合奖励，无需人工偏好标注或独立奖励模型。
AI.result: 实验表明该奖励方法在离线RM风格响应排序和在线强化学习上均优于现有方法，消融实验证实评分标准、全局评分和可执行验证提供互补的监督信号。
AI.conclusion: 将奖励标准明确化并分离规范与计算过程，能有效提升开放式后训练的效果，且无需昂贵的人工标注或额外奖励模型。

title: ESAM++: Efficient Online 3D Perception on the Edge
summary: Online 3D scene perception in real time is essential for robotics, AR/VR, and autonomous systems, particularly in edge computing scenarios where computational resources are limited and privacy is crucial. Recent state-of-the-art methods like EmbodiedSAM (ESAM) demonstrate the promise of online 3D perception by leveraging the Segment Anything Model (SAM) for real-time, fine-grained, and generalized 3D instance segmentation. However, ESAM still relies on a computationally expensive 3D sparse UNet for point cloud feature extraction, which accounts for the majority of the 3D inference time, hindering its practicality on resource-constrained devices. In this paper, we propose ESAM++, a lightweight and scalable alternative for online 3D scene perception tailored to edge devices without GPU acceleration. Our method introduces a 3D Sparse Feature Pyramid Network (SFPN) that efficiently captures multi-scale geometric features from streaming 3D point clouds while significantly reducing computational overhead and model size. We evaluate our approach on four challenging segmentation benchmarks, namely ScanNet, ScanNet200, SceneNN, and 3RScan, demonstrating that our model achieves competitive accuracy with up to 3 times faster inference with a 2 times smaller model size compared to ESAM, enabling practical deployment on edge devices.

AI.tldr: ESAM++ 提出轻量化的 3D 稀疏特征金字塔网络 (SFPN)，在边缘设备上实现实时在线 3D 场景感知，相比 ESAM 推理速度提升 3 倍、模型缩小 2 倍，同时保持竞争力。
AI.motivation: ESAM 依赖计算昂贵的 3D 稀疏 UNet 进行点云特征提取，导致在资源受限的边缘设备上难以实用。
AI.method: 提出 3D Sparse Feature Pyramid Network (SFPN)，高效捕获流式 3D 点云的多尺度几何特征，显著降低计算开销和模型体积。
AI.result: 在 ScanNet、ScanNet200、SceneNN、3RScan 四个基准上，精度与 ESAM 相当，推理速度提升 3 倍，模型尺寸缩小 2 倍。
AI.conclusion: ESAM++ 实现了轻量高效的在线 3D 场景感知，适用于无 GPU 加速的边缘设备。

title: When and How Long? The Readout-Mediator Angle in Temporal Reasoning
summary: A linear probe can decode a representation almost perfectly and yet be completely irrelevant to how the model uses it. On calendar-date duration reasoning in language models, a $\sin$/$\cos$ probe recovers day-of-year from a layer's activations, yet ablating its direction has no effect on the model's answers -- while ablating a four-dimensional subspace found by Distributed Alignment Search (DAS) at the same layer collapses performance entirely. We measure the angle between these two subspaces -- the \emph{readout-mediator angle} -- and find it indistinguishable from the angle between two random subspaces (the Haar-uniform null), meaning the probe has learned a direction orthogonal to the model's actual computation. Reverse-engineering the circuit reveals why: attention heads route month-grained context through learned QK offsets at ${\pm}30$ and ${\pm}61$ days, and MLPs then convert \emph{when} (absolute date) into \emph{how long} (duration) -- all downstream of the causal subspace the probe never touches. Sparse-autoencoder decomposition confirms the split: probe-aligned and DAS-aligned features encode semantically disjoint concepts with negligible causal overlap. The dissociation replicates across four scales ($1.5$-$9\,$B) and two model families, with preliminary evidence on two further domains (spatial displacement, symbolic arithmetic), suggesting that readout-mediator orthogonality is a general failure mode of probe-based interpretability. This directly undermines proposals to deploy probes as runtime safety monitors: the probe can report high confidence on a direction the model has silently abandoned.

AI.tldr: 线性探针能够完美解码模型表征，但该方向可能与模型实际计算完全正交，导致探针无法反映真实因果机制。本文通过日历日期推理任务证明，基于正弦/余弦的探针虽能解码一年中的第几天，但消融该方向不影响模型表现，而分布式对齐搜索（DAS）找到的四维子空间消融后性能完全崩溃。这种"读出一中介角度"与随机子空间角度无异，表明探针学习了与模型计算正交的方向。电路逆向分析发现注意力头通过±30和±61天的QK偏移路由月份信息，MLP将绝对日期转换为持续时长。该现象在多个规模、模型家族及领域（空间位移、符号算术）中复现，直接质疑基于探针的可解释性和运行时安全监控方案。
AI.motivation: 质疑并揭示线性探针在模型可解释性中的根本性缺陷——探针解码的表征方向可能与模型实际因果计算正交，导致探针完全无法反映模型内部工作机制。尤其针对将探针用于AI安全运行时监控的提议提出直接挑战。
AI.method: 1) 在日历日期持续时间推理任务上，对比正弦/余弦探针与分布式对齐搜索（DAS）两种方法；2) 定义并测量"读出一中介角度"（readout-mediator angle）量化探针方向与因果子空间的偏差；3) 通过电路逆向分析（attention head QK偏移、MLP转换）揭示真实计算路径；4) 稀疏自编码器分解验证特征语义分离；5) 跨模型规模（1.5B-9B）、模型家族及领域（空间位移、符号算术）进行泛化验证。
AI.result: 1) sin/cos探针能高精度解码day-of-year，但该方向与模型实际因果子空间正交（角度接近随机子空间的Haar均匀零假设）；2) 消融探针方向不影响模型性能，消融DAS方向导致性能完全崩溃；3) 电路分析发现注意力头利用±30和±61天的QK偏移编码月份上下文，MLP将绝对日期映射为持续时间；4) 稀疏自编码器验证探针对齐特征与DAS对齐特征编码语义不重叠的概念，因果重叠可忽略；5) 该现象在1.5B-9B四个规模、两个模型家族及空间位移、符号算术领域均稳定复现。
AI.conclusion: 线性探针解码的表征方向可能与模型真实因果计算正交，这是一种普遍性的失效模式（readout-mediator orthogonality），直接否定基于探针的可解释性方法以及将其用于运行时安全监控的提议。

title: Entropy-KL Divergence-based Token Masking: A Novel Approach for Selective Fine-tuning of Large Language Models
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) followed by reinforcement learning (RL) has become a standard post-training paradigm for large language models. This paradigm provides a cold-start for RL exploration, avoiding the inefficiency of pure RL where on-policy sampling yields insufficient positive samples. However, in practice, existing approaches often use a small amount of data for SFT initialization compared to the RL phase, which can cause the model to fit the limited samples and shift away from its pre-trained distribution. This distribution shift impedes the model's ability to effectively explore during subsequent RL training. To address this challenge, we propose that in low-data regimes, SFT should prioritize activating task-relevant capabilities rather than memorizing specific content. Along this line, we propose EKSFT (Entropy-KL Selective Fine-Tuning), which selectively masks tokens that exhibit either high entropy or high KL divergence from a reference model. By excluding these high-uncertainty, distribution-shifting tokens from imitation, EKSFT injects task-specific knowledge while preserving the integrity of the model's pre-trained distribution. Empirical evaluations on mathematical reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that EKSFT consistently outperforms standard SFT. Further RL fine-tuning from the EKSFT model yields consistently better post-RL performance, indicating improved exploration for the RL stage. Our codes and datasets are available at https://github.com/MINE-USTC/EKSFT.

AI.tldr: 论文提出EKSFT方法，通过在SFT阶段选择性屏蔽高熵或高KL散度的token，避免模型过度拟合有限数据而偏离预训练分布，从而提升后续RL阶段的探索效率。数学推理实验证明该方法优于标准SFT，且有助于RL微调。
AI.motivation: 标准SFT+RL范式在数据量少时，SFT会使模型过拟合有限样本，导致分布偏移，阻碍后续RL的有效探索。作者希望在小数据场景下，SFT应优先激活任务相关能力而非记忆具体内容。
AI.method: EKSFT（Entropy-KL Selective Fine-Tuning）：在SFT训练中，选择性屏蔽那些相对于参考模型具有高熵或高KL散度的token，避免模型模仿这些高不确定性、会导致分布偏移的token，从而在注入任务知识的同时保留预训练分布。
AI.result: 在数学推理基准上，EKSFT一致优于标准SFT；基于EKSFT模型再进行RL微调，得到的最终性能也更好，表明EKSFT改善了RL阶段的探索效果。
AI.conclusion: 小数据场景下，选择性屏蔽高不确定性token的SFT方法能有效缓解分布偏移问题，为后续RL提供更好的初始探索点。

title: Accommodation Goes Both Ways: Studying Linguistic Convergence Between Humans and Language Models
summary: As LLMs become increasingly integrated into daily life, understanding how their presence will shape human linguistic behavior is an open question. We present a large-scale study of linguistic convergence in human-LLM dialogue, examining how humans and LLMs accommodate each other's linguistic style during multi-turn conversations. Using an asymmetric convergence metric on WildChat, a corpus of real-world ChatGPT transcripts, we find that while LLMs significantly overconverge toward their users on both function word and open-class features across eight languages, human convergence rates in this setting are broadly consistent with human-human baselines. These findings suggest that accommodation in human-LLM dialogue is asymmetric: while LLMs dramatically overfit to their users' style, humans linguistically accommodate LLMs no differently than they would another person.

AI.tldr: 人类与LLM对话中存在不对称的语言趋同现象：LLM会过度适应用户的语言风格，而人类对LLM的语言适应程度与对人类对话者无异。
AI.motivation: 随着LLM融入日常生活，探究其存在如何塑造人类语言行为是一个悬而未决的问题。现有研究缺乏大规模、多语言背景下人类与LLM对话中的语言趋同分析。
AI.method: 提出不对称趋同度量方法，使用WildChat（真实ChatGPT对话语料），分析人类与LLM在多轮对话中对功能词和开放类特征的语言趋同情况，涵盖八种语言。
AI.result: LLM在功能词和开放类特征上对用户表现出显著的过度趋同；而人类对LLM的语言趋同率与人类-人类基线一致，未出现异常适应行为。
AI.conclusion: 人-LLM对话中的语言适应是不对称的：LLM过度拟合用户风格，而人类对LLM的语言趋同行为与对待真人无异。

title: KGEdit: Ambiguity-Aware Knowledge Graphs for Training-Free Precise Video Generation and Editing
summary: In recent years, training-free video generation has progressed remarkably. However, when handling complex textual instructions, existing methods still suffer from semantic ambiguity, incorrect concept binding, and cross-frame inconsistency. To address these issues, we propose KGEdit, a structured semantic control framework for text-to-video (T2V) diffusion models. Specifically, we first construct an ambiguity-aware knowledge graph (AAKG) to disentangle and disambiguate the input prompt, converting it into four types of structured semantics: identity, relation, attribute, and negative constraints. We then design a structured semantic injection module (SSIM) to inject these semantic signals into key layers of the diffusion Transformer, enabling fine-grained semantic control. In addition, we introduce a temporal-aware semantic control (TASC) module that dynamically schedules semantic objectives according to the stage-wise characteristics of the denoising process, further improving semantic alignment and temporal consistency. Experiments show that KGEdit outperforms existing methods in editing precision and temporal stability, while offering higher efficiency and controllability in text-driven interaction scenarios.

AI.tldr: KGEdit提出了一种基于知识图谱的结构化语义控制框架，通过构建消歧知识图谱（AAKG）、结构化语义注入模块（SSIM）和时序感知语义控制模块（TASC），显著提升了文本到视频生成中的语义对齐精度和时间一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有免训练视频生成方法在处理复杂文本指令时存在语义歧义、概念绑定错误和跨帧不一致的问题，亟需一种能够精确控制语义结构的框架。
AI.method: 1) 构建消歧知识图谱（AAKG）将输入提示分解为身份、关系、属性和负约束四种结构化语义；2) 设计结构化语义注入模块（SSIM）将语义信号注入扩散Transformer关键层；3) 引入时序感知语义控制模块（TASC），根据去噪过程阶段特征动态调度语义目标。
AI.result: KGEdit在编辑精度和时间稳定性上优于现有方法，并在文本驱动交互场景中展现出更高的效率和可控性。
AI.conclusion: 通过结构化语义表示与时序感知的动态控制，KGEdit有效解决了复杂文本指令下的语义歧义和时序不一致问题，为视频生成提供了更精确可控的解决方案。

title: Apertus LLM Family Expansion via Distillation and Quantization
summary: The wide adoption of LLMs has led to their use in great variety of applications and scenarios, such as chatbot assistants and data annotation, creating the need for the models to satisfy certain budget and hardware constraints. This has led to the trend of LLMs being released in batches consisting of similar models of various sizes for the family of models to adhere to as wide of a range of constraints as possible. In this paper, we validate distillation and quantization as a cost-effective way to expand model families to new sizes and hardware formats. Based on the open-recipe Apertus 8B LLM, we produce Apertus-v1.1 - a distilled family of models with up to 4B parameters trained on 1.7T permissive license tokens. We demonstrate cost-efficiency and strong accuracy performance of our approach for covering large ranges of hardware and systems requirements.

AI.tldr: 本文验证了蒸馏和量化作为低成本扩展现有模型家族至新规模和硬件格式的有效方法，基于Apertus 8B模型生产了Apertus-v1.1系列（最大4B参数，1.7T tokens训练），在覆盖广泛硬件需求的同时保持了高准确率。
AI.motivation: LLMs被广泛应用于多种场景（如聊天助手、数据标注），面临预算和硬件限制；模型常以不同大小的家族形式发布以适配不同约束，但如何低成本地扩展模型家族至新规模是一个关键问题。
AI.method: 采用蒸馏（distillation）和量化（quantization）技术，基于开源Apertus 8B模型，生产了Apertus-v1.1系列模型（最大4B参数），在1.7T许可token上训练。
AI.result: Apertus-v1.1系列模型在覆盖广泛硬件和系统需求的同时，展示了成本效益和强大的准确性表现。
AI.conclusion: 蒸馏和量化是低成本扩展模型家族至新规模和硬件格式的有效途径，能够在不显著牺牲性能的前提下满足多样化的部署约束。

title: Rubric-Guided Process Reward for Stepwise Model Routing
summary: Stepwise model routing improves the efficiency of Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) by assigning each reasoning step to a suitable model. Recent methods formulate routing as a sequential decision process and train the router with reinforcement learning. However, although they model routing as a process, they still supervise the router with outcome rewards. Such rewards only reflect final answer correctness and fail to evaluate intermediate routing decisions, which can weaken performance and generalization. To address this gap, we propose RoRo, a rubric-guided process reward framework for stepwise model routing. RoRo first collects diverse routing trajectories and constructs preference pairs based on outcome, cost, and process quality. It then trains a Rubricor to generate a query-specific evaluation rubric and a Judge to score routing trajectories under this rubric through alternating optimization. The resulting process rewards are combined with outcome rewards to optimize the routing policy via GRPO. Experiments on five reasoning benchmarks under both same-family and cross-family settings show that RoRo consistently outperforms strong baselines and achieves better accuracy and cost trade-offs.

AI.tldr: RoRo是一个基于rubric引导的过程奖励框架，通过引入过程质量评估来改进逐步模型路由，相比仅依赖结果奖励的方法在多个推理基准上表现更优。
AI.motivation: 现有逐步模型路由方法虽然将路由建模为序列决策过程，但仍仅使用最终答案正确性作为奖励信号，无法评估中间路由决策的质量，导致性能与泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 1) 收集多样化的路由轨迹并基于结果、成本和过程质量构建偏好对；2) 训练Rubricor生成查询特定的评估rubric；3) 训练Judge在rubric指导下对路由轨迹评分；4) 通过交替优化得到过程奖励，并与结果奖励结合，利用GRPO优化路由策略。
AI.result: 在五个推理基准上，无论是同模型族还是跨模型族设置，RoRo均一致优于强基线方法，实现了更好的准确率与成本权衡。
AI.conclusion: 引入过程奖励机制能有效提升逐步模型路由的性能和泛化能力，验证了过程质量评估在路由决策中的重要性。

title: MusTBENCH: Benchmarking and Advancing Temporal Grounding in Music LLMs
summary: Recent Large Audio-Language Models (LALMs) have demonstrated promising abilities in understanding musical content. However, whether their responses are grounded in the correct temporal regions of the audio remains underexplored. This limitation is particularly critical for music understanding, where key information often occurs as temporally localized events, such as instrument entries and rhythmic transitions. To address this gap, we introduce MusTBENCH, a music-expert-validated benchmark designed to evaluate temporal grounding in LALMs through five temporally grounded question-answering tasks. To further improve temporal grounding in existing models, we propose MusT, a novel four-stage temporal optimization recipe spanning music encoder adaptation, LLM adaptation, LLM supervised fine-tuning, and RL-based optimization. Experiments on MusTBENCH show that existing LALMs struggle with precise temporal grounding, while MusT brings significant improvements over strong baselines. These results establish temporal grounding as a key missing capability in current LALMs and position MusTBENCH as a challenging benchmark for future research in temporally grounded music understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MusTBENCH基准测试和MusT优化方法，用于评估和提升大型音频-语言模型在音乐理解中的时间定位能力，实验表明现有模型在该任务上表现不佳，而MusT能显著改进。
AI.motivation: 现有大型音频-语言模型在音乐内容理解上表现出一定能力，但其回答是否准确定位于音频的正确时间区域（如乐器进入、节奏转换等关键音乐事件）尚不清楚，这一时间定位能力对音乐理解至关重要但未被充分探索。
AI.method: 构建了MusTBENCH——一个经音乐专家验证的基准测试，包含5个时间定位问答任务；提出了MusT——一个四阶段时间优化方案，涵盖音乐编码器适配、大语言模型适配、大语言模型监督微调以及基于强化学习的优化。
AI.result: 在MusTBENCH上的实验表明，现有大型音频-语言模型在精确时间定位上表现不佳，而MusT方法相比强基线模型带来了显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 时间定位是当前大型音频-语言模型缺失的关键能力，MusTBENCH可作为未来时间定位音乐理解研究的一个具有挑战性的基准。

title: RadioFormer3D: Weakly Supervised 3D Radio Map Estimation in Low-Altitude Airspace via Generative Modeling
summary: With the emergence of wireless applications in three-dimensional environments, such as the low-altitude airspace and 3D heterogeneous networks, radio map estimation is increasingly required to characterize signal propagation across both horizontal and vertical dimensions. However, extending radio map estimation from 2D to 3D remains challenging due to increased spatial sparsity and limited supervision across continuous altitudes. In this paper, we propose \textbf{\textit{RadioFormer3D}}, a specialized model for volumetric spectrum reconstruction under weak supervision. Building on the dual-stream, multi-granularity fusion architecture of \textit{RadioFormer}, \textit{RadioFormer3D} introduces a Fourier-based sampling encoder and a volumetric decoder to efficiently process sparse measurements in 3D space. To alleviate the lack of vertical supervision, we propose the \textbf{\textit{Joint Spectrum Integrity Loss}}, which integrates volume-level pseudo-label supervision, map-level geometry-aware radio rendering, and pixel-level localized constraints within a unified optimization scheme. This design enables the model to capture complex vertical structural relationships more effectively under sparse supervision. Extensive experiments across several radio map datasets show that \textit{RadioFormer3D} achieves superior overall performance compared to representative existing methods. In particular, it demonstrates improved reconstruction quality at unlabeled altitudes while maintaining a favorable trade-off between accuracy and inference efficiency, positioning it as a highly promising solution for future 3D environment-aware wireless networks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RadioFormer3D，一种基于弱监督的3D无线信号地图重建模型，通过傅里叶采样编码器、体积解码器和联合频谱完整性损失，在稀疏垂直监督下实现高质量的三维信号重建。
AI.motivation: 无线应用向三维环境（低空空域、3D异构网络）扩展，亟需能够同时刻画水平和垂直维度信号传播的3D无线电地图，但现有2D方法面临空间稀疏性增加和垂直方向监督不足的挑战。
AI.method: 基于RadioFormer的双流多粒度融合架构，引入傅里叶采样编码器和体积解码器处理3D稀疏测量；提出联合频谱完整性损失（Joint Spectrum Integrity Loss），融合体积级伪标签监督、地图级几何感知渲染和像素级局部约束。
AI.result: 在多个无线电地图数据集上，RadioFormer3D性能优于现有代表性方法，尤其在未标记高度层上重建质量提升，同时保持精度与推理效率的良好平衡。
AI.conclusion: RadioFormer3D是面向未来3D环境感知无线网络的高度有前途的解决方案，在弱监督条件下实现了高效、高质量的三维信号重建。

title: Optimal Gap-Dependent Regret for Private Stochastic Decision-Theoretic Online Learning
summary:
We study stochastic decision-theoretic online learning with full information and event-level pure differential privacy. A COLT open problem of Hu and Mehta asks to determine the optimal gap-dependent regret rate for stochastic decision-theoretic online learning under pure event-level differential privacy. For $K$ actions, losses in $[0,1]$, and a unique best action separated from the second-best action by gap $Δ_{\min}$, the known lower bound is of order $
  \frac{\log K}{\min\{Δ_{\min},\varepsilon\}}, $
or equivalently, up to universal constants, of order \[
  \frac{\log K}{Δ_{\min}}+\frac{\log K}{\varepsilon}. \] We give a horizon-free pure-DP algorithm and prove the explicit regret bound \[
  \operatorname{Reg}_T
  \le
  1000 \cdot \left(\frac{\log K}{Δ_{\min}}+\frac{\log K}{\varepsilon}\right) \] for every horizon $T$. The numerical constant is not optimized. The algorithm partitions time into blocks of exponentially increasing size, plays a single action throughout each block, and chooses the next action by an exponential mechanism applied to a data-independent random prefix of the previous block. The random prefix converts block regret into a sum, over all prefix lengths, of softmax selection errors. A single entropy-potential argument controls all privacy-dominated large-gap actions at cost $\log K/\varepsilon$.

AI.tldr: 本文针对随机决策理论在线学习中的纯事件级差分隐私问题，提出了一个与时间范围无关的算法，实现了最优的遗憾界 O(log K/Δ_min + log K/ε)，解决了Hu和Mehta在COLT上提出的开放问题。
AI.motivation: 确定随机决策理论在线学习在纯事件级差分隐私下的最优间隙相关遗憾率是一个COLT开放问题，现有下界为O(log K/min{Δ_min, ε})，但尚未有算法达到此下界。
AI.method: 将时间划分为指数增长的数据块，每个块内只执行一个动作；使用指数机制选择下一个动作，该机制作用于前一个块的数据无关随机前缀上；通过随机前缀将块遗憾转化为所有前缀长度上softmax选择误差的和；使用单个熵-势参数控制所有隐私主导的大间隙动作。
AI.result: 实现了与时间范围T无关的遗憾界 Reg_T ≤ 1000·(log K/Δ_min + log K/ε)，达到了已知的最优下界。
AI.conclusion: 成功解决了开放问题，给出了纯事件级差分隐私下随机决策理论在线学习的最优遗憾界，算法具有与时间范围无关的优越性质。

title: ConMoE: Expert-Pool Consolidation via Prototype Reassignment for MoE Compression
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language models reduce per-token computation but still require storing and serving all experts, making deployment memory-intensive. Existing post-training compression methods mainly shrink this cost by pruning experts or merging their weights. We formulate post-training MoE compression as expert-pool consolidation: retaining a smaller set of pretrained experts as reusable prototypes and deterministically remapping each original expert reference to one selected prototype. This view separates the reduced expert pool from the reuse structure that represents the original expert slots, and allows prototype sharing within local layer scopes while preserving the original router interface. We propose ConMoE, a train-free prototype remapping framework that selects retained experts using calibration-based contribution and replaceability signals, then redirects original expert calls to the selected prototypes without weight updates or post-compression fine-tuning. Experiments on three pretrained MoE language models show that ConMoE matches or outperforms strong pruning and merging baselines in several settings, achieving the best average score on deepseek-moe-16b-base at both 25% and 50% routed-expert reduction, while remaining competitive on Qwen3-30B-A3B and OLMoE-1B-7B-0125. Ablations indicate that deterministic reassignment is the most stable component, whereas broader cross-layer sharing and post-hoc weight fusion are model-dependent.

AI.tldr: ConMoE是一个无需训练的专家池压缩框架，通过保留少量预训练专家作为原型，并将原始专家重新映射到这些原型上，在不更新权重的情况下实现MoE模型的高效压缩。
AI.motivation: MoE语言模型虽然减少了单token计算量，但仍需存储所有专家，导致部署内存开销大。现有后训练压缩方法主要通过剪枝或合并专家来缩减成本，但效果仍有提升空间。
AI.method: 提出ConMoE框架，将后训练MoE压缩视为专家池合并问题：保留一小部分预训练专家作为可重用原型，通过基于校准的贡献度和可替换性信号选择保留的专家，然后将原始专家调用确定性重定向到所选原型，无需权重更新或微调。
AI.result: 在三个预训练MoE模型上实验，ConMoE在多个设置中匹配或优于强剪枝和合并基线，在deepseek-moe-16b-base上25%和50%路由专家缩减时均取得最佳平均分，在Qwen3-30B-A3B和OLMoE-1B-7B-0125上也具有竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 确定性重分配是最稳定的组件，而跨层共享和后处理权重融合的效果依赖于具体模型。

title: GrepSeek: Training Search Agents for Direct Corpus Interaction
summary: Large Language Model (LLM) search agents have shown strong promise for knowledge-intensive language tasks through multiple rounds of reasoning and information retrieval. Most existing systems access information using a retriever that takes a keyword or natural language query and returns a ranked list of documents using an index of pre-computed document representations. In this work, we explore a complementary perspective in which the search agent treats the corpus itself as the search environment and finds evidence by issuing executable shell commands. We introduce GrepSeek, an optimized direct corpus interaction (DCI) search agent that trains a compact search agent to find, filter, and compose evidence from large text corpora. To address the instability of learning behavior directly with reinforcement learning on large corpora, we propose a two-stage training pipeline. First, we construct a cold-start dataset using an answer-aware Tutor and answer-blind Planner to generate verified, causally grounded search trajectories. Second, we refine the initialized policy with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO), allowing the agent to improve its task-oriented search behavior through direct interaction with the corpus. To make DCI practical at scale, we further use a semantics-preserving sharded-parallel execution engine that accelerates shell-based retrieval by up to $7.6\times$ while preserving byte-exact equivalence with sequential execution of the shell command. Experiments across seven open-domain question answering benchmarks show that GrepSeek achieves the strongest overall token-level $F_1$ and Exact Match. Our analysis also highlights the limitations of purely lexical interaction on queries with substantial surface-form variation, suggesting DCI as a practical and competitive method for search agents that can complement existing retrieval paradigms in the real world.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GrepSeek，一种通过可执行Shell命令直接与语料库交互的搜索智能体。为解决强化学习训练不稳定的问题，采用两阶段训练：先用Tutor和Planner生成冷启动轨迹，再用GRPO优化策略。同时提出语义保留的分片并行执行引擎加速检索。实验表明GrepSeek在多项开放域问答基准上取得最佳F1和精确匹配分数。
AI.motivation: 现有大语言模型搜索智能体通常依赖基于关键词或自然语言查询的检索器，从预计算的文档表示索引中返回排序结果。本文探索一种互补视角：将语料库本身视为搜索环境，通过可执行Shell命令直接与语料交互，从而实现更细粒度的证据发现。
AI.method: 提出GrepSeek，核心方法包括：(1) 两阶段训练流程：第一阶段用答案感知的Tutor和答案盲的Planner生成冷启动搜索轨迹；第二阶段用GRPO（组相对策略优化）在语料库交互中优化策略。(2) 提出语义保留的分片并行执行引擎，加速Shell命令执行高达7.6倍，同时保证字节精确等价。
AI.result: 在7个开放域问答基准上，GrepSeek取得了最强的整体token级F1和精确匹配（Exact Match）分数。并行执行引擎实现最高7.6倍的检索加速。
AI.conclusion: 纯词汇交互在表面形式变化较大的查询上存在局限性，但DCI作为现有检索范式的补充方法，在实际应用中具有竞争力和实用性。

title: GiPL: Generative augmented iterative Pseudo-Labeling for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Object Detection
summary: Vision-language foundation models have shown promising zero-shot generalization for Cross-Domain Few-Shot Object Detection (CD-FSOD). However, they face two critical challenges in fine-tuning: insufficient support set utilization due to sparse single-instance annotations, and severe overfitting under extremely limited target-domain samples. To address these issues, this paper proposes GiPL, an efficient two-branch training framework.In the first branch, we design an iterative pseudo-label self-training paradigm, which performs zero-shot inference on the support set to generate reliable pseudo-annotations, fuses them with ground-truth labels, and iteratively optimizes the model to fully exploit support set data. In the second branch, we introduce generative data augmentation pipeline using large vision-language models, which synthesizes domain-aligned, multi-object annotated images to enrich training samples and suppress overfitting. Extensive experiments on three challenging CD-FSOD datasets (RUOD, CARPK, CarDD) under 1/5/10-shot settings demonstrate that GiPL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods with significant performance gains.Code is available at \href{https://github.com/z-yaz/CDiscover}{CDiscover}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GiPL，一个两分支训练框架，通过迭代伪标签自训练和生成式数据增强，解决跨域小样本目标检测中支持集利用不足和过拟合问题，在三个数据集上取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 视觉语言基础模型在跨域小样本目标检测中面临两个关键挑战：1) 支持集利用不足，因仅有稀疏的单实例标注；2) 在极少目标域样本下严重过拟合。
AI.method: 提出GiPL两分支训练框架：分支一采用迭代伪标签自训练范式，对支持集进行零样本推理生成可靠伪标注，与真实标签融合后迭代优化模型；分支二利用大视觉语言模型进行生成式数据增强，合成域对齐、多目标标注的图像以丰富训练样本并抑制过拟合。
AI.result: 在RUOD、CARPK、CarDD三个跨域小样本检测数据集上，在1/5/10-shot设置下，GiPL均显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的两分支框架有效解决了跨域小样本检测中的支持集利用和过拟合问题，代码已开源。

title: Do Deep Networks Forget Initialization? A Forgetting-Time View of Practical Inductive Bias
summary: Randomly initialized neural networks induce a prior over functions, but the predictor used in practice is produced only after training. We ask how much of this initial bias survives the training pipeline. To make the question measurable, we introduce initialization memory: the dependence of the validation-selected predictor on the scale of the random initialization. We perform controlled CIFAR-10 experiments on ResNets where initialization memory already sharply separates training regimes. Low-learning-rate SGD can interpolate while still remembering its initialization: on ResNet-9 with batch size $b=128$, test accuracy varies by $26.5$ percentage points across initialization scales despite $\ge99.5\%$ training accuracy. This is not undertraining: extending the same low-learning-rate regime to $5{,}000$ epochs leaves the spread essentially unchanged. In contrast, Adam-family methods largely erase the dependence. SGD can also be made to forget when larger learning rates are paired with explicit $L_2$ norm control. We interpret these findings in terms of the time scale of forgetting: gradient-flow-like dynamics can preserve initialization memory, whereas stochastic finite-step effects, explicit norm decay, and adaptive preconditioning erase it on scales governed by the size of explicit or implicit regularization. The practical inductive bias of a trained network is therefore not the architectural prior alone, but the architectural prior after being filtered by the forgetting dynamics of the training pipeline; and the same regularizers that improve generalization are precisely those that erase memory of initialization.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了随机初始化对训练后神经网络预测的影响程度，引入了"初始化记忆"概念来衡量。实验表明，低学习率SGD能保持初始化记忆（在ResNet-9上测试准确率相差26.5个百分点），而Adam族方法和高学习率加L2正则则能消除这种记忆。训练后的归纳偏好是架构先验经训练遗忘动态过滤后的结果。
AI.motivation: 探究随机初始化带来的先验在训练过程中有多少被保留下来，即初始化对最终模型预测的影响程度。
AI.method: 提出"初始化记忆"概念，通过改变随机初始化尺度观察验证集选择预测器的变化。在CIFAR-10上用ResNet进行控制实验，对比不同优化器（低学习率SGD、Adam族）、学习率和正则化策略的影响。
AI.result: 低学习率SGD可插值但保留初始化记忆（ResNet-9上测试准确率差26.5%，即使训练5K轮也不变）；Adam族方法消除记忆；高学习率+L2约束也可消除记忆。
AI.conclusion: 训练网络的归纳偏好是架构先验经训练遗忘动态过滤的结果，改善泛化的正则化器恰好是那些能擦除初始化记忆的机制。

title: PassNet: Scaling Large Language Models for Graph Compiler Pass Generation
comment: Code and data available at https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PassNet
summary: Modern tensor compilers such as TorchInductor deliver substantial speedups on mainstream models, yet face a systematic performance ceiling on long-tail workloads -- our profiling shows that 43% of real-world subgraphs experience end-to-end slowdowns under default compilation. While LLMs offer a path toward automated optimization, existing efforts focus on standalone kernel generation. We argue that pass generation -- where LLMs author structured graph transformations that integrate directly into compiler pipelines -- is the more appropriate abstraction. We propose PassNet, the first large-scale ecosystem for LLM-based compiler pass generation, comprising: (1) PassNet-Dataset, over 18K unique computational graphs from 100K real-world models; and (2) PassBench, 200 curated long-tail fusible tasks (comprising 2,060 subgraphs in total) evaluated under the Error-aware Speedup Score (ES_t) -- a metric unifying correctness, stability, and performance -- with layered integrity defenses against systematic LLM exploitation. Experiments reveal that PassBench is both highly discriminative and genuinely unsaturated: the best frontier model trails TorchInductor by 37% in aggregate, yet on individual subgraphs LLMs achieve up to 3x speedup over the same compiler -- indicating that the bottleneck is consistency, not capability. Fine-tuning a small model on merely ~4K PassNet trajectories yields a 2.67x improvement approaching frontier-model performance, demonstrating substantial headroom and validating PassNet as live training infrastructure for advancing LLM-driven compiler optimization. All data, benchmarks, and tooling are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 PassNet，首个面向大语言模型生成编译器变换 pass 的大规模生态系统，包含包含 1.8万+ 计算图的 PassNet-Dataset 和包含 200 个长尾融合任务的 PassBench，并引入错误感知加速比分数 ES_t 进行评估。实验表明 PassBench 具有高度区分性且未饱和，最佳前沿模型比 TorchInductor 低 37%，但在单个子图上 LLM 可达 3 倍加速，瓶颈在于一致性而非能力。微调小模型仅用 4K 轨迹即可提升 2.67 倍，接近前沿模型表现。
AI.motivation: 现代张量编译器（如 TorchInductor）在主流模型上表现良好，但在长尾工作负载上存在系统性性能瓶颈——43% 的真实子图在默认编译下出现端到端减速。现有 LLM 工作集中于独立内核生成，但作者认为 pass 生成（即 LLM 编写可直接集成到编译器流程中的结构化图变换）是更合适的抽象层次。
AI.method: 构建 PassNet 生态系统：1) PassNet-Dataset：从 10 万个真实模型中提取 1.8 万+ 唯一计算图；2) PassBench：200 个精心筛选的长尾可融合任务（共 2060 个子图）；3) 引入 ES_t（Error-aware Speedup Score）评估指标，统一考虑正确性、稳定性和性能，并设置分层完整性防御防止 LLM 利用。
AI.result: 最佳前沿模型在 PassBench 上比 TorchInductor 低 37% 的聚合性能；但在单个子图上 LLM 可达到高达 3 倍加速。在仅 4K PassNet 轨迹上微调小模型获得 2.67 倍提升，接近前沿模型水平。
AI.conclusion: PassBench 具有高度区分性且未饱和，当前 LLM 的瓶颈在于一致性而非能力。PassNet 可作为推动 LLM 驱动编译器优化的实时训练基础设施，具有显著提升空间。

title: PatchBoard: Schema-Grounded State Mutation for Reliable and Auditable LLM Multi-Agent Collaboration
summary: LLM multi-agent systems often coordinate through natural-language dialogue or loosely structured shared memory, making intermediate state difficult to validate, attribute, and audit. We introduce PatchBoard, a schema-grounded collaboration architecture that replaces inter-agent dialogue with validated JSON Patch mutations over a shared structured state. An Architect agent constructs a task-specific schema and workflow rules, while a deterministic kernel validates each proposed state mutation against schema constraints, role-specific write contracts, and runtime invariants before committing it transactionally. On 630 matched ALFWorld episodes, PatchBoard achieves an 84.6% success rate, compared with 30.8% for LangGraph and 61.6% for Flock, while reducing tokens per successful task to 45.5k, compared with 368.3k and 64.2k, respectively.

AI.tldr: PatchBoard提出了一种基于JSON Patch变异的模式驱动协作架构，将多智能体系统的中间状态变为可验证、可审计的结构化数据。在ALFWorld基准上，相比LangGraph和Flock分别取得84.6% vs 30.8%和61.6%的成功率，同时token消耗仅为45.5k vs 368.3k和64.2k。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统通过自然语言对话或松散共享内存协调，导致中间状态难以验证、归因和审计，缺乏可追溯性和可靠性保障。
AI.method: Architect智能体先构建任务特定schema和工作流规则；确定性内核在提交前对每个状态变异进行schema约束、角色特定写合约和运行时不变量的校验；采用JSON Patch格式替代自然语言对话进行智能体间通信。
AI.result: 在630个ALFWorld episode上，PatchBoard达到84.6%成功率（LangGraph 30.8%, Flock 61.6%），每个成功任务仅消耗45.5k token（LangGraph 368.3k, Flock 64.2k）。
AI.conclusion: 基于模式约束和事务性提交的结构化状态变异机制，能够显著提升多智能体系统的可靠性、可审计性和效率，为多智能体协作提供了一种更可控的替代范式。

title: Learning Representations from 3D Gaussian Splats
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is a recent approach for scene rendering. Although primarily designed for view synthesis, its potential for scene understanding tasks remains underexplored. In this work, we conduct a comparative evaluation of various geometric deep learning architectures for the classification of 3D scenes represented using Gaussian Splatting. We benchmark point-based and graph-based models across both traditional point cloud datasets and dedicated Gaussian Splatting datasets. Scenes are embedded into latent representations, which are evaluated through end-to-end classification, linear probing, and clustering analysis. Our study provides insight into the suitability of different geometry-aware architectures and input feature configurations for learning effective 3D Gaussian Splat representations. The results highlight consistent differences between architectural families and reveal the impact of Gaussian-specific attributes on the quality of representation.

AI.tldr: 本文对比评估了多种几何深度学习架构在3D高斯泼溅场景分类中的表现，涵盖点云和图神经网络，并通过端到端分类、线性探测和聚类分析进行基准测试。
AI.motivation: 3DGS主要用于视图合成，其在场景理解任务（如分类）中的潜力尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 采用基于点和图的深度学习模型，在传统点云数据集和专用高斯泼溅数据集上进行分类实验，通过端到端分类、线性探测和聚类分析评估潜在表示质量。
AI.result: 不同架构家族之间存在一致性的性能差异，高斯专属属性对表示质量有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 研究为如何选择几何感知架构和输入特征配置以学习有效的3D高斯泼溅表示提供了见解。

title: Unveiling Multi-regime Patterns in SciML: Distinct Failure Modes and Regime-specific Optimization
summary: Neural networks trained under different hyperparameter settings can fall into distinct training "regimes," with consistent behavior within regimes and qualitative differences across regimes. In this paper, we study such multi-regime behavior in scientific machine learning (SciML) models through a regime-aware diagnostic framework that jointly analyzes performance, training dynamics, and loss-landscape geometry. We identify three key findings: (i) a consistent three-regime structure emerges across many standard SciML models, different constraint enforcements, and various optimizer designs; (ii) optimization effectiveness is regime-specific, with no single method performing well across all regimes; and (iii) SciML models can exhibit fine-grained failure modes that can challenge conventional interpretations of standard loss-landscape metrics. Our results provide an approach to establish a unified, task-oblivious perspective on failure modes in SciML and to inform regime-aware guidance for improving robustness. We validate these findings across widely-used SciML models, including physics-informed neural networks, neural operators, and neural ordinary differential equations, on benchmarks spanning representative ordinary and partial differential equations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了科学机器学习（SciML）模型中在不同超参数设置下出现的多训练“体制”现象，提出了一个体制感知的诊断框架，联合分析性能、训练动态和损失景观几何。发现三个关键结果：(i) 多种标准SciML模型普遍存在一致的三体制结构；(ii) 优化效果具有体制特异性；(iii) SciML模型存在细粒度失效模式，可挑战传统损失景观指标的解释。研究为统一理解SciML失效模式及提升鲁棒性提供了体制感知指导。
AI.motivation: 神经网络的训练行为会随超参数变化而落入不同的训练“体制”，不同体制间存在定性差异。在科学机器学习（SciML）领域，这种多体制行为尚未被系统研究，且现有诊断方法缺乏对体制的感知能力，导致对模型失效模式的理解不够深入。本文旨在填补这一空白，通过构建体制感知的诊断框架来系统分析SciML模型的多体制行为。
AI.method: 提出一个体制感知的诊断框架，联合分析三个维度：(1) 模型性能；(2) 训练动态（如损失下降模式、梯度行为）；(3) 损失景观几何（如曲率、平坦性等指标）。通过在多种SciML模型（物理信息神经网络、神经算子、神经常微分方程）和多种微分方程基准上进行广泛实验，识别和验证不同训练体制的结构。
AI.result: 三个主要发现：(i) 不同SciML模型、不同约束方式和不同优化器设计下，均一致观察到三体制结构（即存在三个不同的训练行为模式）；(ii) 优化方法的有效性具有体制特异性，没有一种优化器在所有体制下都表现良好；(iii) SciML模型存在细粒度失效模式，这些模式可能颠覆传统损失景观指标（如损失平坦性）的常规解释。
AI.conclusion: 本文提供了一种统一的任务无关视角来理解SciML中的失效模式，并为提升模型鲁棒性提供了体制感知的指导建议。该框架有助于指导研究者根据当前训练体制选择合适的优化策略，避免盲目调参。

title: Scaling Monosemanticity: Extracting Interpretable Features from Claude 3 Sonnet
summary: We demonstrate that sparse autoencoders can extract interpretable features from Claude 3 Sonnet, a production-scale language model, addressing the open question of whether dictionary learning methods scale beyond small transformers. We trained sparse autoencoders with up to 34 million features on the model's middle layer residual stream, using scaling laws to guide hyperparameter selection. The resulting features are multilingual and multimodal (generalizing to images despite text-only training), respond to both concrete instances and abstract discussions of concepts, and can be used to steer model behavior in ways consistent with their interpretations. We find features corresponding to famous entities and locations, as well as more abstract concepts like sarcasm or errors in code. We also identify features relevant to ways in which language models might cause harm--including features representing deception, power-seeking, sycophancy, and bias--and show that these causally influence model outputs when manipulated. Additionally, we conduct analyses of feature interpretability, geometry, and computational function. However, significant limitations remain: our suite of features is incomplete, and we lack rigorous methods for evaluating whether our features faithfully capture model computations.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了稀疏自编码器能够从生产级语言模型Claude 3 Sonnet中提取可解释特征，证明了字典学习方法可以扩展到大型模型，并发现了与欺骗、权力寻求、阿谀奉承等有害行为相关的特征。
AI.motivation: 解决字典学习方法能否从小型Transformer扩展到生产级大规模语言模型这一开放性问题，探索稀疏自编码器在大型模型上的可解释性能力。
AI.method: 在Claude 3 Sonnet中间层残差流上训练多达3400万特征的稀疏自编码器，使用缩放定律指导超参数选择，通过特征分析、因果干预等方法验证特征的可解释性和功能性。
AI.result: 提取的特征具有多语言和多模态特性，能响应具体实例和抽象概念，可用于引导模型行为；发现与知名实体、地点、抽象概念（如讽刺、代码错误）以及潜在有害行为（欺骗、权力寻求、偏见等）相关的特征，且这些特征能因果性地影响模型输出。
AI.conclusion: 稀疏自编码器可成功应用于生产级语言模型进行可解释性分析，但特征集不完整且缺乏严格评估方法，存在显著局限性。

title: FoRA: Fisher-orthogonal Rank Adaptation for Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning
summary: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning(PEFT) has largely focused on LoRA and its accuracy-oriented variants, leaving the original goal of reducing trainable parameters has receivedcomparatively little attention. We introduce FoRA, which revisits this goal by reducing the number of adapted layers rather than adapter rank. FoRA selects task-informative layers via a single-pass diagonal Fisher score (under 1% of training cost) and trains the LoRA down-projection at selected layers on the Stiefel manifold, preserving column orthonormality and effective rank. FoRA consistently outperforms LoRA and DoRA at half their parameter budget, and falls within 0.7-0.8 accuracy points of AdaLoRA at one-quarter its parameter count, across five LLaMA-family backbones. Cross-architecture experiments on twelve backbones from the LLaMA, Qwen3, and Gemma families confirm consistent gains from 270M to 32B parameters. The two components combine super-additively: Fisher selection alone matches rank reduction at the same budget, while the Stiefel constraint provides the decisive additional gain.

AI.tldr: FoRA通过Fisher评分选择任务相关层（仅需不到1%训练成本），并在Stiefel流形上对选定的LoRA下投影层施加列正交约束，以极少的参数量实现优于LoRA/DoRA的效果，压缩比接近AdaLoRA的1/4参数量。
AI.motivation: 现有PEFT方法（如LoRA及其变体）主要关注精度提升，忽视了减少可训练参数这一原始目标。作者希望在不牺牲性能的前提下，进一步压缩参数量。
AI.method: 1) 使用单次对角Fisher信息分数（<1%训练成本）选择任务信息丰富的层；2) 在选定层的LoRA下投影上施加Stiefel流形约束，保持列正交性和有效秩。
AI.result: 在LLaMA系列5个骨干上：FoRA以LoRA/DoRA一半参数量持续优于后者；以AdaLoRA 1/4参数量达到仅差0.7-0.8精度点。在LLaMA、Qwen3、Gemma等12个骨干（270M-32B）上获得一致增益。
AI.conclusion: Fisher选择与Stiefel约束存在超加性组合效应：前者在相同预算下匹配秩缩减效果，后者提供决定性额外增益。表明层选择+正交约束是比降低秩更有效的参数压缩策略。

title: TAE: Target-aware enhancer for nighttime UAV tracking
comment: Accepted at ICIP 2026. Dataset is avaliable at: https://github.com/Fu0511/DarkSOT-Dataset
summary: Severe image degradation under low-light nighttime conditions constitutes a core bottleneck preventing all-day applications for UAV-based single object tracking. Existing image enhancement methods often struggle to distinguish between target and background regions, which can easily lead to amplified background noise or compromise target features. To overcome this limitation, we propose TAE, a target-aware low-light enhancement framework tailored for nighttime object tracking. Guided explicitly by weak supervisory signals from tracking bounding boxes, the framework performs region-aware enhancement to ensure operations focus on the target area. It further adopts an adaptive RGB multi-curve fusion mechanism to achieve refined modeling and adaptive adjustment across different regions. To facilitate research in this domain, we also contribute DarkSOT, a new benchmark for nighttime UAV tracking, comprising 268 sequences across 9 target categories. Experimental results on the DarkSOT and UAVDark135 demonstrate that TAE significantly improves tracking performance in low-light nighttime scenarios, exhibiting strong robustness and generalization. The DarkSOT dataset is available at https://github.com/Fu0511/DarkSOT-Dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TAE（目标感知低光增强框架），利用跟踪框的弱监督信号实现区域感知增强，并采用自适应RGB多曲线融合机制，显著提升无人机夜间单目标跟踪性能；同时贡献了包含268个序列的夜间无人机跟踪基准DarkSOT。
AI.motivation: 夜间低光环境下的严重图像退化是阻碍无人机全天候单目标跟踪应用的核心瓶颈，现有图像增强方法难以区分目标和背景区域，容易放大背景噪声或破坏目标特征。
AI.method: 提出TAE框架：1）利用跟踪边界框的弱监督信号进行区域感知增强；2）采用自适应RGB多曲线融合机制，实现不同区域的精细化建模和自适应调整。
AI.result: 在DarkSOT和UAVDark135两个基准上的实验表明，TAE显著提升了夜间低光场景下的跟踪性能，展现出强鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: TAE通过目标感知的低光增强有效解决了夜间无人机跟踪难题，DarkSOT数据集为后续研究提供了标准化评测基准。

title: RUBRIC-ARROW: Alternating Pointwise Rubric Reward Modeling for LLM Post-training in Non-verifiable Domains
summary: Pointwise reward modeling offers critical signals for LLM post-training, yet struggles with absolute scoring in subjective, non-verifiable settings. Rubric-based methods address this by decomposing evaluation into explicit criteria, but existing approaches typically depend on frontier LLMs and suffer from ties caused by hard Boolean aggregation. We present RUBRIC-ARROW, an alternating framework that jointly trains a rubric generator and a rubric-conditioned judge, with its RL stage using only pairwise preference data. Our method couples a probability-based scoring rule that reduces ties with phase-specific preference-based rewards and an alternating GRPO scheme that together train the pointwise evaluator. Extensive experiments show that RUBRIC-ARROW achieves competitive reward-modeling accuracy and yields consistent gains for downstream policy post-training.

AI.tldr: RUBRIC-ARROW提出了一种交替训练框架，联合训练评标生成器和评标条件裁判，通过基于概率的评分规则和交替GRPO方案，仅使用成对偏好数据实现点态奖励建模，在主观场景下取得优异效果。
AI.motivation: 现有基于评标的方法依赖前沿大模型且因布尔聚合导致平局问题，缺乏在主观、不可验证场景下进行点态奖励建模的有效方案。
AI.method: 提出RUBRIC-ARROW框架，包含：(1) 评标生成器与评标条件裁判的联合交替训练；(2) 基于概率的评分规则减少平局；(3) 阶段特定的偏好奖励；(4) 交替GRPO方案，仅使用成对偏好数据训练点态评估器。
AI.result: 在多个实验上，RUBRIC-ARROW达到了具有竞争力的奖励建模准确率，并在下游策略后训练中取得一致的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: RUBRIC-ARROW通过交替训练框架和概率评分规则，有效解决了主观场景下点态奖励建模的平局和依赖前沿模型问题。

title: MiraBench: Evaluating Action-Conditioned Reliability in Robotic World Models
summary: Action-conditioned world models are increasingly used as scalable simulators for robot learning, yet current evaluations provide limited evidence that their predictions are reliable under the actions they condition on. Existing benchmarks largely emphasize visual fidelity, leaving unclear whether predicted futures are physically plausible, faithful to commanded actions, and calibrated to failure when actions should not succeed. We introduce \textsc{MiraBench}, a hierarchical benchmark that defines \emph{action-conditioned reliability} as a core evaluation target for robotic world models. MiraBench decomposes this target into three progressively demanding levels: \emph{Physics Adherence}, which evaluates reference-free physical consistency; \emph{Action-Following Fidelity}, which measures whether predictions respect task-relevant action inputs; and \emph{Optimism Bias Detection}, which probes the tendency to predict successful outcomes under failure-inducing actions.
