FinVerBench is built from SEC 10-K XBRL filings for 43 S&P 500 companies and defines a four-category error taxonomy covering arithmetic, cross-statement linkage, year-over-year, and magnitude perturbations. We attempt fifteen contemporary LLM evaluations and report fourteen complete runs; a Gemini 2.5 Pro run is excluded from the main comparison because 40/108 gateway calls failed. All binary metrics exclude underdetermined positive instances whose perturbed line item is not rendered, leaving a 105-instance observable diagnostic subset (43 clean, 62 error-injected). Under the original guided-checklist prompt on the unrounded diagnostic subset, nine of fourteen complete LLM runs produce 95-100% false positives on clean statements, while one run achieves 0% observed false positives. Benchmark rendering choices materially affect measured recall: on a realistic rounded variant of the same observable subset, the calibrated model's recall is 79.0% with 0% observed FPR, compared with 100.0% recall on the unrounded diagnostic variant. These results support a construct-validity conclusion rather than a final leaderboard: financial statement verification is not merely arithmetic detection, but calibrated judgment under incomplete observability, prompt-induced assumptions, and realistic numerical rendering. FinVerBench and all code are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍FinVerBench——一个用于财务报表验证（判断报表数字是否一致）的基准测试。基于43家S&P 500公司的SEC 10-K XBRL数据构建，定义四类错误（算术、跨表链接、同比、幅度扰动）。测试15个当代LLM，14个完整运行。发现大多数模型产生95-100%假阳性，仅一个模型实现0%假阳性。基准渲染方式显著影响召回率。研究支持构念效度结论：财务报表验证不仅是算术检测，更是校准判断。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估缺乏专门针对财务报表数字一致性验证的基准，真实场景中财务报表验证需要处理不完整信息、数值呈现方式变化等复杂因素，现有评估无法捕捉这些挑战。
AI.method: 从S&P 500公司SEC 10-K XBRL文件构建数据集，定义四类错误（算术、跨表链接、同比、幅度扰动）。使用带引导清单的提示词对15个当代LLM进行测试，控制数值渲染方式（未取整vs取整），分析不同条件下的表现。
AI.result: 14个完整LLM运行中，9个在未取整数据上产生95-100%假阳性；仅一个模型实现0%假阳性。取整后，该校准模型的召回率从100%降至79.0%，假阳性率仍为0%。40/108次Gemini 2.5 Pro网关调用失败被排除。
AI.conclusion: 财务报表验证不是简单的算术检测任务，而是需要在信息不完全、提示词诱导假设、数值呈现方式变化下进行校准判断。该基准支持构念效度结论，而非最终的排行榜排名。

title: On Asymmetric Optimization of Reasoning and Perception in Vision-Language Model Post-Training
summary: Post-training has greatly improved reasoning in frontier vision-language models, yet its gains for perception remain comparatively limited, creating a bottleneck for end-to-end visual reasoning. To investigate this gap, we introduce a controlled diagnostic framework with two synthetic tasks that disentangle perception from reasoning. Our analysis reveals a consistent perception-reasoning asymmetry: posttraining improves reasoning more substantially than perception, though the underlying mechanism differs by training paradigm. For supervised fine-tuning (SFT), this asymmetry stems from token imbalance in chain-of-thought supervision, where perception occupies fewer tokens and thus receives a weaker training signal. Dynamically reweighting the loss mitigates this imbalance and boosts end-to-end performance by up to 18.2. For reinforcement learning (RL), the asymmetry instead arises from reward coupling: outcome rewards correlate more strongly with reasoning than with perception, weakening the signal for perception learning. Adding a perception-aware reward alleviates the imbalance and improves end-to-end accuracy by up to 6.0; even without groundtruth perception rewards, a reliable surrogate reward provide useful signal, yielding gains of 3.2 points. Together, our results comprehensively diagnose asymmetric optimization and suggest concrete interventions to balance perception and reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉语言模型的后训练存在感知-推理不对称性：后训练更显著提升推理能力而非感知能力。原因分两种：SFT中感知token少导致训练信号弱，RL中奖励与推理相关性更强。提出重加权损失和感知奖励等干预措施，有效缓解该不平衡。
AI.motivation: 后训练显著提升了视觉语言模型的推理能力，但对感知能力的提升有限，形成了端到端视觉推理的瓶颈。作者希望系统性地诊断这一不对称现象的成因。
AI.method: 设计两个合成任务构建可控诊断框架，将感知与推理解耦。针对SFT分析token不平衡，提出动态重加权损失；针对RL分析奖励耦合，引入感知感知奖励及替代奖励。
AI.result: SFT中动态重加权损失提升端到端性能高达18.2；RL中添加感知感知奖励提升准确率最高6.0，即使无真实感知奖励，替代奖励也能带来3.2的提升。
AI.conclusion: 系统诊断了视觉后训练中的感知-推理不对称优化问题，提出了针对不同训练范式的具体干预措施，有效平衡感知与推理学习。

title: S2MDF: A Plug-And-Play Layer for Intersection-Free Multi-Object Signed Distance Fields
summary: Compositional implicit surface representations model scenes as collections of objects, each encoded by a Signed Distance Field (SDF). A fundamental limitation of this approach is that multiple SDFs can produce geometries that interpenetrate, violating physical plausibility. Existing mitigation strategies rely on soft penalty terms that reduce but do not eliminate intersections, and require careful loss weighting. To truly prevent interpenetration, we propose a hard constraint on vector-valued SDFs and introduce S2MDF, a lightweight plug-and-play module that enforces the constraint on any object-compositional SDF representation without architectural modifications. It introduces negligible computational overhead and is compatible with linearly-interpolated standard meshing algorithms such as Marching Cubes. It can be applied during training or as a post-processing step. Experiments on multiple state-of-the-art compositional methods show that S2MDF reduces intersections to numerical precision while preserving reconstruction quality, outperforming existing mitigation strategies.

AI.tldr: 提出S2MDF模块，通过硬约束解决组合式隐式表面表示中物体间的互穿问题，无需修改网络架构即可将交叉降至数值精度级别，且不牺牲重建质量。
AI.motivation: 现有组合式隐式表面表示（多个SDF建模场景物体）存在物体几何互穿问题，违反物理合理性。现有软惩罚方法只能减少交叉而不能彻底消除，且需要精细的损失权重调节。
AI.method: 提出一种硬约束作用于向量值SDF，并设计S2MDF——一个轻量级即插即用模块，无需修改网络架构即可施加该约束。兼容Marching Cubes等标准网格化算法，可在训练或后处理阶段使用。
AI.result: 在多种最先进组合式方法上，S2MDF将互穿减少到数值精度级别，同时保持重建质量，优于现有缓解策略。
AI.conclusion: 硬约束比软惩罚更有效地解决组合式SDF的物体互穿问题，S2MDF是一种高效、通用且计算开销极小的解决方案。

title: Attention as In-Context Empirical Bayes: A Two-Stage View via Particle Dynamics
summary: We study minimal attention-only transformers under all-token corruption and show they admit a two-stage empirical Bayes interpretation. A single attention step computes a kernel-weighted posterior mean with respect to the empirical distribution defined by the context. Depth refines this distribution through particle dynamics (Stage 1), while a long-range skip-connection carries the noisy input as a query for posterior inference (Stage 2), revealing distinct statistical roles for depth and attention residuals. The framework isolates a minimal setting in which the context itself induces a depth-dependent energy landscape governing in-context inference. We show that effective denoising can emerge without an explicit noise schedule: a fixed kernel bandwidth and finite integration horizon suffice, yielding a principled depth-noise relationship. We further establish a posterior-mean recovery guarantee for a class of well-behaved priors, where the empirical estimator converges to the Bayes-optimal predictor under asymptotic conditions. Connecting these dynamics to reverse-diffusion limits, our results provide a statistical interpretation of attention as in-context inference via sample-based posterior estimation, without explicit density modeling.

AI.tldr: 本文证明最小化仅注意力Transformer在全标记破坏下具有两阶段经验贝叶斯解释：单层注意力计算核加权后验均值，深度通过粒子动力学精炼分布（阶段1），长程跳跃连接传递噪声输入作为后验推断的查询（阶段2），揭示了深度和注意力残差的独特统计角色。
AI.motivation: 旨在从统计学角度理解Transformer中注意力机制的本质，揭示深度（层数）和注意力残差在上下文学习中的不同功能角色，并探索无需显式噪声调度的有效去噪机制。
AI.method: 在全标记破坏条件下分析最小化仅注意力Transformer，将其建模为两阶段经验贝叶斯过程：阶段1通过深度层进行粒子动力学分布精炼；阶段2通过长程跳跃连接传递噪声输入作为后验推断的查询。使用固定核带宽和有限积分步长实现去噪。
AI.result: 建立了后验均值恢复保证，证明了在渐近条件下经验估计量收敛到贝叶斯最优预测器。揭示了固定核带宽与有限积分步长即可产生有效的深度-噪声关系，无需显式噪声调度。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制可被统计解释为通过样本后验估计进行的上下文推断，无需显式密度建模。该框架将上下文学习与反向扩散极限联系起来，为Transformer提供了新的统计理论基础。

title: Mind-Omni: A Unified Multi-Task Framework for Brain-Vision-Language Modeling via Discrete Diffusion
summary: Modeling the interplay between external stimuli and internal neural representations is a pivotal research area for Brain-Computer Interfaces (BCIs). A major limitation of prior work is the prevailing paradigm of specialized, single-task models, which curtails versatility and neglects inter-task synergies. To address this, we propose Mind-Omni, the first versatile framework that unifies seven distinct encoding and decoding tasks through a discrete diffusion paradigm. At its core is a novel Brain Tokenizer that transforms heterogeneous, continuous brain signals into standardized, discrete tokens. This enables direct, token-level interactions for mutual understanding and generation between any two or more modalities within a shared semantic space. To unlock advanced reasoning capabilities, we further curate a specialized Brain Question Answering (BQA) instruction-tuning dataset. Our model not only establishes a new state-of-the-art among multi-task unified frameworks but also provides strong evidence for multi-task synergy. By demonstrating performance competitive with, and at times superior to, larger specialized models, our work offers a powerful new paradigm for neural modeling and paves the way for foundation models of neural activity. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/ReedOnePeck/Mind-Omni.

AI.tldr: Mind-Omni提出了首个统一七种脑信号编码与解码任务的多功能框架，通过离散扩散范式和Brain Tokenizer将异质脑信号转化为离散token，实现了多模态交互，并在统一框架中达到SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有BCI工作局限于专门化的单任务模型，缺乏通用性且忽视了任务间的协同效应，亟需一个统一的、多任务协同的框架。
AI.method: 提出Mind-Omni框架，核心是Brain Tokenizer将连续脑信号转化为离散token；采用离散扩散范式实现多模态间token级互动；并构建了Brain Question Answering (BQA)指令微调数据集增强推理能力。
AI.result: 在多任务统一框架中达到新SOTA，性能与更大规模专有模型相当甚至更优，验证了多任务协同效益。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为神经建模提供了新的统一范式，展现了多任务协同的力量，为神经活动基础模型铺平了道路。

title: Mask the Target: A Plug-and-Play Regularizer Against LoRA Forgetting
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become one of the most widely used fine-tuning mechanisms for adapting large language models to new domains, tasks, and users. Yet adaptation performance alone can obscure an important failure mode: LoRA updates may improve performance on the target distribution while degrading prior capabilities learned during pretraining and alignment. We show that this forgetting becomes especially severe when the adaptation distribution differs substantially from the models original training or alignment distributions. The challenge is amplified in practical settings, where the original training and alignment data are typically unavailable. Motivated by this constraint, we study how LoRA based adaptation balances new learning against forgetting in a replay-free setting, and introduce a simple output space regularizer that can be added directly to existing training pipelines. Our method removes the ground-truth token from both the base and adapted model distributions, renormalizes the remaining probabilities, and applies KL regularization only over the non-target vocabulary. This preserves the base models relative preferences among alternative tokens without directly opposing the cross-entropy signal required for adaptation. As the regularizer acts only at the loss level, it requires no replay data, architectural changes, adapter redesign, or inference-time overhead, and can be applied directly to existing LoRA variants. Across all LoRA variants tested and across various backbones, our method improves the frontier between new learning and forgetting when the adaptation distribution differs substantially from the base models original training or alignment distributions, suggesting a broadly applicable route toward more reliable LLM updating.

AI.tldr: LoRA微调在目标分布上表现良好，但可能导致对预训练能力的灾难性遗忘。本文提出一种无需重放的输出空间正则化方法，通过移除真实token、重新归一化并在非目标词汇上施加KL正则化，在不干扰交叉熵信号的前提下保留基础模型的相对偏好。该方法在多种LoRA变体和骨干网络上有效改善了学习与遗忘的权衡。
AI.motivation: LoRA微调在适应新分布时可能严重遗忘预训练和alignment阶段学习到的能力，尤其是在适应分布与原始分布差异较大且原始数据不可获取的实际场景中，现有方法缺乏有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一种输出空间正则化方法：从基础模型和适应模型的分布中移除真实token，重新归一化剩余概率，仅对非目标词汇施加KL散度正则化。该方法仅作用于损失层面，无需重放数据、架构修改或推理开销。
AI.result: 在多种LoRA变体和不同骨干网络上，当适应分布与原始分布差异显著时，该方法显著改善了新任务学习与旧能力遗忘之间的权衡，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的输出空间正则化是一种简单、通用且有效的缓解LoRA遗忘问题的方法，可无缝集成到现有训练流程中，为更可靠的LLM更新提供了可行的路径。

title: GeoMag: Geometric-Aware Video Motion Magnification via State Space Model
summary: Video Motion Magnification (VMM) reveals imperceptible dynamics but often suffers from structural inconsistencies under complex geometric transformations. Existing learning-based methods generally face a trade-off between the limited global context of CNNs and the high computational cost of Transformers. In addition, current training protocols, largely dominated by simple linear motion, fail to capture the geometric and imaging complexities encountered in real-world videos. To address these issues, we propose GeoMag, a geometric-aware VMM framework built upon State Space Models to achieve globally consistent motion amplification with linear complexity. We further construct Geo-200K, a large-scale synthetic dataset that introduces rich geometric transformations together with sensor-realistic degradations, improving the diversity and realism of training signals. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that GeoMag consistently outperforms prior methods in visual fidelity and computational efficiency, while producing fewer artifacts and better structural consistency.

AI.tldr: GeoMag提出基于状态空间模型的几何感知视频运动放大框架，配合大规模合成数据集Geo-200K，以线性复杂度实现全局一致的运动放大，在视觉保真度和计算效率上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有VMM方法在复杂几何变换下存在结构不一致问题；CNN全局上下文有限，Transformer计算成本高；训练数据集多局限于简单线性运动，缺乏真实世界的几何与成像复杂性。
AI.method: 基于状态空间模型(State Space Models)构建几何感知VMM框架GeoMag，实现线性复杂度的全局一致运动放大；构建Geo-200K大规模合成数据集，引入丰富几何变换和传感器真实退化。
AI.result: 在合成和真实基准测试中，GeoMag在视觉保真度和计算效率上持续优于先前方法，产生更少伪影，结构一致性更好。
AI.conclusion: GeoMag有效解决了复杂几何变换下的运动放大问题，状态空间模型在兼顾全局上下文与计算效率方面具有优势，大规模多样化数据集对提升模型泛化能力至关重要。

title: Neural-Behavioral Representation of Natural Whole-body Movement in Monkeys
summary: Understanding how cortical activity represents natural whole-body behaviors in primates remains challenging. Limited by the diversity of movements and inaccessibility of large-scale neural representation of whole-body kinematics, previous motor decoding studies focused on constrained tasks and limited limb movements. Here, we present a neural-behavioral recording and modeling framework for freely moving monkeys, combining large-scale epidural cortical signals from distributed sensory- and motor-related areas with synchronized multi-view motion capture through a custom-made data collection platform. We reconstructed whole-body monkey kinematics and learned a compact behavior prior using an autoregressive encoder-decoder model. Conditioned on neural signals, the model decoded accurate and realistic whole-body movement without explicit physical constraints. Our results provide a novel proof-of-concept approach for decoding natural whole-body movements in primates using large-scale intracranial neural activity.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个针对自由运动猴子的神经-行为记录与建模框架，结合大规模硬膜外皮层信号与多视角运动捕捉，利用自回归编码器-解码器模型成功解码了全身自然运动，为灵长类动物自然行为解码提供了新思路。
AI.motivation: 现有运动解码研究多局限于受限任务和有限肢体运动，难以理解皮层活动如何表征灵长类动物的自然全身行为，主要受限于运动多样性及大规模全身运动神经表征的获取困难。
AI.method: 构建了自由运动猴子的神经-行为记录平台，同步采集大面积感觉-运动相关皮层的硬膜外信号与多视角运动捕捉数据；采用自回归编码器-解码器模型学习紧凑的行为先验，并基于神经信号条件解码全身运动。
AI.result: 模型能够在无需显式物理约束的情况下，从神经信号中解码出准确且真实的全身运动。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为利用大规模颅内神经活动解码灵长类动物自然全身运动提供了概念验证，拓展了运动解码研究的边界。

title: HiKEY: Hierarchical Multimodal Retrieval for Open-Domain Document Question Answering
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for document-based Open-domain Question Answering (ODQA) on large-scale industrial corpora faces two critical bottlenecks: routing failure in locating the correct document and evidence fragmentation in integrating scattered information. Existing approaches relying on flat text chunks or page-level images inherently struggle to (i) precisely pinpoint the target document among thousands of candidates and (ii) organically connect multimodal evidence, such as tables and figures, within a limited token budget. To address these challenges, we propose HiKEY, a hierarchical tree-based multimodal retrieval framework that elevates document hierarchy to a first-class retrieval signal. Instead of simple chunking, HiKEY reconstructs a logical heterogeneous graph via Document Hierarchical Parsing (DHP), explicitly encoding parent-child relationships. Adopting a hierarchical coarse-to-fine strategy, the framework (1) performs global routing to rapidly prune the search space using hierarchical indexing, and (2) conducts fine-grained retrieval to rank sections by employing a multimodal fusion strategy that captures the most discriminative evidence. Finally, HiKEY assembles a token-efficient evidence subgraph via a hybrid structural-semantic packing strategy. Experiments on ODQA benchmarks demonstrate that HiKEY significantly outperforms page- and chunk-based baselines, improving retrieval recall by up to 12.9% and end-to-end QA performance by up to 6.8%.

AI.tldr: HiKEY是一个基于层次化树的检索增强生成框架，通过文档层次化解析和多模态融合策略，有效解决了大规模工业语料中ODQA的路径路由失败和证据碎片化问题，在召回率和QA性能上分别提升最高12.9%和6.8%。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG方法在处理大规模工业文档时面临两个关键瓶颈：一是无法从海量候选中精确定位目标文档（路由失败），二是在有限token预算下难以有机整合表格、图片等多模态证据（证据碎片化）。
AI.method: 提出HiKEY框架：1) 通过文档层次化解析构建逻辑异构图，显式编码父子关系；2) 采用层次化粗到细策略，先全局路由快速剪枝搜索空间，再细粒度检索利用多模态融合策略选取最具判别力的证据；3) 通过混合结构-语义打包策略组装token高效的证据子图。
AI.result: 在ODQA基准测试中，HiKEY相比基于页面和基于分块的基线方法，检索召回率提升最高12.9%，端到端QA性能提升最高6.8%。
AI.conclusion: 将文档层次结构作为一级检索信号，结合层次化粗到细检索与多模态融合策略，能有效提升大规模工业文档ODQA的性能。

title: Source-Grounded Semantic Reinforcement Learning for Low-Resource Target-Language Generation
summary: Low-resource target-language generation is often limited by scarce parallel data, while high-resource source-language monolingual data is abundant but difficult to use with standard supervised fine-tuning. We propose Source-Grounded Semantic Reinforcement Learning (SG-SRL), a resource-utilization framework that converts source-language monolingual data into cross-lingual semantic supervision for target-language generation. SG-SRL performs reference-free reinforcement learning (RL) on source-language data using a cross-lingual semantic reward model, instantiated by a cross-lingual reranker that scores the semantic relevance between the source input and the target-language generation. While this induces severe verbosity-based reward hacking, a lightweight recovery stage using a small parallel corpus restores fluency, conciseness, and task format while preserving the semantic gains. Experiments on Chinese-to-Thai generation show that SG-SRL improves semantic grounding and factual coverage over cold-start SFT. Additional analyses on long-form transfer and Tibetan embedding-based rewards clarify the generalization behavior of SG-SRL and show that an encoder-based semantic reward can substitute for an LLM-based reranker in a realistic low-resource language setting.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SG-SRL框架，利用源语言单语数据通过跨语言语义强化学习来提升低资源目标语言生成质量，并设计轻量恢复阶段解决奖励黑客问题。
AI.motivation: 低资源目标语言生成受限于平行数据稀缺，而高资源源语言单语数据丰富却难以通过标准监督微调利用。
AI.method: 使用跨语言语义奖励模型（重排序器）对源语言单语数据执行无参考强化学习，再通过小规模平行语料进行轻量恢复训练以修复流畅性和简洁性。
AI.result: 中泰生成任务中SG-SRL相比冷启动SFT提升了语义基础性和事实覆盖率；在藏语设置中编码器语义奖励可替代LLM重排序器。
AI.conclusion: SG-SRL有效利用源语言单语数据提升低资源目标语言生成，且编码器奖励在真实低资源场景中是可行的替代方案。

title: Energy-Aware NECO for Single-Pass Pixel-wise Out-of-Distribution Detection in Semantic Segmentation
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures. Accepted at the ICRA 2026 Workshop on Long-term Deployments in the Wild (LoWi 2026)
summary:
Reliable semantic segmentation for mobile robots requires both accurate dense prediction and robust uncertainty estimation under distribution shift. Strong uncertainty baselines such as Monte Carlo Dropout often require repeated stochastic forward passes and are difficult to deploy on edge platforms.
  We propose Energy-Aware NECO, a single-pass pixel-wise out-of-distribution (OOD) detector for semantic segmentation. The method combines a centered NECO-style geometric ratio computed from decoder features with a logit-based Energy score. Both components are standardized using statistics fitted on a pure in-distribution validation split and fused through a convex combination.
  We evaluate the method on the miniMUAD subset using true pixel-level OOD labels. The proposed hybrid score achieves an AUROC of 0.8539, outperforming NECO-only (0.8280), Energy-only (0.8171), and an ensemble predictive-entropy baseline (0.8124). Additional qualitative and operating-point analyses show that the hybrid detector improves overall ranking performance while preserving the efficiency advantages of a single-pass design.
  Code is available at https://github.com/boyuan-zhangx/Energy-Aware_NECO

AI.tldr: 提出Energy-Aware NECO，一种单次前向传播的像素级分布外检测器，结合NECO几何比率和Energy得分，在语义分割任务上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 移动机器人需要既准确又具有鲁棒不确定性估计的语义分割，但现有强基线如MC Dropout需要多次随机前向传播，难以在边缘平台部署。
AI.method: 将解码器特征的居中NECO几何比率与基于logit的Energy得分结合，两者通过纯分布内验证集标准化后，以凸组合方式融合，形成单次前向传播的混合OOD检测器。
AI.result: 在miniMUAD数据集上，混合得分AUROC达0.8539，优于NECO-only(0.8280)、Energy-only(0.8171)以及集成预测熵基线(0.8124)。
AI.conclusion: 混合检测器在保持单次前向传播效率优势的同时，提升了整体排序性能，适合边缘平台部署。

title: Solving Integer Linear Programming with Parallel Tempering
summary: Integer Linear Programming (ILP) serves as a versatile framework for modeling a wide range of combinatorial optimization problems, typically addressed by sophisticated exact solvers or heuristics. While learning-based approaches have recently shown their effectiveness, they suffer from poor generalization to out-of-distribution instances and inherent dependence on external solvers. In this work, we propose a solver-free, sampling-based optimization framework for ILP that directly explores discrete feasible regions without training or external solvers. Exploiting the linear structure of ILP, we employ a Locally-Balanced Proposal to construct a transition kernel, thereby avoiding the gradient approximation. To overcome the highly multimodal nature of ILP energy landscapes, we integrate Parallel Tempering. In addition to standard temperature tempering, we introduce penalty tempering, which modulates constraint barriers while preserving the objective landscape over feasible solutions. Empirically, our method consistently outperforms SCIP across all four benchmarks, matches or exceeds Gurobi on two of four tasks within a 200-second budget, and is substantially more robust to distribution shift than learning-based methods. Furthermore, on MIPLIB 2017 instances, our framework remains competitive with classical solvers without any problem-specific tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需求解器、无需训练的基于采样的整数线性规划优化框架，利用局部平衡提议和并行回火（包括标准温度回火和惩罚回火）直接探索离散可行区域，在多个基准上表现优于SCIP，与Gurobi竞争，且对分布偏移具有鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有ILP求解依赖精确求解器或启发式方法，而学习方法泛化性差且依赖外部求解器。作者希望提出一种无需外部求解器、无需训练的采样框架，直接探索离散可行区域，同时克服ILP能量景观的高度多峰性。
AI.method: 1) 利用ILP的线性结构，设计Locally-Balanced Proposal构建转移核，避免梯度近似。2) 引入Parallel Tempering应对多峰能量景观，包括标准温度回退和创新的惩罚回退——通过调节约束障碍而保持可行解上的目标景观不变。3) 整体为求解器无关、训练无关的采样框架。
AI.result: 在四个基准上一致优于SCIP；在200秒预算内，两项任务匹配或超过Gurobi；相比学习方法，对分布偏移的鲁棒性显著更强；在MIPLIB 2017实例上，无需问题特定调优即可与经典求解器竞争。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的无求解器采样框架在ILP优化中展现了强大的竞争力，兼具高性能、泛化性和鲁棒性，为组合优化提供了一种新的有效范式。

title: Improving Collaborative Storytelling with a Multi-Agent Framework Based on Large Language Models
summary: The topic of Co-creation, i.e., AI agents interacting with humans to generate outputs (e.g., art), has gained significant attention recently. However, most studies focus on adult-human interactions in a digital setting. This paper explores a novel ludic co-creation scenario involving children and Large Language Models (LLMs) interacting through a physical board game to create written stories. Our goal is to develop a multi-agent framework capable of producing high-quality narratives suitable for young players. At the core of our approach is an iterative Writer-Editor process in which one LLM generates stories while another evaluates them and provides feedback for refinement. Through a simulation study involving multiple LLMs, we show that this iterative interaction consistently improves the perceived quality of generated stories across successive loops. The results indicate that a small number of refinement steps may be sufficient to achieve high-quality outputs in interactive storytelling systems.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了儿童与LLM通过实体棋盘游戏进行共创故事的新场景，提出多智能体框架，通过迭代的“写手-编辑”过程提升叙事质量，模拟实验表明少量迭代即可获得高质量输出。
AI.motivation: 现有AI共创研究多聚焦于成人-数字场景，缺乏对儿童通过实体游戏进行人机共创故事的探索。
AI.method: 提出多智能体框架，核心是迭代的Writer-Editor过程：一个LLM生成故事，另一个LLM评估并提供反馈以改进故事。
AI.result: 模拟实验表明，迭代交互持续提升了生成故事的感知质量，少量优化步骤即可达到高质量。
AI.conclusion: 迭代式Writer-Editor机制在儿童-实体游戏共创场景中有效，为交互式故事生成提供了高效方案。

title: From Blind Guess to Informed Judgment: Teaching LLMs to Evaluate Materials by Building Knowledge-Augmented Preference Signals
summary: As candidate generation and high-throughput experimentation advance, the primary bottleneck in materials discovery is shifting from property prediction to making reliable evaluations among massive candidate sets. We propose a Knowledge-Augmented Preference Signals Framework, MaterEval, that automatically produces, for the same candidate, two evaluations: an informed judgment that follows expert rules and provides supporting evidence, and a rule-removed blind guess. By pairing the two evaluations as preference data, we guide general-purpose large language models (LLMs), originally lacking materials-specific criteria, from intuitive judgment toward reliable evaluation supported by explicit evidence. To balance throughput, cost, and reliability, we further introduce a fast-slow reasoning scheme that decouples large-scale rapid screening from in-depth review on a small subset. Using high-entropy alloy (HEA) assessment as a case study, we show that, without external retrieval and relying solely on internalized capabilities, small open-source LLMs achieve substantial gains in accuracy, conclusion consistency, and evidence discrimination, approaching the performance of rule-based closed-source LLMs. These results demonstrate that expert rules can be systematically transformed into learnable preference signals, enabling a low-cost and deployable evaluation module for autonomous materials discovery loops.

AI.tldr: 提出MaterEval框架，通过知识增强的偏好信号将专家规则转化为可学习信号，结合快慢推理机制，使小规模开源LLM在材料评估中接近基于规则的闭源LLM性能。
AI.motivation: 材料发现瓶颈从性质预测转向大规模候选集的可靠评估，现有LLM缺乏材料领域专业知识。
AI.method: 提出MaterEval框架：(1) 为同一候选材料生成"有依据判断"和"盲目猜测"配对偏好数据；(2) 引入快慢推理机制，分离大规模快速筛选与深度评估。
AI.result: 无需外部检索，仅靠内部能力，小规模开源LLM在准确性、结论一致性和证据区分度上显著提升，接近基于规则的闭源LLM性能。
AI.conclusion: 专家规则可系统转化为可学习的偏好信号，为自主材料发现循环提供低成本、可部署的评估模块。

title: Improving CLIP Adaptation by Breaking Tail Alignment for Source-Free Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) such as CLIP demonstrate strong zero-shot generalization, but their performance significantly degrades in cross-domain scenarios with scarce target-domain training data (Cross-Domain Few-Shot Learning, CDFSL). In this paper, we focus on the target-domain few-shot finetuning in the CLIP-based CDFSL task. Prevailing finetuning paradigms uniformly align all image patch tokens with their corresponding textual embeddings. However, we find a counterintuitive phenomenon: actively pushing away certain low-similarity image tokens, termed "tail tokens", from their textual embeddings consistently improves target-domain performance. We delve into this phenomenon and provide a novel interpretation: under great domain shifts and scarce training data, the model can hardly extract semantic information from visual inputs; therefore, the common belief of alignment is valid only for tokens already containing sufficient semantic information; for tail tokens, forcing the alignment would lead to excessive overfitting to the scarce training, while breaking the alignment is more useful. Motivated by this, we propose Adaptive Tail-Head Alignment (ATHA), a novel fine-tuning strategy for CLIP that transforms the conventional uniform alignment paradigm to an adaptive alignment paradigm, with both alignment strengthening and weakening. Extensive experiments on four challenging CDFSL benchmarks validate our state-of-the-art performance. Our code is available at https://github.com/shuaiyi308/ATHA.

AI.tldr: 本文针对CLIP模型在跨域小样本学习（CDFSL）中性能下降的问题，提出了一种自适应尾-头对齐（ATHA）微调策略。该策略打破传统均匀对齐范式，主动将低相似度“尾部令牌”推离文本嵌入，同时加强高相似度“头部令牌”的对齐，实验证明该方法在四个CDFSL基准上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有CLIP微调方法在跨域小样本场景下性能严重退化，原因是传统均匀对齐范式迫使所有图像令牌与文本嵌入对齐，但领域偏移大、训练数据少时模型难以从视觉输入中提取语义信息，强制对齐会导致过拟合。
AI.method: 提出ATHA（Adaptive Tail-Head Alignment）微调策略：识别图像中低相似度的“尾部令牌”并主动将其推离文本嵌入（alignment weakening），同时加强高相似度“头部令牌”的对齐（alignment strengthening），将传统均匀对齐转变为自适应对齐范式。
AI.result: 在四个具有挑战性的CDFSL基准数据集上验证了SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了在域偏移大、数据少的场景下，传统的均匀对齐信念并非普适有效：对于已含足够语义信息的令牌（头部）应加强对齐，对于语义不足的令牌（尾部）打破对齐反而更有利。ATHA通过自适应的对齐强弱调整有效缓解了过拟合问题。

title: Deep Adaptive Dimension Reduction for Bayesian Inference in Inverse Problems
summary: Solving high-dimensional PDE-governed inverse problems is often challenging due to complex non-Gaussian posterior distributions, expensive forward model evaluations, and misspecified prior information. To address these issues, we propose a deep adaptive dimension-reduction Bayesian inference framework based on the Variational Flow (VF) model. Since standard normalizing flows are restricted by bijective mappings and cannot directly reduce dimensions, VF overcomes this limitation by integrating VAE-based nonlinear dimension reduction with dual normalizing flows for the latent prior and encoder. This design provides a strictly higher evidence lower bound than VAE and allows more flexible approximation of complex posterior distributions. We further introduce an iterative prior updating strategy that gradually moves the prior mean toward high-probability posterior regions, avoiding manual prior tuning. These components form a closed adaptive loop together with an adaptively fine-tuned Fourier Neural Operator (FNO) surrogate: VF generates posterior-concentrated samples to refine the surrogate, while the updated surrogate further improves posterior inference. Numerical experiments on a 100-dimensional Rosenbrock problem and three standard PDE-governed inverse problems show that our method delivers competitive or superior accuracy compared with MCMC, UKI, and SVGD baselines across all tested configurations, with the most pronounced advantages emerging in challenging scenarios such as high-noise observations and high-dimensional parameter spaces.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于变分流（VF）的深度自适应降维贝叶斯推断框架，结合VAE与归一化流、迭代先验更新策略及自适应FNO代理模型，用于高效求解高维PDE控制反问题，在多种基准测试中优于MCMC、UKI和SVGD方法。
AI.motivation: 高维PDE反问题面临后验分布非高斯、正演计算昂贵、先验信息设定不当等挑战，现有方法难以有效处理。
AI.method: 构建VF模型，融合VAE非线性降维与双归一化流（处理隐空间先验和编码器）；引入迭代先验更新策略逐步将先验均值移向高概率后验区域；结合自适应微调的FNO代理模型，形成闭环自适应循环：VF生成后验集中样本细化代理，代理改进后验推断。
AI.result: 在100维Rosenbrock问题和三个标准PDE反问题上，该方法在所有测试配置下达到与MCMC、UKI、SVGD相当或更优的精度，在高噪声观测和高维参数空间中优势最显著。
AI.conclusion: 提出的自适应降维贝叶斯框架能有效应对高维PDE反问题的多重挑战，尤其适合高噪声、高维度等困难场景。

title: Beyond Attack Success Rate: Temporal Logit Observability for LLM Safety Failures
summary: Attack Success Rate (ASR) evaluates each jailbreak with a single yes/no label at the end of generation, telling us whether a failure happened but not how it unfolded. Two attacks that produce equally harmful outputs may have followed completely different paths, and ASR cannot tell them apart. We make those hidden paths observable from logits alone. Temporal Logit Observability (TLO) is a training-free diagnostic that watches a compliance-refusal margin during decoding and places each model-attack condition on a calibrated 2D plane. By design, this plane is most informative exactly where ASR is least informative: among attacks that succeed for genuinely different reasons. Across four aligned LLMs and three jailbreak paradigms, attacks with nearly identical ASR land at clearly different points on the plane: the same model can fail through different temporal patterns. The geometry matches refusal-direction probes from hidden states on most conditions, with one model showing the limit of our fixed-lexicon approach. A simple early-stop rule derived from TLO cuts successful jailbreaks by more than half, without false alarms on plain benign queries. Safety evaluation should report when and how a failure unfolds, not only whether it occurred. TLO makes the first two observable from logits alone.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TLO（时间Logits可观测性），一种无需训练的诊断方法，通过监控解码过程中的服从-拒绝边际，将模型-攻击条件映射到校准的二维平面上，揭示不同越狱攻击的时间动态模式，而非仅报告最终成功率（ASR）。实验表明，ASR相近的攻击在TLO平面上呈现明显不同的轨迹，且基于TLO的早停策略可减少超过一半的成功越狱，且不会误判良性查询。
AI.motivation: 现有越狱评估指标ASR仅用二值标签（成功/失败）报告最终结果，无法区分产生类似有害输出的不同攻击路径，缺乏对失败过程的时间动态洞察。
AI.method: 提出TLO方法，无需额外训练，通过监控解码过程中服从与拒绝的logits边际，将每个模型-攻击条件映射到校准的二维平面上，使不同时间模式的攻击在平面上可区分。
AI.result: 在四种对齐LLM和三种越狱范式下，ASR相近的攻击在TLO平面上呈现明显不同的位置；TLO几何与基于隐藏状态的拒绝方向探针在大多数条件上一致；基于TLO的早停策略将成功越狱减少超过一半，且对良性查询无误报。
AI.conclusion: 安全评估不仅应报告失败是否发生，还应报告失败何时发生以及如何展开。TLO仅从logits即可实现前两点的可观测性。

title: LiteCoder-Terminal: Scaling Long-Horizon Terminal Environments for Learning Language Agents
summary: Mastering terminal environments requires language agents capable of multi-step planning, feedback-grounded execution, and dynamic state adaptation. However, training such agents is currently bottlenecked by a reliance on scraped external repositories, which limits domain diversity, environment controllability, and the targeting of specific capability deficits. We introduce LiteCoder-Terminal-Gen, a zero-dependency synthesis pipeline that autonomously generates executable and verifiable terminal training environments directly from domain specifications. Using this framework, we construct two large-scale resources: LiteCoder-Terminal-SFT, comprising 11,255 expert trajectories across 10 domains, and LiteCoder-Terminal-RL, featuring 602 verifiable environments for trajectory-level preference optimization. Supervised fine-tuning of Qwen-family models on our SFT dataset yields agents that significantly outperform their base counterparts. Notably, our 32B variant achieves 29.06%, 18.54%, and 34.00% pass@1 on Terminal Bench 1.0, 2.0, and Pro, respectively. Furthermore, applying Direct Multi-turn Preference Optimization (DMPO) on our RL environments yields additional performance gains. These results systematically demonstrate that fully synthetic, executable environments offer a scalable and verifiable supervision signal for mastering complex, real-world command-line workflows.

AI.tldr: 提出零依赖合成管线LiteCoder-Terminal-Gen，自动生成可执行终端训练环境，构建SFT(11,255条专家轨迹)和RL(602个可验证环境)数据集，在终端任务上显著提升Qwen模型性能(32B在Terminal Bench 1.0/2.0/Pro上分别达29.06%/18.54%/34.00%)，并通过DMPO进一步优化。
AI.motivation: 现有终端语言代理训练依赖爬取外部仓库，导致领域多样性不足、环境可控性差、难以针对性补足能力缺陷。
AI.method: 提出LiteCoder-Terminal-Gen合成管线，从领域规范自动生成可执行且可验证的终端训练环境；构建SFT数据集(专家轨迹)和RL数据集(可验证环境)；采用监督微调+Direct Multi-turn Preference Optimization (DMPO)优化。
AI.result: 32B模型在Terminal Bench 1.0/2.0/Pro上分别取得29.06%/18.54%/34.00% pass@1，超越基座模型；DMPO进一步带来性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 全合成可执行环境能为复杂命令行工作流提供可扩展、可验证的监督信号。

title: Fewer Steps, Better Performance: Efficient Cross-Modal Clip Trimming for Video Moment Retrieval Using Language
summary: Given an untrimmed video and a sentence query, video moment retrieval using language (VMR) aims to locate a target query-relevant moment. Since the untrimmed video is overlong, almost all existing VMR methods first sparsely down-sample each untrimmed video into multiple fixed-length video clips and then conduct multi-modal interactions with the query feature and expensive clip features for reasoning, which is infeasible for long real-world videos that span hours. Since the video is downsampled into fixed-length clips, some query-related frames may be filtered out, which will blur the specific boundary of the target moment, take the adjacent irrelevant frames as new boundaries, easily leading to cross-modal misalignment and introducing both boundary-bias and reasoning-bias. To this end, in this paper, we propose an efficient approach, SpotVMR, to trim the query-relevant clip. Besides, our proposed SpotVMR can serve as plug-and-play module, which achieves efficiency for state-of-the-art VMR methods while maintaining good retrieval performance. Especially, we first design a novel clip search model that learns to identify promising video regions to search conditioned on the language query. Then, we introduce a set of low-cost semantic indexing features to capture the context of objects and interactions that suggest where to search the query-relevant moment. Also, the distillation loss is utilized to address the optimization issues arising from end-to-end joint training of the clip selector and VMR model. Extensive experiments on three challenging datasets demonstrate its effectiveness.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SpotVMR，一种高效的视频时刻检索方法。它通过可学习的剪辑搜索模型和低成本语义索引特征，在未修剪视频中定位与查询相关的时刻。SpotVMR可作为即插即用模块，在不牺牲检索性能的情况下提升现有SOTA方法的效率，并在三个数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有VMR方法先将未修剪视频下采样为固定长度剪辑，再进行多模态交互推理。这种方式存在两个问题：1) 对长视频不可行（计算成本高）；2) 固定下采样可能滤除查询相关帧，导致边界模糊和跨模态对齐偏差（边界偏置和推理偏置）。
AI.method: 1) 设计了一个新颖的剪辑搜索模型，学习基于语言查询识别有前景的视频区域进行搜索；2) 引入低成本的语义索引特征，捕捉物体和交互的上下文信息，指引查询相关时刻的搜索位置；3) 使用蒸馏损失解决剪辑选择器与VMR模型端到端联合训练中的优化问题。
AI.result: 在三个具有挑战性的数据集上进行了大量实验，验证了SpotVMR的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SpotVMR是一种高效的即插即用模块，通过智能剪辑选择降低计算开销，同时保持良好检索性能，解决了长视频场景下VMR任务的可扩展性问题。

title: TRACER: Persistent Regularization for Robust Multimodal Finetuning
summary: Mainstream strategies for finetuning pretrained multimodal models often degrade out-of-distribution (OOD) robustness, a phenomenon known as catastrophic forgetting. In this paper, we develop a theoretical framework for multimodal contrastive finetuning, yielding closed-form solutions and a geometric decomposition for each strategy. This framework shows that self-distillation is more effective than other regularization approaches to retain the knowledge of the pretrained model. Our analysis reveals a largely overlooked limitation: standard Exponential Moving Average (EMA) teachers, widely used in robust finetuning, suffer from collapse. To solve this, we prove that a Weighted Moving Average (WMA) teacher maintains a persistent regularizing force over finite horizons and yields bias-free convergence in the task subspace while preserving orthogonal knowledge. These insights motivate **TRACER** (**T**rajectory-**R**obust **A**nchoring for **C**ontrastive **E**ncoder **R**egularization), which combines contrastive learning with WMA-guided multi-perspective distillation. Extensive experiments on CLIP finetuning demonstrate consistent OOD accuracy and calibration gains across three backbone architectures, and comprehensive ablations confirm that TRACER is both principled and robust to hyperparameter choices. Code is available at [https://github.com/HesamAsad/TRACER](https://github.com/HesamAsad/TRACER).

AI.tldr: 本文提出TRACER框架，通过加权移动平均（WMA）教师蒸馏解决多模态对比微调中的灾难性遗忘问题，在CLIP微调中显著提升分布外鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 主流多模态微调策略会破坏分布外鲁棒性（灾难性遗忘），现有EMA教师存在坍缩问题，亟需更有效的正则化方法保留预训练知识。
AI.method: 建立多模态对比微调的理论框架（闭式解+几何分解），证明自蒸馏优于其他正则化；提出WMA教师（持久正则化力+无偏收敛），结合对比学习与多视角蒸馏实现TRACER。
AI.result: 在CLIP三个骨干架构上，OOD准确率和校准度一致提升，超参数鲁棒性强。
AI.conclusion: WMA教师有效克服EMA坍缩，为鲁棒微调提供理论指导的开源方案。

title: VikingMem: A Memory Base Management System for Stateful LLM-based Applications
summary: Large Language Models have revolutionized interactive applications; however, their finite context windows pose a critical data management challenge for maintaining stateful, long-term interactions. Existing memory approaches often rely on simplistic extraction methods that lead to incomplete memories or use rigid, single-purpose memory extraction prompts tailored to a single use case, such as chatbots. Consequently, they lack generalizability and perform poorly across diverse downstream tasks. To bridge this gap, we introduce the Memory Base, a novel data management paradigm for managing the persistent state of long-term interactions. It is characterized by three core principles: selective extraction of high-value memories from raw information streams; inherent statefulness and evolution, where memory content is progressively summarized, corrected, and temporally weighted to prioritize recent interactions; and a generalizable abstraction paradigm designed for robust transferability across diverse applications, including education, recommendation, and agent memory. Building on this foundation, we present VikingMem, an end-to-end Memory Base Management System implemented on the VikingDB vector engine. VikingMem materializes this paradigm through interconnected event and entity abstractions. It features event-centric memory extraction to selectively handle complex information streams, while entities are dynamically updated by events to achieve stateful evolution. Using temporal compression via a topic-wise timeline and time-weighted recall, the system progressively produces high-level summary memories, prioritizes recent items, and compresses and fades older ones. Extensive evaluations on long-term memory benchmarks demonstrate that VikingMem outperformes baselines by up to 30% in memory retrieval effectiveness while maintaining the low latency essential for interactive applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Memory Base的新型数据管理范式，用于管理大语言模型在长程交互中的持久状态，并基于此设计了VikingMem系统，通过选择性记忆提取、状态演化（事件驱动实体更新、时序压缩与加权召回）和通用化抽象（面向教育、推荐、智能体等多种场景）三大核心原则，在记忆检索效果上相比基线提升了30%，同时保持低延迟。
AI.motivation: 现有的大语言模型记忆管理方法存在两个主要问题：一是依赖简单的提取方式导致记忆不完整；二是使用僵化、单用途的提示模板，仅适用于单一场景（如聊天机器人），缺乏通用性，难以在不同下游任务中表现良好。因此，需要一种更通用、可迁移的记忆管理范式。
AI.method: 提出Memory Base范式，包含三条核心原则：(1) 选择性提取：从原始信息流中提取高价值记忆；(2) 固有状态性与演化：通过渐进式摘要、纠正和时间加权来优先处理近期交互；(3) 通用化抽象：设计可迁移的抽象范式以适用于多种应用。基于此实现VikingMem系统，基于VikingDB向量引擎，采用事件与实体两级抽象：事件中心化提取处理复杂信息流，实体由事件驱动动态更新；通过主题维时间线和时间加权召回实现时序压缩，逐步产生高层次摘要记忆，优先近期内容并压缩/淡化旧内容。
AI.result: 在长程记忆基准测试中，VikingMem在记忆检索有效性上相比基线方法提升了高达30%，同时保持了交互式应用所需的低延迟。
AI.conclusion: VikingMem通过Memory Base范式的三原则——选择性提取、状态演化与通用化抽象——有效解决了大语言模型长程交互中的记忆管理难题，在检索效果和延迟方面均表现出优势，适用于教育、推荐、智能体等多种场景。

title: GAPD: Gold-Action Policy Distillation for Agentic Reinforcement Learning in Knowledge Base Question Answering
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) is a natural fit for agentic knowledge base question answering (KBQA), where a model must issue executable actions, observe knowledge-base feedback, and eventually return an answer. However, current RL-based KBQA systems mainly optimize sparse rewards from the final answer, leaving intermediate action errors weakly supervised. This is especially limiting for logical-form annotated KBQA benchmarks: gold logical forms can be converted into executable action sequences, but existing pipelines use them mainly for warm-start data construction rather than for on-policy RL updates. We propose GAPD, a training-time Gold-Action Policy Distillation framework that adds dense token-level guidance to outcome-based RL. To align gold actions with on-policy student rollouts, GAPD uses MID-ANCHOR MATCHING: it treats the intermediate entities reached during student exploration and gold execution as state anchors, and matches student states to gold states through these explored entity sets. The current policy conditioned on this aligned gold action serves as a stop-gradient teacher, whose token distribution is distilled back to the ordinary student policy over generated action-token spans. GAPD consistently surpasses the current state of the art on WebQSP, GrailQA, and GraphQ.

AI.tldr: 提出GAPD框架，通过金标动作策略蒸馏为基于RL的KBQA系统提供稠密的token级监督信号，弥补稀疏奖励的不足，在多个基准上超越SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有RL-based KBQA系统主要依赖最终答案的稀疏奖励，对中间动作错误缺乏监督；逻辑形式标注的金标动作仅用于预热数据构建，未用于on-policy RL更新。
AI.method: 提出GAPD框架，包含MID-ANCHOR MATCHING机制：将学生探索和黄金执行过程中的中间实体作为状态锚点进行对齐，将基于对齐后金标动作的策略分布蒸馏回学生策略。
AI.result: 在WebQSP、GrailQA、GraphQ三个基准上一致超越当前SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 通过金标动作策略蒸馏为基于RL的KBQA系统提供稠密监督信号是有效的，能够显著提升性能。

title: Low-Magnification SEM May Suffice: Interpretable Deep Learning for Multi-Scale Fracture-Cause Classification in Zirconia-Toughened Alumina
summary: Reliable identification of fracture origins in alumina matrix composite hip and knee implants is critical for quality assurance and patient safety, yet current fractographic workflows are time-consuming, partly subjective, and reliant on high-magnification scanning electron microscopy (SEM). We present an interpretable vision-transformer (ViT) workflow for automated classification of fracture causes in an alumina matrix composite (BIOLOX delta, CeramTec GmbH) widely used in total joint replacements. A dataset of 8,493 SEM images (50x-10,000x) was curated from five years of in-production burst and proof tests and annotated into three defect categories defined along the manufacturing chain: green body, hard machining, and material defects. Under severe class imbalance, the fine-tuned ViT reached an accuracy of 0.907 and a macro-F1 of 0.888 in stratified five-fold cross-validation, with a two-stage perceptual-hash/SSIM leakage audit confirming negligible specimen overlap. Notably, performance at low magnification (50x) was comparable to that at high magnification (1k-10kx), indicating that macro-scale features - mirror geometry and hackle line fields - already encode sufficient diagnostic signal. Grad-CAM attributions consistently localised on canonical fractographic cues (mirrors, hackles, pores, machining marks), aligning with established fractographic criteria. Together, these results position interpretable ViTs as a complementary tool for ceramic-implant quality assurance, enabling low-magnification pre-screening and reducing reliance on time-intensive high-magnification inspection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的视觉Transformer（ViT）流程，用于自动分类氧化铝基复合陶瓷髋/膝关节植入物的断裂原因，在8493张SEM图像数据集上达到0.907准确率和0.888宏F1分数，并发现低倍放大（50x）下性能与高倍相当，可作为低倍预筛选辅助工具。
AI.motivation: 当前陶瓷植入物断口分析工作流程耗时、部分主观且依赖高倍SEM，需要更高效、客观的自动化方法来保障质量控制和患者安全。
AI.method: 收集8493张SEM图像（50x-10000x）并标注为三类缺陷（生坯、硬加工、材料缺陷）；使用微调ViT进行五折交叉验证；通过感知哈希/SSIM两步法审核数据泄露；利用Grad-CAM进行可解释性分析。
AI.result: ViT准确率0.907，宏F1=0.888；低倍（50x）性能与高倍（1k-10kx）相当；Grad-CAM定位到镜面、人字纹、气孔、加工痕迹等典型断口特征。
AI.conclusion: 可解释ViT可作为陶瓷植入物质量保证的补充工具，实现低倍预筛选，减少对耗时的高倍SEM检查的依赖。

title: On the Optimizer Dependence of Neural Scaling Laws
summary: The scaling exponent $α$ in neural scaling laws $L(N) \propto N^{-α}$ is commonly treated as a fixed constant set by architecture and data. We present evidence that $α$ depends systematically on the optimizer. In controlled random-feature regression experiments -- the canonical theoretical framework for neural scaling -- we measure $α$ across five optimizer variants and six spectral conditions. Preconditioned optimizers consistently yield steeper scaling (larger $α$), with the $α$-shift increasing across most of the tested spectral range, peaking near $s = 1.5$, and remaining large at $s = 2.0$. At $s \approx 1.0$ (characteristic of natural language), the full natural gradient achieves $α\approx 0.31$ versus $α\approx 0.12$ for gradient descent -- a $2.6\times$ larger fitted exponent that, within the random-feature model, compounds with each model-size doubling. Whether and how this exponent shift transfers to large-scale LLM training -- where recent evidence suggests the advantage may attenuate with scale -- remains an important open question. Our results imply that scaling-law forecasts should account for optimizer choice, and we provide a spectral diagnostic predicting when advanced optimizers will pay off.

AI.tldr: 本文发现神经缩放律中的指数α并非固定常数，而是依赖于优化器的选择。在随机特征回归实验中，预条件优化器（如自然梯度）能产生更陡峭的缩放指数（α更大），在自然语言典型谱条件下自然梯度比梯度下降的α高出2.6倍（0.31 vs 0.12），且这种优势随模型规模扩大而累积。但这一优势能否迁移到大语言模型训练中尚待验证。
AI.motivation: 挑战神经缩放律中缩放指数α是固定常数的传统观点，揭示优化器选择对缩放指数的重要影响，为更准确的缩放律预测提供依据。
AI.method: 在随机特征回归理论框架下进行受控实验，测量5种优化器变体在6种谱条件下的缩放指数α，分析预条件优化器与标准梯度下降的差异。
AI.result: 预条件优化器持续产生更大的α（更陡峭的缩放），在s≈1.0（自然语言特征）时自然梯度α≈0.31 vs 梯度下降α≈0.12，提升2.6倍；α偏移在s=1.5时达到峰值，在s=2.0时仍保持较大。
AI.conclusion: 缩放律预测应考虑优化器选择；提供了预测先进优化器收益的谱诊断方法；但该指数偏移能否迁移到大语言模型训练仍是不确定的开放问题。

title: LLM-Evolved Domain-Independent Heuristics for Symbolic AI Planning
summary: Heuristic search is the dominant paradigm in symbolic AI planning, and the strongest heuristics are the result of decades of work by planning researchers. Recent work has shown that large language models (LLMs) can design heuristics for individual planning domains, but no LLM-generated heuristic has so far worked on arbitrary planning tasks. In this paper, we use evolutionary search to produce the first LLM-generated domain-independent heuristics that exceed the hand-engineered state of the art. We let an LLM mutate parent heuristics written in C++, store candidates in a MAP-Elites archive keyed on informedness and speed and calculate fitness scores by blending coverage with solving time. To place the evolved programs in context, we additionally benchmark a broad set of hand-engineered heuristics on their informedness-speed tradeoff, which to our knowledge has not been done before. On unseen testing domains, our best evolved heuristic solves more tasks than even the strongest baseline, with our full heuristic suite spanning the Pareto frontier of said tradeoff. We also find that seeding evolution from the trivial blind heuristic outperforms seeding from the strong FF heuristic, even when the resulting program is itself an FF variant, and that LLM reasoning effort affects how often candidates compile much more than the quality of those that do. Because the evolved programs are plain C++, they slot into existing planners as drop-in replacements and inherit the soundness and completeness guarantees of the underlying search.

AI.tldr: 本文通过进化搜索让大语言模型（LLM）生成领域无关的启发式函数，首次超越了手工设计的SOTA启发式。在未见过的测试领域，最佳进化启发式求解的任务数超过最强基线，且完整启发式集合覆盖了帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 符号AI规划中，启发式搜索是主导范式，最强启发式是研究人员数十年手工设计的成果。尽管已有工作表明LLM可以为单个规划领域设计启发式，但尚无LLM生成的启发式能在任意规划任务上有效工作。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 使用进化搜索，让LLM变异用C++编写的父启发式，将候选方案存储在按信息量和速度分键的MAP-Elites档案中，通过混合覆盖率和求解时间计算适应度分数。同时，首次对大量手工启发式进行信息量-速度权衡的基准测试。
AI.result: 最佳进化启发式在未见过的测试领域求解任务数超过最强基线；完整启发式套件覆盖了信息量-速度权衡的帕累托前沿。从简单盲启发式开始进化优于从强FF启发式开始。LLM推理努力对候选编译成功率的影响远大于对质量的影响。
AI.conclusion: 进化程序是纯C++代码，可即插即用地替换现有规划器中的启发式，并继承底层搜索的完备性保证。这是首个LLM生成的、超越手工SOTA的领域无关启发式。

title: World Models in Words: Auditing Physical State-Transition Commitments in Vision-Language Models
summary:
Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly used to answer questions about physical scenes, yet most evaluations reduce performance to a final answer. This hides whether the model perceived the right objects, represented the right physical state, predicted a plausible transition, or merely selected the right option for the wrong reasons. We introduce \wmw, an evaluation framework for auditing the \emph{language-expressed physical commitments} of VLMs. Instead of scoring only $I,q\mapsto a$, we ask models to produce a typed trace $I,q\mapsto(s_0,Δs,s_1,a)$: an initial state, a state transition, a resulting state, and an answer. A hybrid verifier then checks schema validity, state grounding, transition consistency, and answer-trace compatibility, yielding typed error labels such as object, relation, force, transition, temporal, unit/scale, and faithfulness errors. We release 	racebank, a controlled trace resource with 
Seed schema- and recomputation-validated synthetic scenarios across 
Families physics families, 
Pairs minimally perturbed contrastive preference pairs, verifier code, audit guidelines, and model outputs. We evaluate 
Models VLMs on both controlled and external physical-reasoning examples. \wmw reveals failures that answer-only evaluation misses: 35\% of correct answers from mid-tier models are backed by physically invalid traces. Verifier-guided reranking recovers up to 7 percentage points of trace validity without sacrificing answer accuracy, and trace-level preference tuning reduces hidden inconsistency by 41\% relative. The contribution is not another final-answer physics benchmark, but a reusable protocol for measuring whether a VLM's stated physical world can be true at the same time as its answer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出\wmw框架，用于审计视觉语言模型(VLM)在物理场景问答中的语言表达物理承诺。模型需输出结构化轨迹(初始状态、状态变化、结果状态、答案)，通过混合验证器检查语义有效性、状态接地、转变一致性和答案-轨迹兼容性，揭示仅评估最终答案所隐藏的物理推理缺陷。实验表明中档模型35%的正确答案基于无效物理轨迹，验证器引导的重排序可提升7个百分点的轨迹有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM评估仅关注最终答案是否正确，无法区分模型是否真正理解了物理场景——它可能感知了正确物体却错误推理，或猜对了答案却出于错误理由。作者旨在建立一套可复用的审计协议，衡量VLM的物理世界陈述与其答案能否同时为真。
AI.method: 提出\wmw框架：要求VLM输出四元组(s0, Δs, s1, a)即初始状态、状态转变、结果状态和答案。设计混合验证器检查模式合法性、状态接地性、转变一致性、答案-轨迹兼容性，生成7类错误标签(物体、关系、力、转变、时序、单位/尺度、忠实性)。构建\tracebank数据集包含经过模式验证和重计算验证的合成场景及对比偏好对。
AI.result: 中档模型35%的正确答案基于物理无效轨迹；验证器引导的重排序在不牺牲答案准确率的前提下将轨迹有效性提升最多7个百分点；轨迹级别的偏好微调将隐藏不一致性相对降低41%。
AI.conclusion: 贡献不在于发布另一个最终答案的物理基准，而在于一套可复用的审计协议，用于衡量VLM的物理世界陈述与答案的逻辑一致性，揭示仅靠答案正确率无法发现的物理推理缺陷。

title: Not All Inputs Are Valid: Towards Open-Set Video Moment Retrieval Using Language
summary: Video Moment Retrieval (VMR) targets to retrieve the specific moment corresponding to a sentence query from an untrimmed video. Although recent works have made remarkable progress in this task, they implicitly are rooted in the closed-set assumption that all the given queries as video-relevant\footnote{In this paper, we treat ``video-relevant query'' as ``in-distribution (ID) query'' and ``video-irrelevant query'' as ``out-of-distribution (OOD) query''.}. Given an OOD query in open-set scenarios, they still utilize it for wrong retrieval, which might lead to irrecoverable losses in high-risk scenarios, \textit{e.g.}, criminal activity detection. To this end, we creatively explore a brand-new VMR setting termed Open-Set Video Moment Retrieval (OS-VMR), where we should not only retrieve the precise moments based on ID query, but also reject OOD queries. In this paper, we make the first attempt to step toward OS-VMR and propose a novel model \textbf{OpenVMR}, which first distinguishes ID and OOD queries based on the normalizing flow technology, and then conducts moment retrieval based on ID queries. Specifically, we first learn the ID distribution by constructing a normalizing flow, and assume the ID query distribution obeys the multi-variate Gaussian distribution. Then, we introduce an uncertainty score to search the ID-OOD separating boundary. After that, we refine the ID-OOD boundary by pulling together ID query features. Besides, video-query matching and frame-query matching are designed for coarse-grained and fine-grained cross-modal interaction, respectively. Finally, a positive-unlabeled learning module is introduced for moment retrieval. Experimental results on three VMR datasets show the effectiveness of our OpenVMR.

AI.tldr: 本文首次探索开放集视频时刻检索（OS-VMR）任务，提出OpenVMR模型，通过归一化流区分ID和OOD查询，并仅对ID查询进行时刻检索，在三个数据集上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有VMR方法均基于封闭集假设，即所有查询都与视频相关。但在开放场景中，面对无关查询（OOD）时仍会错误检索，这在高风险场景（如犯罪检测）中可能导致不可挽回的损失。因此，需要探索开放集视频时刻检索（OS-VMR）。
AI.method: 1) 利用归一化流学习ID分布，假设ID查询服从多元高斯分布；2) 引入不确定性分数搜索ID-OOD分类边界；3) 通过拉近ID查询特征细化边界；4) 设计视频-查询匹配（粗粒度）和帧-查询匹配（细粒度）进行跨模态交互；5) 引入正-无标签学习模块进行时刻检索。
AI.result: 在三个VMR数据集上的实验结果表明，OpenVMR方法有效。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次提出并探索了开放集视频时刻检索（OS-VMR）任务，所提出的OpenVMR模型能够同时处理ID查询的时刻检索和OOD查询的拒绝，为开放场景下的视频理解提供了新思路。

title: GDSD: Reinforcement Learning as Guided Denoiser Self-Distillation for Diffusion Language Models
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) can be used to improve the policy (denoiser) of diffusion large language models (dLLMs), while being hindered by the intractability of the policy likelihood. A dominant and efficient family of methods replaces the likelihood in standard RL with its evidence lower bound (ELBO), estimated from randomly masked sequences. Despite being well aligned with pre-training, these approaches introduce bias through training--inference mismatch by using the ELBO as a likelihood surrogate, which can degrade performance. In this work, we propose Guided Denoiser Self-Distillation (GDSD) to directly distill the denoiser of dLLMs from an advantage-guided self-teacher, derived from the closed-form optimum of reverse-KL regularized RL. GDSD matches the dLLM's denoiser logits to the teacher's via a normalization-free objective, which reduces RL to likelihood-free self-distillation and thus bypasses the TIM biases. Recent ELBO-based methods emerge as instances of applying different distillation divergences, but with diagnosable pathologies that GDSD avoids. On planning, math, and coding benchmarks with LLaDA-8B and Dream-7B, GDSD consistently outperforms prior state-of-the-art ELBO-based methods with a more stable training reward dynamics, achieving test-accuracy improvements of up to $+19.6\%$. These results suggest that direct denoiser self-distillation, without relying on an ELBO likelihood surrogate, can provide a more stable and effective RL procedure for dLLMs. Code is available at https://github.com/GaryBall/GDSD.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GDSD方法，通过优势引导的自蒸馏直接优化去噪器，避免ELBO似然代理带来的训练-推理不匹配偏差，在LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B上规划、数学和编码任务中提升测试准确率（最高+19.6%），训练更稳定。
AI.motivation: 现有基于ELBO的RL方法虽与预训练一致，但用ELBO作为似然代理会引入训练-推理不匹配偏差（TIM），损害性能。作者旨在消除这种偏差，实现更稳定有效的RL微调。
AI.method: 从逆向KL正则化RL的闭式最优解推导出优势引导的自教师，通过无归一化目标将去噪器logits匹配到教师，将RL简化为无似然的自我蒸馏，绕过TIM偏差。
AI.result: 在LLaDA-8B和Dream-7B上，GDSD在规划、数学和编码基准中一致优于现有ELBO方法，训练奖励更稳定，测试准确率提升最高达+19.6%。
AI.conclusion: 不依赖ELBO似然代理的直接去噪器自蒸馏，能为扩散大语言模型提供更稳定有效的RL流程。

title: Think Fast, Talk Smart: Partitioning Deterministic and Neural Computation for Structured Health Text Generation
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being used to generate health text from structured records such as wearable time series, biomarkers, vitals, and care-management logs. For recurring health outputs, fluency is not enough: systems must remain faithful to source data, ground explanatory claims in available evidence, follow stated policies, emit machine-readable outputs, and run cheaply enough for repeated use. We ask which responsibilities in structured health generation should be deterministic computation rather than runtime LLM prompting.
  We introduce Think Fast, Talk Smart, a sleep-health insight pipeline in which deterministic code performs recurring analysis before one bounded LLM writer call. Across 280 user-nights and six models, achieves lower numeric error, lower instruction-compliance error, and lower end-to-end cost than structured zero-shot and few-shot one-call baselines.
  Layer replacement reveals contract-specific failures: LLM comparison raises numeric error, LLM ranking degrades policy selection, LLM attribution increases unsupported causal language, and an LLM-generated writer interface reintroduces errors even after upstream facts are deterministic. The results support a broader design rule: let code own recurring analysis, and let LLMs express verified facts within bounded interfaces.

AI.tldr: 提出“Think Fast, Talk Smart”管线：用确定性代码处理重复分析，仅将一次有界LLM调用用于文本表达。实验表明该方法比纯LLM方案错误更少、成本更低，并揭示了LLM在不同子任务中的特定失败模式。
AI.motivation: 结构化健康文本生成中，LLM存在忠实度不足、易产生无依据因果语言、成本高等问题。需要明确哪些任务适合用确定性计算而非LLM运行时提示。
AI.method: Think Fast, Talk Smart管线：确定性代码负责重复性分析（比较、排序、属性归因），仅将一次有界LLM调用用于生成最终文本。通过层替换实验分析各子任务中LLM vs 确定性的效果。
AI.result: 在280用户-夜、6个模型上，相比零样本/少样本基线，数值误差、指令遵循误差和端到端成本均更低。层替换显示：LLM比较→数值误差上升，LLM排序→策略选择退化，LLM属性归因→无依据因果语言增加，LLM生成写入接口→即使上游事实已确定性仍引入错误。
AI.conclusion: 支持更广泛的设计原则：让代码负责重复性分析，让LLM在有界接口内表达已验证的事实。

title: Training Deliberative Monitors for Black-Box Scheming Detection
summary: As autonomous agents become more capable of performing real-world tasks, distinguishing scheming behavior from benign task pursuit may become a central AI control problem. Existing monitors often rely on chain-of-thought access or internal activations, or use prompted frontier models, all of which can be unavailable, unreliable or expensive in deployment. In this work, we study action-only deliberative monitors: smaller open-weight models trained to detect scheming and sabotage from agentic trajectories without accessing the monitored agent's reasoning or model internals. Our method, inspired by deliberative alignment, uses a scheming specification to elicit structured rationales from a frontier teacher, filters them with a separate judge, and distills the highest-quality rationales into open-weight monitors with supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning. We train on five datasets, and evaluate across six out-of-distribution agentic misalignment benchmarks. We show that applying our method to Qwen3.5-27B yields higher performance than all low-cost frontier models as prompted monitors (Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite, GPT-5.4 Nano, and Claude Haiku 4.5) and than Gemini 2.5 Pro, while also achieving lower marginal inference cost (token-metered USD per 1,000 evaluations). Stronger prompted frontier monitors (Gemini 3.1 Pro, GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, and Claude Opus 4.6) achieve higher performance but at roughly $16$--$34\times$ higher marginal inference cost. Several of our trained monitors are positioned on the empirical cost--performance Pareto frontier among the monitors we evaluate, providing practical low-cost, low-FPR alternatives to prompted frontier models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种仅基于动作的审慎监控器（action-only deliberative monitors），通过从前沿教师模型中蒸馏高质量推理链到小型开放权重模型，在不访问推理过程或内部状态的情况下检测智能体的阴谋与破坏行为，在成本和性能之间取得了帕累托最优。
AI.motivation: 现有监控器依赖思维链、内部激活或前沿模型，这些在部署中可能不可用、不可靠或成本高昂。本文旨在开发一种低成本、可靠且仅基于动作轨迹的监控方法。
AI.method: 受审慎对齐启发，使用阴谋规范从前沿教师模型引出结构化推理，经独立裁判过滤后，通过监督微调与强化学习将高质量推理蒸馏到开放权重的小模型中。
AI.result: 基于Qwen3.5-27B的方法在性能上优于所有低成本前沿模型（Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite等）及Gemini 2.5 Pro，边际推理成本更低；强前沿模型性能更高但成本高出16-34倍；多个训练模型位于成本-性能帕累托前沿。
AI.conclusion: 仅动作的审慎监控器可以作为前沿模型的高性价比替代方案，在低成本和低假阳性率场景下具有实用价值。

title: Fairness Beyond Demographics: Optimizing Performance Across Appearance-Based Hidden Cohorts in Medical Imaging
comment: Pre-review version submitted to MICCAI 2026. 10 pages, 5 figures
summary: Medical image analysis models can exhibit performance disparities across patient subgroups, threatening clinical safety and fairness. Existing methods typically address this issue by optimizing accuracy and fairness metrics for visible demographic attributes (e.g., sex or age) considered in isolation. This strategy not only overlooks potentially more informative latent stratifications, which may reveal deeper sources of model error and inequity, but also fails to scale when multiple demographic attributes are considered simultaneously due to the resulting sparsity of training data within each subgroup. We deal with these issues by introducing the label-free hidden-cohort fairness (LHCF) training paradigm that instead of maximizing fairness over visible demographic attributes, it optimizes fairness across latent subpopulations discovered from image appearance. By clustering images into K appearance-based cohorts and applying fairness optimization over them, LHCF uncovers underlying sources of model error and avoids the combinatorial sparsity of multi-demographic attributes, reducing disparities across both single and multiple demographic attributes. We demonstrate on our proposed fairness benchmark, HIDFairBench, that LHCF provides state-of-the-art fairness results on single and multiple demographic attributes, despite never using demographic labels for training. Our results position hidden-cohort fairness as a practical, scalable, and robust alternative to demographic-based fairness optimization for trustworthy medical image analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出标签无关的隐藏队列公平性（LHCF）训练范式，通过对图像外观聚类发现潜在子群体并优化公平性，无需人口统计标签即可在医学图像分析中实现跨单/多属性的公平性能，优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅针对可见的人口统计属性（如性别、年龄）单独优化准确率和公平性，忽视了可能更隐蔽的模型错误和不平等来源，且处理多属性时面临训练数据稀疏问题。
AI.method: 将图像聚类为K个外观基队列，对这些潜在子群体进行公平性优化，而非直接对可见人口属性做公平性最大化。
AI.result: 在HIDFairBench基准上，LHCF在单一和多个属性上均达到最先进的公平性结果，且无需使用人口统计标签进行训练。
AI.conclusion: 隐藏队列公平性是人口统计公平优化的一种实用、可扩展且稳健的替代方案，适用于可信的医学图像分析。

title: Rethinking Post-Training Recipes for Multimodal Time-Series Forecasting
summary: Time-Series Foundation Models (TSFMs) excel at zero-shot unimodal forecasting using numerical data, but unlike LLMs they cannot consume multimodal, non-numerical context that often shape real-world trajectories. In this work, we bridge this gap and argue for a multimodal time-series forecasting approach that post-trains LLMs to act as context-guided revisors over strong numerical TSFM priors. We introduce PostTime, a post-training recipe combining Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR), along with a methodology to generate automated reasoning traces for forecast revisions. PostTime teaches an LLM to generate context-conditioned forecast interventions -- decisions to revise, preserve, or ignore the TSFM prior based on the multimodal context. We evaluate this approach on the TimesX multimodal forecasting benchmark using a Gemma-3-4B LLM and TimesFM-2.5 TSFM, and show that it significantly outperforms standalone TSFMs, LLM-only baselines, and existing multimodal forecasting approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PostTime方法，通过后训练LLM使其能够利用多模态非数值上下文信息，对强大的时间序列基础模型（TSFM）的零样本预测进行智能修正，显著提升了多模态时间序列预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有TSFM虽在零样本单模态数值预测上表现优异，但无法像LLM一样消费多模态、非数值的上下文信息（如文本、图像等），而这些信息往往影响着真实世界的时间序列轨迹，导致预测缺乏对复杂现实情境的理解能力。
AI.method: 提出PostTime后训练方法，结合监督微调（SFT）和带可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR），并设计了自动化推理轨迹生成方法。训练LLM基于多模态上下文做出三种预测干预决策：修正、保持或忽略TSFM的先验预测。
AI.result: 在TimesX多模态预测基准上，使用Gemma-3-4B LLM和TimesFM-2.5 TSFM进行评估，PostTime显著优于单独的TSFM、仅用LLM的基线以及现有的多模态预测方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过后训练LLM作为上下文引导的修正器，可以有效弥合TSFM与LLM之间的鸿沟，实现多模态时间序列预测的性能突破。

title: PTCG-Bench: Can LLM Agents Master Pokémon Trading Card Game?
summary: Given a strategically complex board game, human players can quickly learn to devise strategies after playing a few rounds. Autonomous agents require similar capabilities in realistic interactive environments, yet existing agent benchmarks often fail to fully capture such strategic and evolving decision-making scenarios. We present PTCG-Bench, a benchmark built on the Pok'{e}mon Trading Card Game (PTCG) that evaluates LLM agents at two complementary levels: (1) their decision-making performance within a single complex environment, and (2) their ability to self-evolving through accumulated experience. We further include a modular harness ablation to better interpret agent performance without conflating it with model capability. Our experiments show that, although LLM agents can achieve non-trivial gameplay performance, sustained and stable self-evolution remains challenging, and performance is sensitive to harness design. We hope that PTCG-Bench will facilitate future research on harness-aware and self-evolving agents in realistic interactive environments.

AI.tldr: 提出PTCG-Bench基准，基于宝可梦卡牌游戏评估LLM代理在复杂环境中的决策能力和自我进化能力，发现虽然能取得一定游戏表现，但持续稳定的自我进化仍具挑战性，且表现对框架设计敏感。
AI.motivation: 人类玩家能快速从少量对局中学习策略，但现有代理基准缺乏对策略性和进化性决策场景的充分捕捉，需要更合适的评估框架。
AI.method: 基于宝可梦卡牌游戏构建PTCG-Bench基准，在单环境决策和跨经验自我进化两个层面评估LLM代理，并引入模块化框架消融实验以解耦代理性能与模型能力。
AI.result: LLM代理能实现非平凡的游戏表现，但持续稳定的自我进化仍然困难，且性能对框架设计敏感。
AI.conclusion: PTCG-Bench有望推动未来在真实交互环境中对框架感知和自我进化代理的研究。

title: DLM-SWAI: Steering Diffusion Language Models Before They Unmask
summary: Steering language model generation toward desired textual properties is essential for practical deployment, and inference-time methods are particularly appealing because they enable controllable generation without retraining. Recent work has also highlighted diffusion language models as an emerging generation paradigm with distinct decoding properties. However, most existing steering approaches either rely on auxiliary models or are designed for autoregressive next-token decoding, making them difficult to apply to diffusion language models DLMs, which generate text through iterative denoising of partially masked sequences. Therefore, we propose DLM-SWAI, a simple training-free steering method that biases the token distribution at each denoising step using pre-computed token-level style scores. Experiments on style and safety control tasks show that DLM-SWAI effectively steers diffusion language models while preserving generation quality and requiring minimal computational overhead. Ablations further reveal a controllable trade-off between steering strength and fluency, and our analysis links class-wise steerability to the strength of token-level attribute cues.

AI.tldr: 提出DLM-SWAI，一种无需训练的扩散语言模型控制方法，通过在每个去噪步骤中偏置token分布来实现风格和安全性控制，计算开销小且保持生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有的文本生成控制方法大多依赖辅助模型或专为自回归模型设计，难以直接应用于扩散语言模型（DLMs），而DLMs作为一种新兴的生成范式具有独特的解码特性，因此需要一种适配DLMs的简单有效的控制方法。
AI.method: 提出DLM-SWAI方法，利用预计算的token级风格分数，在每个去噪步骤中对token分布进行偏置（bias），无需额外训练或辅助模型。
AI.result: 在风格控制和安全性控制任务上，DLM-SWAI能够有效引导扩散语言模型生成符合要求的文本，同时保持生成质量，计算开销极小。消融实验显示控制强度与流畅度之间存在可调节的权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种简单有效的训练-free方法来实现扩散语言模型的可控生成，建立了token级属性线索与类别级可控性之间的联系，为DLM的实际部署提供了实用方案。

title: Parameter-Efficient Subspace Decoupling ViT for Mitigating Multi-Task Negative Transfer in Histological Scoring
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, 2 tables. Accepted by IEEE ICME 2026. Camera-ready version
summary: Histological scoring is essential for diagnosing Non-Alcoholic Fatty Liver Disease (NAFLD), yet its automation remains challenging due to the high annotation cost and negative transfer among the strongly correlated NAFLD Activity Score (NAS) indicators in multi-task learning. To address this issue, we propose a subspace-decoupled multi-task Vision Transformer (ViT) that integrates lightweight task-specific Adapters with orthogonality-based constraints. This design constructs independent feature subspaces for steatosis, ballooning, and inflammation, effectively reducing task interference while retaining shared representations. We further construct a curated multi-task mouse NAFLD histology dataset with expert annotations for all NAS components. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method improves multi-task stability and generalization with substantially reduced computational cost compared to training separate single-task models. The code and the curated dataset have been prepared and will be made publicly available upon acceptance to support reproducibility.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种子空间解耦的多任务ViT，通过轻量级任务适配器和正交约束，有效解决NAFLD组织学评分中多任务学习的负迁移问题，在降低计算成本的同时提升了多任务稳定性和泛化能力。
AI.motivation: NAFLD组织学评分对诊断至关重要，但其自动化面临两大挑战：高标注成本，以及NAS各指标间强相关性导致的多任务学习负迁移问题。
AI.method: 提出子空间解耦的多任务Vision Transformer，为脂肪变性、气球样变和炎症分别设计轻量级任务特定Adapter，并施加正交性约束，构建独立的特征子空间以减少任务干扰，同时保留共享表示。
AI.result: 在构建的带专家标注的多任务小鼠NAFLD数据集上，该方法相比单独训练的单任务模型，显著降低了计算成本，同时提升了多任务学习的稳定性和泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 子空间解耦策略能有效缓解NAS多任务学习中的负迁移问题，代码和数据集将公开以促进可重复性研究。

title: Information-Directed Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
summary: Decision-making from offline datasets typically warm-starts a policy or score model from fixed offline data and then refines it with limited online interaction. Offline data reduces uncertainty, but it does not remove the need for exploration; it changes what remains to be explored. We formalise this residual uncertainty by the conditional mutual information $I(χ;τ_{1:T}\mid\mathcal{D}_N)$ between a learning target $χ$ and the online trajectories after conditioning on the offline dataset. This view leads naturally to information-directed sampling (IDS), a family parameterised by $η\ge 0$ that selects actions by trading off instantaneous regret against information gain. We prove a generic offline-to-online Bayesian regret bound for IDS through a ratio certificate: any information-ratio bound satisfied by a reference Thompson-sampling policy over the same randomised policy class is inherited by IDS. In a known-dynamics Bayesian linear-reward model, the conditional mutual information has a log-determinant form, and vanilla IDS ($η=0$) satisfies $\widetilde O\!\left(Hd\min\left\{\sqrt T,\,T\sqrt{C^\dagger_{β,\mathrm{IDS}_0}(N,T)/N}\right\}\right),$ where the coverage coefficient is tied to the visitation distribution induced by vanilla IDS itself. We also identify a warm-start regime with a dominated but informative probe in which vanilla IDS selects the probe while Thompson sampling never does, giving a constant-factor Bayesian regret separation. Controlled bandit experiments and D4RL offline-to-online RL experiments validate this mechanism: IDS is most beneficial when offline data is informative but leaves biased or low-probability residual uncertainty that targeted online actions can resolve, a regime shared by offline RL, offline black-box optimization, and Bayesian optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用条件互信息形式化离线到在线学习中的残差不确定性，并推导了信息导向采样（IDS）的贝叶斯遗憾界，证明其在特定场景下优于Thompson采样。
AI.motivation: 离线数据集虽能降低不确定性，但并未完全消除探索需求。现有方法未能形式化"离线数据后还剩哪些不确定性需要在线探索"这一核心问题，本文通过条件互信息对此进行理论刻画。
AI.method: 1) 用条件互信息 I(χ;τ|D_N) 形式化残差不确定性；2) 提出参数化信息导向采样（IDS）族，在瞬时遗憾和信息增益间做权衡；3) 通过"比率证明"（ratio certificate）建立IDS的贝叶斯遗憾界；4) 在贝叶斯线性奖励模型下给出log-行列式形式的显式界。
AI.result: 1) IDS的贝叶斯遗憾上界为 Õ(Hd min{√T, T√(C†/N)})；2) 发现了"预热-探测"场景，IDS会选择探测动作而Thompson采样不会，导致常数因子的贝叶斯遗憾分离；3) 在bandit和D4RL离线RL实验中验证了IDS在"信息丰富但存在有偏残差不确定性"时的优势。
AI.conclusion: IDS在离线数据提供了信息但仍存在有偏或低概率残差不确定性的场景下最有效，这一机制普遍存在于离线强化学习、离线黑箱优化和贝叶斯优化中。

title: TRACE: Toulmin-based Reasoning Assessment through Constructive Elements for LLM CoT Evaluation
summary: Evaluating open-ended outputs from large language models (LLMs) remains challenging due to the absence of ground truth. Existing metrics rely on final-answer accuracy or surface-level statistics, leaving the reasoning process itself unexamined. We introduce TRACE (Toulmin-based Reasoning Assessment through Constructive Elements), a metric that analyzes Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning processes. Rather than judging outcomes, TRACE inspects how arguments are constructed by integrating Toulmin's argumentation theory with Flavell's metacognitive framework to assess reasoning structure. Experiments on 26.3K QA samples across 7 reasoning models show strong correlation with benchmark accuracy (r=0.74). Furthermore, TRACE is effective as a reinforcement learning reward signal, outperforming accuracy-only baselines. Together, these results indicate that logically sound reasoning leads to higher-quality answers. TRACE thus serves as a complementary metric for evaluating open-ended outputs. Code is available at https://github.com/hyyangkisti/trace.

AI.tldr: TRACE是一个基于Toulmin论辩理论与Flavell元认知框架的评估指标，用于分析大语言模型思维链推理过程的结构质量，在26.3K样本上与基准准确率高度相关(r=0.74)，并可作为有效的强化学习奖励信号。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM评估指标仅关注最终答案准确性或表面统计信息，无法检验推理过程本身的质量。
AI.method: 将Toulmin论辩理论（论证结构要素）与Flavell元认知框架（认知监控）结合，设计出分析CoT推理结构的评估指标TRACE。
AI.result: 在7个推理模型的26.3K问答样本上，TRACE与基准准确率的相关系数达0.74；作为强化学习奖励信号时，效果优于仅基于准确率的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 逻辑上合理的推理能够带来更高质量的答案，TRACE可作为评估开放生成输出的补充性指标。

title: Entity-Collision: A Stratified Protocol for Attributing Retrieval Lift in Agent Memory
comment: 48 pages with appendix; 6-page body, mandatory Limitations, References, and 7 appendices. Code, benchmarks, and 37 reproduce scripts: https://github.com/youwangd/engram (see paper/REPRODUCIBILITY.md). Apache 2.0
summary: End-to-end agent-memory benchmarks report a single hit@k per retriever, confounding lexical leakage (uncontrolled query/gold/distractor entity overlap) with tag-mixing (preferences, services, tools averaged together). We propose entity-collision, a system-agnostic protocol that pins the BM25 floor by construction -- every distractor shares the answer's entity tokens -- and stratifies queries by discriminator tag, so any lift over BM25 is attributable to the embedder. Applied to an open-source agent-memory testbed across 5 tags x 3 embedders x 5 collision degrees with paired-bootstrap 95% CIs, the protocol reveals a two-axis pattern: a 256-d hash trigram helps only on closed-vocabulary lexical tags at deep collision; MiniLM-384 dominates both axes; and a 2.7x-parameter BGE-large does not uniformly improve on MiniLM -- it wins on intent-style queries but loses on lexical ones. Encoder capacity alone is not the binding constraint. The synthetic intent-tag null replicates on LongMemEval (n=500) as a single-session-preference recall cliff. Adaptive vector-weight routing on LoCoMo is a measured null: 11.7pp of oracle headroom exists, but no signal we tested recovers it. All 26 result tables and 37 reproduce scripts are version-controlled and verified by a public registry; the protocol is exercised on a deterministically governed memory testbed (event-sourced decision log, DAG-state-machine schema lifecycle) so every reported CI is reproducible byte-for-byte from the ingest stream.

AI.tldr: 提出entity-collision协议，通过控制实体重叠和查询标签分层，分离BM25基线效应与嵌入器真实贡献，揭示检索器性能受查询类型和碰撞程度双轴影响，编码器容量并非主要瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端记忆基准将词汇泄露（实体重叠）与标签混合（不同类型查询混杂）混淆，无法归因检索器真实性能提升来源。
AI.method: 提出entity-collision协议：1）构造性固定BM25下限（每个干扰项共享答案实体token）；2）按判别标签分层查询。在开源代理记忆测试平台跨5个标签×3个嵌入器×5个碰撞程度进行评估，辅以配对bootstrap 95%置信区间。
AI.result: 1）256-d哈希三元组仅在闭词汇词汇标签且深度碰撞下有效；2）MiniLM-384在两个轴上均占优；3）BGE-large（2.7倍参数）并非全面优于MiniLM——在意图类查询上胜出，在词汇类查询上反而落后。4）在LongMemEval和LoCoMo上的复现验证均为null结果。
AI.conclusion: 编码器容量并非检索性能的绑定约束；现有记忆基准存在系统性混淆，需通过协议化设计分离真实归因；所有结果和脚本均已版本控制并公开可复现。

title: Building and Road Recognition in Dense Urban Informal Settlements: A Dataset and Benchmark
summary: As a widespread form of informal settlements, urban villages present significant challenges for sustainable urban development and governance. Precise mapping of their infrastructure is essential, however, existing remote sensing datasets primarily focus on formal urban environments, lacking fine-grained annotated data for the high-density building patterns and narrow road networks typical of urban villages. To address this gap, we introduce the \textit{DenseUIS} dataset, the first high-resolution remote sensing dataset specifically designed for building and road extraction in extremely dense urban informal settlements, covering 126 urban villages across Shenzhen and Guangzhou in China. Furthermore, we conduct a comprehensive evaluation of state-of-the-art deep learning models on this dataset. Experimental results reveal the limitations of existing methods in handling the unique morphological patterns of dense informal settlements, underscoring the need for specialized approaches. \textit{DenseUIS} therefore provides a robust benchmark for advancing fine-grained urban mapping in complex and high-density informal environments. The dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/rui-research/DenseUIS.

AI.tldr: 提出首个专用于城中村超高密度建筑与道路提取的高分辨率遥感数据集DenseUIS，覆盖深圳、广州126个城中村，评估现有深度学习模型揭示其局限性，为密集非正规住区精细制图提供基准。
AI.motivation: 城中村作为非正规住区对可持续城市治理构成重大挑战，但现有遥感数据集缺乏针对其高密度建筑和窄路网的细粒度标注数据，亟需专门的基准数据集推动研究。
AI.method: 构建DenseUIS数据集（覆盖126个城中村的高分辨率遥感影像及精细标注），并利用多种SOTA深度学习模型进行建筑和道路提取任务的全面评估。
AI.result: 现有SOTA模型在处理密集非正规住区的独特形态模式时表现有限，存在显著性能瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: DenseUIS为高密度非正规环境下的精细城市制图提供了强有力的基准，揭示了开发专用方法的必要性。

title: The Good, the Bad, and the Ugly of Markov Boundary for Tabular Prediction
summary: Under standard graphical assumptions, the Markov boundary of a target variable is the smallest set of features that renders every other feature redundant. Once the boundary is observed, the target is conditionally independent of the rest of the table. This is a tempting object for tabular prediction, since it names exactly the columns a model should need. Yet modern regressors are still trained on the full feature set. We ask whether the Markov boundary is genuinely useful for prediction on SCM3K, a 3,450-task synthetic SCM benchmark with feature counts from 40 to 1000 and six SCM families, evaluated with six regressors. The answer is more nuanced than the theory suggests. Restricting a regressor to the oracle boundary often improves prediction substantially, and the improvement grows as the feature space becomes larger and sparser. But the natural pipeline of recovering the boundary with causal discovery and training on the recovered mask does not deliver. Existing estimators exhaust the compute budget before reaching the regime where the boundary helps most, and even where they run they rarely beat the full feature set. We trace this to three causes. Discovery optimizes structural recovery rather than prediction. False negatives and false positives carry sharply asymmetric predictive cost. The exact boundary is only one of many feature sets that beat all features. We then develop what these facts imply for prediction-aligned feature selection and for tabular models that learn to use causal structure.

AI.tldr: 本文在SCM3K基准上实证发现，马尔可夫边界（Markov Boundary）在理论上能精简预测特征，实际中若已知真实边界可大幅提升预测性能，但通过因果发现算法恢复的边界效果不佳，原因包括因果发现优化目标与预测不一致、误分类的不对称代价、以及存在多个优于全特征的特征集。
AI.motivation: 探究马尔可夫边界在表格预测中是否真的有用，因为理论上它是最小充分特征集，但实际中回归器仍在使用全特征集。
AI.method: 在SCM3K基准（含3450个合成SCM任务，特征数40-1000，6种SCM族）上，使用6种回归器，对比在真实马尔可夫边界、因果发现恢复的边界和全特征集上的预测性能。
AI.result: 使用真实马尔可夫边界能显著提升预测性能，且特征空间越大越稀疏时提升越明显；但通过现有因果发现方法恢复的边界效果不佳，计算资源耗尽前难以达到边界最有效的区域，且很少能超越全特征集。
AI.conclusion: 因果发现优化目标（结构恢复）与预测目标不一致，需要开发预测对齐的特征选择方法和能利用因果结构的表格模型。

title: GRASP: Gated Regression-Aware Skill Proposer for Self-Improving LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents acting in structured environments fail in operational rather than conversational ways, and reliability depends on procedural knowledge of the environment.
