Prior self-improvement methods accumulate natural-language guidance without checking that each new item preserves previously correct behavior, so a note that fixes one trajectory can silently regress another. We introduce GRASP (Gated Regression-Aware Skill Proposer), which treats agent improvement as a sequence of edits to a bounded skill library, admitting each candidate only if it produces a net improvement on a balanced held-out probe under a hard regression budget. We evaluate GRASP across five base models (gpt-oss-120b, DeepSeek V4 Flash, Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite, GPT-4.1, GPT-5.4) on two FHIR-based clinical benchmarks. On MedAgentBench, GRASP lifts gpt-oss-120b from 40.6% to 88.8%, exceeds the strongest of five self-improvement baselines by 21.0 points, and improves every other base model by 17.2 to 40.3 points. Ablations attribute the gain to comparative proposal generation, the acceptance gate, and the hard regression budget rather than to skill writing itself, which without validation is no better than using no skills. The mechanism generalizes beyond the clinical domain, improving agents on three of four non-clinical environments and remaining flat only where the action space is open-ended. Frozen libraries transfer across models, where skills from a stronger model improve weaker executors beyond what they learn for themselves while the reverse does not, an asymmetry that no ungated baseline reproduces.

AI.tldr: GRASP是一种基于硬回归预算门控机制的技能库编辑方法，通过逐项验证候选技能是否带来净改进来提升LLM agent在结构化环境中的可靠性，在MedAgentBench上表现显著优于多种基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM agent在结构化环境中经常因操作错误而失败，而此前自改进方法在累积自然语言指导时，无法保证新修复不破坏已有正确行为，存在"修复一个、退步一个"的沉默回归问题。
AI.method: GRASP将agent改进建模为对有限技能库的序列编辑，通过三项核心设计实现：(1) 比较性提议生成，(2) 接受门控（仅当候选技能在平衡保留探针集上产生净改进时才接受），(3) 硬回归预算（禁止任何已有正确行为的退化）。
AI.result: 在MedAgentBench上，GRASP将gpt-oss-120b从40.6%提升至88.8%，领先最强基线21.0个百分点；所有五种基础模型均提升17.2~40.3个百分点。消融实验表明增益来自三项核心设计而非技能编写本身。技能库可在模型间迁移，强模型技能可提升弱模型表现，反之不成立。
AI.conclusion: GRASP证明了带硬回归约束的门控机制是提升结构化环境中LLM agent可靠性的有效途径，技能库可跨模型迁移且存在非对称性，验证了方法的泛化能力。

title: Predicting Causal Effects from Natural Language Queries using Structured Representations
summary: Randomized controlled trials are a cornerstone of medicine and the social sciences as they enable reliable estimates of causal effects. However, they are costly and time-consuming to conduct, motivating interest in predicting causal effects from existing experimental evidence. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on knowledge-intensive tasks, raising the question of whether these models can be used for forecasting causal effect sizes. To investigate this, we introduce Query2Effect, a new large-scale benchmark consisting of more than 72,000 natural language questions aligned with experiment descriptions, created to simulate realistic information-seeking scenarios by varying query specificity along dimensions of implicitness, abstraction, and ambiguity. We then propose a two-step framework that first generates a synthetic structured representation of a query before predicting effect size using a supervised encoder model. Experiments show that finetuning plays a crucial role in improving prediction performance, with absolute error reducing by -27% up to -71% compared to prompted out-of-the-box LLMs, and that our two-step framework is beneficial for out-of-domain generalization, highlighting the benefits of separating semantic interpretation from numerical effect estimation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Query2Effect基准（72,000+问题）和两步框架（先结构化表示再预测效应量），发现微调可将绝对误差降低27%-71%，两步法有助于跨领域泛化。
AI.motivation: 随机对照试验成本高昂且耗时，促使研究者希望从已有实验证据中预测因果效应量。探索大语言模型是否可用于预测因果效应大小。
AI.method: 构建Query2Effect基准（72,000+自然语言问题），提出两步框架：先生成查询的结构化表示，再用监督编码模型预测效应量。
AI.result: 微调显著提升性能，绝对误差降低27%-71%；两步框架有助于跨领域泛化。
AI.conclusion: 分离语义解释与数值效应估计是有益的，微调对于因果效应预测至关重要。

title: Masked Diffusion Vision-Language Models for Temporal Action Localization
summary:
Temporal action localization (TAL) requires recognizing the target event and localizing its start and end times precisely in untrimmed videos. Recent vision-language formulations improve semantic reasoning and support language-conditioned outputs, but their autoregressive decoders still generate tokens from left to right, preventing later semantic evidence from revising earlier timestamp predictions.
  We adapt masked diffusion vision-language models (MDVLMs) to TAL so that semantic tokens and boundary tokens remain editable throughout iterative denoising with bidirectional attention, allowing temporal boundaries and semantic content to be refined jointly.
  Direct adaptation, however, creates two TAL-specific mismatches: standard masked diffusion training corrupts all positions uniformly at random, but the time tokens are more reliable when enough semantic context is available; and token-level cross-entropy does not reflect temporal IoU. To address these mismatches, we introduce a Planned Training Objective that uses boundary-aware masking and step-weighted reconstruction to rehearse the late recovery of time tokens, together with a Step-Level IoU Reward that provides overlap-aware supervision during denoising. A standard sequence-level cross-entropy term provides the base reconstruction signal.
  Experiments on ActivityNet-RTL, ActivityNet-1.3, and THUMOS-14 show that MDVLM-TAL improves both temporal reasoning and boundary localization over autoregressive vision-language baselines, with especially strong gains under stricter temporal IoU criteria.

AI.tldr: 本文提出MDVLM-TAL，将掩码扩散视觉语言模型适配到时序动作定位任务，通过双向注意力迭代去噪实现语义与边界联合优化，并引入边界感知掩码训练和步级IoU奖励来解决直接适配中的不匹配问题，在多个基准上超越自回归基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有自回归视觉语言模型用于时序动作定位时，从左到右的生成方式导致后续语义证据无法修正早期时间戳预测，存在不可逆误差累积问题。
AI.method: 1) 将掩码扩散视觉语言模型(MDVLMs)适配到TAL，使语义和边界token在双向注意力迭代去噪中可编辑；2) 提出Planned Training Objective，包含边界感知掩码和步级加权重构；3) 提出Step-Level IoU Reward，在去噪过程中提供重叠感知的监督信号。
AI.result: 在ActivityNet-RTL、ActivityNet-1.3和THUMOS-14上，MDVLM-TAL在时序推理和边界定位方面均超越自回归视觉语言基线，在更严格的IoU指标下优势尤为明显。
AI.conclusion: 双向注意力的掩码扩散范式能够有效解决自回归模型中时序预测不可修正的问题，边界感知训练和IoU奖励进一步弥合了扩散模型与TAL任务之间的差距。

title: How Much Is a Dataset Worth? Scaling Laws, the Vendi Score, and Matrix Spectral Functions
summary: Neural scaling laws appraise data through dataset size, while the Vendi Score uses quantum entropy to measure dataset value. We show both that common neural-scaling-law objectives and the Vendi Score are submodular. We further show that the Vendi Score is a special case of a broader class of submodular objectives that we call matrix spectral functions. This also includes determinantal (DPP) objectives, as well as many others. We also introduce weakly matrix monotone functions and show how they lead to weakly submodular matrix spectral functions, yielding a broad family of practical objectives for data appraisal. We develop secular-equation-based updates that avoid repeated eigendecompositions during greedy optimization, reducing marginal-gain evaluation for $m$-dimensional embeddings by an $O(m)$ factor relative to oracle queries. This yields an average empirical speedup of about 35,000x, making direct optimization of the Vendi Score feasible on ImageNet-1K-scale datasets. Thus enabled, we compare how well several objectives predict the value of training subsets for held-out test performance under fixed-size, class-balanced, and fixed training-budget regimes, including the Vendi Score, DPPs, facility location, and three new matrix spectral variants. Across multiple datasets, facility location performs the best. Direct optimization also reveals that, while the Vendi Score is predictive over moderate score ranges, pushing the objective to higher values can make it a poor downstream performance proxy. We also find that uniformly at random fixed-size subsets, both unconstrained and class-balanced, are remarkably concentrated in both appraisal scores and held-out performance. Finally, we show that size, class balance, and training budget do not alone determine data value: even when controlling for these factors, performance ranges smoothly from good to bad.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了神经缩放定律目标和Vendi Score均具有子模性，证明Vendi Score是一类更广泛的子模目标（矩阵谱函数）的特例。通过开发基于特征方程的高效更新方法，实现了对Vendi Score的实用优化（在ImageNet-1K规模上加速约35,000倍）。实验发现设施选址（Facility Location）是预测数据价值的最佳目标，而Vendi Score在过高值时反而会成为下游性能的差代理。
AI.motivation: 现有方法分别通过数据集大小（神经缩放定律）和量子熵（Vendi Score）评估数据价值，但缺乏对这些目标数学性质的统一理解，也缺少可扩展的优化算法来实际应用。
AI.method: 1) 证明神经缩放定律目标和Vendi Score都是子模函数。2) 将Vendi Score推广到矩阵谱函数这一更广泛的子模目标类别（包含DPP、设施选址等）。3) 引入弱矩阵单调函数概念，产生弱子模矩阵谱函数。4) 开发基于特征方程的增量更新方法，避免重复特征分解。5) 在ImageNet-1K规模上进行多目标对比实验。
AI.result: 1) 方法实现约35,000倍加速。2) 设施选址在多个数据集上表现最佳。3) Vendi Score在中等范围内有预测力，但过度优化会使其成为差代理。4) 随机固定大小子集在评分和性能上高度集中。5) 控制大小、类别平衡和训练预算后，性能仍有从好到差的平滑变化。
AI.conclusion: 数据价值不能仅由大小、类别平衡和训练预算决定，即使控制这些因素，性能仍有显著差异。设施选址是预测数据价值的最优目标。

title: Notation Matters: A Benchmark Study of Token-Optimized Formats in Agentic AI Systems
summary: Large language models in Agentic AI systems consume tool schemas and execution results and emit tool invocations as structured data. The default language for that exchange, JSON, was designed for application-to-application interchange rather than token efficiency, so its structural elements impose substantial token overhead. Recent work proposes token-optimized alternatives such as TOON (Token-Oriented Object Notation) and TRON (Token Reduced Object Notation) as more compact replacements, but these formats have been evaluated only on isolated comprehension or generation tasks. Whether their token reductions hold inside end-to-end agentic loops therefore remains an open question. We evaluate TOON and TRON on four agentic benchmarks (BFCL, MCPToolBenchPP, MCP-Universe, StableToolBench) and five open-weight LLMs, decoupling input compression from output compression to measure comprehension and generation independently. TRON reduces tokens by up to 27% with accuracy within 14pp of the JSON baseline. TOON achieves up to 18% reduction at a similar 9pp accuracy cost, but additionally cascades on multi-turn parsing failures and collapses parallel tool-call output for most models.

AI.tldr: 本文评估了两种JSON替代格式（TOON和TRON）在端到端Agent AI系统中的token效率与实际表现，发现TRON可减少27% token且准确率接近JSON基线，而TOON虽能减少18% token但存在多轮解析失败和并行工具调用崩溃问题。
AI.motivation: JSON在Agent AI系统中作为工具调用格式存在大量结构化token开销，作者希望验证TOON和TRON等压缩格式在真实端到端Agent循环中是否仍能保持token缩减效果和任务性能。
AI.method: 在四个Agent基准（BFCL、MCPToolBenchPP、MCP-Universe、StableToolBench）和五个开源LLM上分别评估输入压缩和输出压缩对TOON和TRON的影响，解耦理解与生成任务。
AI.result: TRON最多减少27% token，准确率下降在14个百分点以内；TOON最多减少18% token，准确率下降约9个百分点，但在多轮交互中发生解析错误累积，且对多数模型无法正确处理并行工具调用输出。
AI.conclusion: TOON和TRON在Agent场景中能有效降低token开销，但TOON存在多轮稳定性和并行输出能力不足的问题，不适合实际部署；TRON是更可靠的替代方案。

title: Evaluating Cross-lingual Knowledge Consistency in Code-Mixed vis-a-vis Indian Languages using IndicKLAR
summary: Large language models recall knowledge reliably in English but often fail on the same query posed in a lower-resourced language -- a crosslingual consistency gap that remains underexplored for Indian languages and their code-mixed counterparts. To study this gap, we introduce IndiKLAR, an Indic extension of the KLAR-CLC benchmark covering 18 of the 22 scheduled Indian languages and pairing them with code-mixed variants for 11 widely used language pairs, with native-speaker verification of both monolingual and code-mixed variants for these 11 settings. This three-way alignment offers a unique opportunity to examine how knowledge recall consistency varies across the spectrum of English, code-mixed, and native Indian language inputs. Evaluating across nine open-weight models, we find that the native-language accuracy gap to English can reach $\sim$0.50, while code-mixed inputs close most of it -- bringing performance within $\sim$0.05 of English without any model-level intervention. Motivated by this, we evaluate several prompting strategies that vary in how language conversion is exposed, including a two-stage translate-then-answer setup, a one-stage joint translation-and-answer prompt, and Translate-in-Thought (TinT) -- a single-step strategy in which the model converts the input internally and emits only the final answer. Across the performance trajectory native $\rightarrow$ code-mixed $\rightarrow$ English, we identify a consistent flip point -- the boundary between incorrect and correct prediction -- that lies between the native and code-mixed settings. Interestingly, this holds whether the trajectory is induced by the input surface form or by the model's internal conversion process.

AI.tldr: 论文提出IndiKLAR基准，涵盖18种印度语言及11种代码混合变体，发现大语言模型在印度本土语言上的知识召回准确率比英语低约0.50，而代码混合输入可将差距缩小至约0.05；研究还发现从本土语言→代码混合→英语的性能轨迹中存在一致的"翻转点"。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在英语上可靠地召回知识，但在低资源语言（尤其是印度语言及其代码混合变体）上表现不佳，这种跨语言一致性差距尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 构建IndiKLAR基准（覆盖18种印度语言、11种代码混合变体，经母语者验证）；在9个开源模型上评估；对比多种提示策略（两阶段翻译-回答、单阶段联合翻译-回答、Translate-in-Thought）。
AI.result: 本土语言准确率比英语低约0.50；代码混合输入可将差距缩小至约0.05；在性能轨迹中发现一致的"翻转点"（从错误到正确的边界）。
AI.conclusion: 代码混合输入无需模型干预即可显著缩小跨语言一致性差距；翻转点的存在表明模型内部表征中存在语言相关的知识访问阈值。

title: DGSG-Mind: Dynamic 3D Gaussian Scene Graphs for Long-Term Scene Understanding and Grounding
summary: Integrating open-vocabulary semantic information into dynamic 3D scene representations is essential for long-term embodied scene understanding. However, existing methods often suffer from fragile instance association due to incomplete cross-view cues, while their limited ability to handle object-level topological changes restricts long-term robotic task execution. Moreover, current 3D scene understanding methods either rely on simple feature matching without explicit spatial reasoning or assume offline ground-truth 3D geometry. To address these challenges, we present DGSG-Mind, a hybrid instance-aware 3D Gaussian dynamic scene graph system with an embodied reasoning agent. Our system couples a probabilistic voxel grid with explicit 3D Gaussians to enable robust cross-modal instance fusion and incremental semantic mapping. It handles dynamic changes through Gaussian-based visual relocalization and localized masked refinement guided by geometric-semantic consistency. Built on the instance Gaussian map, DGSG-Mind further constructs a hierarchical scene graph and develops the 3D Gaussian Mind, which integrates structural relations, spatial-semantic information, and visually annotated RoI Gaussian renderings for multimodal reasoning. Extensive experiments show that DGSG-Mind achieves the best zero-shot 3DVG performance among methods operating on self-reconstructed maps, while also delivering strong performance in 3D open-vocabulary semantic segmentation and scene reconstruction. We further deploy DGSG-Mind on real-world robots to demonstrate its target-oriented reasoning and dynamic update capabilities. The project page of DGSG-Mind is available at https://icr-lab.github.io/DGSG-Mind

AI.tldr: DGSG-Mind 提出了一种混合实例感知的3D高斯动态场景图系统，结合概率体素网格与显式3D高斯，实现跨模态实例融合、增量语义建图、视觉重定位和分层场景图构建，并在零样本3D视觉定位、语义分割和真实机器人部署中取得优异性能。
AI.motivation: 现有动态3D场景表示方法存在跨视角实例关联脆弱、无法处理对象级拓扑变化、缺乏显式空间推理能力等问题，限制了长期具身场景理解与机器人任务执行。
AI.method: 1) 将概率体素网格与显式3D高斯耦合，实现鲁棒的跨模态实例融合与增量语义建图；2) 通过高斯视觉重定位和几何-语义一致性引导的局部遮罩精炼处理动态变化；3) 构建分层场景图，并开发3D Gaussian Mind集成结构关系、空间-语义信息和RoI高斯渲染，实现多模态推理。
AI.result: 在自重建地图上的零样本3DVG任务取得最佳性能，同时在3D开放词汇语义分割与场景重建中表现强劲，并在真实机器人上验证了目标导向推理与动态更新能力。
AI.conclusion: DGSG-Mind通过混合实例感知的3D高斯场景图系统，有效解决了动态场景中的实例关联与拓扑变化问题，为长期具身场景理解提供了新范式。

title: Forget Less, Generalize More: Unifying Temporal and Structural Adaptation for Dynamic Graphs
summary: Representation learning on dynamic graphs requires capturing complex dependencies that evolve across both time and structure. Existing approaches typically adopt fixed temporal decay schemes or predetermined structural propagation depths, limiting their ability to generalize across graphs with diverse interaction frequencies and topological characteristics. We propose Dual-Scale Retentive Dynamics (DSRD), a unified framework that maintains a retentive representation state encoding both temporal memory and structural context. DSRD introduces two key components: (i) a retentive state with dual-scale adaptation that jointly models temporal dynamics and structural propagation within a single recurrent formulation, and (ii) adaptive decay kernels with learnable time-sensitivity parameters that automatically balance short-term responsiveness and long-term retention based on the underlying interaction patterns. We provide theoretical analysis establishing the equivalence between event-wise parallel aggregation and efficient recurrent state updates, as well as stability and boundedness guarantees for the learned dynamics. Extensive experiments on 14 real-world benchmarks demonstrate that DSRD consistently achieves state-of-the-art performance on both link prediction and node classification tasks, with strong generalization across transductive and inductive settings.

AI.tldr: 提出DSRD框架，通过双尺度自适应保持状态和可学习衰减核，统一建模动态图中的时间动态与结构传播，在14个基准上实现SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有动态图表示学习方法采用固定时间衰减方案或预定结构传播深度，难以泛化到具有不同交互频率和拓扑特征的图，亟需一种能自适应捕获时间与结构双重依赖的统一框架。
AI.method: 提出DSRD框架：(1) 双尺度自适应保持状态，在单一循环公式中联合建模时间动态与结构传播；(2) 可学习衰减核，通过时间敏感参数自动平衡短期响应与长期保持。提供事件级并行聚合与循环更新等价性的理论证明及稳定性保证。
AI.result: 在14个真实世界基准上，链接预测与节点分类任务均达SOTA，在直推式与归纳式场景下均表现出强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: DSRD通过统一的时间-结构双尺度自适应机制，有效克服了固定衰减方案的局限性，为动态图学习提供了可扩展且理论上保证的新范式。

title: NICE: A Theory-Grounded Diagnostic Benchmark for Social Intelligence of LLMs
summary: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied in social contexts such as emotional companionship and customer service, measuring their social intelligence has become critical to the quality and safety of human-AI interaction. However, existing social intelligence benchmarks lack a unified framework that organizes social abilities into a unified structure, and therefore cannot enable fine-grained diagnosis. To build the first holistic diagnostic evaluation grounded in social theory, we first construct a social intelligence framework through a literature review and multi-stage expert validation guided by psychometric principles. The resulting framework includes 4 categories and 11 dimensions, each further specified by fine-grained capability facets. Building on this framework, we introduce NICE (Norm, Interaction, Cognition, Experience), a diagnostic benchmark of 137 items operationalized through representative Chinese contexts. Across 5 frontier LLMs and a human reference group, models score higher in aggregate accuracy yet show a consistent weakness in Communication, which the framework localizes to 3 specific capability facets: multi-turn communication, nonverbal communication, and synchrony. NICE thus reframes social intelligence evaluation toward theory-grounded diagnosis of socially consequential weaknesses in LLMs.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了基于社会理论的社交智能诊断框架NICE，包含4大类11维度137个评测项，通过评估5个前沿LLM和人类参照组，发现模型在整体准确率上表现较好，但在沟通能力（特别是多轮对话、非语言沟通和同步性）上存在持续短板。
AI.motivation: 现有社交智能基准缺乏统一理论框架，无法支持细粒度诊断。随着LLM广泛应用于情感陪伴、客服等社交场景，亟需一个基于社会理论、可精确定位模型社交弱点的评测体系。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和多轮专家验证（遵循心理测量学原则）构建社交智能框架（4类11维度），并基于此开发NICE基准（137项中文情境化评测项），对5个前沿LLM和人类参照组进行系统性评估。
AI.result: LLM在整体准确率上高于人类参照组，但在沟通维度持续表现薄弱，具体定位于多轮对话、非语言沟通和同步性三个能力面向。
AI.conclusion: NICE将社交智能评估从粗粒度比较转向理论指导下的细粒度诊断，能够精准定位LLM在社会交互中的关键弱点。

title: Classification of non-analyzable word types in web documents to implement an effective Korean e-learning system
summary: E-learning systems should deliver contents that reflect various phenomena of the language as it is used. In addition to formal Korean, e-learning systems that would include real-world Korean expressions such as those in web documents, mobile text messages, or twitter posts, would be useful to high-level learners. We construct two types of corpora: one is made of formal documents like online news articles; the other is made of informal documents like customer reviews about new products in web blogs. By comparing these corpora, we show how expressions differ in these two types of corpora. We survey the main characteristics of the informal corpus. Given that a significant proportion of text is informal, we propose Local Grammar Graphs (LGG) as an appropriate model to treat them effectively in Korean e-learning systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文构建了正式语料库（如新闻）和非正式语料库（如博客评论），通过对比分析揭示韩语正式与非正式表达的差异，并提出局部语法图（LGG）模型以有效处理非正式文本，适用于高级韩语学习者的电子学习系统。
AI.motivation: 现有的韩语电子学习系统主要基于正式书面语，缺乏对实际生活中非正式韩语表达（如网络文本、短信、推特）的覆盖，难以满足高级学习者的需求。
AI.method: 构建两种语料库：正式语料库（在线新闻文章）和非正式语料库（博客产品评论）。通过对比分析揭示两类语料中语言表达的差异，并调研非正式语料的主要特征。提出局部语法图（LGG）作为处理非正式文本的有效模型。
AI.result: 发现在非正式语料中存在显著的语言表达差异，且非正式文本占文本总量的重要比例。
AI.conclusion: 局部语法图（LGG）是适用于韩国电子学习系统中处理非正式文本的有效模型，有助于系统更全面地反映现实语言使用现象。

title: Mitigating Hallucination in Vision-Language Models through Barrier-Regulated Adaptive Closed-form Steering
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) often hallucinate objects that are not present in the input image, largely because visual grounding weakens as decoding progresses. Existing inference-time mitigation methods modify logits or hidden states throughout generation, but they suffer from three key limitations: they lack an explicit grounding objective, intervene even when the model is already well-grounded, and use fixed correction strengths that do not adapt to the severity of grounding failure. We propose BRACS (Barrier-Regulated Adaptive Closed-form Steering), a training-free steering framework that addresses these issues through barrier-regulated adaptive closed-form steering. BRACS monitors the model's own attention to measure visual grounding and applies corrections to the hidden states only when grounding deteriorates. The corrective update is computed analytically in closed form, requiring no training of auxiliary networks or model retraining. Experiments on LLaVA-1.5-7B and Qwen-VL-Chat show that BRACS consistently outperforms prior methods on hallucination benchmarks, reducing CHAIR$_s$ by 9.4 points and improving POPE F1 by 2.7 points, while matching or improving performance on four general multimodal benchmarks. BRACS also remains efficient, operating at 80% of greedy decoding throughput and achieving 1.3 times higher speed on average than the baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出BRACS框架，通过监测视觉注意力动态调整隐藏状态修正，在不需要训练的情况下减少LVLM的物体幻觉。
AI.motivation: 现有LVLM存在物体幻觉问题，而推理阶段的缓解方法有三个局限：缺乏显式接地目标、在模型已良好接地时仍干预、使用固定的修正强度无法适应接地失效的严重程度。
AI.method: BRACS（Barrier-Regulated Adaptive Closed-form Steering）通过监测模型自身的注意力来度量视觉接地程度，仅当接地恶化时对隐藏状态施加校正，校正更新通过闭式解析计算，无需训练辅助网络或重新训练模型。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B和Qwen-VL-Chat上，BRACS在幻觉基准上持续优于此前方法，CHAIRs降低9.4点，POPE F1提升2.7点，在四个通用多模态基准上持平或更优，吞吐量达贪心解码的80%，平均速度比基线高1.3倍。
AI.conclusion: BRACS通过自适应、训练自由的闭式引导有效缓解了LVLM的幻觉问题，兼顾了效果与效率。

title: A Full-Pipeline Framework for Evaluating Membership Inference Attacks in Machine Learning
summary: While Membership Inference Attacks (MIAs) are the prevailing method for identifying training data, their application has expanded into privacy auditing and machine unlearning. Nevertheless, the field lacks a systematic framework for evaluating how different contexts affect MIA efficacy. Without such a characterization, practitioners risk deploying algorithms that perform well on benchmarks but become statistically irrelevant when faced with the nuances of specific, real-world datasets. To bridge this gap and provide actionable insights, we introduce a comprehensive evaluation framework that systematically characterizes privacy risks across the entire machine learning pipeline, spanning data, architectures, algorithms, and post-training modules. Designed to inherently capture diverse operational contexts, our framework rigorously evaluates state-of-the-art MIAs across a broad spectrum of training configurations. To account for varying misclassification costs in real-world deployments, we employ three complementary metrics: Balanced Accuracy for symmetric costs, alongside TPR at low FPR (or TNR at low FNR) for asymmetric scenarios where false alarms or missed detections are strictly penalized. Furthermore, recognizing that existing MIAs assume divergent adversary capabilities, we formalize two standardized threat models and adapt these attacks into corresponding variants to ensure an equitable benchmark. Extensive empirical evaluations demonstrate that the efficacy of specific MIA methodologies is highly sensitive to the assumed threat models and chosen evaluation metrics. Ultimately, we distill these findings into actionable guidelines and provide a ready-to-use auditing toolkit, empowering practitioners to conduct better privacy assessments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个系统性评估框架，用于研究不同上下文（数据、架构、算法、后训练模块）对成员推断攻击（MIA）效能的影响，并标准化了威胁模型与评估指标，最终提供实用指南与审计工具包。
AI.motivation: 现有MIA评估缺乏系统性框架，无法反映不同操作上下文对攻击效能的影响，导致实践中部署的算法可能在特定数据集上失效。
AI.method: 构建一个覆盖机器学习全流程（数据、架构、算法、后训练模块）的综合评估框架，采用三种互补指标（平衡准确率、低FPR下的TPR、低FNR下的TNR），并标准化两种威胁模型以公平对比现有MIA方法。
AI.result: 实验表明MIA方法的效能高度依赖于假定的威胁模型和选择的评估指标。
AI.conclusion: 将发现提炼为可操作的指南，并提供了即用的审计工具包，帮助从业者更好地进行隐私评估。

title: Reliable Reasoning with Large Language Models via Preference-Based Maximum Satisfiability
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at understanding natural language but struggle with optimisation tasks involving multiple constraints and user-defined preferences, which commonly arise in domains such as robotics. We propose a hybrid reasoning approach in which LLMs externalise reasoning through code generation. Given a natural language problem description, an LLM generates Python code that encodes user-defined constraints and preferences as a preference-based Maximum Satisfiability (MaxSAT) problem, which is then solved by an exact MaxSAT solver. To ensure correctness, solutions returned by the model-generated code are independently verified for feasibility and optimality against a canonical MaxSAT encoding, allowing for different encodings and multiple optimal solutions. We evaluate our approach using both open-source and closed-access LLMs on three families of preference-based reasoning tasks, and compare it against direct-answer, chain-of-thought, and program-of-thought baselines using the same models. While these baselines rarely produce feasible solutions, the MaxSAT-based pipeline achieves substantially higher acceptance rates, in some cases exceeding 80%. Our results demonstrate that LLM-driven code generation combined with preference-based MaxSAT enables solver-verifiable optimisation with respect to generated encodings, and substantially improves correctness under independently verified reference semantics.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合推理方法，利用LLM生成Python代码，将自然语言描述的优化问题编码为偏好型MaxSAT问题，通过精确求解器求解，并独立验证解的可行性和最优性。实验表明该方法在多个偏好推理任务上显著优于基线方法，接受率最高超过80%。
AI.motivation: LLM擅长理解自然语言，但在处理多约束和用户自定义偏好的优化任务（如机器人领域）时表现不佳，现有方法难以保证解的可行性和最优性。
AI.method: LLM将问题描述转化为Python代码，编码为偏好型MaxSAT问题；使用精确MaxSAT求解器求解；通过规范MaxSAT编码独立验证解的可行性与最优性。
AI.result: 在三种偏好推理任务上，MaxSAT流水线的接受率远超直接回答、思维链和程序推理基线方法，某些场景下超过80%。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的代码生成结合偏好型MaxSAT能够实现可验证的优化，在独立验证的参考语义下大幅提升了正确性。

title: Verifiable Rewards Beyond Math and Code: Lightweight Corpus-Grounded Process Supervision for Factual Question Answering
summary: Applying reinforcement learning to improve factual accuracy in knowledge-intensive question answering faces a reward design dilemma. Response-level rewards provide only coarse supervision and cannot distinguish correct from incorrect statements within a reasoning trace. Sentence-level alternatives offer finer-grained feedback, but typically rely on NLI verifiers, LLM judges, or knowledge-verification pipelines that are expensive to deploy at RL scale and often unreliable for rare-entity facts, where accurate reward signals are especially important. We propose CorVer (Corpus Verify), a lightweight, plug-in-ready process reward that replaces neural verifiers with a corpus-grounded signal derived from Wikipedia co-occurrence statistics. CorVer assigns sentence-level credit and maps it to token-level advantages via a simple alignment, requiring only a 0.5B extractor and a single corpus lookup per sentence. Across 30 (model, benchmark) cells spanning six instruction-tuned models (3B to 14B) and five QA benchmarks, CorVer improves over the raw baseline for every cell, with an average TriviaQA gain of +4.1 pp. It also outperforms four neural-verifier baselines in 18 of 20 cells under their feasible configurations, while training 4.8 to 8.4x faster.

AI.tldr: 提出CorVer，一种基于语料库共现统计的轻量级过程奖励方法，替代昂贵的神经验证器，在知识密集型QA的强化学习训练中提升事实准确性，在30个实验单元中全部优于基线，训练速度提升4.8-8.4倍。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在提升知识密集型问答事实准确性时面临奖励设计困境：响应级奖励过于粗糙，无法区分推理轨迹中的正确与错误陈述；句子级奖励虽粒度更细，但依赖NLI验证器、LLM裁判或知识验证管道，部署成本高且在稀有实体事实场景下不可靠。
AI.method: 提出CorVer，利用Wikipedia共现统计作为语料库基础的信号，替代神经验证器。方法包括：句子级信用分配，通过简单对齐映射到token级优势值。仅需0.5B的提取器和每次句子一次语料库查找，轻量高效。
AI.result: 在30个（模型，基准）实验单元（涵盖6种指令微调模型3B-14B、5个QA基准）中，CorVer在所有单元上均优于原始基线，TriviaQA平均提升+4.1个百分点。在可行配置下，20个单元中有18个超越四种神经验证器基线，训练速度提升4.8-8.4倍。
AI.conclusion: CorVer作为一种轻量级、即插即用的过程奖励方法，通过语料库共现统计有效解决了知识密集型QA中RL训练的奖励设计难题，兼具高效性与可靠性。

title: DVSM: Decoder-only View Synthesis Model Done Right
summary: Recent Large View Synthesis Models (LVSMs) advocate an encoder-decoder architecture that separates reconstruction and rendering into distinct networks. We re-examine this design. Through controlled experiments, we show that a decoder-only architecture, which represents scenes implicitly as a KV-cache, outperforms encoder-decoder variants while using fewer parameters at identical rendering complexity. Further analysis shows that sharing weights between the color-input reconstruction network and the camera-only rendering network better aligns their features at the same viewpoint, facilitating image synthesis. Building on this finding, our model, dubbed DVSM, further incorporates foundation model priors and stage-wise patch sizing for an improved efficiency-quality tradeoff. Our results establish a new state of the art for novel-view synthesis across multiple benchmarks, in some cases even outperforming per-scene-optimized 3DGS under dense input views.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DVSM模型，采用纯解码器架构（隐式KV-cache表示场景），证明其优于传统编码器-解码器设计，在多个新视角合成基准上达到SOTA，甚至在某些情况下超越逐场景优化的3DGS。
AI.motivation: 重新审视LVSMs中编码器-解码器架构的必要性，探索更高效的场景表示方式。
AI.method: 1) 提出纯解码器架构，用隐式KV-cache表示场景；2) 共享重建网络（颜色输入）与渲染网络（仅相机输入）的权重，对齐特征；3) 引入基础模型先验和分阶段patch sizing优化效率-质量权衡。
AI.result: 在多个新视角合成基准上达到SOTA，部分场景超越逐场景优化的3DGS。
AI.conclusion: 纯解码器架构+权重共享设计更优，验证了重建与渲染网络联合优化的有效性。

title: Honest Lying: Understanding Memory Confabulation in Reflexive Agents
comment: Accepted to ICML 2026 Workshop "Failure Modes in Agentic AI"
summary: Reflexion-style agents rely on self-generated reflections as memory, implicitly assuming that agents can accurately diagnose their own failures.We show that this assumption can fail systematically: across ALFWorld and HumanEval, agents store confident but incorrect interpretations of the task and continue acting on them across trials,even though the environment resets to the correct task each time. We call this failure mode memory confabulation and introduce the Reflection Repetition Rate (RRR), a log-based metric that detects repeated reliance on incorrect reflective content.Using RRR, we identify 16 frozen environments in ALFWorld, where 0 of 121 reflections mention the correct target object, and 4 analogous cases in HumanEval. Our mitigation replaces open-ended self-diagnosis with programmatic extraction of trajectory-level failure signals, increasing correct object mention from 0% to 86%, reducing RRR from 0.64 to 0.10, and solving 3 of 16 frozen ALFWorld environments, suggesting that reflective memory can reinforce false beliefs rather than correct them.

AI.tldr: 论文发现Reflexion-style智能体在失败时会存储自信但错误的记忆（记忆虚构），导致在多个试验中重复错误。作者提出RRR指标检测此问题，并通过程序化提取轨迹级失败信号来缓解，显著提升了正确率并解决了部分冻结环境。
AI.motivation: 挑战Reflexion-style智能体的隐含假设——即智能体能准确诊断自身失败——并揭示其在ALFWorld和HumanEval中系统性失败的现象。
AI.method: 提出Reflection Repetition Rate (RRR)指标，通过日志检测对错误反思内容的重复依赖；并提出用程序化提取轨迹级失败信号替代开放式的自我诊断。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld识别出16个冻结环境（0/121条反思提到正确目标），HumanEval识别出4个类似案例。缓解方案将正确目标提及率从0%提升至86%，RRR从0.64降至0.10，并解冻3/16个环境。
AI.conclusion: 反思性记忆可能强化而非纠正错误信念，简单的自我诊断机制并不可靠，需要更结构化的失败信号提取方式。

title: FHRFormer: A Self-Supervised Masked Transformer Framework for Fetal Heart Rate Time-Series Inpainting and Forecasting
comment: Submitted to Frontiers in Digital Health. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2509.20852
summary: Approximately 10% of newborns require assistance to initiate breathing at birth, and around 5% need ventilation support. Fetal heart rate (FHR) monitoring plays a crucial role in assessing fetal well-being during prenatal care, enabling the detection of abnormal patterns and supporting timely obstetric interventions to mitigate fetal risks during labor. Applying artificial intelligence (AI) methods to analyze large datasets of continuous FHR monitoring episodes with diverse outcomes may offer novel insights into predicting the risk of needing breathing assistance or interventions. Recent advances in wearable FHR monitors have enabled continuous fetal monitoring without compromising maternal mobility. However, sensor displacement during maternal movement, as well as changes in fetal or maternal position, often lead to signal dropout, resulting in gaps in recorded FHR data. Such missing data limits the extraction of meaningful insights and complicates automated (AI-based) analysis. Traditional approaches to handling missing data, such as simple interpolation techniques, often fail to preserve the spectral characteristics of the signals. In this paper, we propose a masked transformer-based autoencoder approach to reconstruct missing FHR signals by capturing both local temporal and frequency components of the data. The proposed method demonstrates robustness across varying durations of missing data and can be used for signal inpainting and forecasting. The proposed approach can be applied retrospectively to research datasets to support the development of AI-based risk algorithms. In the future, the proposed method could be integrated into wearable FHR monitoring devices to achieve earlier and more robust risk detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于掩码Transformer自编码器的方法，用于重建胎儿心率监测中的缺失信号，以支持后续的AI风险预测分析。
AI.motivation: 胎儿心率监测对评估胎儿健康至关重要，但可穿戴设备在采集过程中因传感器位移等问题导致信号缺失，传统插值方法无法保留信号频谱特性，限制了AI分析的准确性。
AI.method: 提出掩码Transformer自编码器（Masked Transformer-based Autoencoder），同时捕获FHR信号的局部时间特征和频率成分，用于缺失信号的修复和预测。
AI.result: 该方法在不同缺失时长下均表现出鲁棒性，可用于信号修复（inpainting）和预测（forecasting）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可回顾性地应用于科研数据集以支持AI风险算法开发，未来有望集成到可穿戴FHR监测设备中，实现更早、更稳健的风险检测。

title: Beyond English and Evasion: A Human-Annotated Multi-Domain Benchmark for High-Stakes LLM Safety Evaluation in Chinese
summary: When Large Language Models (LLMs) are deployed in Chinese-language settings, a troubling pattern emerges: safety systems that work well in English break down. These systems struggle to cross linguistic and cultural bound-aries, leaving models exposed to adversarial prompts that exploit Chinese-specific evasion techniques, including Pinyin romanization, character decomposition, internet slang, and hedging tone. To address this gap, we introduce ChiSafe-PAS (Chinese Safety Pilot Annotation Set), a human-annotated benchmark of 1,897 adversarial Chinese prompts spanning four high-stakes domains: self-harm and violence, drug and illicit trade, fraud, and satire. Of these, 1,544 entries carry complete gold-standard annotations: a 3-class response label (REFUSE, SAFE-REDIRECT, RESPOND), a nine-category obfuscation taxonomy, a risk-level rating, and annotator rationale. We describe the dataset design, annotation process, and obfuscation taxonomy in detail. Our primary goal is practical: to give the research community a high-quality, culturally grounded resource for benchmarking LLM safety alignment. In doing so, we engage three broader tensions in the field: the blurring boundary between training and evaluation data, the need for domain coverage grounded in real-world risk, and the limits of scale as a substitute for cultural expertise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChiSafe-PAS，一个针对中文场景下LLM安全对齐的高质量人工标注基准数据集，包含1,897条对抗性提示，揭示现有安全系统在跨语言和文化边界上的脆弱性。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM安全系统在英文场景表现良好，但在中文场景下容易崩溃，模型易受拼音、汉字拆分、网络俚语等中文特定规避技术的攻击，缺乏针对中文文化背景的安全评测资源。
AI.method: 构建ChiSafe-PAS基准数据集：人工标注1,897条中文对抗性提示，覆盖自我伤害/暴力、毒品/非法交易、欺诈、讽刺四个高风险领域；其中1,544条包含完整标注（三分类响应标签、九类混淆技术分类、风险等级、标注理由）。
AI.result: 生成了一个高质量的、具有文化根基的中文安全对齐评测基准，包含详细的混淆技术分类体系和多维度标注信息。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为社区提供了实用的评测资源，同时引发了三方面思考：训练与评测数据的界限模糊化、基于真实风险的领域覆盖需求、规模替代文化专业知识的局限性。

title: Train the Agent, Not the Expert: Learning to Harness Heterogeneous Experts for Multi-Turn Visual Reasoning
summary: Recent progress in computer vision has produced a wide range of powerful specialized models for detection, segmentation, counting, and other visual tasks. However, these models are usually optimized for isolated task formulations, making it difficult to directly support general-purpose visual intelligence, especially when a task requires complex language understanding and dense small-object perception. In this paper, we propose VisHarness, a trainable visual agent that decouples high-level perception, reasoning, and decision-making from low-level task execution. Instead of training a model to solve a specific visual task, VisHarness learns to harness a set of carefully designed heterogeneous visual experts. This paradigm preserves the general intelligence of the agent while fully leveraging the precision advantages of specialized visual models in concrete visual tasks. With only lightweight training, VisHarness learns a generalizable visual expert-harnessing policy and can solve common fundamental vision tasks under various complex conditions through multi-turn interactions with visual expert models. To enable efficient on-policy reinforcement learning training in a live environment, we introduce dynamic visual memory archiving, which mitigates the rapidly accumulating visual-token overhead caused by multi-turn interactions with visual expert models. Experiments on four representative benchmarks covering reasoning segmentation, generalized referring segmentation, dense small-object detection, and referring counting demonstrate that VisHarness substantially outperforms existing general-purpose models and achieves competitive or superior performance compared with task-specific models.

AI.tldr: VisHarness是一种可训练视觉智能体，通过轻量级强化学习学会调用多种专业视觉专家模型来解决各种视觉任务，在推理分割、小目标检测等任务上优于通用模型并接近专用模型水平。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉模型通常针对孤立任务优化，难以支持需要复杂语言理解与密集小目标感知的通用视觉智能。
AI.method: 提出VisHarness——可训练视觉智能体，将高层感知、推理、决策与低层任务执行解耦，通过轻量级强化学习学习调用一组异构视觉专家模型的策略，并引入动态视觉记忆归档缓解多轮交互中积累的视觉token开销。
AI.result: 在推理分割、广义指代分割、密集小目标检测和指代计数四个基准上，VisHarness明显优于现有通用模型，与专用模型相比达到有竞争力或更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: VisHarness通过智能体-专家协作范式，在保留通用智能的同时充分利用专用模型的精度优势，为通用视觉智能提供了一种可行路径。

title: Composing Non-Conjugate Factor Graphs with Closed-Form Variational Inference
summary: Stacking probabilistic building blocks into deeper architectures typically breaks closed-form inference. We show that closed-form inference can be preserved. We identify five factor-graph primitives: a bilinear factor, an exponential link, a Gamma prior, a Gaussian likelihood, and an equality node, and prove that any model composed from them admits closed-form variational message passing. The construction works because each primitive preserves a small set of message families: under mean-field factorization, messages on Gaussian variables remain Gaussian and messages on precision variables remain Gamma, while the only non-conjugate interface, the exponential link, remains tractable through the Gaussian moment-generating function and the sufficient statistics of the Gamma family. We demonstrate composition at increasing depth, from static ensembles through input-dependent gating to split-branch routing, and show that stacking routing layers encodes arbitrary decision trees, establishing universal function approximation with closed-form inference. Applied to ensemble time-series forecasting, the framework yields a Bayesian mixture of experts in which gating functions are inferred rather than learned, providing calibrated uncertainty over expert selection across five benchmark datasets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在概率因子图中通过五种原语（双线性因子、指数链接、Gamma先验、高斯似然、等式节点）构建深层架构的方法，该方法能够保持闭式变分消息传递，并证明堆叠路由层可编码任意决策树，实现通用函数逼近。在集成时间序列预测中，该方法提供了推断式的贝叶斯混合专家模型，产生校准的不确定性估计。
AI.motivation: 将概率构建块堆叠成深层架构通常会破坏闭式推理，作者希望找到一组原语，使得在深层架构中仍能保持闭式变分消息传递。
AI.method: 识别了五种因子图原语（双线性因子、指数链接、Gamma先验、高斯似然、等式节点），证明由它们构建的任何模型在均值场分解下都能保持闭式变分消息传递。关键思想是每种原语都保持特定的消息族（高斯消息、Gamma消息），且指数链接通过高斯矩生成函数和Gamma充分统计量保持可处理性。
AI.result: 证明了堆叠路由层可以编码任意决策树，实现通用函数逼近。在五个基准数据集上的集成时间序列预测中，该方法提供了校准的不确定性估计，门控函数是通过推断而非学习获得的。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心选择的原语集合，可以在深层概率架构中保持闭式推理，为贝叶斯深度学习和不确定性量化提供了一种新的有效途径。

title: Beyond Trajectory Rewards: Step-level Credit Assignment for Agentic Search via Graph Modeling
summary: In Agentic Search, trajectory-level outcome rewards fail to quantify the behavioral contributions of individual steps, while existing step-level reward methods typically rely on costly tree sampling. We view world knowledge as a latent world graph and each IS task as search within a latent task graph, where effective steps should make graph progress toward the answer node. Based on this prior, we propose Graph-Distance Contribution Reward (GDCR), a step-level process reward that scores newly-retrieved and newly-cited entities by their distance to the answer node in a training-time Entity-Relation (ER) graph. We further propose Step Advantage Policy Optimization (SAPO), which converts GDCR into step-level advantages and combines them with trajectory-level outcome advantages. Experiments on four challenging benchmarks validate the effectiveness of our method.

AI.tldr: 提出基于图距离贡献的步骤级奖励机制GDCR及步骤优势策略优化SAPO，用于提升智能体搜索中的步骤级过程监督。
AI.motivation: 智能体搜索中，轨迹级结果奖励无法衡量单步的行为贡献，而现有的步骤级奖励方法通常依赖昂贵的树采样，效率低下。
AI.method: 将世界知识视为潜在世界图，检索任务视为潜在任务图搜索；提出GDCR，基于训练时的实体-关系图计算新检索/新引用实体到答案节点的距离来打分；进一步提出SAPO，将GDCR转化为步骤级优势并与轨迹级结果优势结合。
AI.result: 在四个具有挑战性的基准上验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 基于图距离的步骤级奖励能有效量化单步贡献，结合步骤级与轨迹级优势的优化策略可提升智能体搜索性能。

title: EviLink: Multi-Path Schema Linking with Uncertainty-Guided Evidence Acquisition for Large-Scale Text-to-SQL
summary: Schema linking is a difficult and important step in large-scale Text-to-SQL, where systems must identify a compact yet sufficient schema context from large and ambiguous databases. Existing methods often treat schema linking as deterministic selection around a single SQL path, but complex questions may admit multiple valid realizations with different schema needs. We reframe schema linking as uncertainty-aware schema-need inference over multiple plausible SQL paths, where the system distinguishes required schema items from path-dependent uncertain ones and acquires evidence only where needed. We instantiate this reframing with EviLink, which combines multi-hypothesis schema grounding with uncertainty-guided evidence acquisition. Experiments on BIRD-Dev and Spider2-Snow show that this perspective improves the balance among schema completeness, schema relevance, and token cost. On Spider2-Snow, EviLink achieves 90.15% field-level strict recall rate, uses 123.30K average tokens, and improves downstream SQL generation under a fixed generator.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将大规模Text-to-SQL中的schema linking重新定义为不确定性感知的schema需求推断，并实例化为EviLink方法，通过多假设schema基础与不确定性引导的证据收集，在BIRD-Dev和Spider2-Snow数据集上取得了更优的schema完整性、相关性和token成本平衡。
AI.motivation: 现有schema linking方法通常将问题简化为单一SQL路径上的确定性选择，但复杂问题可能存在多个有效的SQL实现方案，需要不同的schema项。因此需要一种能处理schema需求不确定性的新范式。
AI.method: 将schema linking重新定义为不确定性感知的schema需求推断：在多个可能的SQL路径上区分必需的schema项和路径依赖的不确定schema项，仅在必要时获取证据。具体实例化为EviLink，结合多假设schema基础（multi-hypothesis schema grounding）与不确定性引导的证据收集（uncertainty-guided evidence acquisition）。
AI.result: 在BIRD-Dev和Spider2-Snow上取得了更好的schema完整性、相关性和token成本平衡。Spider2-Snow上达到90.15%的字段级严格召回率，平均使用123.30K tokens，并改善了固定生成器下的下游SQL生成质量。
AI.conclusion: 不确定性感知的schema linking范式能更有效地处理复杂Text-to-SQL问题中schema选择的不确定性，在保持高召回率的同时降低token成本，并提升下游SQL生成性能。

title: CityGen: Structure-Guided City-Style Synthesis for Cross-City Autonomous Driving
summary: Autonomous driving systems are commonly trained and evaluated within limited geographic regions, which hinders their scalability when deployed in new cities. However, significant domain shifts in appearance, road topology, and traffic patterns often cause severe performance degradation under cross-city deployment. Existing approaches based on domain adaptation, data augmentation, or synthetic data generation typically rely on labeled target data, city-specific annotations, or task-specific designs, limiting their scalability and effectiveness for holistic evaluation. In this paper, we introduce CityTransfer-Bench, a geographically disjoint benchmark for evaluating cross-city generalization across perception, segmentation, and planning, and propose CityGen, a diffusion-based generative framework that performs zero-label city adaptation via HD-map-conditioned synthesis guided by city-level visual prompts. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CityGen consistently improves cross-city robustness across multiple tasks, establishing a scalable and label-efficient foundation for generalizable autonomous driving.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CityTransfer-Bench基准和CityGen生成框架，用于解决自动驾驶系统跨城市部署时的性能下降问题。CityGen通过高清地图条件扩散模型和城市级视觉提示，实现零标签的城市适应，在感知、分割和规划等多个任务上提升了跨城市鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶系统在限定地理区域训练和评估，跨城市部署时因外观、道路拓扑和交通模式的显著域偏移导致性能严重下降。现有方法依赖目标域标签、城市特定标注或任务特定设计，可扩展性和有效性有限。
AI.method: 提出CityTransfer-Bench（地理分离的跨城市泛化基准）和CityGen（基于扩散模型的生成框架）。CityGen通过高清地图条件合成和城市级视觉提示，实现零标签的城市适应。
AI.result: 大量实验表明CityGen在感知、分割和规划等多个任务上一致提升了跨城市鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了可扩展且标签高效的自动驾驶泛化基础，为通用自动驾驶系统的跨城市部署提供了有效方案。

title: Access Sets Matter: Budgeting Expert Reads for Scalable Weight-Space Model Merging
comment: ICML 2026 Workshop on Weight-Space Symmetries: from Foundations to Practical Applications
summary: Weight-space model merging is usually formulated as an algebraic operation on checkpoints, yet at LLM scale the limiting resource is often the set of expert weights that must be read. We introduce MergePipe, a budget-aware execution layer that casts LLM merging as an \emph{expert access-set} problem: given a merge operator and a checkpoint family in a shared weight coordinate system, choose which expert delta blocks to access under an explicit I/O budget. MergePipe indexes parameter blocks, builds deterministic access plans, and executes the induced budgeted merge with replayable manifests. The plan is budget-sound by construction and recovers the full-read merge at full budget; for fixed-coefficient additive operators, the omitted-update error is bounded by the norm of omitted deltas. Across Qwen and Llama merging workloads, MergePipe reduces expert-read I/O by up to an order of magnitude and achieves up to $11\times$ speedups. Representative budget sweeps show $O(10^{-3})$ parameter deviation from full-read merges and no monotonic degradation on downstream benchmarks.

AI.tldr: MergePipe 提出了一种预算感知的 LLM 权重合并框架，通过将合并问题转化为专家访问集问题，在显式 I/O 预算下选择性地读取专家 delta 块，实现了最高 11 倍加速和数量级的 I/O 降低，同时保持极低的参数偏差。
AI.motivation: 在大规模 LLM 模型合并中，传统方法将所有专家权重作为代数运算处理，但实际瓶颈在于必须读取大量专家权重的 I/O 开销。作者旨在解决这一资源限制问题。
AI.method: MergePipe 将 LLM 合并视为"专家访问集"问题：在共享权重坐标系下，给定合并算子和检查点族，在显式 I/O 预算下选择要访问的专家 delta 块。系统通过索引参数块、构建确定性访问计划，并利用可重放清单执行预算合并。
AI.result: 在 Qwen 和 Llama 合并任务上，MergePipe 将专家读取 I/O 降低多达一个数量级，实现最高 11 倍加速。参数偏差仅为 O(10^{-3})，且在下游基准测试中未出现单调退化。
AI.conclusion: MergePipe 通过预算感知的合并策略，在显著降低 I/O 开销的同时保持了合并质量，为大规模 LLM 模型合并提供了一种高效且实用的解决方案。

title: BitTP: The Lightweight Trajectory Prediction Model with BitLLM for Edge-Devices
comment: Camera-ready version. Accepted as a findings paper at CVPR 2026. 8 pages, 4 figures
summary: Trajectory prediction is a fundamental task for autonomous systems, requiring complex reasoning about multi-agent interactions and intents. Large language models (LLMs) have recently been adopted for this task, as they provide strong contextual reasoning and interpretable, language-based trajectory representations. However, these LLM-based predictors are extremely memory- and compute-intensive, making them difficult to deploy on resource-constrained edge devices such as on-board computers in autonomous robots. To bridge this gap, we propose BitTP, which converts an LLM-based trajectory predictor into a lightweight bitlinear architecture. We demonstrate that weight-only quantization to 1.58-bit (BitTP-Weight) is optimal. Crucially, activations must remain in full precision, as quantizing them leads to severe degradation and instability in spatio-temporal reasoning. Empirically, BitTP-Weight not only preserves but improves prediction quality over the full-precision (BF16) LLM baseline, reducing ADE by 14.29% and FDE by 20.97% on average, while simultaneously reducing memory usage and inference latency relative to other quantization methods. These results demonstrate that carefully designed quantization acts as an effective regularizer, enabling the practical deployment of sophisticated LLM-based reasoning on edge devices. Code is available at: https://github.com/MintCat98/BitTP.

AI.tldr: 提出BitTP，将基于LLM的轨迹预测器转化为1.58-bit轻量二值化架构（仅量化权重，激活保持全精度），在降低内存和推理延迟的同时，反而提升了预测精度（ADE降14.29%，FDE降20.97%），实现了在边缘设备上部署LLM推理能力。
AI.motivation: 基于LLM的轨迹预测器虽然推理能力强且可解释性好，但计算和内存开销极大，难以部署在资源受限的边缘设备（如自动驾驶车载计算机）上。
AI.method: 提出BitTP，采用1.58-bit权重量化（BitTP-Weight）将LLM轨迹预测器转化为轻量二值化架构，同时保持激活值为全精度以避免时空推理退化。
AI.result: BitTP-Weight相比全精度BF16基线，ADE平均降低14.29%，FDE平均降低20.97%，同时内存和推理延迟低于其他量化方法。
AI.conclusion: 精心设计的量化可作为有效的正则化手段，使基于LLM的复杂轨迹推理能够在边缘设备上实际部署。

title: Spurious Prompts: Can Irrelevant Prompts Steer Large Language Models?
summary: Large language models are highly sensitive to prompts, but this sensitivity is usually studied through task-relevant instructions, demonstrations, or reasoning cues. In this paper, we study a different form of prompt sensitivity: whether prompts that are semantically unrelated to the task can nevertheless steer model behavior. We call them spurious prompts and show their surprising efficacy. We also propose a simple black-box search procedure for discovering them. Across reasoning and question-answering benchmarks, using models ranging from 0.8B to 27B parameters and spanning three model families, we show that spurious prompts can improve performance, often matching or outperforming standard prompting baselines and task-aware prompt optimization. We further show that they can steer models toward unintended behaviors, such as repeatedly selecting the first answer option, producing incorrect answers, returning an even, prime or small number without explicitly instructing the model to do so. These findings reveal a new kind of prompt sensitivity: LLMs can be systematically steered by prompts that are unrelated to the task they are asked to solve. Our code is available at https://github.com/Batorskq/spurious

AI.tldr: 本文发现与任务语义无关的"虚假提示"（spurious prompts）也能显著影响大语言模型的行为，通过黑盒搜索方法即可找到这类提示，它们能提升模型性能甚至匹配或超越标准提示方法，同时也能引导模型产生非预期行为（如固定选第一个答案、输出偶数等）。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注与任务相关的提示敏感性，而作者想探索语义上不相关的提示是否同样能系统性影响模型行为，揭示一种新型的提示敏感性。
AI.method: 提出一种简单的黑盒搜索方法来发现虚假提示；在推理和问答基准上，使用0.8B到27B参数的三类模型家族进行实验验证。
AI.result: 虚假提示能提升模型性能，常匹配或超越标准提示基线及任务感知的提示优化方法；还能引导模型产生非预期行为（如固定选第一个答案、输出错误/偶数/质数/小数等）。
AI.conclusion: LLM存在一种新型提示敏感性：语义无关的提示也能系统性引导模型行为，这对模型安全与可控性提出了新的挑战。

title: Mesh-Aware Epipolar Matching for Multi-View Multi-Person 3D Pose Estimation in Basketball
summary: Multi-view multi-person 3D pose estimation in team sports scenarios remains challenging due to player occlusions, appearance similarity caused by team uniforms, and the scarcity of annotated multi-view data, all of which limit the effectiveness and generalization capability of learning-based methods. In contrast, the performance of training-free approaches is inherently constrained by the accuracy of 2D keypoint detection and the robustness of cross-view association. To address these challenges, we propose Mesh-Aware Epipolar Matching (MAEM), a training-free framework for multi-view multi-person 3D pose estimation. Our method employs a monocular 3D human mesh recovery model as the frontend and introduces a two-stage epipolar matching strategy based on the recovered mesh outputs. Specifically, the proposed framework combines disjoint-set-union-based clustering with per-joint triangulation to achieve robust cross-view association and accurate 3D pose reconstruction. Experiments on two public multi-view basketball datasets demonstrate that MAEM consistently outperforms existing training-free association baselines while achieving competitive RGB-only performance in both indoor and outdoor basketball scenarios. MAEM achieves MPJPE/PA-MPJPE scores of 59.8/40.7 mm on SportCenter EPFL and 74.0/51.8 mm on Human-M3 Basketball, highlighting the effectiveness of dense mesh geometry for cross-view association without requiring target-domain training or fine-tuning.

AI.tldr: 提出MAEM——一种无需训练的框架，利用单目3D人体网格恢复模型和两阶段极线匹配策略，在团队运动场景中实现鲁棒的多视角多人体3D位姿估计，在篮球数据集上取得领先的RGB-only性能。
AI.motivation: 团队运动场景中多视角多人体3D位姿估计面临球员遮挡、队服相似导致外观相近、标注数据稀缺等问题，现有学习方法泛化能力受限，而无需训练的方法受限于2D关键点检测精度和跨视角关联鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出MAEM框架，前端使用单目3D人体网格恢复模型，后端采用两阶段极线匹配策略：结合并查集聚类与每关节三角测量，实现鲁棒的跨视角关联与精确的3D位姿重建。
AI.result: 在SportCenter EPFL上MPJPE/PA-MPJPE达59.8/40.7 mm，在Human-M3 Basketball上达74.0/51.8 mm，一致优于现有无需训练的关联基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 密集网格几何信息能有效提升跨视角关联性能，无需目标域训练或微调即可在室内外篮球场景中取得竞争力结果。

title: Gradient Perturbation: Learning to Perturb Gradients for Adaptive Training
summary: Deep neural network training involves both forward propagation (from features through logits to loss) and backward propagation (from loss through gradients to parameter updates). While perturbations along the forward chain, including feature perturbation, logit perturbation, and label perturbation, have been extensively studied, the backward chain's gradient perturbation has received little systematic investigation. In this paper, we establish a unified framework for gradient perturbation, revealing that existing methods such as Sharpness-Aware Minimization (SAM), gradient clipping, and gradient noise injection can all be interpreted as imposing specific forms of gradient perturbation. Analogous to the recently proposed Logit Perturbation Learning (LPL), we conjecture that amplifying the gradient norm for a class acts as positive augmentation (enhancing learning), while dampening it acts as negative augmentation (suppressing overfitting). Based on these observations, we propose Learning to Perturb Gradients (LPG), which adaptively perturbs logit-level gradients at the class level to achieve category-aware training. We also establish theoretical connections between gradient perturbation bounds and generalization guarantees via PAC-Bayesian analysis. Experiments on balanced classification, long-tail classification, and noisy label learning demonstrate that LPG consistently outperforms existing methods and can be combined with them as a plug-in module.

AI.tldr: 本文建立了一个统一的梯度扰动框架，揭示了SAM、梯度裁剪和梯度噪声注入等方法均可视为梯度扰动的特定形式。基于此，提出LPG方法，自适应地在类别级别扰动梯度，实现类别感知训练，在多种任务中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 前向链路的扰动（特征、logit、标签）已被广泛研究，但反向链路中的梯度扰动缺乏系统性研究。
AI.method: 提出Learning to Perturb Gradients (LPG)，在类别级别自适应地扰动logit层梯度，实现类别感知训练。
AI.result: 在平衡分类、长尾分类和噪声标签学习任务中，LPG始终优于现有方法，且可作为即插即用模块。
AI.conclusion: 梯度扰动是一种通用且有效的训练范式，LPG通过类别级别的自适应梯度扰动显著提升了模型性能。

title: NaRA: Noise-Aware LoRA for Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning of Diffusion LLMs
summary: Diffusion Large Language Models (dLLMs) have emerged as a promising non-autoregressive generative paradigm. Given the prohibitive computational cost of full fine-tuning, Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) has become the standard approach. However, existing PEFT methods (e.g., LoRA), originally tailored for autoregressive models, rely on static parameters that are agnostic to the noise level. Consequently, they ignore the intrinsic dynamics of the diffusion process, where input distributions and generation difficulty shift significantly along the denoising trajectory, rendering them suboptimal for dLLMs. To address this, we propose Noise-aware Low-Rank Adaptation (NaRA), which introduces a low-rank core matrix generated by a lightweight, globally shared hypernetwork conditioned on the noise level. This design enables the update matrices to vary continuously along the diffusion process while keeping parameter and latency overhead negligible. We provide a theoretical justification for the proposed NaRA framework and empirically demonstrate consistent improvements over noise-agnostic baselines across commonsense reasoning, mathematical reasoning, and code generation benchmarks. Our code is available at https://github.com/generaldi/NaRA.

AI.tldr: 针对扩散大语言模型(dLLMs)中现有PEFT方法（如LoRA）忽略噪声水平动态变化的问题，提出NaRA（噪声感知低秩适配），通过轻量级全局共享超网络生成依赖噪声水平的低秩核心矩阵，使更新矩阵沿扩散过程连续变化，在常识推理、数学推理和代码生成任务上优于噪声无关基线。
AI.motivation: 现有PEFT方法（如LoRA）专为自回归模型设计，使用与噪声水平无关的静态参数，忽略了扩散过程中输入分布和生成难度沿去噪轨迹显著变化的固有动态特性，导致其在dLLMs上表现次优。
AI.method: 提出NaRA框架，包含一个轻量级全局共享超网络，以噪声水平为条件生成低秩核心矩阵，使得适配矩阵能够沿扩散过程连续变化，同时保持参数和延迟开销极小。
AI.result: 在常识推理、数学推理和代码生成基准测试中，NaRA consistently outperforms noise-agnostic baselines，并提供了理论证明支持。
AI.conclusion: NaRA通过噪声感知设计有效解决了dLLMs中PEFT的静态参数局限，为扩散模型的参数高效微调提供了更优方案。

title: Scaling Laws for Agent Harnesses via Effective Feedback Compute
summary: Agent harnesses increasingly determine the performance of language-model systems by deciding how models call tools, receive feedback, verify intermediate states, store memory, and revise solutions. Yet current test-time scaling analyses often parameterize this process by raw expenditure -- tokens, tool calls, operations, wall time, or cost -- which does not distinguish useful feedback from redundant or unstable interaction. We introduce \emph{Effective Feedback Compute} (EFC), a trace-level scaling coordinate that credits feedback only when it is informative, valid, non-redundant, and retained for subsequent decisions, and we normalize it by task demand when comparing tasks with different feedback requirements. Across synthetic controllable tasks, executable code tasks, real benchmark traces, held-out splits, and a prospective validation batch, EFC-based coordinates consistently predict failure rates better than raw-compute baselines and a strong multivariate SAS baseline. In controlled scaling, raw tokens and tool calls explain limited variation ($R^2=0.33$ and $0.42$), SAS reaches $0.88$, while Oracle-EFC and Estimated-EFC reach $0.94$ and Oracle-EFC/$D_{\mathrm{task}}$ reaches $0.99$. Matched-budget interventions show that improving feedback quality raises success from $0.27$ to $0.90$ while raw cost and tool calls are fixed. On mixed real traces, NRS-EFC/$D_{\mathrm{task}}$ reaches $R^2=0.92$ while raw compute has near-zero or negative fit, and it remains the best predictor in a prospective holdout ($R^2=0.85$). These results suggest that harness scaling is governed less by how much computation is spent than by how efficiently raw budget is converted into durable, task-sufficient feedback.

AI.tldr: 本文提出有效反馈计算量（EFC），一种追踪层面的缩放坐标，通过仅计入信息性、有效、非冗余且被保留用于后续决策的反馈，来替代原始计算量（token、工具调用等）作为语言模型系统性能的预测因子。实验表明，EFC比原始计算量或SAS基线能更准确预测失败率（R²达0.92-0.99），且改进反馈质量可在固定原始成本下将成功率从0.27提升至0.90。
AI.motivation: 现有测试时缩放分析通常以原始消耗（token数、工具调用次数、操作数、时间或成本）作为参数，这种做法无法区分有用反馈与冗余或不稳定交互，导致性能预测不准确。
AI.method: 提出EFC坐标，仅当反馈具有信息性、有效性、非冗余性并被保留用于后续决策时才计入；同时用任务需求（D_task）进行归一化。在合成可控任务、可执行代码任务、真实基准轨迹、留出集和前瞻验证批上进行评估。
AI.result: EFC坐标一致优于原始计算量基线和SAS基线：在受控缩放中，原始token和工具调用的R²仅0.33和0.42，SAS达0.88，而Oracle-EFC达0.94，Oracle-EFC/D_task达0.99。匹配预算干预下，改进反馈质量使成功率从0.27提升至0.90。在混合真实轨迹上，NRS-EFC/D_task的R²达0.92，前瞻留出中为0.85。
AI.conclusion: 工具编排系统的缩放性能主要取决于原始预算转化为持久、任务充分的反馈的效率，而非计算量的大小。这提示研究重点应从原始计算量转向反馈质量与信息效率。

title: SwInception -- Local Attention Meets Convolutions
comment: International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence, 2024
summary: Sparse vision transformers have gained popularity as efficient encoders for medical volumetric segmentation, with Swin emerging as a prominent choice. Swin uses local attention to reduce complexity and yields excellent performance for many tasks but still tends to overfit on small datasets. To mitigate this weakness, we propose a novel architecture that further enhances Swin's inductive bias by introducing Inception blocks in the feed-forward layers. The introduction of these multi-branch convolutions enables more direct reasoning over local, multi-scale features within the transformer block. We have also modified the decoder layers in order to capture finer details using fewer parameters. We demonstrate a performance improvement on eleven different medical datasets through extensive experimentation. We specifically showcase advancements over the previous state-of-the-art backbones on benchmark challenges like the Medical Segmentation Decathlon and Beyond the Cranial Vault. By showing that the existing inductive bias in Swin can be further improved, our work presents a promising avenue for enhancing the capabilities of sparse vision transformers for both medical and natural image segmentation tasks. Code and pre-trained weights can be accessed at https://github.com/Eiphodos/SwInception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 SwInception 架构，通过在 Swin Transformer 的前馈层引入 Inception 多分支卷积模块增强归纳偏置，并改进解码器以更少参数捕获细节，在11个医学数据集上超越先前最优模型。
AI.motivation: Swin Transformer 使用局部注意力降低了计算复杂度，在小数据集上仍易过拟合，需要进一步增强其归纳偏置以提升泛化能力。
AI.method: 在 Swin Transformer 的前馈网络层中引入 Inception 多分支卷积模块以增强局部多尺度特征推理能力，同时改进解码器层以用更少参数捕获更精细细节。
AI.result: 在11个不同医学数据集上表现提升，在 Medical Segmentation Decathlon 和 Beyond the Cranial Vault 等基准挑战中超越了先前最先进骨干网络。
AI.conclusion: 通过增强 Swin 已有的归纳偏置，该方法为提升稀疏视觉变换器在医学和自然图像分割任务上的能力提供了有前景的方向。

title: On-Policy Replay for Continual Supervised Fine-Tuning
summary: Continual supervised fine-tuning (SFT) is the de facto recipe for adapting large language models (LLMs) to a stream of downstream tasks, but it suffers from catastrophic forgetting of earlier capabilities. Recent work shows that on-policy signals -- training on the model's own outputs -- reduce forgetting more reliably than off-policy supervision. Existing on-policy methods route this signal through a new training objective (e.g., self-distillation losses with a teacher copy), inheriting an extra forward pass, schedule sensitivity, and stylistic drift from the teacher.We instead route the on-policy signal through the training data source. Our method, On-Policy Replay (OPR), rolls out the most recent checkpoint on a small budget of historical prompts, filters the generations by a task reward, and replays the surviving (prompt, model response) pairs as ordinary SFT examples. There is no teacher, no auxiliary loss, and no on-the-fly distillation. Across three 7--8B instruction-tuned backbones (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, Qwen3-8B, Llama3.1-8B-Instruct) on the TRACE continual-learning benchmark, OPR consistently reduces forgetting; on the sharpest stress test (Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, Sequential SFT BWT -13.93), OPR lifts BWT to -0.65 at a 10% replay budget and to -2.29 at a 1% budget -- a 46% reduction in |BWT| over a tuned Vanilla Replay baseline, with 42--46% reductions observed across all three backbones. We give a KL-shrinkage interpretation that places OPR and prior on-policy distillation methods on a single axis, and we present a counterintuitive finding that explains why Vanilla Replay is already a strong baseline: low-score replay is uniformly worse than Vanilla Replay, demonstrating that the active ingredient in OPR is the on-policy distribution, not the response quality alone.Our code is available at https://github.com/Yancey2024/OnPolicyReplay.

AI.tldr: 本文提出On-Policy Replay (OPR)方法，通过在历史提示上滚动最新模型、用任务奖励过滤生成并回放(提示,模型回复)对作为普通SFT示例，有效缓解持续微调中的灾难性遗忘，无需教师模型、辅助损失或在线蒸馏。在三个7-8B模型上显著降低遗忘，将BWT从-13.93提升至-0.65（10%回放预算），且发现核心在于on-policy分布而非回复质量。
AI.motivation: 持续监督微调（SFT）中灾难性遗忘严重，现有on-policy方法虽更可靠但依赖新训练目标（如自蒸馏），带来额外前向传播、调度敏感性和风格漂移问题。本文希望将on-policy信号直接路由到数据源而非训练目标中，以更简洁的方式缓解遗忘。
AI.method: On-Policy Replay (OPR)：用最近检查点在少量历史提示上生成回复，通过任务奖励过滤后，将(提示, 模型回复)对作为普通SFT示例回放。无教师模型、无辅助损失、无在线蒸馏。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct、Qwen3-8B、Llama3.1-8B-Instruct三个模型上，OPR一致降低遗忘。在Qwen2.5-7B上（Sequential SFT BWT -13.93），OPR在10%预算下将BWT提升至-0.65，1%预算下提升至-2.29；相比调优的Vanilla Replay基线，|BWT|降低42-46%。
AI.conclusion: OPR通过on-policy分布而非回复质量本身来缓解遗忘；低分回放效果比Vanilla Replay更差，证明核心成分是on-policy分布。同时给出KL收缩解释，将OPR与先前on-policy蒸馏方法统一在单一轴线上。

title: Uncertainty-Aware Transfer Learning for Cross-Building Energy Forecasting: Toward Robust and Scalable District-Level Energy Management
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Accepted at BALANCES'26 (6th ACM International Workshop on Big Data and Machine Learning for Smart Buildings and Cities), Banff, Alberta, Canada, June 22, 2026. This is the author's accepted manuscript; final published version DOI will be activated after June 22, 2026
summary: Scaling data-driven energy forecasting to district level requires models that can be re-used across buildings with minimal target-domain data and honest uncertainty estimates. We present an uncertainty-aware transfer learning (TL) framework for cross-building energy forecasting based on the Temporal Fusion Transformer (TFT), evaluated on a newly released high-resolution real sub-meter dataset: an educational building at Aalborg University, Denmark (source) and the multi-typology NEST building at EMPA, Switzerland (target). We introduce the Transfer Robustness Index (TRI), an architecture-agnostic metric for quantifying generalization quality across domain gaps. A four-strategy layer-freezing ablation shows that Probe-Only fine-tuning, updating only 455 output-layer parameters out of 806K, achieves the best transfer quality (TRI = 3,097), outperforming full fine-tuning and suggesting that TFT encoders learn transferable temporal representations. Monte Carlo Dropout yields a prediction interval coverage probability of 93.2%, close to the nominal 95% target. A data-scarcity analysis further shows monotonic improvement with increasing target-domain data, providing practical guidance for district energy deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于时间融合变换器（TFT）的不确定性感知迁移学习框架，用于跨建筑能源预测。在丹麦奥尔堡大学（源域）和瑞士EMPA的NEST建筑（目标域）上评估，引入迁移鲁棒性指数（TRI）量化泛化质量。实验表明，仅更新455个输出层参数的Probe-Only微调策略效果最佳（TRI=3,097），优于全微调。Monte Carlo Dropout实现了93.2%的预测区间覆盖概率。数据稀缺性分析显示目标域数据增加带来单调性能提升。
AI.motivation: 将数据驱动的能源预测扩展到区域级别，需要能够在最小目标域数据下跨建筑复用的模型，并具备诚实的（即校准良好的）不确定性估计。
AI.method: 提出基于TFT的不确定性感知迁移学习框架；引入TRI指标（架构无关的泛化质量度量）；采用四策略层冻结消融实验（Probe-Only微调仅更新455/806K参数）；使用Monte Carlo Dropout进行不确定性量化。
AI.result: Probe-Only微调达到最佳迁移质量（TRI=3,097），优于全微调；Monte Carlo Dropout的预测区间覆盖概率93.2%（接近95%目标）；数据稀缺性分析显示单调改进趋势。
AI.conclusion: TFT编码器能够学习可迁移的时序表示；Probe-Only微调是最有效的跨建筑迁移策略；该方法为区域级能源部署提供了实用指导。

title: Domino: Decoupling Causal Modeling from Autoregressive Drafting in Speculative Decoding
summary: Speculative decoding accelerates LLM inference by drafting multiple tokens and verifying them in parallel with the target model. However, its practical speedup is constrained by the trade-off between draft quality and drafting cost: autoregressive drafters model causal dependencies among draft tokens but incur sequential overhead, while parallel drafters reduce drafting cost but weaken intra-block dependency modeling. In this paper, we propose Domino, a speculative decoding framework that decouples causal dependency modeling from expensive autoregressive draft execution. Domino first uses a parallel draft backbone to produce preliminary draft distributions for the entire block, and then applies a lightweight Domino head to refine them with prefix-dependent causal information. To stabilize teacher-forced causal encoding, we further introduce a base-anchored training curriculum that first strengthens the parallel backbone and then gradually shifts optimization toward the causally corrected final distribution. Experiments on Qwen3 models show that Domino achieves up to \(5.49\times\) end-to-end speedup under the Transformers backend and up to \(5.8\times\) throughput speedup under SGLang serving.

AI.tldr: Domino提出了一种解耦因果依赖建模与自回归草稿执行的推测性解码框架，通过并行草稿主干加轻量级Domino头实现高效推理，在Qwen3模型上最高达到5.8倍吞吐加速。
AI.motivation: 现有推测性解码方法在草稿质量和草稿成本之间存在权衡：自回归草稿器能建模因果依赖但带来顺序开销，并行草稿器降低草稿成本却削弱了块内依赖建模。
AI.method: 提出Domino框架，采用并行草稿骨干生成初步草稿分布，再用轻量级Domino头注入前缀相关的因果信息进行精炼；同时引入基于锚点的训练课程，先强化并行骨干，再逐步优化至因果校正的最终分布。
AI.result: 在Qwen3模型上，Transformers后端端到端加速最高达5.49倍，SGLang服务下吞吐加速最高达5.8倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦因果依赖建模与自回归执行，Domino有效打破了草稿质量与成本的权衡，实现了显著的推理加速。

title: EVL-ECG: Efficient ECG Interpretation With Multi-Aspect Heterogeneous Knowledge Distillation
comment: Accepted at the SD4H Workshop at ICML 2026. 11 pages, 3 figures
summary: High-fidelity ECG interpretation is increasingly reliant on massive foundation models, yet their deployment in clinical edge-care remains hindered by extreme computational demands. While knowledge distillation (KD) is a promising solution, traditional methods fail to capture the complex spatio-temporal dependencies of ECG signals when transferring knowledge across heterogeneous architectures. In this paper, we propose EVL-ECG, a framework specifically designed for cross-architecture distillation of cardiac diagnostic logic. EVL-ECG introduces three ECG-aware innovations: (1) Multi-Head Cross-Attention Alignment, which harmonizes architectural discrepancies to preserve fine-grained morphological features; (2) Optimal Transport-based Visual Feature Matching, utilizing optimal transport to maintain global structural relationships across ECG leads despite mismatched token representations; and (3) Geometric Intra-Architecture Relation Matching, which distills the latent diagnostic reasoning of the teacher model. Evaluations across ECG benchmarks demonstrate that EVL-ECG yields improvements of up to 2.4% AUC and 1.1% clinical accuracy over existing baselines. Notably, EVL-ECG establishes an efficient 2B-parameter ECG foundation model, suitable for resource-constrained clinical environments.

AI.tldr: 提出EVL-ECG框架，通过三种ECG感知创新（多头交叉注意力对齐、最优传输视觉特征匹配、几何架构内关系匹配）实现跨架构知识蒸馏，在资源受限的临床边缘场景下高效部署ECG基础模型，性能提升达2.4% AUC和1.1%临床准确率。
AI.motivation: 高保真ECG解读日益依赖大规模基础模型，但极端计算需求阻碍了其在临床边缘计算的部署。传统知识蒸馏方法在跨异构架构迁移知识时，无法捕获ECG信号复杂的时空依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出EVL-ECG框架，包含三个ECG感知创新：(1)多头交叉注意力对齐，协调架构差异以保留细粒度形态特征；(2)基于最优传输的视觉特征匹配，在token表示不匹配的情况下维持跨导联全局结构关系；(3)几何架构内关系匹配，蒸馏教师模型的潜在诊断推理能力。
AI.result: 在ECG基准测试中，EVL-ECG相比现有基线方法在AUC上提升高达2.4%，临床准确率提升1.1%。成功建立了高效的2B参数ECG基础模型，适用于资源受限的临床环境。
AI.conclusion: EVL-ECG通过专门设计的跨架构蒸馏方法，有效解决了ECG基础模型在边缘临床部署中的计算瓶颈，在保持高保真诊断能力的同时显著降低了模型复杂度。

title: Convex Basins in Single-Index Model Loss Landscapes: Applications to Robust Recovery under Strong Adversarial Corruption
summary: We study the problem of robustly learning Gaussian Single Index Models (SIMs) in the presence of heavy-tailed noise and a constant fraction of adversarially corrupted covariates and responses. Prior work on robust recovery has considered settings such as linear regression (Pensia et al., JASA 2024), strictly monotonic link functions (Awasthi et al., NeurIPS 2022), and phase retrieval (Buna and Rebeschini, AISTATS 2025). However, these techniques do not extend to generic asymmetric non-monotonic link functions such as \textsc{GeLU} and \textsc{Swish}, which arise naturally as scalar primitives in modern gated neural architectures. We close this gap by giving the first robust recovery algorithm with near-linear sample and time complexity for generic non-monotonic link functions, thereby establishing the first robust recovery guarantees for a broad family of nonlinear SIMs for which \textit{no guarantees were previously known}. Our central contribution is a new structural understanding of the Gaussian squared-loss landscape under adversarial contamination. Crucially, we prove that for a broad class of nonlinear non-monotonic SIMs, a dimension-independent, constant-radius convex basin exists around the ground truth and is efficiently reachable via robust spectral initialization even under adversarial contamination. Prior works fail to establish both guarantees simultaneously, thereby either breaking down under adversarial contamination or failing to handle generic non-monotonic link functions. Together, these structural insights yield a principled warm start for robust gradient descent that provably converges to a final estimation error of $O(σ\sqrtε)$ in $\tilde{O}(nd)$ time with $\tilde{O}(d)$ samples, where $ε$ is the contamination fraction.

AI.tldr: 本文首次在存在重尾噪声和对抗性污染的情况下，针对通用非单调链接函数（如GeLU和Swish）的高斯单指标模型（SIMs）给出了鲁棒恢复算法，实现了近线性的样本和时间复杂度。核心贡献在于揭示了对抗污染下高斯平方损失景观的结构特性，证明存在一个维度无关的常半径凸盆地，且可通过鲁棒谱初始化高效到达。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒恢复方法（如线性回归、严格单调链接函数、相位恢复）无法处理现代门控神经架构中广泛使用的通用非对称非单调链接函数（如GeLU和Swish），对此类SIMs的鲁棒恢复保证完全空白，亟需填补。
AI.method: 1. 理论分析对抗污染下高斯平方损失景观的结构，证明存在维度无关的常半径凸盆地；2. 提出鲁棒谱初始化方法，在对抗污染下高效到达该凸盆地；3. 在此基础上进行鲁棒梯度下降，实现收敛保证。
AI.result: 算法在$\tilde{O}(nd)$时间和$\tilde{O}(d)$样本下，达到$O(σ\sqrtε)$的最终估计误差（$ε$为污染比例），实现了近线性的样本和时间复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 首次为通用非单调链接函数的SIMs提供了鲁棒恢复保证，填补了该领域的重要空白，其结构见解可为后续鲁棒深度学习理论提供基础。

title: Citation-Closure Retrieval and Per-Rule Attribution for Real-World Regulatory Compliance Question Answering
summary: Deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) for regulatory compliance demands rigorous traceability via comprehensive citations across multi-tiered authority structures. Unlike traditional multi-hop or legal QA, this task requires structured procedural lookups and evidence-set closure rather than entity resolution or case-law reasoning. Existing RAG systems struggle here due to flattened citation edges, fragmented retrieval expansions, and fragile post-hoc attribution. We formalize Regulatory Compliance QA with RegOps-Bench, a novel benchmark featuring an Operational Knowledge Graph derived from complex national R\&D regulations. To address these bottlenecks, we propose RefWalk, a unified framework driven by a shared topic anchor. RefWalk traverses cross-document citations, fuses multi-view candidates via max-based aggregation, and enforces per-rule attribution to explicitly map claims to sources. We establish a strong baseline with substantial improvements in retrieval recall and citation accuracy. Finally, a contrastive evaluation on a U.S. health compliance dataset (HIPAA) reveals that existing systems exhibit saturation on flat-structure rules, underscoring the need for RegOps-Bench. Our code is available at https://github.com/yeongjoonJu/RefWalk.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RegOps-Bench基准测试和RefWalk框架，专门解决LLM在法规合规问答中的多层级引用溯源问题，显著提升了检索召回率和引用准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有RAG系统在处理法规合规任务时面临三大瓶颈：扁平化引用边、碎片化检索扩展、脆弱的归因机制，无法满足多层级权力结构下的严格可追溯性要求。
AI.method: 提出RefWalk统一框架：1) 基于共享主题锚点遍历跨文档引用；2) 通过基于最大值的聚合融合多视角候选结果；3) 实施逐规则归因，显式映射声明到源文档。
AI.result: 在RegOps-Bench上取得显著改进，检索召回率和引用准确性大幅提升；在HIPAA数据集上的对比评估显示现有系统在扁平结构规则上已饱和。
AI.conclusion: RegOps-Bench有效揭示现有系统的局限性，RefWalk为法规合规QA提供了强有力的基线方法，代码已开源。

title: Understanding Safety-Sensitive Expert Behavior in Mixture-of-Experts LLMs
summary:
Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) LLMs rely on sparse, router-driven expert activation, yet how safety alignment interacts with routed expert specialization remains underexplored. A common intuition is that safety behavior may be controlled by routing harmful requests to distinct refusal-oriented experts. In this work, we provide empirical evidence for a different picture: routing patterns in aligned MoE LLMs are largely topic-driven, while safety behavior can be altered with little change to the model's intrinsic routing path.
  Motivated by this observation, we present **RASET** (**R**outer-**A**gnostic **S**afety-critical **E**xpert **T**uning), a red-teaming framework that probes safety enforcement that is localized in a small subset of experts while preserving the model's intrinsic routing behavior. **RASET** identifies safety-critical experts via a contrastive routing-sensitivity criterion and applies parameter-efficient tuning only to the selected experts, minimizing semantic disruption relative to router-steering interventions. These results reveal a distinct MoE safety risk, highlighting the need for expert-aware alignment mechanisms.

AI.tldr: 本文探究MoE大语言模型中安全对齐与专家路由的关系，发现路由主要由主题驱动而非安全行为，并提出RASET框架——通过对比路由敏感性标准识别安全关键专家并进行参数高效微调，揭示MoE模型存在独立于路由的安全风险。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对MoE模型中安全对齐与专家路由专业化之间的相互作用理解不足，需要探究安全行为是否真正依赖于特定的专家路由模式。
AI.method: 提出RASET框架：1) 通过对比路由敏感性标准识别安全关键专家；2) 仅对选中的专家进行参数高效微调，保持模型固有路由行为不变。
AI.result: 发现对齐MoE模型的路由模式主要由主题驱动，而非安全行为；安全行为可以在不显著改变路由路径的情况下被改变。
AI.conclusion: MoE模型存在一种独立于路由机制的安全风险，需要开发专家感知的对齐机制来应对。

title: Genetically Aligned Patient Representations Improve Hematological Diagnosis
comment: Accepted for publication at the 29th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2026
summary: Multimodal alignment of histopathology encoders with transcriptomic and genomic data has been shown to significantly improve performance in downstream diagnostic tasks. Hematological cytology is unique in that visual single-cell evaluation is often paired with cytogenetics and molecular genetics for blood cancer diagnosis. In this study, we present a framework to align single white blood cell images with chromosomal aberrations (karyotype) and somatic mutations from targeted gene panels. Our training strategy follows a two-stage approach: (i) self-supervised, vision-only pretraining of a transformer aggregator using an iBOT head on a cohort of over 1500 patients, and (ii) genetic alignment via supervised contrastive loss on acute myeloid leukemia patients. Our genetically aligned patient encoder improves hematological diagnostic tasks, outperforming slide-level histopathology foundation models. Additionally, the model provides off-the-shelf retrieval capabilities for diseases and genetic alterations. Incorporating genetic data into patient encoders increases the quality of patient representations, providing a framework that aligns with clinical diagnostic workflows and paves the way for future multimodal hematology-specific AI. The code and model weights are available at https://github.com/marrlab/GenBloom.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenBloom框架，通过两阶段训练（自监督视觉预训练+遗传监督对比学习）将单细胞白血病图像与染色体畸变及基因突变对齐，构建多模态患者编码器，在血液学诊断任务中优于现有组织病理学基础模型。
AI.motivation: 血液学细胞学诊断中，单细胞形态学评估常与细胞遗传学、分子遗传学数据结合，但现有方法未能有效对齐这些多模态数据以提升诊断性能。
AI.method: 两阶段训练：(i) 在1500+患者数据上使用iBOT头进行自监督视觉预训练，训练Transformer聚合器；(ii) 对急性髓系白血病患者使用监督对比损失进行遗传对齐。
AI.result: 遗传对齐的患者编码器在血液学诊断任务上优于基于全切片图像的组织病理学基础模型，并具备疾病和遗传变异的即用检索能力。
AI.conclusion: 整合遗传数据提升了患者表征质量，该框架与临床诊断流程一致，为未来多模态血液学AI奠定基础。

title: Quotient DAGs for Off-Policy Evaluation:Forward-Flow Importance Sampling and Exact Slate Propensities
summary: Off-policy evaluation estimates how a target policy would perform using data collected by a different behavior policy, which is crucial when online testing is costly or risky, such as in recommendation or healthcare. Standard importance sampling reweights each logged trajectory, but it can treat details of the generation process as meaningful even when the evaluation target ignores them: for example, an autoregressive slate recommender may generate an ordered sequence of items while the reward and downstream estimator depend only on the unordered slate. This creates nuisance variance and a computational gap, since exact unordered slate propensities require summing over all generation orders. We introduce a quotient-DAG view that merges histories equivalent for evaluation and assigns weights using target-to-behavior forward-flow ratios on the merged graph. For slate recommendation under a set-sufficient next-item interface, this yields Forward-DP, a subset-DAG dynamic program that computes exact unordered propensities without factorial enumeration. The resulting propensity primitive enables practical propensity-based evaluation and model selection for context-dependent autoregressive slate loggers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于商DAG的视角来解决离线策略评估中因无序板级推荐产生的方差和计算问题，通过Forward-DP算法计算精确的无序倾向性得分，无需阶乘枚举。
AI.motivation: 标准重要性采样方法在评估无序板级推荐时，将生成过程中的有序细节视为有意义，而评估目标只关注无序集合，这导致了不必要的方差和计算困难（需要枚举所有生成顺序来计算精确的倾向性得分）。
AI.method: 引入商DAG（quotient-DAG）视图，合并对评估等价的轨迹历史，并使用目标策略与行为策略在前向流比（forward-flow ratios）在合并图上分配权重。针对板级推荐，提出Forward-DP算法，一种子集DAG动态规划，能够在无需阶乘枚举的情况下精确计算无序倾向性得分。
AI.result: Forward-DP算法能够精确计算无序板级推荐的倾向性得分，为基于倾向性的评估和模型选择提供了实用的基础工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了自回归板级记录器在上下文相关场景下的离线策略评估问题，弥合了生成过程与评估目标之间的计算鸿沟。

title: Personalized Turn-Level User Conversation Satisfaction Benchmark
summary: User satisfaction with AI assistants is highly personalized: the same response may satisfy one user but disappoint another depending on what each user expects and what they have asked for before.
