Existing automatic evaluation methods mostly measure generic response quality, making it difficult to judge whether a response satisfies a user at a specific turn. We study this problem as personalized turn-level user conversation satisfaction evaluation. We build a conversation satisfaction evaluator that combines compact user memories with target-turn context to produce satisfaction scores and dissatisfaction-oriented rationales. Meta-evaluation against human satisfaction annotations shows that personalized memory and post-hoc score calibration improve ordinal agreement and dissatisfied-turn detection over supervised, retrieval-based, and generic LLM-as-a-judge baselines. We further introduce PersTurnBench, a personalized turn-level user conversation satisfaction benchmark that uses the verified evaluator to assess generation models via replay. By holding the replay state fixed, PersTurnBench enables controlled comparison of generic generation models and memory-augmented personalized systems without new human labels for every candidate model. The evaluator and benchmark let researchers compare candidate generation models on personalized satisfaction without collecting new user feedback for every model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了AI助手中个性化的用户对话满意度评估问题，提出了结合用户记忆与目标回合上下文的满意度评估器，并构建了PersTurnBench基准，用于在不收集新用户反馈的情况下比较不同生成模型的个性化满意度。
AI.motivation: 现有自动评估方法主要衡量通用回复质量，难以判断特定回合下用户是否满意，而用户对AI助手的满意度具有高度个性化特点（同一回复可能让不同用户产生不同感受）。
AI.method: 构建结合紧凑用户记忆与目标回合上下文的满意度评估器，生成满意度评分和不满意的理由；引入事后分数校准；提出PersTurnBench基准，通过固定回放状态实现不同生成模型的可控比较。
AI.result: 个性化记忆和事后分数校准在序数一致性和不满回合检测上优于监督式、检索式和通用LLM-as-a-judge基线。
AI.conclusion: 该评估器和基准使研究人员无需为每个模型收集新用户反馈，即可在个性化满意度上比较候选生成模型。

title: FRUC: Feedforward Dynamic Scene Reconstruction from Uncalibrated Collaborative Driving Views
summary: We present FRUC, a feed-forward 3D Gaussian splatting framework for dynamic scene reconstruction from uncalibrated collaborative driving views. Existing multi-agent reconstruction frameworks are often hindered by rigid prerequisites, demanding precise spatial calibration and slow per-scene optimization. In this paper, we rethink this task by conceptualizing a distributed multi-vehicle network as a spatio-temporally unstructured ego-centric multi-camera system, where the core challenge lies in enhancing ego-centric occluded geometry through collaboration without degrading the ego's accurately observed visible geometry, while preserving reconstruction efficiency. For efficient reconstruction, FRUC is built upon a visual grounded geometric Transformer backbone to enable one-shot, calibration-free inference from a flexible number of multi-vehicle views. To achieve non-destructive geometric supplementation under uncalibrated cross-agent misalignment, FRUC first introduces an ego-centric causal occlusion field that explicitly derives occlusion evolution as latent priors by modeling agent-wise spatio-temporal correlations. Guided by these occlusion priors, it further formulates cross-agent integration as a deterministic residual denoising process via zero-initialized injection, turning challenging cross-agent fusion into bounded residual learning for robust collaborative blind-spot completion. Through extensive evaluations on the real-world V2XReal and UrbanIng-V2X datasets, FRUC is shown to be a new state-of-the-art for the scene reconstruction of dynamic collaborative driving environments, significantly outperforming existing methods in both rendering quality and efficiency.

AI.tldr: FRUC是一个前馈式3D高斯泼溅框架，用于从非标定的协作驾驶视角进行动态场景重建。它通过视觉接地几何Transformer实现一次性、免标定推理，引入以自我为中心的因果遮挡场建模跨智能体时空相关性，并将跨智能体融合建模为确定性残差去噪过程，在保持高效重建的同时实现非破坏性几何补充，在真实数据集上达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有多智能体重建框架依赖精确空间标定和逐场景优化，效率低下。核心挑战在于如何在无需标定的多车协作中，增强自我中心被遮挡几何体而不破坏已准确观测的可见几何体，同时保持重建效率。
AI.method: 1) 构建视觉接地几何Transformer主干，实现从灵活数量的多车视角进行一次性的免标定推理；2) 引入自我中心因果遮挡场，通过建模智能体间时空关联显式推导遮挡演化的潜在先验；3) 将跨智能体融合建模为确定性残差去噪过程，通过零初始化注入将跨智能体融合转化为有界残差学习，实现鲁棒的协作盲区补全。
AI.result: 在V2XReal和UrbanIng-V2X两个真实数据集上，FRUC在渲染质量和效率两方面均显著优于现有方法，达到新的SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: FRUC通过非标定、前馈式的高效框架成功解决了动态协作驾驶场景中的场景重建问题，为多智能体视觉协作提供了新的有效范式。

title: K-FinHallu: A Hallucination Detection Benchmark for Multi-Turn RAG in Korean Finance
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have advanced financial automation through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), yet hallucinations remain a critical barrier to deployment in high-stakes environments. Existing benchmarks focus on single-turn, English-centric tasks, leaving the multi-turn dynamics and linguistic-regulatory nuances of the Korean financial domain unaddressed. We introduce K-FinHallu, the first benchmark for hallucination detection in multi-turn Korean financial RAG. We construct multi-turn dialogues from authentic Korean financial documents and inject hallucinations under a proposed hierarchical taxonomy based on context answerability that explicitly accounts for justified abstention. Benchmarking frontier and open-source LLMs as hallucination detectors, we find that even the strongest models struggle with fine-grained financial diagnostics and refusal behavior. While fine-tuning an 8B model on our training split yields performance competitive with frontier LLMs, justified abstention remains the weakest axis across all evaluated models.

AI.tldr: K-FinHallu는 한국 금융 RAG 시스템의 환각 탐지를 위한 최초의 다중 턴 벤치마크로, 정당한 기권을 포함한 계층적 환각 분류 체계를 제시하고, 최첨단 모델도 세밀한 금융 진단과 거절 동작에 어려움을 겪음을 발견했다.
AI.motivation: 기존 환각 탐지 벤치마크는 단일 턴, 영어 중심 태스크에 초점을 맞추고 있어, 다중 턴 역학과 언어·규제적 특성을 지닌 한국 금융 도메인의 환각 문제는 다루지 않았다.
AI.method: 한국 금융 문서에서 다중 턴 대화를 구축하고, 문맥 응답 가능성(Context Answerability)에 기반한 계층적 환각 분류 체계를 제안하여 정당한 기권(Justified Abstention)을 명시적으로 고려한 후, 프론티어 및 오픈소스 LLM을 환각 탐지기로 벤치마킹했다.
AI.result: 최고 성능 모델도 세밀한 금융 진단과 거절 동작에 어려움을 겪었으며, 8B 모델을 미세조정하여 프론티어 LLM과 경쟁할 만한 성능을 얻었으나, 정당한 기권(Justified Abstention)은 모든 평가 모델에서 가장 취약한 축으로 남았다.
AI.conclusion: 한국 금융 RAG 환경에서의 환각 탐지는 여전히 어려운 과제이며, 특히 정당한 기권을 적절히 수행하는 능력이 부족하므로 이에 대한 추가 연구가 필요하다.

title: Benchmarking Positional Encoding Strategies for Transformer-Based EEG Foundation Models
summary: Electroencephalography (EEG) is a widely used non-invasive technique for measuring brain activity in brain-computer interface (BCI) applications. Supervised EEG decoding models often struggle to generalize across tasks, subjects, and datasets, motivating transformer-based EEG foundation models trained with self-supervised learning. Since transformers are permutation-invariant, they require explicit positional information. Unlike textual tokens, EEG electrodes are spatially distributed across the scalp, raising the question of how electrode positions should be encoded in transformer-based EEG models. In this study, we benchmark five positional encoding strategies within the CBraMod backbone and evaluate them under linear probing and fine-tuning protocols on motor imagery classification and emotion recognition. Our results show that no single strategy consistently outperforms across tasks. Spherical Positional Encoding (SPE) yields strong representations for motor imagery but underperforms on emotion recognition, while Asymmetric Conditional Positional Encoding (ACPE) demonstrates more consistent performance across tasks. These findings suggest that the optimal positional encoding strategy is task-dependent, with no universal solution across EEG decoding scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文在CBraMod骨干网络中基准测试了五种位置编码策略，发现没有一种策略能在所有任务中表现一致——球面位置编码（SPE）在运动想象任务中表现优异但在情感识别中较差，而非对称条件位置编码（ACPE）则表现更稳定，表明最优策略取决于具体任务。
AI.motivation: EEG解码模型泛化能力差，Transformer需要位置编码，但EEG电极的空间分布特性与文本不同，现有工作缺乏对电极位置编码策略的系统比较。
AI.method: 在CBraMod骨干网络中基准测试五种位置编码策略（包括SPE和ACPE等），采用线性探测和微调两种评估协议，在运动想象分类和情感识别两个任务上进行比较。
AI.result: SPE在运动想象任务上表现最强，但在情感识别上表现不佳；ACPE则在两个任务上均表现更稳定。没有任何一种策略能一致领先。
AI.conclusion: 最优位置编码策略具有任务依赖性，不存在适用于所有EEG解码场景的通用解决方案。

title: Teaching Language Models to Check Grounded Claim Factuality with Human Test-Taking Strategies
summary: Grounded claim factuality checking is important for large language model (LLM) applications such as retrieval-augmented generation, as it helps users assess the correctness of generated outputs. Existing metrics using entailment classifiers require dataset-specific threshold tuning, while LLM-based approaches often use direct prompting, which underutilises the reasoning capabilities of LLMs. We address this by formulating grounded claim factuality checking as a true/false reading comprehension task and prompting LLMs with explicit test-taking strategies for efficient reasoning. Our method reduces token usage by over 80% compared to unguided open-ended reasoning, and achieves competitive performance to more expensive alternatives across two factuality benchmarks, setting a new state of the art on one. To further reduce inference cost, we train small language models (SLMs) to replace LLMs in the checking pipeline. Using supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and a self-revision mechanism, the SLMs learn to improve their factuality judgements. Experimental results show that the resulting SLMs perform on par with strong baselines, combining low inference costs with generating supporting rationales to support interpretability. Code and datasets will be released upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出将 grounded 事实验证建模为真/假阅读理解任务，通过提示 LLM 使用应试策略实现高效推理，相比无引导推理减少 80% 以上 token 消耗，并在一个基准上达到 SOTA。同时，通过监督微调和自我修正机制训练小型语言模型（SLM）替代 LLM，在保持低成本的同时实现可比的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的事实验证方法存在两个问题：基于蕴含分类器的指标需要针对不同数据集调整阈值；基于 LLM 的方法直接提示，未能充分利用其推理能力，且成本较高。因此需要一种更高效、更经济的 grounded 事实验证方法。
AI.method: 将 grounded 事实验证建模为真/假阅读理解任务，用应试策略提示 LLM 进行推理；同时训练 SLM 替代 LLM，采用监督微调（SFT）和自我修正机制提升判断质量。
AI.result: token 消耗降低 80% 以上；在两个基准上达到与更昂贵方法竞争的性能，其中在一个基准上取得 SOTA；训练的 SLM 与强基线方法性能相当。
AI.conclusion: 将事实验证建模为阅读理解任务并引入应试策略能显著提升推理效率，而通过 SFT 和自我修正训练的 SLM 可在低成本下实现可比的验证效果，兼具可解释性。

title: EarlyTom: Early Token Compression Completes Fast Video Understanding
comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. 16 pages, 8 figures, 8 tables. Project page: https://viridisgreen.github.io/EarlyTom
summary: Video large language models (Video-LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in video understanding tasks. However, their practical deployment is still hindered by the inefficiency introduced by processing massive amounts of visual tokens. Although recent approaches achieve extremely low token retention ratios while maintaining accuracy comparable to full-token baselines, most of them perform compression only at the late stage of prefilling, leaving the efficiency of the vision encoder unoptimized. In this paper, we first show that vision encoding contributes a large portion to the time-to-first-token (TTFT). Therefore, instead of compressing visual tokens only after the vision encoder, performing compression inside the encoder still leaves substantial room for exploration. Based on this insight, we propose EarlyTom, a training-free token compression framework that performs early-stage visual token compression inside the vision encoder, enabling significantly better TTFT reduction and higher throughput. In addition, we introduce a decoupled spatial token selection strategy that improves the overall compression effectiveness. EarlyTom reduces TTFT by up to 2.65x and FLOPs by up to 61% on a single NVIDIA A100 GPU for the LLaVA-OneVision-7B model, while maintaining accuracy comparable to the full-token baseline. These improvements substantially enhance the practicality of deploying Video-LLMs in real-world production scenarios.

AI.tldr: 提出EarlyTom框架，在视觉编码器内部进行早期token压缩，减少视频大模型的首 token 生成时间（TTFT）和计算量，最高实现2.65倍TTFT降低和61% FLOPs减少，同时保持精度不变。
AI.motivation: 现有Video-LLMs在处理大量视觉token时效率低下，虽然已有方法在预填充后期进行压缩，但视觉编码阶段本身占据了大量TTFT，这一部分的效率瓶颈尚未被充分优化。
AI.method: 提出EarlyTom，一个无需训练（training-free）的token压缩框架，在视觉编码器内部进行早期视觉token压缩；并引入解耦的空间token选择策略以提升压缩效果。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-OneVision-7B模型上，TTFT最高降低2.65倍，FLOPs降低61%，在单张NVIDIA A100 GPU上实现，精度与全token基线相当。
AI.conclusion: EarlyTom通过早期压缩显著提升了Video-LLMs的部署效率，增强了其在实际生产场景中的实用性。

title: Learning to Perturb Hidden Representations for Generalizable Deep Learning
summary: Deep neural networks process data through a cascade of representations: input features, hidden activations, logits, and loss. While perturbations at the input, logit, and label levels have been systematically studied, the intermediate hidden activations, which constitute the bulk of the network's computation, have received no unified perturbation analysis. In this paper, we establish a unified framework for hidden activation perturbation, revealing that Dropout, Manifold Mixup, adversarial feature perturbation, and related methods all impose specific forms of activation perturbation but with class-agnostic or random strategies. We conjecture that expansive perturbation (increasing activation norm) acts as positive augmentation, while contractive perturbation (decreasing activation norm) acts as negative augmentation, and that the perturbation layer determines whether the effect resembles input-level augmentation (shallow layers) or logit-level manipulation (deep layers). We propose Learning to Perturb Activations (LPA), which adaptively perturbs activations at a selected hidden layer with class-level perturbations learned via PGD. We further provide theoretical analysis connecting activation perturbation to flat minima and perturbation amplification through layers. Experiments on balanced classification, long-tail classification, and domain generalization demonstrate that LPA consistently outperforms existing methods and provides complementary benefits to logit perturbation methods such as LPL.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种统一的隐藏激活扰动框架，并设计LPA方法，通过自适应、类别级别的扰动来提升神经网络性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究系统分析了输入、logit和标签层面的扰动，但中间隐藏层激活（占据网络大部分计算）缺乏统一的扰动分析框架。
AI.method: 提出Learning to Perturb Activations (LPA)，在选定隐藏层通过PGD学习类别级别的自适应扰动；同时提供了激活扰动与平坦最小值、逐层扰动放大的理论分析。
AI.result: 在平衡分类、长尾分类和域泛化任务上，LPA一致优于现有方法，并能与logit扰动方法（如LPL）互补增益。
AI.conclusion: 隐藏激活扰动可通过学习自适应、类别级别的策略有效提升网络泛化能力，且与现有方法互补。

title: LFQ: Logit-aware Final-block Quantization for Boosting the Generation Quality of Low-Bit Quantized LLMs
summary: As large language models continue to scale, low-bit weight-only post-training quantization (PTQ) offers a practical solution to their memory-efficient deployment. Although block-wise PTQ is capable of matching the full-precision (FP) baseline on basic language modeling and understanding, its quality is degraded for generative tasks -- especially at longer responses and extended chains of thought, which is critical in boosting task accuracy. We attribute this shortfall to two factors: (i) the omission of the unembedding layer (the LM head) in block-wise optimization and (ii) the reliance on the mean squared error (MSE) objective. Both factors cause the token probability distribution of the quantized model to misalign with that of the FP model, yielding notable accuracy drops on text generation benchmarks. To rectify the discrepancy, we introduce Logit-aware Final-block Quantization (LFQ), a simple yet effective enhancement to block-wise PTQ that quantizes the final Transformer block by minimizing the cross-entropy between the logits of the FP model and those of its quantized counterpart. By aligning token probabilities at the logit level in the final block, LFQ consistently improves the accuracy of complex generation tasks over state-of-the-art block-wise PTQ across diverse model families, while maintaining parity with FP baselines on language modeling and understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LFQ方法，通过优化最后Transformer块的交叉熵损失来对齐量化模型与全精度模型的logits，从而提升低比特后训练量化在生成任务上的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有块级后训练量化在基础语言建模和理解任务上表现良好，但在生成任务（尤其是长回复和长思维链）上质量下降。作者归因于：(i) 优化过程中忽略了unembedding层，(ii) 依赖MSE目标导致量化模型的token概率分布与全精度模型不一致。
AI.method: 提出Logit-aware Final-block Quantization (LFQ)，对最后一个Transformer块进行量化，通过最小化全精度模型与量化模型之间logits的交叉熵损失来对齐token概率分布。
AI.result: LFQ在多种模型家族上，在复杂生成任务上一致优于现有最先进的块级PTQ方法，同时在语言建模和理解任务上与全精度基线持平。
AI.conclusion: 通过聚焦最终块的logit级对齐，LFQ简单有效地弥补了块级PTQ在生成任务上的性能差距。

title: Leveraging Routing Dynamics in Mixture-of-Experts Models for Efficient Language Adaptation
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models are widely used to scale language models, yet their expert routing behavior and adaptation in a multilingual setting remain underexplored. In this work, we study multilingual routing dynamics during continual pre-training of an English-centric MoE model on a multilingual corpus, analyzing how expert usage varies across languages. We find that continual multilingual pre-training leads to diffused, language-agnostic routing in early and middle layers, with language specialization primarily emerging in the final layers. We also show that token-level vocabulary overlap between languages plays an important role in how languages are routed. Motivated by these findings, we propose a parameter-efficient adaptation strategy that updates language-specific and shared experts in the final MoE layers. Experiments on MultiBLiMP and Belebele show that our method achieves a strong performance-efficiency trade-off, attaining competitive performance relative to fine-tuning complete final layers, while updating less than 2% of the parameters. Overall, our findings provide insights into where and how language specialization emerges in MoEs during continual pre-training and provide practical insights for low-resource multilingual adaptation. Our code is available at https://github.com/aditi184/moe-routing-adaptation.

AI.tldr: 研究英文为中心的多专家（MoE）模型在多语言持续预训练中的路由动态，发现前中层表现为语言无关路由，最终层出现语言专业化，并提出仅更新最终层不到2%参数的高效适配方法。
AI.motivation: MoE模型虽广泛用于规模扩展，但其在多语言场景下的专家路由行为及适配机制尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 首先分析多语言持续预训练中路由动态，包括不同层级的专家使用模式及词汇重叠的影响；然后提出参数高效适配策略：仅更新最终MoE层中的语言特定专家和共享专家。
AI.result: 在MultiBLiMP和Belebele上表现优异，更新不到2%的参数即可达到与完整微调最终层相当的性能，实现强性能-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了MoE模型中语言专业化的出现位置与机制，并为低资源语言适配提供了实用指导。

title: VisualThink-VLA: Visual Intermediate Reasoning for Effective and Low-Latency Vision-Language-Action Policies
summary: Recent work has begun to equip vision-language-action (VLA) policies with explicit intermediate reasoning. In embodied control, however, textual chain-of-thought is a poor fit: irrelevant or weakly textual information can interfere with action prediction, while autoregressive text decoding adds too much latency for real-time closed-loop execution. We present VISUALTHINK-VLA, a visual intermediate-reasoning framework for accurate, low-latency VLA policies. Our bootstrapping philosophy is to guide action with effective visual thinking: VISUALTHINK-VLA bootstraps action prediction through a compact visual-evidence interface that preserves spatial precision while avoiding decoding overhead. Besides, to further improve performance and efficiency, VISUALTHINK-VLA adopts a tailored selective routing mechanism to learn the visual evidence tokens, enabling low-latency inference while preserving high-capacity specialization. We also introduce VisualEvidence-Kit, a supervision-and-audit resource centered on a VisualEvidence-Agent that constructs a 754.7k VLA instructions VisualEvidence-Set for route supervision and counterfactual faithfulness tests. Across multiple benchmarks and real-robot evaluation, VISUALTHINK-VLA achieves the highest success rate on most benchmarks while reducing the multi-second latency of reasoning-augmented baselines to the sub-second regime. For example, on BridgeData V2, it reduces step latency from 8.377,s with ECoT to 0.367,s, achieving a 22.8 times speedup.

AI.tldr: VISUALTHINK-VLA 提出了一种视觉中间推理框架，通过紧凑的视觉证据接口和选择性路由机制，在保持高精度的同时将推理增强型 VLA 策略的延迟从多秒降至亚秒级（如 BridgeData V2 上从 8.377s 降至 0.367s，提速 22.8 倍）。
AI.motivation: 现有 VLA 策略引入中间推理（如文本思维链）存在两大问题：1）文本信息与动作预测相关性弱，反而造成干扰；2）自回归文本解码引入过多延迟，无法满足实时闭环控制需求。
AI.method: 1）提出视觉证据接口（Visual-Evidence Interface）：紧凑的视觉表示代替文本思维链，保持空间精度且无解码开销；2）选择性路由机制（Selective Routing）：专门学习视觉证据 token，兼顾低延迟和高容量；3）构建 VisualEvidence-Kit 数据集（754.7k VLA 指令），用于路线监督和反事实忠实性测试。
AI.result: 在多个基准和真实机器人评估中实现最高成功率；延迟从多秒降至亚秒级，BridgeData V2 上延迟从 8.377s 降至 0.367s，实现 22.8 倍加速。
AI.conclusion: 视觉中间推理比文本思维链更适合具身控制任务，VISUALTHINK-VLA 在精度和效率上均显著优于现有推理增强型 VLA 方法。

title: AsymVLM: Asymmetric Token Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Model Inference
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) process thousands of visual tokens per image alongside comparatively few text tokens, yet existing compression methods treat both modalities uniformly. We observe that the two modalities have fundamentally different properties: vision tokens are spatially redundant and dominate prefill, while text tokens are causally dependent and accumulate during decoding. Based on this asymmetry, we propose and empirically evaluate AsymVLM, which applies aggressive pruning to vision tokens before prefill using a learned importance scorer with per-sample adaptive budgeting, and temporal threshold-based eviction to text tokens only when they exceed a fixed budget. Our experiments indicate that AsymVLM achieves the highest FLOPs savings (up to 54%) among state-of-the-art methods while outperforming existing approaches by 2--3% on document and chart understanding tasks where visual information is spatially localized and query-specific, and maintaining competitive accuracy on holistic benchmarks. In text-dominated scenarios, our eviction strategy substantially outperforms standard LLM cache compression methods by adapting to the short-context nature of VLM.

AI.tldr: AsymVLM提出利用视觉与文本模态的不对称性，对视觉token采用自适应剪枝、对文本token采用基于阈值的驱逐策略，实现高达54%的FLOPs节省，并在文档/图表理解任务上领先现有方法2-3%。
AI.motivation: 现有压缩方法对视觉和文本token一视同仁，忽略了二者本质差异：视觉token空间冗余大且主导预填充阶段，文本token因果依赖强且随解码累积。利用这一不对称性可更高效压缩。
AI.method: 1) 视觉token：预填充前用学习的重要性评分器进行激进剪枝，并采用每样本自适应预算分配。2) 文本token：仅当超出固定预算时，基于时间阈值的驱逐策略。
AI.result: 最高节省54% FLOPs；在文档/图表理解任务上比现有方法高2-3%；在文本主导场景下优于标准LLM缓存压缩方法。
AI.conclusion: 利用视觉与文本模态的不对称性进行差异化压缩是有效的，AsymVLM在计算效率和任务精度上均取得显著提升。

title: From XXLTraffic to EvoXXLTraffic: Scaling Traffic Forecasting to Sensor-Evolving Networks
summary: Existing traffic forecasting benchmarks assume a fixed sensor set, but real road-sensor networks grow continuously as the road network changes year by year. We introduce the XXLTraffic dataset family, which spans up to 27 years of California PeMS and Transport for NSW data. The fixed-sensor subsets of XXLTraffic support extremely long forecasting with multi-year gaps and standard hourly / daily long-horizon forecasting. We extend it to EvoXXLTraffic, a sensor-evolving reorganization that exposes per-year active sensors, yearly traffic-flow matrices, and yearly graph snapshots across nine PeMS districts, with growth ratios ranging from +305% to over +10,000%. We define a yearly streaming forecasting protocol on EvoXXLTraffic in which each calendar year is a continual task, and benchmark a wide range of representative baselines drawn from static spatio-temporal GNNs, naïve online schemes, evolving-graph continual methods, and retrieval / test-time methods. We find that our ultra-large evolutionary dataset better reflects the real world, and many state-of-the-art (SOTA) results no longer work. Our dataset complements existing benchmarks by enabling more realistic forecasting under ultra-long evolutionary road networks.

AI.tldr: 提出XXLTraffic（长达27年的交通数据集）及EvoXXLTraffic（传感器不断演化的版本），定义年度流式预测协议，发现许多SOTA方法在演化路网下失效。
AI.motivation: 现有交通预测基准假设传感器固定不变，但真实路网中的传感器网络会逐年增长，现有基准无法反映这种演化特性。
AI.method: 构建XXLTraffic数据集（27年加州PeMS+新州交通数据），并扩展为EvoXXLTraffic（保留逐年活跃传感器、流量矩阵和图快照）。定义年度流式预测协议，将每年视为一个持续任务，在增长比+305%至+10000%+的9个PeMS区域上评估多种基线方法。
AI.result: 超大型演化数据集更能反映真实世界；许多在固定传感器上SOTA的方法在演化设置下不再有效。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集补充了现有基准，支持在超长演化路网下进行更真实的预测评估。

title: User-Aware Active Knowledge Acquisition for Emotional Support Dialogue
summary: Emotional support plays an important role in dialogue systems, and its success depends on adapting to a user's evolving and implicit needs across multi-turn interactions while leveraging the strong reasoning capacity of large language models. However, since signals about user needs are often weak, indirect, and can only be disambiguated through multi-turn interaction, existing emotional support methods often struggle to acquire and generalize relevant conversational knowledge efficiently. To bridge this gap, we introduce User-Aware Active Knowledge Acquisition (UKA), a gradient-free active dialogue learning framework that explicitly represents uncertainty about user needs and incorporates active learning into both knowledge acquisition and response selection.We propose a Theory-of-Mind uncertainty estimation mechanism that allows the model to prioritize responses, thereby eliciting more informative user feedback. UKA is capable of efficiently exploring user-aligned conversational knowledge during training while maintaining robustness at test time. Experiments across multiple dialogue benchmarks and model architectures demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms strong baselines in dialogue quality and user alignment.

AI.tldr: 提出UKA框架，通过主动学习和心智理论不确定性估计，在多轮对话中高效获取用户知识以提升情感支持质量。
AI.motivation: 现有情感支持对话系统难以从用户弱信号中高效获取和泛化对话知识，无法适应多轮交互中用户动态、隐式的需求。
AI.method: 提出UKA（用户感知主动知识获取）框架，包含：1) 基于心智理论的不确定性估计机制，优先选择能获取更多用户反馈的回复；2) 将主动学习同时应用于知识获取和回复选择；3) 无梯度的主动对话学习框架。
AI.result: 在多个对话基准和模型架构上，UKA在对话质量和用户对齐方面持续优于强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: UKA通过主动探索用户对齐的对话知识，在训练时高效学习，在测试时保持鲁棒性，有效提升了情感支持对话系统的性能。

title: DocRetriever: A Plug-and-Play Framework for Multimodal Document Retrieval with Comprehensive Benchmark
summary: Multimodal documents contain diverse elements, such as tables, figures, and layouts, which can complicate retrieval tasks. While current approaches typically combine dense visual embedding models with supervised rerankers to achieve high-precision retrieval, they face inherent limitations. First, the coarse-grained nature of dense embeddings tends to obfuscate explicit semantics, failing to leverage structurally salient information. Second, supervised reranking models suffer from generalization bottlenecks, as their performance heavily relies on domain-specific training data. Furthermore, existing benchmarks often lack diverse assessment dimensions and comprehensive relevance annotations, limiting reliable evaluation. To address these challenges, we propose DocRetriever, a plug-and-play framework. It enhances visual retrieval via a layout-aware sparse embedding technique, enabling effective hybrid encoding without the overhead of optical character recognition (OCR). We also introduce a generalizable reranker that leverages reasoning-augmented demonstrations and optimized sampling to improve accuracy in few-shot settings. Finally, we construct a new benchmark, MultiDocR, to enable more rigorous evaluation. Experiments across diverse benchmarks validate DocRetriever's superiority over state-of-the-art methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DocRetriever框架，通过布局感知稀疏嵌入（无需OCR）和推理增强的少样本重排序器解决多模态文档检索中的语义模糊和泛化瓶颈问题，并构建了MultiDocR评估基准，实验表明其优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法存在三个局限：1）稠密嵌入的粗粒度特性混淆显式语义，未能利用结构突出信息；2）监督重排序模型依赖领域特定训练数据，存在泛化瓶颈；3）现有基准缺乏多维评估指标和全面相关性标注，难以可靠评测。
AI.method: 1）提出布局感知的稀疏嵌入技术，无需OCR即可实现混合编码；2）引入基于推理增强示范和优化采样的可泛化重排序器，提升少样本场景准确性；3）构建MultiDocR新基准用于严格评估。
AI.result: 在多个基准上的实验表明，DocRetriever优于当前最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DocRetriever作为即插即用框架，有效解决了多模态文档检索中稠密嵌入语义模糊和重排序器泛化瓶颈问题，MultiDocR基准为更可靠的评估提供了支撑。

title: SCOPE: A Lightweight-training LLM Framework for Air Traffic Control Readback Monitoring
summary: Pilot readback of Air Traffic Control (ATC) voice instructions is a primary safeguard against miscommunication in air transportation. However, readback anomalies remain implicated in approximately 80% of aviation incidents. This vulnerability is further exacerbated by rising traffic volume and elevated cognitive workload, thereby motivating automated readback monitoring by machine. Traditional rule-based and machine learning approaches struggle to generalize across the highly variable and evolving phraseology of air traffic controller-pilot communications. While Large Language Models (LLMs) have opened a new avenue through their strong reasoning and generalization capabilities, existing approaches still face deployment and computational barriers in practice. In this work, we propose Semantic reasoning for Communication via Open-set Plug-in with Examples (SCOPE), a novel lightweight-training LLM framework that advances both the efficiency and accuracy of machine-based ATC readback monitoring. The core idea is to couple a plug-in open-set classifier with a carefully designed in-context learning mechanism on top of a frozen LLM. Extensive experiments on the semi-synthetic communication dataset show that SCOPE attains superior accuracy while delivering the low-latency response required for operational environments. Under a few-shot setting, SCOPE achieves 91.05% accuracy in open-set detection and corrects 96.63% of anomalous readbacks, thereby outperforming the strongest available baselines while providing explanations for its decisions. These findings demonstrate the potential of our framework as a practical pathway toward interpretable and controllable ATC readback monitoring.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SCOPE框架，通过将冻结的LLM与开放集分类器和上下文学习机制相结合，实现了高效、准确的可解释航空交通管制指令复诵监控，在少量样本下达到91.05%的检测准确率和96.63%的异常纠正率。
AI.motivation: 航空交通管制（ATC）指令复诵异常约涉及80%的航空事故，传统规则和机器学习方法难以泛化至多变术语，而现有LLM方法面临部署和计算瓶颈，亟需高效准确的自动化复诵监控方案。
AI.method: 提出SCOPE框架，核心思路是在冻结的LLM之上，耦合一个开放集分类器插件并结合精心设计的上下文学习（in-context learning）机制，通过轻量级训练实现语义推理。
AI.result: 在半合成通信数据集上，SCOPE在少量样本设定下开放集检测准确率达91.05%，异常复诵纠正率达96.63%，优于最强基线方法，同时具备低延迟响应能力。
AI.conclusion: SCOPE框架为ATC复诵监控提供了一条实用路径，兼具可解释性和可控性，有望实际部署于运行环境。

title: Croissant Tasks: A Metadata Format for Reproducible Machine Learning Evaluations
summary: Reproducibility is fundamental to the scientific method, yet remains a critical challenge in machine learning. Contributing factors include underspecified execution details and brittle software environments. Human-centric remedies, such as checklists and manual verification, help but require intensive effort and fail to scale. To address this, we introduce Croissant Tasks: a declarative, machine-actionable metadata format that abstracts low-level implementation details into high-level specifications. This format enables conceptual reproducibility: verifying claims via independent, agent-generated implementations rather than brittle source code replication. We contribute: (1) the Croissant Tasks specification, formally decoupling task problem from solution; (2) an automated LLM pipeline that retrofits existing benchmarks into this format; and (3) empirical validation showing autonomous agents can ingest these specifications to generate functional, accurate reproduction pipelines from scratch. We envision this format as a new foundation for automated and conceptual reproducibility in machine learning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 Croissant Tasks，一种声明式、机器可执行的元数据格式，将底层实现细节抽象为高层规范，使智能体能够基于概念描述而非源代码复现实验结果，从而解决机器学习中的可重复性危机。
AI.motivation: 机器学习中可重复性面临严峻挑战，主要原因包括执行细节描述不足和脆弱的软件环境。现有基于人工的解决方案（如检查表和手动验证）虽然有效但成本高、难以扩展，亟需自动化、可扩展的替代方案。
AI.method: (1) 设计 Croissant Tasks 规范，形式化地将任务问题与解决方案解耦；(2) 开发自动化 LLM 流水线，将现有基准测试转换为该格式；(3) 通过自主智能体实验验证该格式的有效性。
AI.result: 自主智能体能够读取 Croissant Tasks 规范并从头生成功能完整、准确的可复现流水线，证明了该格式在实现概念可重复性方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Croissant Tasks 有望成为机器学习中自动化、概念可重复性的新基础框架，推动从源代码复制的脆弱方式向基于高层规范的独立实现验证模式转变。

title: HTAM: Hierarchical Transition-Attended Memory for Operator Optimization
summary: High-performance GPU kernels are essential for efficient LLM deployment, yet optimizing them remains expertise-intensive. Recent LLM-based code generation makes automatic GPU operator generation promising, but operator optimization remains a hardware-aware search problem. Existing LLM-based methods face a granularity mismatch: coarse hints are reusable but hard to execute, whereas detailed memories are actionable but enlarge the search space and obscure optimization bottlenecks. The key challenge is therefore to organize optimization experience at an appropriate granularity. To address this issue, this paper proposes HTAM (Hierarchical Transition-Attended Memory), a coarse-to-fine framework for LLM-based operator optimization. HTAM builds a two-level Hierarchical Transition Graph (HTG) to organize coarse global directions, detailed local strategies, and transition experience between optimization steps. During each evolution step, HTAM selects a global direction from the current state and recent optimization history, retrieves the corresponding local strategy memory, and uses it to guide concrete CUDA code generation. Experiments on the full KernelBench suite demonstrate that HTAM consistently improves correctness, fast-solution rate, and speedup over LLM-based baselines, while backend and Robust-KBench studies indicate transferable benefits from structured memory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HTAM，一种层次化过渡关注记忆框架，通过粗到细的组织方式（全局方向→局部策略→过渡经验）解决LLM在GPU算子优化中的粒度不匹配问题，在KernelBench上显著提升正确率、快速解率和加速比。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-based算子优化方法面临粒度不匹配：粗粒度提示可复用但难以执行，细粒度记忆虽可操作但扩大搜索空间并模糊优化瓶颈。需要以合适的粒度组织优化经验。
AI.method: 提出HTAM框架，构建两级层次化过渡图（HTG），组织粗粒度全局方向、细粒度局部策略以及优化步骤间的过渡经验。每步优化时，基于当前状态和历史选择全局方向，检索对应局部策略记忆，引导CUDA代码生成。
AI.result: 在KernelBench全量测试上，HTAM在正确率、快速解率和加速比上持续超越LLM基线；后端实验和Robust-KBench研究表明结构化记忆具有可迁移收益。
AI.conclusion: 层次化的粗到细记忆组织方式能有效解决粒度不匹配问题，提升LLM在GPU算子优化中的效果，且结构化记忆具有可迁移性。

title: GenEraser: Generalizable Video Object Removal via Balanced Text-Mask Guidance and Decoupled Locator-Preserver
summary: Video object removal frequently struggles to simultaneously eliminate target objects and their associated physical effects (e.g., smoke, reflections, light, and ripples) in out-of-domain scenarios due to complex spatiotemporal ambiguities. While existing methods primarily rely on spatial masks, they often fail to capture weakly correlated effects, and the potential of explicit textual guidance remains underexplored. Furthermore, a fundamental optimization conflict exists in removal models between high-level semantic generalization and precise pixel-level background preservation. To address these challenges, we propose GenEraser, a novel framework for generalized and high-fidelity video object and effect removal. First, we introduce a Multi-Conditional Mixture-of-Experts (MC-MoE) paired with Bipartite Text guidance to fully exploit the multimodal priors of Diffusion Transformers, significantly enhancing the identification of complex effects. Second, a Learnable Deep ``CFG'' Fusion mechanism (LD-CFG) is developed to adaptively balance the relative dominance of mask and textual conditions across diverse scenarios. Finally, we propose a Decoupled Expert Architecture, comprising a Locator and a Preserver, to mitigate the inherent trade-off between semantic generalization and pixel alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our GenEraser surpasses recent state-of-the-art approaches, achieving significant quantitative improvements (e.g., $2.16$ dB and $1.44$ dB on the ROSE Benchmark and VOR-Eval, respectively) while maintaining exceptionally robust generalization in open-world scenarios. https://cyqii.github.io/GenEraser.github.io/

AI.tldr: GenEraser提出了一个通用且高保真的视频物体与效果移除框架，通过多条件混合专家（MC-MoE）与二分文本引导增强复杂效果识别，利用可学习深度CFG融合（LD-CFG）自适应平衡掩码与文本条件，并设计解耦专家架构（定位器+保持器）解决语义泛化与像素保真之间的优化冲突，在多个基准上超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频物体移除方法难以同时去除目标物体及其关联的物理效果（如烟雾、反射、光晕、涟漪），且存在两个核心问题：(1) 空间掩码无法捕捉弱相关效果，显式文本引导未被充分利用；(2) 高层次的语义泛化与像素级背景保留之间存在根本性的优化冲突。
AI.method: GenEraser包含三个关键设计：(1) Multi-Conditional Mixture-of-Experts (MC-MoE) 配合Bipartite Text guidance，充分利用扩散Transformer的多模态先验，增强复杂效果的识别；(2) Learnable Deep "CFG" Fusion (LD-CFG)，自适应平衡不同场景下掩码和文本条件的相对主导权；(3) Decoupled Expert Architecture，由Locator（定位器）和Preserver（保持器）组成，解耦语义泛化与像素对齐之间的权衡。
AI.result: 在ROSE Benchmark上提升2.16 dB，在VOR-Eval上提升1.44 dB，在开放世界场景中展现出异常稳健的泛化能力，显著超越最新方法。
AI.conclusion: GenEraser通过多模态条件引导、自适应融合机制和解耦架构设计，有效解决了视频物体与效果移除中的复杂时空歧义问题，实现了通用且高保真的移除效果。

title: Singularity-aware Optimization via Randomized Geometric Probing: Towards Stable Non-smooth Optimization
summary: Deep learning optimization relies heavily on the assumption of smooth loss landscapes, a condition systematically violated by modern architectures due to non-smooth components such as ReLU activations and quantization operators. In such non-smooth regimes, adaptive optimizers such as Adam suffer from gradient chattering, violent oscillations caused by conflicting signals within the Clarke subdifferential, leading to poor convergence and suboptimal generalization. To address this, we introduce Singularity-aware Adam (S-Adam), a novel optimizer that stabilizes training by dynamically modulating step sizes based on local geometric instability. Our key contribution is the Local Geometric Instability (LGI) metric, a computationally efficient estimator of the Clarke subdifferential diameter derived from the variance of randomized directional derivatives. S-Adam incorporates an adaptive damping mechanism exp(-$λ$$ρ$) that decelerates updates in high-instability regions while preserving fast convergence in smooth basins. We provide a rigorous convergence analysis using differential inclusions, proving that S-Adam converges almost surely to ($δ$,$ε$)-Clarke stationary points at the optimal O(1/$\sqrt(T)$) rate. Empirical evaluations on Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) and high-noise small-batch learning demonstrate that S-Adam consistently outperforms AdamW and Prox-SGD, achieving accuracy gains of up to 6 percent on CIFAR-100 and 3 percent on TinyImageNet while effectively mitigating gradient oscillations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出S-Adam优化器，通过局部几何不稳定性指标动态调整步长，解决非平滑损失景观中自适应优化器的梯度振荡问题，在QAT和小批量学习任务上优于AdamW和Prox-SGD。
AI.motivation: 现代深度学习架构（如ReLU、量化算子）导致损失景观非平滑，传统自适应优化器（Adam）在Clarke次微分中产生梯度振荡（梯度抖动），导致收敛差和泛化次优。
AI.method: 提出S-Adam，核心贡献为局部几何不稳定性（LGI）指标，通过随机方向导数的方差估计Clarke次微分直径；并引入自适应阻尼机制 exp(-λρ)，在高不稳定区域减速更新，平滑区域保持快速收敛。
AI.result: 在量化感知训练和高噪声小批量学习任务上，S-Adam一致性优于AdamW和Prox-SGD，在CIFAR-100上准确率提升高达6%，在TinyImageNet上提升3%，有效缓解梯度振荡。
AI.conclusion: S-Adam收敛到(δ,ε)-Clarke稳定点，达到最优O(1/√T)收敛率，为非平滑深度学习优化提供了理论严谨且实践有效的解决方案。

title: Certified Policy Optimisation for Nested Causal Bandits via PAC-Bayes Risk
summary: Critical sequential decisions are rarely single-timescale: a strategic decision causally shapes the context in which every subsequent tactical choice is made; standard bandit and reinforcement-learning theory does not capture this causal coupling between timescales. We formalise the problem class as Nested Contextual Causal Bandits (NCCBs), a hierarchical SCM where each level's action sets the next level's context distribution, and propose Nested Causal Thompson Sampling (NCTS), which draws one mechanism-factorised belief per episode and acts recursively under it. Our main theoretical result is a causal PAC-Bayesian excess-risk bound that certifies any candidate deployment policy from historic data alone, off-policy and anytime, answering the deployment question: can we trust this agent here, and at what risk? Experiments on a hierarchical SCM show that, against a matched RFF-GP joint regression on the same function class, the factorised SCM-mechanism posterior transfers significantly better zero-shot under exogenous distribution shifts, the recursive meta-to-inner commit significantly dominates the joint-commit alternative in distribution, and the certificate significantly contracts as offline data accumulates. Combining these results, we establish progressive certified handover, a safe-deployment method: each timescale flips from a legacy controller to NCTS when gains can be certified, independently of the others.

AI.tldr: 本文提出嵌套上下文因果 bandit（NCCBs）形式化多时间尺度决策的因果耦合问题，并设计嵌套因果汤普森采样（NCTS）算法，通过因子化SCM后验实现层级递归决策，理论上给出因果PAC-Bayes超额风险界用于离线任意时刻策略认证，实验验证其在分布偏移零样本迁移、递归决策优势及认证收缩方面的有效性，并提出渐进式认证移交安全部署方法。
AI.motivation: 传统bandit和强化学习理论未能捕捉战略决策（高层）与战术决策（低层）之间的因果耦合——每个时间尺度的决策因果地塑造后续时间尺度的上下文分布，现有方法将不同时间尺度视为独立或仅联合建模，缺乏对层级因果结构的显式利用。
AI.method: 1. 形式化NCCBs为层级SCM，每层动作设定下一层上下文分布；2. 提出NCTS，每个episode从因子化SCM后验中采样机制信念，递归地在各层级执行动作；3. 推导因果PAC-Bayes超额风险界，支持从历史数据离线认证任意部署策略；4. 提出渐进式认证移交，各时间尺度独立在收益可认证时从传统控制器切换至NCTS。
AI.result: 1. 因子化SCM后验在外生分布偏移下零样本迁移显著优于RFF-GP联合回归；2. 递归元到内层决策显著优于联合提交（联合建模）方法；3. 随着离线数据积累，认证风险界持续收缩；4. 渐进式认证移交实现安全部署。
AI.conclusion: 通过因果结构因子化和递归决策，NCTS有效解决了多时间尺度决策的因果耦合问题，理论认证为安全部署提供了保障，实验验证了其在迁移性、决策质量和风险可控性上的优势。

title: Multi-Legal-Bench: Evaluating LLMs on Legal Reasoning Across Jurisdictions, Languages, and Legal Traditions
summary: Legal NLP benchmarks overwhelmingly evaluate a single language or aggregate tasks that differ fundamentally across jurisdictions, making cross-lingual comparison impossible. We introduce Multi-Legal-Bench, the first cross-jurisdictional legal benchmark that evaluates identical tasks across six countries (Ukraine, France, Netherlands, Poland, Czech Republic, Lithuania), four language families, and 134 million court decisions. The benchmark defines five tasks court-type classification, judgment form classification, case-outcome prediction, legal norm extraction, and cause category prediction mapped to structured metadata from national court registries, forming a deliberately sparse 5x6 task-jurisdiction matrix (20 of 30 cells filled). We evaluate 7 frontier LLMs under zero-shot and 3-shot prompting via AWS Bedrock, with 4 additional small/medium models (3-12B) for scaling analysis. Our results reveal that: (1) task-dependent few-shot effects discovered in Ukrainian replicate across all jurisdictions; (2) no single model dominates any language rankings shift with both task and jurisdiction; (3) cross-lingual few-shot transfer does not follow language proximity: UA->FR (Romance, -2.1 pp) transfers better than UA->PL (Slavic, -13.7 pp), with label-set alignment predicting transfer quality better than language family; and (4) tokenizer fertility, despite a 2.3x spread, does not significantly predict cross-lingual accuracy (r=-0.27, p=0.14), suggesting that model architecture and pretraining data dominate tokenizer efficiency. We release all data, prompts, and model predictions.

AI.tldr: 提出Multi-Legal-Bench，首个跨司法管辖区的法律基准，覆盖6个国家、4个语系、1.34亿份法院判决，评估7个前沿LLM和4个小模型，发现跨语言小样本迁移不遵循语言邻近性，而是受标签集对齐影响更大。
AI.motivation: 现有法律NLP基准大多评估单一语言或跨辖区任务定义不统一，导致跨语言比较无法进行，亟需一个任务定义一致的多语言、多司法管辖区基准。
AI.method: 构建5×6的任务-辖区稀疏矩阵（20/30格填充），定义5个任务映射到各国法院登记簿的结构化元数据，在AWS Bedrock上评估7个前沿LLM进行零样本和3样本提示，外加4个小模型进行规模分析。
AI.result: (1)小样本效果在各辖区一致；(2)无单一模型占优，语言排名随任务和辖区变化；(3)跨语言迁移不遵循语言邻近性（UA→FR优于UA→PL），标签集对齐更能预测迁移质量；(4)分词器生育率对跨语言准确率无显著预测作用。
AI.conclusion: Multi-Legal-Bench填补了跨语言法律NLP基准的空白，揭示了跨司法管辖区任务评估的复杂性，为未来多语言法律AI研究提供了基础。

title: Towards Consistent Video Geometry Estimation
summary: This work presents ViGeo, a feed-forward foundation model for recovering spatially dense and temporally consistent geometry from video sequences. Built upon a plain transformer architecture without task-specific architectural modifications, ViGeo supports streaming, full-sequence, and long-video inference within a unified model. The key design is dynamic chunking attention, which exposes the model to both bidirectional and causal temporal contexts during training and allows it to adapt its attention pattern at test time without retraining. To improve supervision quality, we further introduce a completion-based data refinement framework. This framework trains a video depth completion teacher that conditions on sparse and noisy annotations and exploits video/multi-view context to produce dense, temporally coherent, and geometrically reliable training targets. Beyond depth and point maps, ViGeo also predicts surface normals within the same framework. Trained solely on public datasets, ViGeo achieves state-of-the-art performance across online, offline, and long-video depth estimation, surface normal estimation, and video point map estimation.

AI.tldr: ViGeo是一个基于纯Transformer架构的前馈基础模型，通过动态分块注意力机制和补全式数据精炼框架，实现了视频序列的时空一致几何重建（深度、法线、点图），在多种模式下达到SOTA。
AI.motivation: 现有视频几何重建方法难以同时满足流式在线、离线全序列和长视频推理需求，且缺乏高质量的时空一致训练数据。
AI.method: 1）纯Transformer架构，无任务特定修改；2）动态分块注意力机制，训练时暴露于双向和因果时间上下文，测试时可自适应调整注意力模式；3）补全式数据精炼框架，训练视频深度补全教师模型，利用稀疏标注和视频/多视角上下文生成密集、时域一致且几何可靠的训练目标。
AI.result: 仅在公开数据集上训练，在在线、离线、长视频深度估计、表面法线估计和视频点图估计任务上均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: ViGeo通过统一架构和高质量训练数据策略，有效解决了视频几何重建中时空一致性与多种推理模式兼容的挑战。

title: Why Larger Models Learn More: Effects of Capacity, Interference, and Rare-Task Retention
summary: Larger models learn tasks smaller models do not. What drives this phenomenon? We develop a simple phenomenological argument that power-law scaling already suggests that a larger model will be able to learn a part of the data distribution that a smaller model fails to learn, even with infinite training data. To validate this claim and identify its causes, we study the effects of model scaling on a synthetic setup consisting of a mixture of tasks that show monotonic scaling curves. The results point to a data-induced competition over resources (neurons). Specifically, smaller models allocate their neurons to high frequency or low complexity tasks, and so they learn solutions that perform poorly on rare and complex tasks. Moreover, this happens even when solutions capable of expressing the desired task exist. We then assess how a larger model circumvents this data-centric bottleneck, finding that it traces to a reduced interference mechanism: larger models can allocate enough resources to common tasks that the gradient updates for those tasks become weak, which means that they do not overwrite rare-task features as they slowly accumulate. Finally, to further validate these claims, we pretrain OLMo models (4M to 4B parameters) on novel tasks of varying frequency and complexity. The results mirror those from our synthetic data experiments: only the larger OLMo models learn the infrequent and complex tasks, and these larger models embed more task features in their representations and show less gradient interference between tasks. Overall, we offer a data-centric account of why larger models learn tasks that smaller models fail to. This helps explain why larger models are better in practice, and it can inform practical questions concerning model sizing and training data mixtures.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论论证和实验验证，揭示了更大模型能学习小模型无法学习任务的原因：数据引起的神经元资源竞争导致小模型优先分配资源给高频/低复杂度任务，而大模型通过降低梯度干扰机制，为罕见复杂任务保留了学习空间。
AI.motivation: 解释为什么更大模型能够学习小模型无法学习的任务，探究这一现象背后的根本驱动因素。
AI.method: 首先提出基于幂律缩放的现象学论证；然后在合成数据（混合任务）上研究模型缩放效应；最后在真实OLMo模型（4M到4B参数）上进行预训练验证。
AI.result: 小模型优先学习高频/低复杂度任务，即使存在能表达复杂任务的解，也会因为资源竞争而忽略罕见复杂任务；大模型通过降低梯度干扰来缓解这一数据瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 大模型更好的表现源自其能够减少任务间的梯度干扰，从而更好地学习数据分布中的长尾部分（罕见且复杂的任务），这为模型规模选择和训练数据配比提供了实践指导。

title: SkillsInjector: Dynamic Skill Context Construction for LLM Agents
summary: LLM agents now draw on growing skill libraries to handle complex tasks. However, injecting more skills does not always improve task completion and can even degrade it. Existing methods still treat skill injection as a static step, selecting skills with fixed criteria, fixing the budget in advance, and leaving descriptions unchanged. We argue that this static treatment can undermine the utility of skills, because which skills are exposed, how many are included, and how they are presented all affect downstream performance. We propose SkillsInjector, a two-stage adaptive method that jointly addresses these decisions. First, a context planner learns execution-grounded skill preferences and admits an adaptive number of skills for each task. A set-aware renderer then tailors how selected descriptions are presented relative to their co-injected neighbors. Across tau2-bench, SkillsBench, and ALFWorld, SkillsInjector achieves the highest score, improving over the strongest baseline by 3.9, 6.1, and 7.3 percentage points, respectively. Ablation studies show that skill selection, adaptive budgeting, and set-aware rendering each contribute to the gain. These results show that skill-augmented agents benefit from optimizing the injected context itself. Code will be released upon publication

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillsInjector，一种两阶段自适应方法，通过上下文规划器动态选择技能数量，并通过集合感知渲染器优化技能描述呈现方式，显著提升LLM智能体在多项基准上的任务完成性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将技能注入视为静态步骤，采用固定标准选择技能、预先设定预算且不修改描述，导致技能注入反而可能降低任务完成度。本文旨在解决技能选择、数量及呈现方式三者如何联合优化的问题。
AI.method: SkillsInjector包含两阶段：第一阶段为上下文规划器，学习基于执行结果的技能偏好，并为每个任务自适应地确定技能数量；第二阶段为集合感知渲染器，根据技能之间的共现关系调整描述的呈现方式。
AI.result: 在tau2-bench、SkillsBench和ALFWorld上分别超越最强基线3.9、6.1和7.3个百分点，消融实验证明技能选择、自适应预算和集合感知渲染均有贡献。
AI.conclusion: 技能增强型智能体需要通过优化注入上下文本身来提升性能，静态技能注入方式存在局限，自适应方法更有效。

title: AfriScience-MT: Towards Decolonizing Science in Africa through Text Translation
summary: The dominance of colonial languages in African education and scientific communication limits how hundreds of millions of speakers of African languages access and produce scientific knowledge. A core obstacle is the lack of established scientific terminology in these languages. We introduce AfriScience-MT, a parallel corpus covering six African languages (Amharic, Hausa, Luganda, Northern Sotho, Yorùbá, and isiZulu) across 11 scientific domains. Professional translators, working with expert science communicators, translated plain-language summaries of scientific papers into each target language and created new terms where none existed. We benchmark machine translation systems and large language models in zero-shot, few-shot, and fine-tuned settings. Our results show that closed-source models outperform all open-source models at both the sentence and document levels: GPT-5.4 and Gemini-3.1-Flash-Lite lead with average sentence-level COMET scores of 68.3 and 68.0, respectively, and tie at an average document-level COMET of 48.3. Among open systems, fine-tuned NLLB-1.3B reaches 67.3 at the sentence level, and TranslateGemma-12B reaches 44.0 at the document level with 1-shot in-context learning. We release AfriScience-MT to support benchmarking and document-level scientific MT for African languages.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了覆盖6种非洲语言、11个科学领域的平行语料库AfriScience-MT，并评测了多种机器翻译系统，发现闭源模型表现优于开源模型。
AI.motivation: 殖民语言在非洲教育和科学传播中占据主导地位，限制了数亿非洲语言使用者获取和产生科学知识的能力，而缺乏科学术语是核心障碍。
AI.method: 专业译者与科学传播专家合作，将科学论文的简化摘要翻译成6种非洲语言，并创建新术语；构建AfriScience-MT语料库；在零样本、少样本和微调设置下评测机器翻译系统和大型语言模型。
AI.result: 闭源模型GPT-5.4和Gemini-3.1-Flash-Lite在句子级COMET得分分别为68.3和68.0，文档级均为48.3；开源模型中微调NLLB-1.3B句子级达67.3，TranslateGemma-12B在1-shot下文档级达44.0。
AI.conclusion: AfriScience-MT语料库将公开，以支持非洲语言科学领域的机器翻译基准测试和文档级翻译研究。

title: FakeVLM-R1: Internalizing Physical Laws via CoT for Synthetic Image Detection
summary: The development of generative artificial intelligence technologies has propelled the visual realism of synthetic images to an unprecedented level. Although current interpretable detection methods based on Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) have made certain progress, they still rely on imitation learning derived from massive volumes of forged data. Consequently, they lack genuine causal reasoning capabilities and are prone to explanatory hallucinations. To overcome this bottleneck, we propose FakeVLM-R1, aiming to endow the model with human-like critical thinking capabilities when performing synthetic detection tasks. Building upon Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), this framework integrates Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) with a Critical Thinking Chain-of-Thought (CoT) mechanism. During the inference phase, the model executes a "bidirectional dialectical reasoning" process: while proposing a forgery hypothesis, it must simultaneously invoke physical commonsense to construct an authenticity counter-proof. Furthermore, we constructed the FakeClue++ dataset with high-quality samples, which extensively introduces annotations guided by the physical laws of authentic images, providing a unified authenticity anchor for the model. Experiments confirm that FakeVLM-R1 achieves SOTA performance the evaluated models across multiple benchmarks. It not only achieves high-precision, logically interpretable detection but also resolves the over-rejection bias of existing methods against real images, demonstrating generalization and robustness against perturbations.

AI.tldr: FakeVLM-R1提出结合GRPO与批判性思维CoT的框架，通过双向辩证推理和物理常识锚定，实现高精度、可解释的合成图像检测，解决了现有方法的解释性幻觉和过度拒绝真实图像的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LMM的可解释检测方法依赖大规模伪造数据的模仿学习，缺乏真正因果推理能力，容易产生解释性幻觉（explanatory hallucinations），且存在对真实图像的过度拒绝偏差（over-rejection bias）。
AI.method: 在SFT基础上，引入GRPO（Group Relative Policy Optimization）与批判性思维链（Critical Thinking CoT）机制。推理阶段执行"双向辩证推理"：提出伪造假设的同时，调用物理常识构建真实性反证。同时构建了FakeClue++数据集，引入真实图像的物理规律引导标注作为统一真实性锚点。
AI.result: 在多个基准上达到SOTA性能，实现了高精度、逻辑可解释的检测，解决了对真实图像的过度拒绝偏差，展现了对扰动的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入批判性思维和物理常识推理，FakeVLM-R1有效提升了合成图像检测的可解释性和因果推理能力，为生成式AI检测提供了新范式。

title: On the Construction and Implications of Low-Loss Valleys in LoRA-based Bayesian Inference
summary: While parameter-efficient fine-tuning methods like low-rank adaptation (LoRA) are standard for large language models, principled estimation of epistemic uncertainty remains challenging. Recent results in the LoRA regime suggest that discrete multi-mode approaches such as deep ensembles offer little benefit over single-mode methods. This contradicts broader observations in deep learning, where ensembling independent optima typically improves generalization, and linking these modes through continuous low-loss valleys further enhances Bayesian model averaging (BMA). Whether such structure exists in the LoRA space and whether it yields functional diversity missed by local or discrete methods has not been studied. We introduce LoRA-Curve, a segmented Bézier curve parameterization in the LoRA space, with two variants: a free configuration that jointly optimizes all control points, and an anchored configuration that connects independently fine-tuned LoRA optima. We prove pathwise continuity and Lipschitz regularity of the loss along the curve and empirically show, across reasoning and classification benchmarks with Qwen2.5 7B, that linear interpolation encounters loss barriers, while our anchored multi-segment curves connect independent optima through continuous low-loss valleys. Combined with flat-minima perturbations and a Jensen-Shannon divergence regularizer, LoRA-Curve yields measurably higher mutual information of the predictive distribution without sacrificing performance, and links continuous parameter-space traversal to functional diversity.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LoRA-Curve方法，通过在LoRA参数空间中学习分段贝塞尔曲线来连接多个独立微调的最优点，发现连续低损失谷的存在，并结合平坦极小值扰动和JS散度正则化，在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了预测分布的信息量。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明LoRA参数空间中离散多模态方法（如深度集成）相比单模态方法优势有限，这与深度学习中的普遍观察相矛盾。作者质疑LoRA空间中是否存在连续低损失谷连接独立最优点，以及这种结构是否能带来局部或离散方法无法捕获的功能多样性。
AI.method: 提出LoRA-Curve，在LoRA参数空间中使用分段贝塞尔曲线参数化。包含两种变体：自由配置（联合优化所有控制点）和锚定配置（连接独立微调的LoRA最优点）。理论上证明了曲线上的路径连续性和损失函数的Lipschitz正则性。结合平坦极小值扰动和JS散度正则化增强泛化。
AI.result: 在Qwen2.5 7B模型上的推理和分类任务中，线性插值会遇到损失壁垒，而锚定的多段曲线能连接独立最优点形成连续低损失谷。方法显著提高了预测分布的互信息，且不牺牲性能，建立了参数空间连续遍历与功能多样性之间的联系。
AI.conclusion: LoRA-Curve证明了LoRA参数空间中存在连接独立最优点的连续低损失谷，填补了离散与连续方法之间的空白，为LoRA微调中的贝叶斯模型平均和不确定性估计提供了新的理论基础和实践工具。

title: MEMENTO: Leveraging Web as a Learning Signal for Low-Data Domains
summary: Real-world tasks often lack large labeled datasets, motivating extensive work on learning in low-data regimes. However, existing approaches such as few-shot prompting, instruction tuning, and synthetic data generation, continue to treat labeled or pseudo-labeled data as the primary learning signal. In contrast, human practitioners acquire expertise through repeated, self-directed interaction with the open web, progressively refining both domain knowledge and search strategies. We propose MEMENTO, a framework that treats the web as a learning signal rather than a stateless retrieval interface. MEMENTO operates at two levels: within each session, it conducts iterative web exploration via an Adaptive Exploration Tree (AET) that decomposes tasks into evolving questions and reflects on intermediate findings; across sessions, it accumulates experience through dual-channel memory, separating declarative knowledge (facts) from procedural knowledge (search strategies). This design enables agents to learn reusable research strategies and domain expertise from trajectories of web interaction without additional model training. We evaluate MEMENTO on two low-data professional domains: sales automation and legal research. Our empirical results show consistent improvements in performance over ReAct based baselines (+25.6% on sales automation and 36.5% on legal research), demonstrating that the web can serve as a scalable learning source for acquiring task-specific expertise in data-scarce settings.

AI.tldr: MEMENTO是一个将网络视为学习信号而非无状态检索接口的框架，通过自适应探索树（AET）进行会话内迭代探索，并通过双通道记忆（陈述性知识+程序性知识）实现跨会话的经验积累，在低数据场景下显著优于ReAct基线（销售自动化+25.6%，法律研究+36.5%）。
AI.motivation: 现实世界任务常缺乏大规模标注数据集，现有方法（少样本提示、指令微调、合成数据生成）仍将标注/伪标注数据视为主要学习信号，而人类专家通过反复自导向的网络交互来积累专业知识，因此需要一种能从网络交互中学习可重用策略和领域知识的方法。
AI.method: 提出MEMENTO框架，包含两层设计：1) 会话内：自适应探索树（AET）将任务分解为演化性问题，并对中间发现进行反思；2) 跨会话：双通道记忆机制，将陈述性知识（事实）与程序性知识（搜索策略）分离存储，从网络交互轨迹中学习可重用的研究策略和领域专业知识，无需额外模型训练。
AI.result: 在销售自动化和法律研究两个低数据专业领域评估，MEMENTO相比ReAct基线分别提升25.6%和36.5%，表明网络可作为数据稀缺场景下获取任务特定专业知识的高可扩展学习源。
AI.conclusion: 网络可以作为一种可扩展的学习信号源，使智能体无需额外训练即可从网络交互中获取任务特定专业知识，在低数据场景下显著优于传统方法。

title: DySem: Uncovering Dynamic Semantic Components via Multilingual Consensus for Calculating Semantic Textual Similarity
summary: Calculating semantic textual similarity is a foundational task in natural language processing. Current large language models (LLMs) based methods typically rely on extracting last-layer hidden states with fixed dimensions to compute similarity for every text pairs. We argue that this paradigm is suffer from two limitations: (i) The last hidden layer encodes more general knowledge rather than just semantic knowledge, making it suboptimal for semantic similarity computation; (ii) The hidden layer dimensions of LLMs are generally very large, which introduces some redundancy and noise for representing semantics. In this work, we propose DySem, a novel training-free framework that investigates more semantic-related internal components of LLMs via multilingual consensus, and shifts away from static representation spaces in favor of dynamic, sample-specific semantic dimensions by constructing text-dependent joint semantic set and computes similarity over this shared dimensional subset. Extensive experiments across various LLMs show that our method consistently outperforms recent baselines while maintaining lower dimensions for similarity calculation. The code is released at https://github.com/szu-tera/DySem.

AI.tldr: DySem提出了一种无需训练的计算语义文本相似度框架，通过利用LLM内部的多语言共识，动态构建文本相关的语义维度子集，避免了传统依赖最后一层隐藏层和大维度表示的局限性，在多个LLM上一致优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 当前基于LLM的语义相似度计算方法存在两个问题：(1)最后一层隐藏层编码的是一般知识而非纯语义知识，不适合语义相似度计算；(2)LLM隐藏层维度太大，包含冗余和噪声。因此需要探索更语义相关的内部组件和动态维度选择方法。
AI.method: 提出DySem框架：(1)通过多语言共识机制探索LLM中更语义相关的内部组件；(2)构建文本依赖的联合语义集，从静态表示空间转向动态、样本特定的语义维度子集；(3)在该共享维度子集上计算相似度，无需训练。
AI.result: 在多种LLM上的实验表明，DySem方法一致优于近期基线方法，同时使用更低的维度进行相似度计算。
AI.conclusion: 通过动态选择语义相关维度而不是固定使用最后一层全维度表示，可以更有效、更高效地计算语义文本相似度。

title: Boosting Zero-Shot 3D Style Transfer with 2D Pre-trained Priors
summary: In this work, we focus on zero-shot 3D style transfer that can generate multi-view consistent stylized views of the 3D scene given an arbitrary style image. We primarily tackle the issue of data scarcity in 3D style transfer, which arises when each model is trained on only a single scene, thereby limiting the number of available content images. This scarcity significantly hampers stylization performance, as model optimization relies on a sufficient number of content-style image pairs to provide supervisory signals. Our core idea is to integrate a decoder pre-trained on large-scale 2D image datasets into the 3D style transfer pipeline, thereby leveraging the prior knowledge encoded in the decoder from learning over numerous content-style image pairs. Our method combines feature Gaussian splatting and deferred stylization, enabling high-quality stylization with the data-sufficient decoder network while ensuring view consistency by unifying view-dependent operations into a view-invariant process. Experiments demonstrate that our Data-Sufficient StyleGaussian (DS-StyleGaussian) model outperforms existing zero-shot 3D style transfer methods in terms of visual quality across various datasets. This work also suggests that 2D pre-training can serve as a strong enhancement for 3D tasks, bridging the data gap between 2D and 3D.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DS-StyleGaussian，通过将2D预训练解码器集成到3D风格迁移管道，解决3D风格迁移中数据稀缺问题，实现零样本高质量3D风格迁移。
AI.motivation: 3D风格迁移面临严重的数据稀缺问题——每个模型仅基于单个场景训练，可用内容图像数量有限，导致模型优化缺乏足够的内容-风格图像对来提供监督信号，严重制约了风格化性能。
AI.method: 将在大规模2D图像数据集上预训练的解码器集成到3D风格迁移管道中，结合Feature Gaussian Splatting与延迟风格化（deferred stylization），将视点相关操作统一为视点不变过程，利用2D先验知识提升数据充分性。
AI.result: DS-StyleGaussian在多个数据集上均优于现有零样本3D风格迁移方法，生成多视图一致的高质量风格化结果。
AI.conclusion: 2D预训练可以作为增强3D任务的有效手段，弥合2D与3D之间的数据鸿沟。

title: PEARL: Training Socratic Tutors with Pedagogically Aligned Reinforcement Learning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promise as educational tutors, yet effective tutoring requires more than solving problems: it must provide progressive Socratic guidance and balance multiple pedagogical objectives across multi-turn interactions. However, training such tutors remains challenging due to limited-fidelity and weakly controllable student simulation, under-specified pedagogical reward modeling, and unstable multi-objective optimization. To overcome these limitations, we propose PEARL, a pedagogically aligned reinforcement learning framework for training Socratic tutoring agents, consisting of three key components. First, we introduce a controllable student simulator that decouples latent cognitive states from response generation to model diverse abilities and misconceptions. Second, we develop a generative reward model that jointly evaluates pedagogical quality and objective correctness for policy optimization. Finally, we propose a stable multi-objective RL scheme that discretizes rewards within each dimension and aggregates normalized advantages across dimensions, preventing high-variance objectives from dominating updates. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that PEARL achieves the best performance among open-source models and remains competitive with leading proprietary LLMs, despite using only a 30B policy model.

AI.tldr: PEARL是一个基于强化学习的苏格拉底式教学代理训练框架，包含可控学生模拟器、生成式奖励模型和稳定多目标RL方案，在多个基准上达到最佳性能。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM教学代理存在学生模拟保真度低、可控性弱，教学奖励建模不明确，以及多目标优化不稳定等问题，亟需更有效的训练方法。
AI.method: 1) 可控学生模拟器：将潜在认知状态与响应生成解耦，建模多样能力和误解；2) 生成式奖励模型：联合评估教学质量和答案正确性；3) 稳定多目标RL方案：在每个维度内离散化奖励并聚合归一化优势，防止高方差目标主导更新。
AI.result: 在多个基准上，使用仅30B策略模型的PEARL在开源模型中表现最佳，并与领先的专有LLM竞争。
AI.conclusion: PEARL通过解耦学生认知建模、联合教学奖励评估和稳定多目标优化，有效提升了LLM在苏格拉底式教学任务中的表现。

title: SAAS: Self-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Over-Search Mitigation in Agentic Search
summary: Agentic search enables LLMs to solve complex multi-hop questions through iterative reasoning and external search. Despite the effectiveness, these systems often suffer from a critical limitation in practice: agents fail to recognize their own knowledge boundaries, blindly triggering searches when internal knowledge suffices and failing to terminate search even when adequate evidence has been collected. The lack of self-awareness leads to severe \textbf{over-search}, incurring substantial inference latency and prohibitive computational cost. To this end, we propose SAAS, a novel RL framework designed to cultivate dynamic self-awareness that precisely regulates search behavior without compromising accuracy. SAAS introduces three key components: (i) a search boundary modeling mechanism, which identifies the search boundary under the evolving policy by contrasting search-disabled and search-enabled rollouts; (ii) a boundary-aware reward module, which translates this boundary awareness into trajectory-level penalties, suppressing unnecessary and redundant searches; and (iii) a stage-wise optimization strategy, which leverages a sequential curriculum to prioritize reasoning over search regularization, thereby avoiding reward hacking. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SAAS substantially reduces over-search, while maintaining accuracy. Our code is anonymously released at https://github.com/XMUDeepLIT/SAAS.

AI.tldr: SAAS是一个强化学习框架，通过动态自我感知机制精确调控搜索行为，在不影响准确性的前提下显著减少过度搜索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Agentic搜索系统中，LLM智能体缺乏自我认知能力，无法识别自身知识边界，导致两种问题：内部知识足够时仍盲目触发搜索，以及已收集充分证据后仍不终止搜索。这造成了严重的过度搜索，带来高推理延迟和计算成本。
AI.method: SAAS包含三个关键组件：(1) 搜索边界建模机制——通过对比启用/禁用搜索的轨迹来识别当前策略下的搜索边界；(2) 边界感知奖励模块——将边界感知转化为轨迹级惩罚，抑制不必要和冗余的搜索；(3) 阶段式优化策略——通过顺序课程优先强化推理能力，再正则化搜索行为，避免奖励黑客行为。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，SAAS在保持准确性的同时，显著减少了过度搜索问题。
AI.conclusion: SAAS通过强化学习赋予LLM智能体动态自我认知能力，有效解决了Agentic搜索中的过度搜索问题，实现了精度与效率之间的更好平衡。

title: ActTraitBench: Quantifying the Knowledge-Decision Gap in Large Language Models via Human-Grounded Behavioral Validation
summary: While Large Language Models (LLMs) can convincingly simulate personas in explicit self-reports, they often deviate in implicit behavioral decisions, revealing a substantial Knowledge-Decision Gap ($G_{\text{KD}}$). Existing benchmarks struggle to measure this asymmetry due to limited construct validity, multi-dimensional entanglement, and distributional biases in LLM-based evaluation. To address these issues, we propose ActTraitBench, a human-grounded evaluation framework for measuring personality consistency in LLMs. Grounded in empirical human data, ActTraitBench establishes one-to-one mappings between psychometric facets and behavioral paradigms, and applies a Distributional Calibration via Quantile Mapping procedure to align LLM-judge score distributions with human norms. Experiments on 14 mainstream LLMs reveal a pervasive knowledge-decision asymmetry, where larger and more capable models often exhibit stronger behavioral divergence despite highly consistent self-reports. To mitigate this gap, we further introduce the Chain of Cognitive Alignment (CoCA), a plug-and-play inference-time intervention that improves alignment in reasoning-capable frontier models while exposing clear capability limitations in smaller architectures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ActTraitBench框架，基于人类实证数据评估LLM的人格一致性，发现大模型存在显著的知识-决策鸿沟（自报告与行为决策不一致），并引入CoCA方法缓解该问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM在自我报告中能模拟人格，但在隐式行为决策中常出现偏差，存在知识-决策鸿沟。现有基准因构念效度有限、多维纠缠、评价分布偏差等问题难以衡量该不对称性。
AI.method: 提出ActTraitBench：基于人类实证数据建立心理测量学维度与行为范式的一对一映射；采用分位数映射进行分布校准，使LLM评判器评分分布对齐人类常模；并引入链式认知对齐（CoCA）作为推理时的即插即用干预方法。
AI.result: 在14个主流LLM上的实验表明，更大、更强大的模型尽管自我报告高度一致，却表现出更强的行为偏差（知识-决策鸿沟）；CoCA能改善推理能力强的前沿模型的对齐，但在小架构上暴露出能力限制。
AI.conclusion: LLM普遍存在知识-决策不对称性，模型规模与能力增大反而加剧行为偏差；CoCA可部分缓解该问题，但受限于模型本身的推理能力。

title: Native Audio-Visual Alignment for Generation
summary: Joint audio-video generation aims to synthesize temporally synchronized and semantically coherent visual-acoustic content. However, existing open-source methods mainly rely on either dual-tower designs with posterior alignment or fully unified tri-modal designs that mix textual context, audio and video in one shared space. The former weakens fine-grained audio-video co-evolution, while the latter couples semantic conditioning with low-level synchronization. To address these limitations, we propose NAVA, a Native Audio-Visual Alignment framework for joint audio-video generation. NAVA is built upon context-conditioned native audio-visual alignment: it first establishes audio-video correspondence in a dedicated interaction space, and then uses external context to condition the joint denoising process. Specifically, NAVA is instantiated with an Align-then-Fuse MMDiT architecture, which transitions from modality-aware audio-video alignment to modality-shared joint denoising. Furthermore, we introduce Timbre-in-Context Conditioning to associate reference timbre cues with corresponding speech spans to achieve controllable speech timbre. Experiments on Verse-Bench and Seed-TTS, together with a user study, demonstrate that NAVA achieves superior video quality, precise audio-visual synchronization, competitive audio quality, and stronger reference-timbre controllability using only 6.3B parameters.

AI.tldr: NAVA提出了一种原生音视频对齐框架，通过"先对齐后融合"的MMDiT架构和上下文音色条件控制，用6.3B参数实现了高质量的音视频联合生成，在视频质量、音画同步和音色可控性上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有开源方法要么采用双塔设计（后对齐削弱了细粒度音视频协同演化），要么采用全统一三模态设计（将语义条件和低级同步耦合在一起），无法同时兼顾语义一致性和精确的音视频同步。NAVA旨在解决这一局限性。
AI.method: 提出Align-then-Fuse MMDiT架构，先通过专属交互空间建立音视频对应关系，再用外部上下文条件引导联合去噪过程；同时引入Timbre-in-Context Conditioning实现可控语音音色。
AI.result: 在Verse-Bench和Seed-TTS基准测试及用户研究中，NAVA以仅6.3B参数实现了更优的视频质量、精确的音视频同步、有竞争力的音频质量和更强的参考音色可控性。
AI.conclusion: NAVA通过原生音视频对齐的思想，解耦了语义条件与低级同步，证明了"先对齐后融合"的设计范式在联合音视频生成中的有效性，并以小参数量取得了超越现有方法的性能。

title: Cluster-Level Attention-Guided Parallel Decoding for Masked Diffusion Language Models
summary: Masked diffusion language models (MDLMs) enable parallel decoding by predicting all masked positions at each denoising step, yet existing training-free samplers usually decide which positions to commit at token-level granularity. We revisit this granularity and observe that reliable predictions often emerge as contiguous high-confidence spans, suggesting that the unit of parallel commitment can be larger than a single token. We first group adjacent high-confidence candidates into confidence-induced clusters (CICs) as span-level update units. We then use self-attention maps from the same forward pass to estimate inter-cluster dependencies, enabling conflict-aware selection of mutually compatible CICs for parallel commitment. This yields CLAD (Cluster-Level Attention-Guided Decoding), a training-free cluster-level decoder for MDLMs. Experiments on LLaDA and Dream model families across four reasoning and code-generation benchmarks show that CLAD achieves 1.77x--8.47x speedups over Vanilla decoding while maintaining broadly comparable task accuracy in most settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLAD，一种基于聚类和注意力引导的无训练解码器，将MDLMs中的并行提交单位从token粒度扩展到cluster粒度，在推理和代码生成任务上实现1.77x–8.47x加速，且精度基本持平。
AI.motivation: 现有MDLMs的无训练采样器以token级粒度决定哪些位置可以提交，但观察到可靠预测往往以连续高置信度区间的形式出现，说明并行提交的基本单位可以大于单个token。
AI.method: 首先将相邻的高置信度候选位置分组为置信度诱导聚类（CICs）作为span级更新单元；然后利用同一前向传播中的自注意力图估计聚类间依赖关系，实现冲突感知的并行提交选择；最终形成CLAD（Cluster-Level Attention-Guided Decoding）。
AI.result: 在LLaDA和Dream模型系列上，跨四个推理和代码生成基准测试，CLAD相比Vanilla解码实现1.77x–8.47x加速，同时在大多数设置下保持可比的任务准确率。
AI.conclusion: 将并行提交从token粒度提升到cluster粒度是可行且高效的，CLAD在加速MDLMs解码的同时不牺牲精度，为未来更高效的掩码扩散模型推理提供了新思路。

title: AgentDoG 1.5: A Lightweight and Scalable Alignment Framework for AI Agent Safety and Security
summary: Modern open-world agents such as OpenClaw exhibit powerful cross-environment execution capabilities yet introduce broad new safety risk sources. Meanwhile, advanced frontier AI models drastically lower attack barriers, rendering current agent alignment frameworks inadequate for real-world deployment. To tackle these emerging threats, we propose a lightweight and scalable agent safety alignment framework. Specifically, we update the agent safety taxonomy to accommodate emergent risks from Codex and OpenClaw execution scenarios. We further build a taxonomy-guided data engine with influence-function purification to train lightweight AgentDoG 1.5 variants (0.8B, 2B, 4B, and 8B parameters) using only around 1k samples, achieving comparable performance with leading closed-source models (e.g., GPT-5.4). Based on AgentDoG 1.5, we construct a highly efficient agentic safety SFT and RL training environment, which reduces deployment overhead in Docker-level environments by two orders of magnitude. Finally, we deploy AgentDoG 1.5 as a training-free online guardrail for real-time safety moderation. Extensive experimental results indicate that AgentDoG 1.5 achieves state-of-the-art performance in diverse and complex interactive agentic scenarios. All models and datasets are openly released.

AI.tldr: 本文提出轻量级智能体安全对齐框架AgentDoG 1.5，通过更新安全分类体系、影响函数净化数据引擎和高效训练环境，以约1k样本训练0.8B-8B参数模型，实现与GPT-5.4相当的安全性能，并作为在线防护栏部署。
AI.motivation: 现有智能体对齐框架不足以应对OpenClaw等开放世界智能体带来的新型安全风险，且前沿AI模型降低了攻击门槛，亟需轻量可扩展的安全对齐方案。
AI.method: 1) 更新智能体安全分类体系以覆盖Codex和OpenClaw场景的新风险；2) 构建基于分类学引导的、含影响函数净化的数据引擎，仅用约1k样本训练AgentDoG 1.5系列模型（0.8B-8B）；3) 构建高效的智能体安全SFT和RL训练环境，将Docker级部署开销降低两个数量级；4) 作为免训练在线防护栏实时部署。
AI.result: AgentDoG 1.5以极小参数量（最低0.8B）和极少训练数据（约1k样本）达到与GPT-5.4等闭源大模型相当的安全性能，在多样化复杂交互智能体场景中实现最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 轻量级智能体安全对齐方法在极低资源消耗下可媲美甚至超越大规模闭源模型，为开放世界智能体的实际部署提供了高效、可扩展的安全保障方案，且已开源。

title: Metric-Dependent Annotation Saturation for Learning from Label Distributions
summary: When annotators disagree on a label, the disagreement itself carries signal -- and the number of annotators needed to capture it depends on the evaluation metric. We fine-tune NLI models on label distributions subsampled from ChaosNLI, a dataset providing 100 independent annotator judgments per item, and identify metric-dependent saturation. In our 3-class NLI setting, entropy correlation -- whether the model identifies which items elicit disagreement -- requires N ~ 20-50 annotators to converge, while distributional match (KL divergence) saturates by N ~ 10 (87-95% of improvement across five model seeds). This finding rests on a prior observation: soft labels carry item-specific signal that label smoothing cannot replicate. Across five smoothing intensities, entropy correlation clusters at r ~ 0.45-0.49, while soft labels reach r = 0.643 (p < 0.001); per-item analysis traces this gap to smoothing's inability to distinguish ambiguous items from clear ones. The soft-label advantage replicates across two architectures (DeBERTa, RoBERTa), a non-NLI-pretrained baseline, and an exploratory cross-domain evaluation on content safety. These results suggest that annotation budgets should be informed by the target evaluation metric rather than set uniformly.

AI.tldr: 本文研究标注者分歧信号与评估指标的关系，发现软标签(需20-50个标注者)比标签平滑(仅需10个)更能捕捉标注分歧中的信息，建议标注预算应依据目标评估指标设定。
AI.motivation: 标注者之间存在分歧时，分歧本身包含有价值的信息，但需要多少标注者才能捕获这些信号取决于所用的评估指标，目前缺乏对此的系统研究。
AI.method: 使用ChaosNLI数据集（每项100个独立标注），微调NLI模型于不同规模子采样的标签分布上，比较软标签与标签平滑的效果，并在两种架构(DeBERTa, RoBERTa)及跨域内容安全任务上验证。
AI.result: 熵相关性(模型识别分歧项的能力)需20-50个标注者收敛；KL散度(分布匹配)在10个标注者时即饱和。软标签熵相关性达r=0.643，而标签平滑仅r=0.45-0.49。软标签优势在多种架构和跨域任务中保持一致。
AI.conclusion: 标注预算应依据目标评估指标来设定，而非统一标准；软标签能捕捉标签平滑无法复现的逐项特异性信号。

title: Future Forcing: Future-aware Training-free KV Cache Policy for Autoregressive Video Generation
summary: Autoregressive (AR) video generation has emerged as a promising paradigm for long-horizon video synthesis, where each frame is generated conditioned on previously generated tokens. To accelerate inference, the KV cache is used to avoid redundant recomputation across generation steps. Nevertheless, its growth with generation length introduces increasing memory and error accumulation, limiting the scalability of AR models to even longer sequences. Existing KV cache compression methods mitigate this issue by selectively retaining only video tokens deemed important. However, most existing methods assess token importance using short-horizon signals derived from the current or historical generation context, making these methods prone to overlooking tokens that appear unimportant at early steps but later become critical for future frames. In this work, we identify an important property of trained AR video models: although RoPE-modulated queries evolve across autoregressive steps, the underlying canonical pre-RoPE query distribution remains remarkably stable throughout the video generation process. This approximate stationarity implies that future query distributions are estimable from historical statistics, enabling principled future-aware cache decisions without any additional training. Building on this insight, we propose Future Forcing, a training-free future-aware KV cache policy for AR video generation. Specifically, Future Forcing first constructs a future query proxy from historical statistics, then scores KV cache tokens by their importance under this proxy, and finally merges redundant token pairs within the affine subspace induced by the future query. Extensive experiments show that Future Forcing improves long-horizon consistency under limited KV caches, achieving up to 1.49 improvement in subject consistency on VBench-Long for 60s generation over existing AR video KV cache policies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Future Forcing，一种无需训练的未来感知KV缓存策略，通过利用AR视频模型中RoPE前的查询分布近似平稳性，用历史统计构造未来查询代理来评分和合并冗余token，在长视频生成中提升主体一致性达1.49倍。
AI.motivation: 现有AR视频生成中KV缓存随序列增长导致内存和误差累积，限制模型扩展到更长序列。现有压缩方法仅用短期信号评估token重要性，容易忽略早期不重要但后期关键的token。
AI.method: 1. 发现AR视频模型中RoPE前的查询分布在生成过程中近似平稳；2. 利用历史统计构造未来查询代理；3. 基于未来查询代理对KV缓存token进行重要性评分；4. 在未来查询诱导的仿射子空间内合并冗余token对。
AI.result: 在VBench-Long基准上60秒生成任务中，主体一致性提升1.49倍，整体长程一致性显著优于现有AR视频KV缓存策略。
AI.conclusion: Future Forcing通过利用查询分布的平稳性实现了无需训练的未来感知缓存决策，有效提升了AR视频模型在长序列生成中的一致性和效率。

title: MōLe-Λ: Learning the Coupled-Cluster Response State for Energies, Gradients, and Properties
summary: Coupled-cluster (CC) theory is often considered the gold standard of quantum chemistry, but its high computational cost limits routine access to accurate energies, forces and response properties. While the right-hand $T$-amplitudes determine the correlated wavefunction, many practically important observables additionally require the left-hand $Λ$-amplitudes. We introduce MōLe-$Λ$, an extension of Molecular Orbital Learning (MōLe) that predicts the full ground-state coupled-cluster singles and doubles (CCSD) response state by jointly learning right-hand amplitudes $(T_1,T_2)$ and left-hand amplitudes $(Λ_1,Λ_2)$ from localized Hartree--Fock molecular orbitals. Architecturally, MōLe-$Λ$ extends MōLe with $Λ_1$ and $Λ_2$ readouts that mirror the symmetry constraints of the $T_1$ and $T_2$ heads, while preserving the original equivariant orbital encoder, odd sign-equivariant decoding, locality and size-extensivity. The resulting model yields accurate CC-quality energies and forces, while simultaneously recovering dipoles, quadrupoles, polarizabilities, the electron density, and 2-electron observables such as the pair density. We show that MōLe-$Λ$ further extends the speed advantage of MōLe over full CCSD while substantially expanding the accessible properties, providing a route to wavefunction-level surrogate models for correlated quantum chemistry.

AI.tldr: MōLe-Λ 扩展了 MōLe 模型，通过联合学习 CCSD 的左右手振幅 (T₁,T₂) 和 (Λ₁,Λ₂)，在保持高效率的同时准确预测能量、力以及偶极矩、极化率、电子密度等可观测量，为相关量子化学提供波函数级别的替代模型。
AI.motivation: 耦合簇(CC)理论虽被认为是量子化学的"金标准"，但其高计算成本限制了在能量、力和响应性质上的常规应用。许多重要可观测量还需要左手的 Λ-振幅，传统方法计算代价高昂，因此需要高效的替代模型。
AI.method: MōLe-Λ 在 MōLe 框架基础上，新增 Λ₁ 和 Λ₂ 读出头，与 T₁ 和 T₂ 头共享对称约束；保留原有的等变轨道编码器、奇符号等变解码、局域性和大小广延性等特性。
AI.result: 模型能准确获得 CC 级别的能量和力，同时恢复偶极矩、四极矩、极化率、电子密度以及双电子可观测量(如对密度)。在速度上相比完整 CCSD 保持显著优势。
AI.conclusion: MōLe-Λ 在保持 MōLe 的速度优势的同时，大幅拓展了可预测的性质范围，为相关量子化学提供了波函数级别的有效替代模型。

title: PRAIB: Peer Review AI Benchmark of Behaviour of LLM-Assisted Reviewing
summary: The growing number of submitted papers has motivated the exploration of Large Language Models (LLMs) as a means to support and augment the peer review process, particularly in terms of improving its speed and scalability. Yet, it remains unknown whether LLMs engage with scientific manuscripts in the same manner as human reviewers, or whether they merely produce review-looking text. To address this, we introduce the Peer Review AI Benchmark (PRAIB), a novel framework comprising thoroughly defined metrics that measure review specificity, style, and behavior of engagement. To complement the PRAIB framework, we conduct a large-scale empirical study leveraging a dataset of 11,000 reviews generated by five proprietary and open-source models for 1,000 ICLR and NeurIPS papers. Spanning the 2021--2025 period, these machine-generated reviews are compared against original human feedback across diverse prompting strategies to identify systematic behavioral divergences. Our analysis reveals that the generated reviews diverge significantly from feedback provided by human reviewers: LLM ratings are less variable, positively biased, and overconfident, and their cross-reference patterns are model-dependent and distinct from human norms. Furthermore, when evaluated through PRAIB, we observe that LLMs tend to generate longer, more complex reviews, yet frequently overlook the atomic weaknesses noted by human reviewers. By characterizing where and how LLMs reviewing behavior departs from human norms, PRAIB provides the community with a diagnostic tool for identifying which aspects of the review process LLMs can reliably support today and which require further development before deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个评估大语言模型（LLM）评审行为的基准框架PRAIB，通过大规模实证研究发现LLM生成的评审与人类评审存在显著差异：LLM评分偏差更大、过于自信且缺乏可变性，交叉引用模式依赖模型，并且倾向于生成更长更复杂的评审但常忽略人类关注的原子性弱点。
AI.motivation: 随着投稿数量增长，LLM被用于辅助同行评审，但尚不清楚LLM是否真正以人类评审员的方式参与科学稿件，抑或只是生成看似评审的文本。为此，本文旨在系统性地量化和诊断LLM评审行为与人类评审行为的偏差。
