While recent progress has largely been driven by scaling training data, model capacity, and retrieval mechanisms, improving report quality at inference time remains underexplored. In this work, we observe that fixed radiology MLLMs often generate clinically stronger reports elsewhere in their candidate pool than the one selected by default decoding, suggesting that inference-time decision making remains an overlooked bottleneck. To address this, we propose Clinical Consensus Selection (CCS), a decoder-agnostic inference-time selection framework that samples multiple candidate reports and selects the one with the highest clinical consensus across the rollout pool. CCS unifies text-based utilities with a radiology-adapted utility computed by an image--report-trained multimodal embedder, which measures candidate agreement beyond surface-level textual similarity. Across three datasets and multiple radiology MLLMs, CCS consistently improves inference-time performance over single-path decoding and generic Best-of-N baselines, with particularly clear gains on clinical metrics. Further analysis shows that image-grounded utility forms a selection axis distinct from textual consensus and that substantial headroom remains for improving RRG at inference time.

AI.tldr: 提出临床共识选择（CCS）框架，在推理时通过多候选报告采样和临床一致性评估，显著提升放射学报告生成质量，优于传统单路径解码方法。
AI.motivation: 现有放射学报告生成（RRG）大多聚焦于扩大训练数据、模型容量和检索机制，忽视了推理时的决策优化。研究发现固定模型在候选池中常能生成比默认解码更好的报告，说明推理时决策存在瓶颈。
AI.method: 提出CCS框架：1）推理时采样多个候选报告；2）结合文本效用和基于图像-报告多模态嵌入器的放射学适应性效用；3）选择临床一致性最高的报告，超越表面文本相似度。
AI.result: 在三个数据集和多个放射学MLLM上，CCS一致优于单路径解码和通用Best-of-N基线，尤其在临床指标上提升显著。
AI.conclusion: 图像锚定的效用与文本一致性形成不同选择维度，推理时改进RRG仍有较大空间，CCS是有效且无需修改解码器的通用方案。

title: minWM: A Full-Stack Open-Source Framework for Real-Time Interactive Video World Models
summary:
Recent video diffusion foundation models have achieved remarkable progress in high-quality video generation, yet turning them into real-time interactive video world models remains challenging. Interactive world models require controllable, causal, and low-latency rollout, which in practice demands a full pipeline spanning data construction, controllable fine-tuning, autoregressive training, few-step distillation, and streaming inference. In this work, we present minWM, a full-stack open-source framework for building real-time interactive video world models. minWM provides an end-to-end pipeline that converts existing bidirectional T2V/TI2V video foundation models into camera-controllable few-step autoregressive world models. Specifically, minWM first fine-tunes a bidirectional video diffusion model with camera control, and then applies the Causal Forcing / Causal Forcing++ pipeline, including AR diffusion training, causal ODE or causal consistency distillation, and asymmetric DMD, to distill it into a few-step autoregressive generator for low-latency rollout. The framework is modular and architecture-extensible: we instantiate it on representative open backbones, including Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B and HY1.5-TI2V-8B, covering both cross-attention-based condition injection and MMDiT-style architectures. minWM also supports adapting existing video world models, such as HY-WorldPlay, to new data distributions, training recipes, and latency targets. Beyond releasing runnable scripts, checkpoints, documentation, and inference code, we provide practical ablations on camera trajectory quality, controllability training steps, and minimal batch-size requirements. We hope minWM serves as a reproducible and extensible recipe for building and adapting real-time interactive video world models.
  Project Page: [https://github.com/shengshu-ai/minWM](https://github.com/shengshu-ai/minWM)

AI.tldr: minWM是一个全栈开源框架，用于将现有双向视频扩散模型转化为可实时交互、支持相机控制、低延迟自回归的视频世界模型，完整覆盖数据构建、微调、蒸馏和流式推理全流程。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散基础模型在高质量视频生成上表现出色，但难以转化为实时交互式视频世界模型，后者需要可控性、因果性和低延迟推理能力，缺乏完整、可复现的端到端框架。
AI.method: 提出minWM全栈框架：1) 在双向视频扩散模型上进行相机控制微调；2) 通过Causal Forcing/Causal Forcing++流水线（包括自回归扩散训练、因果ODE/一致性蒸馏、非对称DMD）蒸馏为少步自回归生成器；3) 在Wan2.1-T2V-1.3B和HY1.5-TI2V-8B等不同架构上实例化验证。
AI.result: 在多个开源骨干模型上成功实现实时交互式视频世界模型构建，支持相机控制、低延迟推理、新数据分布适配，并提供完整脚本、检查点、文档和消融实验。
AI.conclusion: minWM提供了一个可复现、可扩展的全栈配方，用于构建和适配实时交互式视频世界模型，弥合了视频基础模型到交互式世界模型之间的工程和实践鸿沟。

title: Feedback-to-Rubrics: Can We Learn Expert Criteria from Inline Comments?
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used for writing and review support, but their usefulness depends on context-dependent criteria, such as expert preferences or organization-specific conventions, that are often tacit, undocumented, and difficult to elicit directly. We propose a problem setting for learning reusable natural-language rubrics from accumulated inline comments on artifacts such as human-written or LLM-generated drafts. Our method infers rubrics from these comments and iteratively refines them by observing comment-wise mismatches between rubric-conditioned predictions and reference comments. We evaluate the proposed method in real-world review settings and in controlled settings with reference rubrics. These results show that inline comments can be distilled into reusable rubrics that support comment prediction, rubric understanding, and automatic artifact revision.

AI.tldr: 本文提出从内联评论中自动学习可复用的自然语言评分标准（rubrics），用于支持大型语言模型（LLM）在写作和评审中的辅助应用。方法通过迭代优化，从评论中推断评分标准，并基于条件预测与参考评论的差异进行改进。实验表明该方法能有效生成可复用的评分标准，支持评论预测、标准理解和自动修订。
AI.motivation: LLM在写作和评审辅助中的有效性依赖于上下文相关的隐性标准（如专家偏好或组织惯例），这些标准难以直接获取。现有方法缺乏从实际反馈中自动提炼可复用评价规则的能力。
AI.method: 提出一种从累积的内联评论中学习自然语言评分标准的方法。通过迭代过程，基于评分条件预测与参考评论之间的不匹配来推断和细化评分标准。
AI.result: 在真实评审环境和受控基准设置下，该方法能有效将内联评论蒸馏为可复用的评分标准，并支持评论预测、评分标准理解以及自动稿件修订。
AI.conclusion: 内联评论可以转化为结构化的可复用评分标准，从而提升LLM在写作辅助和评审中的实用性和适应性。

title: Learning to Choose: An Empowerment-Guided Multi-Agent System with semantic communication for Adaptive Method Selection
summary: Automating scientific computing workflows requires more than generating executable code: autonomous systems must also select appropriate computational strategies, implement them faithfully, and ensure that the resulting outcomes remain causally attributable to the decisions that produced them. In multi-agent pipelines, this process is particularly fragile, as small inconsistencies between agent intentions and actions can lead to semantic drift, where the eventually executed procedure no longer reflects the originally selected strategy, thereby corrupting downstream evaluation and adaptation. In this work, motivated by the ATHENA framework (Toscano et al., 2025; Toscano et al., 2026) and the concept of empowerment (Yiu et al., 2025), we introduce a multi-agent framework that combines contextual bandits with structured inter-agent communication and, most importantly, semantic checkpoints that preserve action-outcome fidelity throughout the pipeline. The system integrates specialized large language model (LLM) agents, grounded code generation, and self-healing execution loops within an adaptive decision-making architecture. Interpreting the framework through the lens of empowerment, we show that reliable autonomous learning requires not only identifying high-quality actions, but also preserving the integrity of their propagation across agents. Using sensitivity analysis and uncertainty quantification workflows as representative case studies, we demonstrate that unchecked semantic drift degrades policy learning, whereas the proposed framework improves convergence, robustness, and adaptation to novel problem contexts. These results suggest a broader design principle for scientific multi-agent systems: adaptive decision-making must be coupled with explicit mechanisms that guarantee semantic consistency and reliable information flow across the computational pipeline.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合上下文臂膀机、结构化通信与语义检查点的多智能体框架，通过保证行动-结果忠实性来防止科学计算流水线中的语义漂移，提升策略学习的收敛性、鲁棒性和适应性。
AI.motivation: 科学计算工作流的自动化不仅需要生成可执行代码，还需要自主系统选择合适的计算策略、忠实执行，并确保结果可归因于产生它们的决策。在多智能体流水线中，智能体意图与行动间的不一致会导致语义漂移，破坏下游评估与自适应。
AI.method: 提出一个多智能体框架，结合上下文臂膀机、结构化智能体间通信和语义检查点；集成专用LLM智能体、接地代码生成与自修复执行循环；并通过赋能（empowerment）视角解释该架构。
AI.result: 以敏感性分析和不确定性量化工作流为案例，证明未受约束的语义漂移会劣化策略学习，而所提框架能提升收敛性、鲁棒性和对新问题上下文的适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 自适应决策必须与显式保证语义一致性和可靠信息流的机制相结合，这是科学多智能体系统的更广泛设计原则。

title: CorPipe at CRAC 2026: Empty Nodes and Cross-Lingual Transfer in Multilingual Coreference Resolution
summary: We introduce CorPipe 26, our winning submission to the CRAC 2026 Shared Task on Multilingual Coreference Resolution. The fifth edition of this shared task focuses mainly on the comparison of generative LLMs and specialized systems; additionally, 5 more datasets and 2 new languages are introduced. CorPipe 26 is an improved version of CorPipe 25, with a new variant predicting empty nodes together with mentions and coreference links in a single model. Our system outperforms all other submissions in the LLM track by 2.8 percent points and all submissions in the unconstrained track by 9.5 percent points. Furthermore, we perform a series of ablation experiments with different model sizes, empty node prediction methods, and cross-lingual zero-shot evaluation. The source code and the trained models are publicly available at https://github.com/ufal/crac2026-corpipe.

AI.tldr: CorPipe 26 是 CRAC 2026 多语言共指消解共享任务中获胜的系统，它改进了上一版本，通过单一模型同时预测空节点、提及和共指链接，在LLM赛道和非约束赛道分别领先2.8%和9.5%的百分点。
AI.motivation: 该工作旨在参与CRAC 2026多语言共指消解共享任务，重点比较生成式大语言模型与专用系统的性能差异，并应对新增的5个数据集和2种新语言带来的挑战。
AI.method: CorPipe 26 是 CorPipe 25 的改进版本，新特性是在单一模型中同时预测空节点、提及和共指链接，采用统一框架进行端到端训练。
AI.result: 在LLM赛道中超越所有其他提交系统2.8个百分点；在非约束赛道中超越所有其他提交系统9.5个百分点。
AI.conclusion: CorPipe 26 证明了专用系统在多语言共指消解任务上仍能显著优于生成式大语言模型，并展现了空节点联合预测的有效性。代码和模型已开源。

title: LoMo: Local Modality Substitution for Deeper Vision-Language Fusion
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved substantial progress across a wide range of understanding and reasoning tasks, driven by large-scale image-text training aimed at multimodal fusion. Ideally, replacing a textual question with its rendered-image counterpart should leave model performance essentially unaffected. In practice, however, such modality substitution induces dramatic performance degradation. We attribute this "carrier sensitivity" issue to an inherent bias in current training corpora. Across prevalent datasets such as image captioning, VQA, OCR, and web-sourced interleaved data, text and images are typically organized into distinct and asymmetric roles, with text serving as linguistic queries and images as visual references. Such data bias leads VLMs to exhibit distinct preferences for information acquisition across different modalities. Consequently, VLMs fail to align representations of semantically equivalent content across textual and visual carriers, making model reasoning fragile under modality substitution. To address this, we propose Local Modality Substitution (LoMo), a lightweight, architecture-agnostic data curation paradigm designed to provide supervision for cross-modal representational invariance between semantically equivalent text and image carriers. LoMo achieves this by reformulating single-modality prompts into seamlessly interleaved multimodal sequences. It dynamically selects target text spans and recasts them as rendered images, thereby preserving the same semantics across "text, visual, text" carriers. Extensive experiments across 13 diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that LoMo significantly improves overall multimodal reasoning and yields deeper cross-modal fusion. Specifically, it delivers consistent gains across foundational models, improving over standard SFT by 2.67 points on LLaVA-OneVision-1.5-8B and 2.82 points on Qwen3.5-9B.

AI.tldr: 本文发现视觉语言模型（VLM）存在“载体敏感性”问题——将文本问题替换为渲染图像后性能显著下降，归因于训练数据中文本和图像角色不对称导致的跨模态表征不对齐。为此提出LoMo方法，通过构建“文本-图像-文本”交错序列实现跨模态表征不变性，在13个基准上提升2.67-2.82分。
AI.motivation: 当前VLM在文本和图像作为语义载体时存在严重的性能不对称：将文本问题换成图像版本后模型表现急剧下降。作者认为这是训练数据中文本和图像被赋予了不对称角色（文本作为查询、图像作为视觉参考）导致的固有偏差，使模型无法对齐跨模态的语义等价表征。
AI.method: 提出Local Modality Substitution (LoMo)，一种轻量级、架构无关的数据编排范式。核心思路是将单模态提示重构为无缝交错的多模态序列：动态选择目标文本片段并将其重新渲染为图像，从而在“文本-视觉-文本”载体间保持相同语义，为跨模态表征不变性提供监督信号。
AI.result: 在13个多模态基准上，LoMo在LLaVA-OneVision-1.5-8B上比标准SFT提升2.67分，在Qwen3.5-9B上提升2.82分，显著提升多模态推理和跨模态融合效果。
AI.conclusion: LoMo通过数据层面的模态替换策略有效缓解了VLM的载体敏感性问题，验证了提供跨模态表征不变性监督信号的有效性，且方法轻量、通用，可应用于不同基础模型。

title: ESPO: Early-Stopping Proximal Policy Optimization
summary: When a large language model under reinforcement learning commits a wrong reasoning step early in a trajectory, standard algorithms force it to keep generating until the maximum horizon, spending compute on tokens that never receive positive reward and polluting advantage estimates with post-failure noise. We propose ESPO (Early-Stopping Proximal Policy Optimization), which detects trajectory failure on-the-fly and terminates rollouts early. At each generation step, ESPO computes a surrogate regret using only the logits already computed during sampling, and terminates when the smoothed cumulative regret significantly exceeds its estimated values. Truncated trajectories are treated as absorbing failure states with a terminal reward, concentrating negative temporal-difference (TD) errors near the detected failure step without any additional reward model or human annotation. On DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B trained for mathematical reasoning, ESPO surpasses PPO on AIME~2024 (46.28% vs. 45.25%), AMC~2023 (85.83% vs. 82.94%), and MATH-500 (87.42% vs. 85.43%), while saving more than 20% rollout tokens cumulatively.

AI.tldr: ESPO是一种在强化学习训练大语言模型时，能实时检测推理失败并提前终止轨迹的方法，比PPO在数学推理任务上提升准确率并节省20%以上的计算token。
AI.motivation: 标准强化学习算法（如PPO）在训练大语言模型时，一旦模型在推理早期就犯错，仍会强制生成直到最大步长，浪费大量计算资源于无法获得正奖励的token上，且后续噪声污染了优势估计。
AI.method: ESPO在每步生成时，利用已计算的logits计算替代遗憾（surrogate regret），当平滑累积遗憾显著超过预期值时提前终止轨迹；截断轨迹被视为吸收失败态，赋予终止奖励，使负TD误差集中在失败步附近，无需额外奖励模型或人工标注。
AI.result: 在DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B上训练数学推理任务，ESPO在AIME 2024 (46.28% vs 45.25%)、AMC 2023 (85.83% vs 82.94%)和MATH-500 (87.42% vs 85.43%)上均超越PPO，同时累积节省超过20%的rollout token。
AI.conclusion: ESPO通过早期错误检测与提前终止策略，既提升了推理性能，又显著降低了训练计算开销，是一种更高效的大语言模型强化学习训练方案。

title: Robust and Generalizable Safety Steering for Text-to-Image Diffusion Transformers
summary: Diffusion Transformers have become a powerful backbone for text-to-image generation, but their layered and cross-modal generation process makes safety control fundamentally different from prompt-level filtering or output-level detection. Harmful semantics may be weakly expressed in text representations, progressively bound to visual latents, and finally entangled with rendering dynamics. As a result, safety steering at a fixed layer can be unstable, and a steering mechanism learned from known risks may not transfer reliably to a shifted target risk domain. We propose SafeDIG, a safety steering framework that formulates DiT safety adaptation as position-aware sparse feature transfer. SafeDIG first constructs Sparse Autoencoders over functionally distinct DiT intervention positions and uses robustness-aware pre-training routing to prioritize intervention sites that are expected to remain stable under source-target risk shift. It then separates transferable safety features from domain-specific activation geometry by freezing the SAE encoder as a reusable sparse safety dictionary and adapting only the decoder to the target-domain activation manifold. During inference, SafeDIG combines Blend and Repel operations to steer unsafe activations toward transferred safety manifolds or away from harmful sparse directions. Experiments on FLUX.1 Dev and Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large show that SafeDIG consistently reduces target-domain and overall unsafe generation rates while preserving source-domain safety and image quality.

AI.tldr: SafeDIG是一个针对扩散Transformer（DiT）文本到图像生成模型的安全引导框架，通过位置感知的稀疏特征迁移，在不同干预位置构建稀疏自编码器，并利用鲁棒性预训练路由和可重用的安全字典，实现跨风险域的安全引导。
AI.motivation: 扩散Transformer的分层跨模态生成过程使得安全控制难以通过简单的提示过滤或输出检测实现——有害语义可能在文本表示中弱表达，逐步绑定到视觉潜变量，最后与渲染动态纠缠，导致固定层的安全引导不稳定，且从已知风险学到的引导机制难以迁移到目标风险域。
AI.method: SafeDIG包含三个关键步骤：1) 在不同功能DiT干预位置构建稀疏自编码器(SAE)，并用鲁棒性感知预训练路由优先选择源-目标风险转移下稳定的干预点；2) 冻结SAE编码器作为可复用稀疏安全字典，仅适配解码器到目标域激活流形，分离可迁移安全特征与域特定激活几何；3) 推理时结合Blend和Repel操作，将不安全激活引导向已迁移的安全流形或远离有害稀疏方向。
AI.result: 在FLUX.1 Dev和Stable Diffusion 3.5 Large上的实验表明，SafeDIG持续降低了目标域和整体的不安全生成率，同时保持了源域安全性和图像质量。
AI.conclusion: SafeDIG通过位置感知稀疏特征迁移有效解决了DiT跨域安全引导的不稳定性和可迁移性问题，在保持图像质量的前提下实现了可靠的安全控制。

title: Do Proactive Agents Really Need an LLM to Decide When to Wake and What to Anchor?
summary: Proactive agents read user activity as text and call an LLM on every event to decide whether to act. But user activity is not natively text: it is a structured event stream of (actor, verb, object, timestamp) tuples that the operating system already maintains in graph form. Rendering the structure as text and asking an LLM to recover it is a round-trip the system never had to take. We treat the always-on signal as graph updates rather than text and use a small temporal-graph-learning (TGL) model as the encoder: one forward pass yields a per-event trigger probability and a per-entity routing score, and only the downstream agent (turning a small structured handoff into a fluent user-facing sentence) is an LLM call, invoked only when the trigger fires. TGL improves F1 on each of 14 backbones (mean +16.7, up to +46.0); in trigger-architecture comparisons, one TGL checkpoint gives the strongest trigger AUCs and the most stable deployed threshold. It runs at 11.13 ms per event on a GPU server and 13.99 ms on a consumer laptop, approximately 4--7x and 12--83x faster than every single-forward LLM-as-trigger configuration tested in each regime, with an approximately 220 MiB BF16 resident footprint deployable on-device alongside the privacy-sensitive activity stream it consumes.

AI.tldr: 本文提出用小型时序图学习模型（TGL）替代LLM作为事件触发和路由编码器，仅在需要生成用户句子时才调用LLM，大幅提升效率与性能。
AI.motivation: 现有主动智能体将结构化事件流渲染为文本再让LLM恢复，存在不必要的"绕路"问题，效率低且开销大。
AI.method: 将用户活动视为图更新，使用TGL模型进行单次前向传播得到事件触发概率和实体路由分数，仅在触发时调用下游LLM生成自然语言句子。
AI.result: 在14个骨干网络上F1平均提升+16.7（最高+46.0），触发性能最强、阈值最稳定；推理速度比LLM方案快4-83倍，内存占用约220 MiB。
AI.conclusion: TGL可高效部署在端侧，在隐私敏感场景下以极低开销实现精准的事件触发与实体路由，是LLM-as-trigger的更优替代方案。

title: PhyGenHOI: Physically-Aware 4D Generation of Dynamic Human-Object Interactions
summary: We address the task of generating physically accurate and visually faithful 4D Human-Object Interaction (HOI). Given a static 3D human and target object represented as 3D Gaussian Splats (3DGS), our goal is to synthesize dynamic scenes where the human actively engages with the object through actions, such as punching or kicking, in accordance with a given input text. To this end, we introduce PhyGenHOI, a novel framework that couples generative human motion with an explicit physical object simulation. We model the human as a semantic agent driven by a Motion Diffusion Model (MDM) and the object as a physical agent simulated via the Material Point Method (MPM), utilizing 3D Gaussians as a unified, differentiable representation. We supervise their interaction through three coupled mechanisms: (1) A Windowed Attraction Loss that temporally synchronizes generative motion to intercept the object; (2) A Contact-Driven Re-simulation step that triggers physically consistent momentum transfer upon impact; and (3) A Masked Video-SDS objective that injects video-based priors to enhance contact fidelity. Experiments show PhyGenHOI generates physically consistent 4D HOI across diverse actions, humans, and objects, outperforming baselines. Project page and videos: https://omerbenishu.github.io/PhyGenHOI/

AI.tldr: 提出PhyGenHOI框架，结合生成式人体运动（Motion Diffusion Model）与显式物理物体模拟（Material Point Method），利用3D高斯作为统一可微表示，通过窗口吸引损失、接触驱动重模拟和掩码视频SDS三个机制，生成物理一致且视觉真实的4D人-物交互动态场景。
AI.motivation: 现有4D人-物交互生成方法难以同时保证物理准确性和视觉真实性，缺乏对人体运动生成与物体物理模拟的有效耦合机制。
AI.method: 1) 以3D高斯（3DGS）作为统一可微表示；2) 人体用Motion Diffusion Model生成语义驱动运动；3) 物体用Material Point Method进行物理模拟；4) 窗口吸引损失实现时间同步；5) 接触驱动重模拟保证动量传递；6) 掩码视频SDS增强接触保真度。
AI.result: 在多种动作、人体和物体上生成物理一致的4D人-物交互，效果优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: PhyGenHOI有效耦合生成式运动与显式物理模拟，为4D人-物交互生成提供了物理一致且视觉可信的解决方案。

title: STAP: A Shuffle-Tokenized App Predictor with Ultra Long Context for Vocabulary-Free Mobile App Prediction
comment: 15 pages, 9 figures, 5 tables Preprint submitted to Expert Systems with Applications
summary: Predicting the next mobile application a user will launch is essential for intelligent device resource management and proactive assistance. Existing models rely on fixed app vocabularies, which prevents them from generalizing across different app ecosystems. Many also depend on user-specific knowledge, which complicates deployment in cold start scenarios. We propose STAP, a Transformer-based model that eliminates the need for a fixed vocabulary. STAP replaces true app identities with randomly reassigned virtual indices via a shuffle mechanism, and compensates for discarded semantic information by processing behavioral sequences with an ultra-long context design. A theoretical analysis shows that, given a sufficiently long context, the predicted distribution converges to the correct one despite the anonymity of the mapping. Experiments on two datasets from different continents demonstrate that STAP achieves strong cross-dataset zero-shot prediction accuracy -- a setting where all existing fixed-vocabulary methods are inherently inapplicable -- while its cold start performance within each dataset remains competitive with leading models. Furthermore, we introduce a deployment strategy that enables the model to retain a sufficiently long context during continuous inference while keeping latency within acceptable bounds.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STAP模型，基于Transformer架构，通过随机重排虚拟索引替换真实应用身份，并利用超长上下文设计补偿丢失的语义信息，实现跨数据集零样本预测，解决了现有固定词汇表模型无法泛化到不同应用生态系统的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有移动应用预测模型依赖固定应用词汇表，无法在不同应用生态间泛化；且许多模型依赖用户特定知识，在冷启动场景部署困难。
AI.method: 提出STAP（Transformer-based模型），通过shuffle机制将真实应用身份替换为随机分配的虚拟索引，消除对固定词汇表的依赖；使用超长上下文设计处理行为序列以补偿丢弃的语义信息；理论分析证明在足够长上下文中预测分布收敛于正确分布。
AI.result: 在两个来自不同大洲的数据集上，STAP实现了强大的跨数据集零样本预测准确性（现有固定词汇表方法在此设置下本质不可用），同时在数据集内的冷启动性能与领先模型竞争。此外提出部署策略，在连续推理中保持足够长上下文的同时将延迟控制在可接受范围内。
AI.conclusion: STAP成功解决了移动应用预测中跨生态系统的泛化问题和冷启动部署难题，为设备资源管理和主动辅助提供了更通用的解决方案。

title: Conformal Certification of Reasoning Trace Prefixes
summary: Language model reasoning traces are rarely all-or-nothing; they frequently contain valid intermediate steps before a critical error occurs. Existing uncertainty quantification methods typically certify final answers or entire responses, failing to provide statistical guarantees for the proportion of a sequential trace that can be safely retained. To address this, we introduce CROP (Conformal Reasoning Output Prefixes), a verifier-agnostic calibration procedure for clean-prefix certification. Given any step-level risk proxy, CROP selects a calibrated threshold and returns the longest contiguous prefix whose step risk proxies remain below it, routing the uncertified suffix for downstream review or repair. Assuming exchangeability, CROP rigorously controls the marginal probability that the returned prefix contains an annotated error. Across six process-labeled reasoning datasets, we demonstrate that standard step-level metrics such as AUROC do not fully capture prefix utility, suggesting verifiers should instead be evaluated by certified prefix length. Furthermore, CROP balances over- and under-withholding, improving downstream repair accuracy by preserving valid intermediate reasoning while discarding misleading suffixes. Ultimately, this work positions prefix certification as a rigorous, practical bridge between process supervision, abstention, and repair.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CROP（Conformal Reasoning Output Prefixes），一种基于共形预测的校准方法，用于在语言模型推理轨迹中认证安全的连续前缀。CROP通过步骤级风险代理选择校准阈值，返回无错误前缀，并保证统计上的边际错误包含概率控制。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性量化方法仅对最终答案或整个响应进行认证，无法为推理轨迹中可安全保留的部分提供统计保证，而实际推理轨迹常包含有效中间步骤后才出现关键错误。
AI.method: CROP是一种与验证器无关的校准过程。它接受任意步骤级风险代理，通过共形预测选择校准阈值，返回最长的连续前缀（其步骤风险代理均低于该阈值），并将未认证的后缀交由下游审查或修复。
AI.result: 在六个过程标注推理数据集上，标准步骤级指标（如AUROC）不能完全反映前缀效用，验证器应通过认证前缀长度来评估。CROP能平衡过度保留与不足保留，通过保留有效中间推理并丢弃误导性后缀，提升下游修复准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本文将前缀认证定位为过程监督、弃权与修复之间一个严格且实用的桥梁。

title: A Dual-Path Architecture for Scaling Compute and Capacity in LLMs
summary: Looped transformers apply a shared block multiple times and have emerged as a parameter-efficient route to scaling compute in language models. However, at fixed FLOPs a looped model has strictly less capacity than a baseline transformer. We propose a novel dual-path block that can flexibly scale compute, the number of sequential operations applied to a hidden state, and capacity, the parameters available at a single step. For this we expose both axes as parallel pathways within a single layer: a deep sublayer re-applied K times with shared parameters, and a wide sublayer with an enlarged feed-forward network applied once. Independent per-token gates combine both axes and allow detailed per-token routing analyses. We show that across two FLOP budgets, our dual-path model surpasses iso-FLOP matched models on language modeling and downstream evaluations, while using fewer parameters than the baseline at matched FLOPs. The learned gates are directly interpretable and show systematic per-token allocation with function words and lexical content trend wide, while punctuation, symbols, and arithmetic tokens trend deep.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种双路径（dual-path）Transformer块，通过并行结合深度共享子层（重复K次）和宽度子层（大FFN一次），并用逐token门控灵活分配计算和容量，在相同FLOPs下超越了基线模型，同时参数更少、门控可解释。
AI.motivation: 循环Transformer在固定FLOPs下比基线模型容量更小（因为参数共享），因此需要一种既能灵活扩展计算（序列操作次数）又能灵活扩展容量（单步参数）的方法。
AI.method: 提出dual-path块：一条路径是深度子层（共享参数，重复K次），另一条是宽度子层（大FFN只执行一次）；两条路径的输出由逐token可学习门控加权融合，实现了计算和容量的解耦与灵活分配。
AI.result: 在两种FLOPs预算下，dual-path模型在语言建模和下游任务上超越了同FLOPs基线，且参数更少；学到的门控具有可解释性，功能词和词汇内容倾向于宽度路径，标点、符号和算术token倾向于深度路径。
AI.conclusion: 通过并行化计算深度和参数宽度两条轴，dual-path设计能更高效地利用FLOPs，在减少参数的同时提升性能，并且门控机制揭示了token级别的系统性分配规律。

title: Boosting Image Quality Assessment Performance: Unsupervised Score Fusion by Deep Maximum a Posteriori Estimation
comment: 2024 International Conference on Acoustics, Speech, and Signal Processing (ICASSP 2024)
summary: Over the past decades, numerous Image Quality Assessment (IQA) models have emerged, aiming to predict the perceptual quality of images. However, individual models are often biased toward certain types of image content or distortions, depending on the design principle and process. An intuitive idea is to harness the strengths and mitigate the weaknesses of each IQA model, by fusing the scores of multiple models into a stronger one. Here we make one of the first attempts to seek an optimal solution for the idea and propose a general framework for unsupervised IQA score fusion using deep Maximum a Posteriori (MAP) estimation. The proposed model conducts fine-grained uncertainty estimation at the score level to increase the accuracy and reduce the uncertainty in fused predictions. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate the superiority of the proposed model over individual IQA models and other fusion methods. It also exhibits an interesting capability of rejecting ``bad" models in the fusion process.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度最大后验(MAP)估计的无监督IQA分数融合框架，通过细粒度不确定性估计融合多个IQA模型，提升预测精度并降低不确定性。
AI.motivation: 单个IQA模型往往对特定图像内容或失真类型存在偏见，通过融合多个模型的评分可以取长补短，但目前缺乏对融合过程的最优解探索。
AI.method: 提出基于深度最大后验(MAP)估计的无监督IQA分数融合框架，在分数级别进行细粒度不确定性估计，以提高融合预测的准确性并降低不确定性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法优于单个IQA模型及其他融合方法，并具备在融合过程中自动拒绝"坏"模型的能力。
AI.conclusion: 基于MAP估计的分数融合是一种有效提升IQA性能的通用框架，具备自动筛选模型的能力。

title: Open Problem: Separating Geometric and Algorithmic Compression via Cayley-Table Completion
comment: 6 pages. Submitted to the Conference on Learning Theory (COLT) 2026 Open Problem track
summary: Modern statistical learning theory and deep learning characterize generalization primarily in terms of continuous capacity control (e.g., norm-based regularization, margin maximization, low-rank bias). While highly successful in continuous domains, deep learning consistently fails to extrapolate exact algorithmic or discrete algebraic rules, reflecting a missing inductive bias toward algorithmic complexity minimization. We propose the Cayley-table completion as the canonical testbed for this missing bias, serving as the discrete algebraic counterpart to matrix completion. Just as matrix factorization combined with weight decay yields an implicit geometric bias toward low linear rank, recent results demonstrate that operator-valued tensor factorizations paired with a flatness prior yield an implicit algorithmic bias toward exact discrete associativity. We pose the open problem of establishing formal exact recovery bounds for Cayley-table completion, and challenge the community to generalize continuous flatness priors to autonomously discover broader discrete algorithmic axioms without combinatorial search.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Cayley表补全作为离散代数版矩阵补全的规范测试平台，指出现有深度学习缺乏算法复杂度最小化的归纳偏置，并论证算子值张量分解配合平坦性先验能产生隐式算法偏置，最终提出建立精确恢复界限的开放问题。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在连续域表现优异，但在精确算法规则或离散代数规则的推广泛化上持续失败，缺乏对算法复杂度最小化的归纳偏置。作者希望提供一个规范化的测试平台来研究和弥补这一缺失。
AI.method: 提出Cayley表补全作为离散代数领域的测试基准，类比矩阵补全在连续域的地位。利用算子值张量分解配合平坦性先验（flatness prior），产生隐式的算法偏置（algorithmic bias），引导模型趋向精确的离散结合律。
AI.result: 近期结果表明，算子值张量分解与平坦性先验相结合能产生隐式算法偏置，引导模型学习到精确的离散结合律（associativity），超越了单纯连续容量控制方法的能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出了建立Cayley表补全形式化精确恢复界限的开放问题，并呼吁研究社区将连续平坦性先验推广到更广泛的离散算法公理自动发现，从而摆脱组合搜索的依赖。

title: Selective QA over Conflicting Multi-Source Personal Memory: A Diagnostic Testbed and Method Comparison
summary: Emerging personal AI agents are moving toward persistent, multi-source memory. This creates an evaluation problem: systems must decide how to use conflicting or incomplete evidence; they cannot just retrieve facts from one clean history. Existing benchmarks rarely show whether an error came from the evidence given to a method or from the method's conflict-resolution step. We study this as selective QA over conflicting multi-source personal memory: systems answer based on conflicting, sometimes incomplete sources, or abstain when evidence is insufficient. We develop a benchmark containing 18 question templates across 8 reasoning types, 480 personas, 4 random seeds, and 34,560 instances, with controlled source distortions and deterministic ground truth. We evaluate the performance of baselines without access to any source, access to a single source, structured fusion methods, and frontier LLMs. The best trained fusion resolver reaches 80.3% accuracy, while the strongest prompt-only LLM baseline reaches 70.0%. With abstention, the same resolver reaches 85.3% selective accuracy at 78.3% coverage and the best LLM reaches 71.0% selective accuracy at 95.4% coverage. Different models have different strengths across reasoning types. We release the data, code, cached model outputs, and data-generating process for reuse.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多源个人记忆中冲突证据的选择性问答问题，构建了包含34,560个实例的基准测试，发现最佳融合解析器准确率达80.3%，而允许弃权时选择性准确率可达85.3%。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试无法区分错误源于证据提供还是冲突解决步骤，亟需一个能系统评估冲突多源记忆场景下模型表现的方法。
AI.method: 构建包含18个问题模板、8种推理类型、480个人物画像、34,560个实例的基准测试，通过受控源失真和确定性真值设计，并评估无源、单源、结构化融合和前沿LLM等多种基线。
AI.result: 最佳训练融合解析器准确率80.3%，最强仅提示LLM基线70.0%；引入弃权后，融合解析器选择性准确率85.3%（覆盖率78.3%），最佳LLM达71.0%（覆盖率95.4%）。
AI.conclusion: 不同模型在不同推理类型上各有优势，冲突多源记忆的选择性问答是一个重要且尚未完全解决的问题，数据与代码已开源供后续研究。

title: GRUFF: LLM Pronoun Fidelity, Reasoning, and Biases in German
summary: Third-person singular pronouns have long been used to study stereotypical biases in language models and to test their abilities to reason about reference. More recently, the interplay between reasoning and bias has been investigated with the task of pronoun fidelity, which assesses models' abilities to correctly reuse a previously-specified pronoun for a discourse entity, independent of other potentially distracting discourse entities mentioned in between. However, such research focuses on English, which is a language with limited grammatical gender and almost no gender agreement. In this paper we contribute a novel, large-scale dataset, GRUFF, to measure pronoun fidelity in German, covering four different gender agreement systems in nouns, and four sets of pronouns. With this dataset, we show that LLMs show strong grammatical agreement for masculine and feminine entities in the absence of explicit context, but not for neopronouns xier and en. Models are generally not robust to distractors, but encoder-only models are more robust in German than in English, reflecting the importance of grammatical gender. Finally, we show that occupational stereotypes in this context are poorly correlated across grammatical cases, and across most models, except ones with closely related architectures. We release all code and data to encourage further work on gender-inclusive language and referential reasoning in German.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了GRUFF数据集，研究德语中大语言模型的代词保真度，发现模型在无上下文时对阳性和阴性实体表现良好，但对新代词表现不佳；模型受干扰项影响，但编码器模型在德语中比英语更鲁棒；职业刻板印象在语法格和模型间相关性低。
AI.motivation: 现有代词研究集中于英语（语法性别有限且无性别一致），缺乏对复杂语法性别系统语言（如德语）的探究，本研究旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 构建了GRUFF数据集，覆盖德语四种名词性别一致系统和四组代词，评估LLMs的代词保真度，并分析干扰项、语法格和职业刻板印象的影响。
AI.result: 1) LLMs对阳性和阴性实体在无上下文中表现良好，但对新代词xier和en表现差；2) 模型普遍受干扰项影响，但编码器模型在德语中比英语更鲁棒；3) 职业刻板印象在不同语法格间相关性低，仅架构相近的模型间相关性较高。
AI.conclusion: 德语语法性别系统对代词推理有显著影响，现有模型在性别包容性方面仍有不足，需进一步研究。

title: Grounded 3D-Aware Spatial Vision-Language Modeling
summary: We present GR3D, a spatial vision language model equipped with three complementary grounding capabilities--explicit 2D grounding, implicit 2D grounding, and monocular 3D grounding--within a single framework. GR3D introduces an implicit grounding mechanism that identifies entity mentions during generation and inserts the corresponding region tokens into the text stream, allowing the model to reference visual evidence on the fly when producing spatial chain-of-thought responses. In parallel, a region-prompted monocular 3D grounding design predicts 3D bounding boxes in the camera view from grounded region queries, supported by intrinsic-aware normalization and dense geometric supervision. Together, these grounding capabilities enable GR3D to decompose complex spatial understanding problems into grounded 2D perception followed by 3D inference. GR3D achieves consistent improvements across grounded and non-grounded spatial benchmarks, demonstrating grounding as an effective inductive bias for strengthening spatial understanding in VLMs. These grounding capabilities collectively enhance general spatial understanding beyond the grounding task itself.

AI.tldr: GR3D是一个统一的视觉语言模型，在同一框架内集成了显式2D定位、隐式2D定位和单目3D定位三种互补能力，通过引入隐式定位机制和区域提示的单目3D定位设计，在空间基准测试中取得了一致改进。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在空间理解方面存在不足，缺乏有效的定位能力作为归纳偏置来增强空间推理，尤其是缺乏统一的框架来处理多种定位任务。
AI.method: 1) 隐式定位机制：在生成时识别实体提及并插入区域令牌到文本流中，实现空间思维链中的即时视觉证据引用；2) 区域提示的单目3D定位：从定位区域查询预测相机视图中的3D边界框，辅以内参感知归一化和密集几何监督；3) 将复杂空间理解分解为2D感知定位+3D推理。
AI.result: 在定位和非定位的空间基准测试中均取得了一致改进，验证了定位作为增强VLM空间理解的有效归纳偏置。
AI.conclusion: 定位能力不仅能完成定位任务本身，还能协同增强模型的整体空间理解能力，证明了多粒度定位融合的有效性。

title: LaRA: Layer-wise Representation Analysis for Detecting Data Contamination in RL Post-Training
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) post-training has shown to improve reasoning in large language models (LLMs). However, there has been little exploration on the problem of data contamination in RL post-training, potentially undermining generalization and evaluation reliability of the training process itself. Existing detection methods primarily rely on output-level signals such as likelihood or entropy, which become unreliable for RL-trained models since RL shapes behavior through trajectory-level rewards rather than token likelihoods. We propose LaRA, a layer-wise representation analysis framework for detecting contamination in RL post-trained LLMs. LaRA introduces three complementary metrics, measuring perturbation sensitivity, directional collapse, and local representation rigidity under controlled perturbations. We find that contamination produces progressive geometric deviations across layers, including amplified perturbation sensitivity, stronger directional collapse, and enhanced local rigidity. Based on our findings, we also develop a contamination detection protocol that aggregates representation-level deviations across layers and metrics. Experiments on RL-trained reasoning models show that our protocol outperforms existing output-level baselines for contamination detection.

AI.tldr: 提出LaRA框架，通过层级表征分析检测RL后训练中的LLM数据污染，利用三个互补指标（扰动敏感性、方向坍缩、局部表征刚性）捕捉污染导致的几何偏差，在检测性能上优于传统输出级方法。
AI.motivation: RL后训练提升了LLM推理能力，但数据污染问题未得到充分探索；现有输出级检测方法（基于似然或熵）对RL训练模型不可靠，因为RL通过轨迹级奖励塑造行为而非token似然。
AI.method: 提出LaRA框架，包含三个互补指标：1）扰动敏感性（测量对输入扰动的反应强度）；2）方向坍缩（表征方向多样性损失）；3）局部表征刚性（在受控扰动下表征的刚性程度）。通过聚合跨层的几何偏差建立检测协议。
AI.result: 在RL训练的推理模型上，LaRA的检测协议优于现有输出级基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 污染会导致跨层的渐进式几何偏差，包括放大的扰动敏感性、更强的方向坍缩和增强的局部刚性；LaRA框架有效利用这些信号实现更可靠的污染检测。

title: PokerSkill: LLMs Can Play Expert-Level Poker without Training or Solvers
summary: Poker is a landmark challenge for artificial intelligence. The dominant approach relies on equilibrium solvers built on counterfactual regret minimization, requiring millions of core-hours of training. Large Language Models (LLMs) possess extensive poker knowledge but perform far below solver-based agents when asked to play directly. Traditional rule-based poker agents are interpretable and training-free, but their strategic ceiling remains far below equilibrium play. We introduce \textbf{PokerSkill}, a training-free and solver-free framework that bridges this gap by using detailed rule-based poker skills as a structured action-grounding interface for LLMs. A deterministic context engine analyzes the current state and retrieves only the relevant fragments from a layered skill library, which is entirely designed by human poker experts, constraining the LLM's choice to reasonable actions. Against GTOWizard, a state-of-the-art GTO benchmark, GPT-5.5 XHigh with PokerSkill achieves $-57 \pm 21$ mbb/hand, Claude Opus 4.6 achieves $-80 \pm 29$ mbb/hand and Claude Opus 4.7 achieves $-87\pm 64$ mbb/hand, reducing losses by 49--61\% compared to default-prompt baselines and outperforming the strong bot Slumbot. Our key finding is that rule-based skills alone do not constitute a strong strategy, and LLMs alone cannot play well, but their combination yields an agent that requires neither training nor solver access yet competes with systems built on millions of core-hours of computation. To our knowledge, this is the first demonstration of an LLM achieving competitive performance in a complex imperfect-information game without game-specific training or solver queries. Code is available at https://github.com/lbn187/PokerSkill.

AI.tldr: PokerSkill 是一个无需训练和无需求解器的框架，通过将详细的基于规则的扑克技能作为 LLM 的结构化动作接口，使 LLM 在德州扑克中达到接近 GTO 水平的竞争力，相比默认提示基线减少了 49-61% 的损失，这是首次无需游戏特定训练或求解器查询即可在复杂不完美信息游戏中实现 LLM 竞争性能的证明。
AI.motivation: 现有 poker AI 方法面临困境：基于遗憾最小化的求解器方法需要数百万核心小时的训练；LLM 拥有丰富扑克知识但直接出牌表现远逊于求解器；传统基于规则的代理人虽然可解释且无需训练，但策略上限远低于均衡玩法。作者希望结合规则技能的结构化优势与 LLM 的知识推理能力，构建一个既无需训练也无需求解器的强大扑克代理。
AI.method: 提出 PokerSkill 框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 分层技能库（由人类扑克专家设计），包含详细的基于规则的扑克技能；(2) 确定性上下文引擎，分析当前牌局状态并从技能库中检索相关片段，将 LLM 的动作约束到合理范围内。该框架无需训练，也无需调用求解器，完全利用规则技能作为 LLM 的结构化动作接地面。
AI.result: 在 GTOWizard 基准上，GPT-5.5 XHigh 达到 -57±21 mbb/hand，Claude Opus 4.6 达到 -80±29 mbb/hand，Claude Opus 4.7 达到 -87±64 mbb/hand，相比默认提示基线减少了 49-61% 的损失，并超越了强对手 Slumbot。
AI.conclusion: 核心发现是：仅依靠规则技能不足以构成强策略，仅依靠 LLM 也无法打好牌，但两者的结合产生了一个既无需训练也无需求解器、却能媲美基于数百万核心小时计算构建系统的智能体。这是首个无需游戏特定训练或求解器查询即可在复杂不完美信息游戏中实现 LLM 竞争性能的证明。

title: Do Language Models Track Entities Across State Changes?
summary: Entity tracking (ET), the ability to keep track of states, is a fundamental skill that underlies complex reasoning. An increasing amount of work investigates how transformer language models (LMs) solve entity binding $\textit{without}$ state changes. However, there is limited understanding of how non-toy LMs address ET problems of realistic difficulties expressed in natural language. To this end, we investigate the mechanisms underlying ET in more complex scenarios featuring multiple state-changing operations. We find that LMs do not incrementally track world states across tokens or query-relevant states across layers, but simply aggregate relevant information in parallel at the last token when the query becomes evident. We further investigate mechanisms of individual operations ($\texttt{PUT}$, $\texttt{REMOVE}$, $\texttt{MOVE}$) to characterize this non-incremental ET mechanism. Surprisingly, LMs implement the $\texttt{REMOVE}$ operation with a fragile global suppression tag; this global removal mechanism predicts various failure modes that we confirm behaviorally. We provide a mechanistic solution of nullifying this tag to partially address this issue. Overall, our findings reveal that LMs solve a fundamentally sequential task using a non-sequential strategy. More broadly, our work illustrates how behavioral and mechanistic analyses can fruitfully interact. Behavioral results inform mechanistic hypotheses, and insights from mechanistic analyses help build stronger behavioral evaluations by predicting failure modes missing from existing evaluations.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Transformer语言模型在复杂实体追踪任务中的机制，发现模型并非逐步追踪状态变化，而是在查询明确时在最后一个token并行聚合相关信息。特别地，模型通过脆弱的全局抑制标签实现REMOVE操作，这导致了多种可预测的失败模式。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注无状态变化的实体绑定问题，而对复杂自然语言场景下、涉及多次状态变更操作的实体追踪机制理解有限。
AI.method: 分析LM在复杂多操作场景下的实体追踪机制；分别研究PUT、REMOVE、MOVE等操作；通过机制分析预测失败模式并进行行为验证；提出通过消去全局抑制标签的部分解决方案。
AI.result: LM并非以增量方式逐token追踪世界状态或逐层追踪查询相关状态，而是在查询变得明显时在末尾token并行聚合相关信息；REMOVE操作通过脆弱的全局抑制标签实现，该机制可预测多种失败模式并被行为实验证实。
AI.conclusion: LM使用非顺序策略解决本质上是顺序的任务；行为分析与机制分析可以相互促进——行为结果指导机制假设，机制分析帮助构建更强的行为评估并预测现有评估中缺失的失败模式。

title: City-Mesh3R: Simulation-Ready City-Scale 3D Mesh Reconstruction from Multi-View Images
comment: Accepted to the USM3D Workshop Proceedings at the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026 as an Oral Presentation. Project page: https://citymesh3r.github.io/
summary: City-scale 3D surface reconstruction from multiview images for downstream 3D simulation, poses highly challenging problems due to the scale and complexity of urban scenes. Existing city-scale 3D reconstruction methods based on NeRF, Gaussian Splatting etc. often fail to recover 3D meshes ready for simulation due to incomplete/missing geometry and irregular, noisy surfaces. Scaling existing small-scale 3D reconstruction methods to arbitrarily large urban scenes is highly infeasible due to their computational complexity. We present City-Mesh3R, a scalable framework for reconstructing watertight surface meshes directly from large unordered image collections. Unlike recent methods which use global sparse SfM point-cloud initialization followed by a distributed 3D dense reconstruction of large-scale scenes, our method follows an end-to-end images-to-mesh 3D reconstruction approach using a divide-and-conquer strategy. The sparse city map is reconstructed via topological image clustering, cluster-wise independent sparse SfM and map merging, without need for exhaustive image feature matching. Then this map is partitioned spatially to perform geometry-aware camera selection, followed by dense surface reconstruction and surface refinement using curvature-aware adaptive vertex density remeshing. These partition meshes are then stitched together to produce the global mesh of the city. The proposed end-to-end framework is evaluated on city-scale reconstruction datasets. As demonstrated by our qualitative and quantitative results, our proposed method yields high-fidelity watertight 3D meshes with regular geometry, capturing fine surface details, and is suitable for scaling to arbitrarily large scenes owing to the end-to-end processing in a distributed setting.

AI.tldr: 提出City-Mesh3R，一种可扩展的端到端框架，采用分治策略从大规模无序图像集合直接重建城市级防水3D网格，无需全局SfM初始化，通过拓扑图像聚类、分区重建和曲率感知自适应网格细化实现高质量、规则几何的城市三维表面重建。
AI.motivation: 现有基于NeRF、Gaussian Splatting的城市级3D重建方法难以恢复可用于仿真的高质量3D网格（几何缺失、表面不规则噪声），而小规模方法无法扩展到大规模城市场景。亟需一种可扩展、端到端且能生成规则防水网格的城市级3D重建方法。
AI.method: 1) 拓扑图像聚类进行稀疏城市地图重建，无需穷尽特征匹配；2) 空间分区进行几何感知相机选择；3) 稠密表面重建；4) 曲率感知自适应顶点密度重网格化进行表面细化；5) 分区网格拼接生成全局城市网格。采用分治策略实现分布式端到端处理。
AI.result: 在城市级重建数据集上的定性和定量结果表明，该方法能生成高保真防水3D网格，具有规则几何结构，捕捉精细表面细节，且可扩展到任意大规模场景。
AI.conclusion: City-Mesh3R通过端到端的分治策略有效解决了城市级3D表面重建的扩展性和质量问题，生成的防水网格可直接用于下游3D仿真任务，优势在于无需全局SfM初始化，计算可分布式处理。

title: OVA-IB: One vs All Information Bottleneck for Multi-Modal Alignment
summary: Contrastive learning is effective for aligning paired views or modalities, but alignment beyond two modalities remains non-trivial and comparatively underexplored. Pairwise CLIP-style losses decompose multi-modal alignment into independent two-way comparisons and therefore do not explicitly model higher-order dependencies among multiple modalities. Recent beyond-pairwise objectives approach this problem from statistical or geometric perspectives, but arbitrary-modality alignment still lacks a principled criterion for defining what each modality should preserve and compress relative to the others. We revisit arbitrary-modality alignment through the Information Bottleneck principle. In multi-modal learning, sufficiency should preserve information predictable from the remaining modalities, while minimality should compress modality-specific information not supported by them. This naturally leads to a One-vs-All view, where each modality is characterized with respect to the remaining modalities. We propose OVA-IB, an Information Bottleneck framework for arbitrary-modality alignment. OVA-IB optimizes a tractable One-vs-All contrastive lower bound for sufficiency connected to a Dual Total Correlation-style objective, uses a parameter-free geometry-aware projection score, and derives a tractable upper-bound regularizer for minimality by bounding each representation's dependence on its own input with representation distributions induced by the remaining modalities. Experiments on classification, regression, modality-agnostic evaluation, and cross-modal retrieval benchmarks demonstrate strong and robust performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出OVA-IB框架，基于信息瓶颈原理实现任意数量模态的对齐，通过One-vs-All对比下界、几何感知投影分数和可处理的上界正则化器，在多项任务上表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有的对比学习方法（如CLIP）只能处理两两模态对齐，无法显式建模多模态间的高阶依赖关系；而现有的超越两两方法缺乏一个原则性的准则来定义每个模态相对于其他模态应该保留或压缩什么信息。
AI.method: 基于信息瓶颈原则，提出One-vs-All视角：充分性保留其他模态可预测的信息，最小性压缩其他模态不支持的信息。优化包括：(1) One-vs-All对比下界（充分性）；(2) Dual Total Correlation目标；(3) 无参数的几何感知投影分数；(4) 可处理的上界正则化器（最小性）。
AI.result: 在分类、回归、模态无关评估和跨模态检索等基准上，OVA-IB展现出强且鲁棒的性能。
AI.conclusion: OVA-IB为任意数量模态的对齐提供了一个有理论依据的框架，有效解决了多模态对齐中信息保留与压缩的权衡问题。

title: VLA-Trace: Diagnosing Vision-Language-Action Models through Representation and Behavior Tracing
summary: Understanding how Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models transform multimodal knowledge into embodied control remains an open challenge. We present VLA-Trace, a progressive diagnostic framework that analyzes VLA models through a unified evidence chain from representation dynamics to causal control attribution and behavioral manifestation. It specifically combines cross-modal and checkpoint-drift centered kernel alignment (CKA) to trace representation evolution, attention knockout interventions to identify modality-specific control pathways, and rollout-level behavioral probes to examine grounding, shortcut dependence, and semantic following. Experiments on $π_{0.5}$ and OpenVLA reveal three key findings. First, the two models exhibit distinct modality-specific adaptation dynamics during VLA finetuning. Second, they rely on different multimodal routing strategies and layer-wise dependencies during action decoding. Third, although VLA policies excel at visually grounded trajectory generation, they remain limited in fine-grained semantic following. These findings highlight future directions for representation-preserving adaptation, causal VLA circuits, and compositional semantic control.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLA-Trace框架，通过表征演化分析、注意力干预和行为探针三大方法，系统诊断VLA模型如何将多模态知识转化为具身控制，发现不同模型在微调适应、多模态路由和语义遵循等方面存在显著差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对VLA模型如何将多模态知识转化为具身控制的理解尚不清晰，缺乏系统性的诊断框架来揭示其内部工作机制。
AI.method: 提出VLA-Trace渐进式诊断框架，包含三个环节：(1) 跨模态和检查点漂移的核对齐(CKA)追踪表征演化；(2) 注意力剔除干预识别模态特定控制路径；(3) rollout级行为探针检测 grounding、捷径依赖和语义遵循能力。
AI.result: 在π₀.₅和OpenVLA上的实验发现：(1) 两种模型在VLA微调中展现出不同的模态适应动态；(2) 它们在动作解码时依赖不同的多模态路由策略和层间依赖关系；(3) VLA策略擅长视觉引导的轨迹生成，但在细粒度语义遵循方面仍有限。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了VLA模型内部工作机制的差异，为表征保持适应、因果VLA电路和组合语义控制等未来研究方向提供了指导。

title: CommunityFact: A Dynamic, Multilingual, Multi-domain Benchmark for Misinformation Detection in the Wild
summary: Misinformation verification increasingly occurs in public, fast-moving, and multilingual online settings, where static benchmarks provide an incomplete measure of model reliability. We introduce CommunityFact, a refreshable benchmark for misinformation detection in the wild, with three major goals: coverage, granularity, and redistributability. This release contains 15,992 standalone claims across five languages and two domains. We evaluate ten LLMs under varying inference-time capabilities, including thinking and web-search. Our results show that closed-input verification remains challenging, web access yields the largest gains, and web-enabled LLMs' source-selection policies are systematically misaligned with the sources human Community Notes raters converge on -- a gap that closes through model-specific mechanisms of retrieval expansion or pruning. We further find substantial variation across language-domain slices and across the evidence ecosystems used by web-enabled systems. Beyond evaluation, CommunityFact positions Community Notes as a training signal for claim-conditioned source suggesters that could improve factual verification on novel claims.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了CommunityFact，一个可刷新的多语言 misinformation 检测基准，包含15,992条跨五语言两领域的独立声明。评估了10个LLM在不同推理能力下的表现，发现封闭输入验证仍具挑战性，联网搜索带来最大提升，但LLM的源选择策略与人类社区笔记评分员的判断存在系统性偏差。
AI.motivation: 现有静态基准无法全面衡量模型在公开、快速变化和多语言在线环境中的虚假信息检测可靠性，因此需要一个可刷新、覆盖广泛且粒度更细的基准。
AI.method: 构建了包含15,992条跨五语言（英、西、葡、印地、阿拉伯语）两领域（健康、政治）的独立声明基准CommunityFact；评估10个LLM，并引入思考（thinking）和联网搜索（web-search）两种推理能力。
AI.result: 1）封闭输入验证仍困难；2）联网搜索带来最大性能提升；3）联网LLM的源选择策略与人类社区笔记评分员不一致，但可通过检索扩展或剪枝来缩小差距；4）不同语言-领域切片及联网系统使用的证据生态存在显著差异。
AI.conclusion: CommunityFact不仅可用于评估，还可将社区笔记作为训练信号，训练声明条件化的源建议器，从而提升新声明的真实性验证能力。

title: Archon: A Unified Multimodal Model for Holistic Digital Human Generation
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. Project Page: https://zju3dv.github.io/archon/
summary: Digital humans are fundamental to immersive interaction, yet creating a unified model for holistic modalities, including text, audio, motion, and visual content, remains an open challenge. In this paper, we present Archon, a fully pretrained, human-centric unified multimodal model for holistic avatar generation. Archon unifies seven modalities with modality-specific tokenizers, and a native autoregressive unified multimodal model pretrained on synchronized modalities and 72 diverse tasks to model holistic joint distributions. To address the token explosion challenge in high-fidelity talking videos, we introduce a memory-efficient semantic video reparameterization, achieving 4x token reduction while preserving fine-grained dynamics, coupled with a semantic-driven video diffusion decoder. We further propose a "Thinking in Modality" that decomposes ambiguous cross-modal tasks into stepwise thinking in an alternative chain of modality, progressively enhancing fidelity and controllability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Archon achieves superior or comparable performance across diverse digital human generation tasks, validating the effectiveness of our unified framework. Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/archon/.

AI.tldr: Archon 是一个统一的多模态数字人生成模型，通过预训练整合文本、音频、动作和视觉等七种模态，并引入语义视频重参数化和"模态思维链"技术，在多种数字人生成任务上达到领先性能。
AI.motivation: 现有数字人模型缺乏统一框架来处理文本、音频、动作和视觉等多种模态，难以实现全模态的联合建模与生成。
AI.method: 1) 使用模态专用分词器统一七种模态；2) 提出语义视频重参数化实现4倍token缩减；3) 引入语义驱动视频扩散解码器；4) 提出"Thinking in Modality"方法，通过交替模态链逐步提升跨模态任务的保真度和可控性。
AI.result: 在多种数字人生成任务上达到最优或可比性能，验证了统一框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Archon证明了全预训练统一多模态模型在数字人全模态生成中的可行性与优越性，为沉浸式交互提供了基础框架。

title: Plan, Don't Pose: Long Composite Motion Generation with Text-Aligned BFM
summary: Text-to-motion (T2M) generation has broad applications in character animation, virtual avatars, and human-robot interaction. Existing methods typically generate pose trajectories or motion tokens directly from language, forcing a single model to handle semantic interpretation, long-horizon structure, and low-level physical realization. This coupling makes them costly and often unreliable for long, compositional, or semantically dense prompts. We propose Text2BFM, the first framework that aligns natural language with pretrained Behavioral Foundation Models (BFMs) for T2M generation without relying on heavy end-to-end motion generators. Text2BFM operates in the latent policy space of a frozen BFM, using it as an executable motion prior. A text-aligned variational behavioral bottleneck compresses BFM policy-latent sequences into compact motion representations that are compatible with language and preserve long-horizon behavioral structure. Generation is performed in this compact behavioral manifold with a lightweight conditional generator, and the resulting latent encoded behaviors are decoded into policy latents that drive the pretrained frozen BFM. By decoupling semantic planning from motion execution, Text2BFM achieves efficient, robust T2M generation and strong performance on long, compositional textual descriptions.

AI.tldr: 提出Text2BFM框架，利用预训练的行为基础模型（BFM）的潜在策略空间进行文本到运动生成，将语义规划与运动执行解耦，实现高效、鲁棒的长序列和组合性文本到运动生成。
AI.motivation: 现有T2M方法将语义理解、长程结构和底层物理实现耦合在单一模型中，导致处理长、组合或语义密集提示时成本高且不可靠。
AI.method: 在冻结BFM的潜在策略空间操作，使用文本对齐的变分行为瓶颈压缩策略潜在序列为紧凑运动表示，用轻量条件生成器在行为流形中生成，再解码为策略潜在驱动BFM。
AI.result: 在长序列和组合性文本描述上实现了高效、鲁棒的T2M生成，性能强劲。
AI.conclusion: 通过将语义规划与运动执行解耦，Text2BFM避免了端到端生成器的依赖，为T2M生成提供了更高效、可靠的范式。

title: Enhancing Multi-Agent Communication through Attention Steering with Context Relevance
summary: LLM-based multi-agent systems have demonstrated remarkable performance on complex tasks through collaborative reasoning. However, these systems tend to rapidly accumulate extremely long conversation histories during interaction. As conversations lengthen, relevant information is increasingly diluted by irrelevant context, leading to degraded performance. In this work, we present Agent-Radar, a training-free context management method that dynamically steers each agent's attention toward relevant context with a novel temporal and spatial decay mechanism. Our experiments demonstrate that Agent-Radar outperforms state-of-the-art methods across five different benchmarks, yielding gains of up to 7.64 absolute points. Furthermore, our analysis shows that Agent-Radar remains effective and robust as the number of agents and interaction rounds increases. Finally, the ablation study shows that core components in Agent-Radar are crucial to performance and generalizable in different settings.

AI.tldr: 提出Agent-Radar，一种无需训练的上下文管理方法，通过时空衰减机制动态引导多智能体系统关注相关上下文，在五个基准上提升达7.64个绝对点。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM多智能体系统在长对话中，相关信息被无关上下文稀释，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 提出Agent-Radar，一种无需训练的上下文管理方法，核心是新颖的时间与空间衰减机制，动态引导每个智能体关注相关上下文。
AI.result: 在五个不同基准上超越最先进方法，提升达7.64个绝对点；随着智能体数量和交互轮次增加仍保持有效性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: Agent-Radar的核心组件在不同设置下对性能至关重要且具有可推广性。

title: Knowing What to Solve Before How: Preplan Empowered LLM Mathematical Reasoning
summary: Current plan-based reasoning methods improve large language models (LLMs) by inserting a planning stage before execution, giving rise to the question $\rightarrow$ plan $\rightarrow$ cot paradigm. While effective, a closer examination reveals an inherent paradigm-level gap: both the planning and its execution stages decide how to solve a problem, while the prior question of what to solve; recognizing the problem type, the applicable tools, and the foreseeable pitfalls; remains entirely implicit. To bridge this gap, we propose PPC (Preplan-Plan-CoT), a framework that introduces an explicit problem-understanding stage, the preplan, yielding a new question $\rightarrow$ preplan $\rightarrow$ plan $\rightarrow$ cot paradigm. Realizing this paradigm requires safeguarding the conceptual integrity of preplan at both ends. Specifically, we design a three-stage synthesis pipeline with a spoiler-score detector that filters out leakage and spoiler failures to build clean preplan supervision, and a composite GRPO reward enforces that the generated plan genuinely follows from the preplan. Experiments across four backbones and five mathematical reasoning benchmarks show that PPC achieves the best results on 39 of 40 metrics, improving maj@16 and pass@16 by +2.23 and +3.06 over the strongest baseline without introducing additional inference token overhead.

AI.tldr: PPC是一个新的问题→预计划→计划→推理链范式，通过在计划和执行前加入显式的问题理解阶段（预计划），并设计了三阶段合成流程和复合GRPO奖励来确保预计划的完整性，在数学推理任务上显著优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有规划推理方法（问题→计划→推理链）存在范式级缺陷：计划和执行阶段解决"如何做"的问题，但"做什么"（识别问题类型、适用工具、潜在陷阱）仍完全隐式，缺乏显式的问题理解阶段。
AI.method: 提出PPC框架，包含：1) 三阶段合成流程，使用spoiler-score检测器过滤泄漏和spoiler失败以构建干净的预计划监督数据；2) 复合GRPO奖励机制，确保生成的计划真正遵循预计划；3) 形成问题→预计划→计划→推理链的新范式。
AI.result: 在4种骨干模型和5个数学推理基准上，PPC在40个指标中的39个上达到最优，maj@16和pass@16分别比最强基线提升+2.23和+3.06，且不增加额外推理token开销。
AI.conclusion: 显式引入预计划阶段弥补了现有规划推理范式的根本性缺陷，验证了"先理解问题再规划求解"的有效性，且高效无额外推理开销。

title: VPG: Visual Prefix Guidance for Autoregressive Image and Video Generation
summary: Autoregressive image and video generators are trained with teacher-forced histories but must sample from their own generated prefixes at inference time, making them vulnerable to exposure bias and prefix drift. Existing remedies either modify training or apply sampling-time guidance aimed primarily at external semantic conditions, such as class labels or text prompts, rather than testing whether a next-step prediction provides strong posterior support for the generated prefix itself. We propose Visual Prefix Guidance (VPG), a training-free inference-time guidance method for autoregressive image and video generation. VPG improves next-step prediction by contrasting the model's output under the generated prefix with its output under a corrupted prefix, then extrapolating logits toward candidates that strengthen the posterior support of the generated prefix. Across class-conditional image generation with VAR, text-to-image generation with Infinity, and text-to-video generation with InfinityStar, VPG improves generation quality without retraining the base model, reducing FID on VAR by 0.36 on average and improving benchmark performance on both image and video generation.

AI.tldr: 提出Visual Prefix Guidance (VPG)，一种无需训练、推理时使用的引导方法，通过对比生成前缀与破坏前缀的模型输出来改进自回归图像和视频生成中的下一步预测，有效缓解曝光偏差和前缀漂移问题。
AI.motivation: 自回归图像和视频生成模型在训练时使用教师强制，但推理时依赖自身生成的前缀，导致曝光偏差和前缀漂移问题。现有方法要么修改训练过程，要么主要依赖外部语义条件（如类别标签或文本提示）进行引导，而未关注当前预测是否支持已生成的前缀本身。
AI.method: 提出Visual Prefix Guidance (VPG)，一种训练无关的推理时间引导方法。通过对比模型在生成前缀和破坏前缀下的输出，将logits外推到能够增强生成前缀后验支持的候选方向上，从而改进下一步预测。
AI.result: 在类条件图像生成（VAR）、文生图（Infinity）和文生视频（InfinityStar）任务上均提升了生成质量，无需重新训练基础模型。VAR上的FID平均降低0.36，图像和视频生成的基准性能均有提升。
AI.conclusion: VPG作为一种简单有效的训练无关推理时引导方法，通过关注前缀的后验支持，能够在不重新训练模型的前提下，显著改善自回归图像和视频生成的质量，具有良好的通用性和实用性。

title: Reducing Experimental Testing in Space Propulsion Film Cooling Analyses by Pixelwise Generative Image Interpolation
comment: Presented at the 11th European Conference for Aeronautics and Aerospace Sciences (EUCASS), 2025, DOI: 10.13009/EUCASS2025-285
summary: We propose a machine learning approach for image regression from sparse experimental measurements. We show the application of the proposed method on film cooling studies in propulsion system development, aiming to reduce the need for extensive physical testing. Our method employs a lightweight feed-forward neural network with positional encoding to generate images conditioned by input parameters. Validated on real and synthetic data, it achieves high image similarity (RMSE < 8 %, SSIM > 93 %) while maintaining accuracy with a 30 \% reduction of measurements. We further propose a knowledge-informed extension for local adaptability of the generated images. This approach significantly reduces required tests while preserving high-quality data, enabling efficient optimization of coolant injector configurations with applications beyond aerospace.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的图像回归方法，通过轻量级前馈神经网络和位置编码，从稀疏实验测量中生成高质量图像，在推进系统气膜冷却研究中减少30%的测量需求，并保持高图像相似度（RMSE<8%，SSIM>93%）。
AI.motivation: 减少推进系统开发中气膜冷却研究所需的大量物理实验测试，通过机器学习方法从稀疏测量数据中重建图像，降低实验成本和时间消耗。
AI.method: 采用轻量级前馈神经网络结合位置编码，根据输入参数条件生成图像；并提出了知识增强扩展方法，提升生成图像的局部适应性。
AI.result: 在真实和合成数据上验证，RMSE低于8%，SSIM超过93%；在减少30%测量点的情况下仍保持准确度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法显著减少所需实验测试次数，同时保持高质量数据生成，可用于冷却剂喷射器配置的优化，应用前景可拓展至航空航天以外的领域。

title: Same Evidence, Different Answers: Canonical-Context On-Policy Distillation for Multi-Turn Language Models
summary: Large language models (LLMs) often solve a task when all instructions are given in a single prompt, but fail when the same information is revealed gradually across turns. When a clean FULL prompt and a RAW-SHARDED conversation contain the same complete user evidence, the model should still arrive at the same answer. We argue that a key reason for this gap is self-anchored drift: responses produced under partial information introduce unsupported assumptions, and those assumptions later distort the final answer. To reduce this effect, we propose Canonical-Context On-Policy Distillation (CCOPD). During training, the same base model is used in two roles: a frozen teacher conditioned on the clean FULL prompt and a trainable student that receives the same evidence incrementally through a multi-turn conversation; CCOPD aligns the student's behavior on its own trajectories with the teacher's canonical full-context behavior. Trained only on math problem conversations, CCOPD yields a 32\% average relative improvement in RAW-SHARDED performance over the original base model across math and five zero-shot out-of-domain task families, while largely preserving full-context performance. Further analyses suggest that CCOPD strengthens grounding in user evidence and reduces sensitivity to contamination from earlier assistant turns.

AI.tldr: LLM在单轮完整提示中能完成任务，但在逐轮信息揭示的多轮对话中表现不佳。作者提出CCOPD方法，通过蒸馏对齐训练，使模型在多轮对话中性能提升32%，同时保持完整提示下的表现。
AI.motivation: LLM在处理完整提示和逐步揭示信息的多轮对话时存在性能差距，作者认为关键原因在于"自我锚定漂移"——模型在部分信息下产生的响应包含未经证实的假设，这些假设后续扭曲了最终答案。
AI.method: 提出Canonical-Context On-Policy Distillation (CCOPD)，使用同一基础模型的两个角色：冻结的教师模型（基于完整提示）和可训练的学生模型（逐步接收信息）。通过在线策略蒸馏，将学生在自身轨迹上的行为与教师的完整上下文行为对齐。
AI.result: 在数学问题对话上训练后，CCOPD在零散信息对话中相较于原始基础模型平均提升32%，涵盖数学和五个零样本跨领域任务族，同时基本保持完整提示下的性能。
AI.conclusion: CCOPD增强了模型对用户证据的锚定，降低了对早期助手轮次污染的敏感性，有效缓解了多轮对话中的自我锚定漂移问题。

title: MonoPhysics: Estimating Geometry, Appearance, and Physical Parameters from Monocular Videos
summary: Existing inverse physics methods recover physical parameters from multi-view videos, where geometric constraints across views resolve scale and 3D structure. In monocular settings, however, such constraints are absent, leading to severe scale ambiguity, inaccurate geometry, and weak coupling between appearance optimization and physical simulation. We propose MonoPhysics, a framework for monocular inverse physics estimation of deformable objects using differentiable MPM simulation and 3D Gaussian Splatting, which jointly optimizes geometry, appearance, and physical parameters from a single camera view. We address these challenges through three visual-physical bridges: global scale alignment, physics-aware geometry refinement, and a differentiable position map, which together enable accurate optimization from monocular observations alone. We evaluate on Vid2Sim and our new dataset of elastic and plastic objects, showing that MonoPhysics outperforms existing baselines in monocular settings and achieves performance comparable to multi-view baselines using only a single camera. Our project page is available at https://daniel03c1.github.io/MonoPhysics/

AI.tldr: MonoPhysics是一个从单目视频中联合优化可变形物体几何、外观和物理参数的框架，通过三种视觉-物理桥梁解决单目设置中的尺度模糊和几何不准确问题，性能可与多视角方法媲美。
AI.motivation: 现有逆物理方法依赖多视角视频来恢复物理参数，但在单目设置中因缺乏几何约束，存在严重的尺度模糊、几何不准确、外观优化与物理模拟耦合弱的问题。
AI.method: 提出MonoPhysics框架，结合可微MPM模拟和3D高斯泼溅，通过三种视觉-物理桥梁（全局尺度对齐、物理感知几何精炼、可微位置映射）实现单目观测下的联合优化。
AI.result: 在Vid2Sim和新数据集（含弹性和塑性物体）上，MonoPhysics在单目设置中优于现有基线，且性能接近多视角方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过精心设计的视觉-物理桥梁，单目逆物理估计可以达到与多视角方法相当的性能，显著降低了数据采集要求。

title: Midpoint Generative Models
summary: We introduce Midpoint Generative Models (MGM), a principled framework for training one-step generative models. MGM is based on a simple symmetry of Flow Matching with linear interpolation: when the two endpoint distributions coincide, the corresponding drift field vanishes at the midpoint time, $t=1/2$. We show that the norm of this field defines a valid discrepancy between distributions, which we call the Midpoint Divergence. We extend this discrepancy beyond the midpoint by introducing randomly flipped interpolations and further generalize it by replacing deterministic linear Flow Matching interpolations with symmetric stochastic interpolants, yielding a generalized Midpoint Divergence. Finally, we derive a variational formulation of our generalized divergence, yielding a tractable objective for training a one-step generator. The resulting MGM algorithm offers an effective and theoretically grounded approach to generative modeling, achieving competitive performance against existing one-step generative modeling methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Midpoint Generative Models (MGM)，一种基于Flow Matching中点对称性训练一步生成模型的框架，通过中点散度作为分布差异度量，并推广至随机插值，实现高效的一步生成。
AI.motivation: 传统生成模型通常需要多步采样，效率较低。作者希望利用Flow Matching中线性插值的对称性，在t=1/2中点处漂移场为零的性质，构建一种新的分布差异度量，从而训练一步生成模型，兼顾理论严谨性和计算效率。
AI.method: 1) 提出Midpoint Divergence，利用Flow Matching线性插值中当两端分布相同时中点漂移场为零的性质，定义该场的范数为分布差异；2) 引入随机翻转插值，将中点散度扩展到任意时间点；3) 用对称随机插值替代确定性线性插值，进一步推广为广义中点散度；4) 推导广义散度的变分形式，得到可训练的一步生成目标函数。
AI.result: MGM在一步生成建模任务上取得了与现有方法相竞争的性能，验证了该框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MGM提供了一种理论上严谨且实用的一步生成模型训练框架，通过中点对称性将Flow Matching与一步生成有机结合，为高效生成建模开辟了新路径。

title: Anchorless Diversification for Parallel LLM Ideation
summary: LLMs are increasingly used to generate candidate-idea pools for creative tasks where broad exploration is valuable. Parallel inference can be attractive in this setting when it broadens the pool while retaining quality and cost efficiency. We study inference-time controls for candidate-pool diversification, asking whether anchorless methods can rival methods that depend on observed seed ideas. Across three creative task families, we compare independent generation and semantic direction stratification with self-, peer-, and representative-anchor baselines, under neutral and population-referential divergent instructions. Population-referential divergence is a strong low-cost baseline, increasing semantic diversity while preserving quality proxies. Semantic direction stratification is stronger: a single planning call organizes generations across broad semantic directions, yielding the best diversity--quality--compute frontier. Anchored regeneration can be strong in final-pool diversity, but its advantage shrinks under full-pipeline token accounting. These results establish practical anchorless baselines for open-ended LLM ideation.

AI.tldr: 研究在创意生成任务中，无锚点方法（如语义方向分层）能够在保持质量和成本效率的同时，比依赖种子想法的锚点方法实现更好的候选池多样化。
AI.motivation: LLM越来越多用于创意生成，如何在不依赖种子想法的情况下高效生成多样化、高质量的候选创意池是一个关键问题。
AI.method: 比较了独立生成、语义方向分层与自锚点、同伴锚点、代表锚点等基线方法，在三种创意任务族中，分别在中性和群体参考发散指令下进行评估。
AI.result: 群体参考发散是强低成本基线；语义方向分层表现最强，在多样性-质量-计算成本前沿最优；锚点方法的优势在考虑完整token预算后缩小。
AI.conclusion: 建立了无需锚点的实用基线，为开放式的LLM创意生成提供了更高效、多样化的实践方案。

title: How LoRA Remembers? A Parametric Memory Law for LLM Finetuning
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) must continuously learn and update knowledge to remain effective in dynamic real-world environments. While Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is widely used for such memory updates, existing studies mainly rely on qualitative downstream evaluations, leaving the quantitative capacity limits and underlying dynamics of exact parametric memory largely unexplored. To bridge this gap, we employ LoRA as a controlled memory capacity probe within the latent space to systematically quantify exact parametric memory. We introduce the Parametric Memory Law, a robust power law linking loss reduction Delta L to effective parameters and sequence length. At the token level, fine-grained analysis reveals a deterministic phase transition, demonstrating that a prediction probability of p > 0.5 constitutes a sufficient condition for verbatim recall under greedy decoding. Driven by these insights, we introduce MemFT, a threshold-guided optimization strategy that dynamically redistributes the training budget toward sub-threshold tokens. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that MemFT can enhance memory fidelity and efficiency. Code will be released at https://github.com/zjunlp/ParametricMemoryLaw.

AI.tldr: 本文通过LoRA作为记忆容量探针，量化了大语言模型的参数记忆能力，提出了参数记忆定律（幂律关系），发现了预测概率p>0.5是贪婪解码下逐字回忆的充分条件，并据此设计了MemFT优化策略以提升记忆保真度和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对LLM通过LoRA进行记忆更新的定量容量限制和参数记忆的动态机制缺乏深入探索，主要依赖定性下游评估。
AI.method: 将LoRA作为可控记忆容量探针，在潜空间中系统量化精确参数记忆；提出参数记忆定律（Delta L与有效参数和序列长度的幂律关系）；在token级别进行细粒度分析，发现确定性相变（p>0.5是贪婪解码下逐字回忆的充分条件）；提出MemFT阈值引导优化策略，动态重新分配训练预算到低于阈值的token。
AI.result: MemFT能够提升记忆保真度和效率；实验验证了参数记忆定律的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文量化了LLM的精确参数记忆能力，揭示了其内在动态规律，并提出了有效的记忆优化策略MemFT。

title: Veda: Scalable Video Diffusion via Distilled Sparse Attention
summary: Scaling Diffusion Transformers to generate high-resolution, long videos is constrained by the quadratic cost of self-attention, and existing sparse attention methods degrade under high sparsity. We show empirically that generation quality is determined not by the sparsity ratio itself, but by how well the sparse mask aligns with the tile-wise geometry of full attention. Based on this insight, we propose Veda, a distilled sparse attention framework that formulates tile selection as an explicit reconstruction problem from full attention. Veda integrates statistics-aware tile scoring with head-aware tiling to reduce estimation error and structural mismatch, enabling aggressive sparsity. A hardware-efficient tile-skipping kernel converts theoretical sparsity into practical wall-clock speedups. Experiments on large video diffusion models, including Waver and Wan2.1, demonstrate substantial acceleration with no noticeable degradation in generation quality. To generate 720P 10-second videos on Waver-T2V-12B, Veda achieves a 5.1$\times$ end-to-end speedup and a 10.5$\times$ self-attention speedup, reducing attention overhead from 92% to 50%. Notably, the gains increase with sequence length, indicating that Veda scales favorably with spatiotemporal resolution across models.

AI.tldr: Veda提出蒸馏稀疏注意力框架，通过 tile 选择重建全注意力几何结构，实现高效长视频扩散模型加速，在 Waver-T2V-12B 上达到 5.1× 端到端加速，且随序列长度增益增大。
AI.motivation: 扩散 Transformer 生成高分辨率长视频时，自注意力的二次复杂度成为瓶颈。现有稀疏注意力方法在高稀疏率下质量严重下降，亟需一种既能实现高稀疏比又能保持生成质量的注意力加速方案。
AI.method: 提出 Veda 蒸馏稀疏注意力框架，将 tile 选择建模为从全注意力的显式重建问题；集成统计感知的 tile 评分与头感知 tile 划分以减少估计误差和结构失配；设计硬件高效的 tile 跳过内核将理论稀疏性转化为实际加速。
AI.result: 在 Waver-T2V-12B 上，720P 10秒视频生成实现 5.1× 端到端加速、10.5× 自注意力加速，注意力开销从 92% 降至 50%，且加速比随序列长度增加而增大。
AI.conclusion: 生成质量的关键不在于稀疏比本身，而在于稀疏掩码与全注意力 tile 级几何结构的对齐程度。Veda 通过显式重建 tile 选择实现了高稀疏比下的高质量生成与实用加速。

title: A Triple-Modal Contrastive Learning Framework with Sequence, Graph, and 3D Features for Drug-Target Interaction Prediction
summary: Accurate prediction of drug-target interactions (DTI) is critical for drug discovery. Existing methods often rely on single-modal representations (e.g., sequences or graphs) or combine only two modalities, overlooking 3D structural features. To address this challenge, we propose TriMod-DTI, a triple-modal contrastive learning framework that incorporates 1D sequences, 2D graphs, and 3D structures of drugs and proteins, obtaining the universal and complementary feature representations for DTI prediction. We design a Feature Extractor to capture drug and target features across the three modalities, thereby enriching their representations. We further propose a triple-modal contrastive learning strategy to align different modal representations of the same drug or protein in the latent space. By constructing cross-modal positive and negative sample pairs, this approach enhances the model's discriminative ability. Experiments on three benchmark datasets demonstrate that TriMod-DTI outperforms state-of-the-art methods. The ablation studies validate the contributions of each modality. Moreover, case studies highlight its practical potential for DTI prediction and drug discovery.

AI.tldr: TriMod-DTI是一个三重模态对比学习框架，融合药物和靶标的1D序列、2D图和3D结构信息，在多模态对齐下提升DTI预测性能，在多个基准数据集上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有DTI预测方法多依赖单一模态或仅结合两种模态，忽视了3D结构特征，导致特征表示不完整。
AI.method: 提出TriMod-DTI框架，包含三部分：1) Feature Extractor提取药物和靶标在1D序列、2D图和3D结构三种模态下的特征；2) 三重模态对比学习策略，通过构建跨模态正负样本对，对齐相同药物/靶标的不同模态表示；3) 整合多模态特征进行DTI预测。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上，TriMod-DTI优于现有最先进方法；消融实验验证了每种模态的贡献；案例研究展示了其在DTI预测和药物发现中的实际应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 融合三种模态（1D、2D、3D）并通过对齐策略获取通用且互补的特征表示，能显著提升DTI预测的准确性，为药物发现提供了有效的新工具。

title: Temporal Stability and Few-Shot Prompting in Math Task Assessment
summary: As AI tools become increasingly integrated into educational contexts, questions arise about both their stability over time and their responsiveness to prompt engineering techniques. This longitudinal study focused on different AI tools' ability to use the Task Analysis Guide (TAG; Stein \& Smith, 1998) to classify the cognitive demand of mathematics tasks. In particular, it examined whether this classification ability changed with (1) model version updates over time and (2) few-shot prompting using exemplar tasks. We tested a general-purpose AI tool (Gemini) and an education-specific AI tool (Coteach). The specific tools were selected because of their relatively high performance on relevant published benchmarks and prior task-specific tests. Models were tested at baseline, retested with model version updates, and then tested again using few-shot prompting (two exemplar tasks for each cognitive demand category). Results revealed that newer model versions alone produced mixed effects: Gemini's accuracy remained stable at 58\%, while Coteach's accuracy decreased from 75\% to 50\%. However, few-shot prompting improved both models' performance: Gemini increased to 67\% and Coteach recovered to 75\% accuracy. These findings demonstrate that prompt engineering techniques can have larger and more reliable effects than passive model improvements, and that version updates may not always improve performance on specialized educational tasks. The study has important implications for how educators and researchers should approach AI tool selection, evaluation, and implementation in educational contexts.

AI.tldr: 本研究纵向考察了AI工具（Gemini和Coteach）在数学任务认知需求分类上的稳定性与提示工程响应性。结果显示，仅模型版本更新效果不一（Gemini稳定58%，Coteach从75%降至50%），而少样本提示显著提升性能（Gemini升至67%，Coteach恢复75%），表明提示工程技术比被动模型更新更可靠。
AI.motivation: 探究AI工具在教育场景中随时间推移的稳定性，以及它们对提示工程技术的响应能力，为教育者和研究者在AI工具的选择、评估和实施提供指导。
AI.method: 纵向研究设计：对通用AI工具（Gemini）和教育专用AI工具（Coteach）进行基线测试，随后在模型版本更新后重新测试，最后运用少样本提示（每个认知需求类别提供两个示例任务）再次测试其分类能力。
AI.result: 1) 仅模型版本更新：Gemini准确率保持58%不变，Coteach从75%下降至50%。2) 少样本提示：Gemini提升至67%，Coteach恢复至75%。提示工程技术效果更大更可靠。
AI.conclusion: 提示工程技术的效果优于被动模型更新；版本更新不一定能提升教育专业任务的性能；教育工作者应重视提示工程策略而非单纯依赖模型升级。

title: Loong: A Human-Like Long Document Translation Agent with Observe-and-Act Adaptive Context Selection
summary: Document-level translation remains one of the most challenging tasks for large language models, which are constrained by limited context windows that impede global cohesion, while simultaneously suffering from redundant contextual information that degrades translation quality. To address this, we propose a human-like long document translation agent called Loong, which leverages a 3E memory module (Essence-Exemplar-Entity) to store summaries, sentence pairs, and entity records as historical context. Instead of passively attending to all history, Loong performs deep reasoning to adaptively identify the optimal context for translation guidance. Loong optimizes its context policy through reinforcement learning, utilizing preference data derived from its own sampled observe-and-act reasoning trajectories. Empirical evaluations demonstrate that Loong achieves substantial translation quality improvements in English $\Leftrightarrow$ Chinese, German, and French directions, with average gains of up to 13.0 points across the three evaluation metrics. Furthermore, Loong exhibits strong generalization across domains and robustness against contextual noise, while maintaining remarkable stability in ultra-long document translation. Our code is released at https://github.com/YutongWang1216/LoongDocMT.

AI.tldr: Loong是一种模仿人类的长文档翻译智能体，通过3E记忆模块（摘要-范例-实体）存储历史上下文，利用强化学习优化上下文选择策略，在英⇄中、德、法翻译任务上平均提升13.0分，并展现出良好的泛化性和鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 解决大语言模型在文档级翻译中面临的矛盾：有限的上下文窗口导致全局连贯性不足，而冗余上下文信息又会降低翻译质量。
AI.method: 提出Loong翻译智能体，包含1）3E记忆模块（Essence-Exemplar-Entity）存储摘要、句对和实体记录；2）深度推理机制自适应识别最优上下文；3）基于自身采样推理轨迹的偏好数据，通过强化学习优化上下文策略。
AI.result: 在英⇄中、德、法翻译方向上，三项评估指标平均提升13.0分；展现出跨领域泛化能力和对上下文噪声的鲁棒性，在超长文档翻译中稳定性优异。
AI.conclusion: Loong通过模仿人类翻译者的选择性注意力机制，有效解决了长文档翻译中全局连贯性与上下文冗余之间的矛盾，为文档级翻译提供了新范式。

title: Supercharging Thermal Gaussian Splatting with Depth Estimation
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures. Accepted and will be published in ISPRS proceedings (ISPRS Congress 2026)
summary: Efficient and robust 3D scene representation is crucial in autonomous driving, robotics, and related fields. While RGB images provide valuable content for 3D reconstruction, other modalities like thermal or depth can enable additional information on the environment. Lately, novel view synthesis methods like 3D Gaussian Splatting have started using multiple modalities to further boost their performance. But fusing or combining multimodal data can make the process slower and can bring in additional challenges. Therefore, our project aims to use single modality based on thermal infrared domain, by removing the reliance on visible light as much as possible. This single modality can be expected to be faster as it does not rely on multimodal data. We propose a method, Thermal-to-Depth Gaussian Splatting (TDg), that uses only thermal images and depth estimation in its architecture to derive the radiance fields. Our TDg method outperforms the MSMG (Multiple Single-Modal Gaussians) baseline in most cases on our test datasets, RGBT-Scenes and ThermalMix. On average, the rendering quality metrics such as learned perceptual image patch similarity (LPIPS), structural similarity index measure (SSIM), and peak signal-to-noise ratio (PSNR) of TDg are 1.12%, 0.034%, and 0.01% better than the baseline MSMG values. It also reduces the training time significantly, by 12 mins 47 secs (55% improvement). Overall, our method is successful in deriving these thermal radiance fields, which can ultimately have several applications, such as identifying heat sources critical in surveillance, search or rescue operations, and industrial inspections where temperature is widely used to monitor machines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Thermal-to-Depth Gaussian Splatting (TDg)方法，仅使用热红外单模态图像结合深度估计来构建3D辐射场，无需多模态数据融合。在RGBT-Scenes和ThermalMix数据集上，TDg在渲染质量(LPIPS、SSIM、PSNR)上均优于MSMG基线，并将训练时间缩短55%。该方法可应用于监控、搜救和工业检测等场景。
AI.motivation: 现有的多模态3D重建方法（如结合RGB、热红外、深度等）虽然性能提升，但融合多模态数据会导致速度变慢并引入额外挑战。作者希望通过仅使用热红外单模态，摆脱对可见光的依赖，实现更高效、更快速的3D场景表征。
AI.method: 提出TDg方法，仅使用热红外图像和深度估计作为输入，基于3D Gaussian Splatting框架推导辐射场。通过单模态（热红外）替代传统多模态融合策略，简化流程并提升效率。
AI.result: 在RGBT-Scenes和ThermalMix数据集上，TDg在LPIPS、SSIM、PSNR上分别比MSMG基线提升1.12%、0.034%和0.01%；训练时间减少12分47秒（55%改进）。
AI.conclusion: 成功证明了仅用热红外单模态即可有效推导辐射场，为需要温度信息的关键应用（如监控、搜救、工业检测）提供了实用且高效的解决方案。

title: Treatment-Conditioned Diffusion for Forecasting Neurodegenerative Disease Progression
summary: Forecasting the progression of neurodegenerative diseases, such as Parkinson's disease, is essential for effective long-term planning and personalized therapeutic intervention. Existing systems typically produce scalar clinical scores that ignore the rich structure of longitudinal neuroimaging, while traditional generative approaches suffer from a loss of anatomical details and blurring subtle progression patterns. To address this, we introduce a novel treatment-conditioned diffusion framework that predicts high-fidelity future brain states by conditioning the generative process on patients' screening DaTscan images and levodopa equivalent daily dose over one year.
